Joshua12:19 eze Madon, otù; eze Hezoa, otù;" 
Joshua12:20 eze Shimron-meron, otù; eze Akshaf, otù;" 
Joshua12:21 eze Teanak, otù; eze Megido, otù;" 
Joshua12:22 eze Kedesh, otù; eze Jọkneam nime Kamel, otù;" 
Joshua12:23 eze Doa n'ebe di elu nke Doa, otù; eze Goim nime Gilgal, otù;" 
Joshua12:24 eze Tiaza, otù: eze ahu nile di orú na iri na otù." 
Joshua13:1 Ma Joshua ghọrọ agadi, ubọchi ndu-ya nāgwu; Jehova we si ya, I ghọwo agadi, ubọchi ndu-gi nāgwu, ma ala nke riri nne nke-uku fọduru inweta." 
Joshua13:2 Nka bu ala nke fọduru: buruburu-ala nile nke ndi Filistia, na ndi Geshua nile;" 
Joshua13:3 site na Shaihoa ahu, nke di n'iru Ijipt, we rue ókè-ala Ekron n'akuku Ugwu, ndi Kenean ka aguru ya nye: ndi-isi ise nke ndi Filistia; ndi Geza, na ndi Ashdod, na ndi Ashkelon, na ndi Gat, na ndi Ekron; ndi Avim kwa," 
Joshua13:4 site na Ndida: ala nile nke ndi Kenean, na Meara nke ndi Zaidon nwe, rue Efek, rue ókè-ala ndi-Amorait:" 
Joshua13:5 na ala ndi Gebal, na Lebanon nile, n'ọwuwa-anyanwu, site na Beal-gad n'okpuru ugwu Heamon rue nbata Hemat:" 
Joshua13:6 ndi nile bi n'ugwu site na Lebanon rue Mizrefot-maim, bú ndi Zaidon nile; Mu onwem nānapu ha ala-ha n'iru umu Israel: nání me ka ọ dayere Israel n'ihe-nketa, dika M'nyeworo gi iwu." 
Joshua13:7 Ma ub͕u a kère ebo iteghete na nkera ebo Manase ala nka n'ihe-nketa. 
Joshua13:8 Ndi Reuben na ndi Gad soro ya nara ihe-nketa-ha, nke Moses nyere ha, n'ofè Jọdan n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu, dika Moses, bú orù Jehova, nyere ha;" 
Joshua13:9 site n'Aroea, nke di n'usọ ndagwurugwu Anon, na obodo nke di n'etiti ndagwurugwu ahu, na ala di lari nile nke Medeba rue Dibon;" 
Joshua13:10 na obodo nile nke Saihon, bú eze ndi-Amorait, onye buri eze nime Heshbon, rue ókè-ala umu Amon;" 
Joshua13:11 na Gilead, na ókè-ala ndi Geshua na ndi Meakat, na ugwu Heamon nile, na Beshan nile rue Saleka;" 
Joshua13:12 ala-eze nile nke Og nime Beshan, onye buri eze n'Ashtarot na n'Edrei (onye ahu fọduru site na ndi fọduru nke Refaim); Moses we tib͕ue ha, napu ha ala-ha." 
Joshua13:13 Ma umu Israel anapughi ndi Geshua na ndi Meakat ala-ha: Geshua na Meakat we biri n'etiti umu Israel, rue ta." 
Joshua13:14 Nání ebo Livai ka ọ nēnyeghi ihe-nketa; àjà-ọku nile nke Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, nke ahu bu ihe-nketa-ya, dika Ọ gwara ya okwu." 
Joshua13:15 Moses we nye ebo umu Reuben dika ab͕uru nile ha si di. 
Joshua13:16 Ókè-ala ha nwere we di site n'Aroea, nke di n'usọ ndagwurugwu Anon, na obodo nke di n'etiti ndagwurugwu ahu, na ala di lari nile nke di n'akuku Medeba;" 
Joshua13:17 Heshbon, na obodo-ya nile nke di n'ala di lari; Dibon, na Bamot-beal, na Bet-beal-meon;" 
Joshua13:18 na Jehaz, na Kedimot, na Mefaat;" 
Joshua13:19 na Kiriataim, na Sibma, na Zeret-shaha n'ugwu ndagwurugwu ahu;" 
Joshua13:20 na Bet-peoa, na nkpọrube nile nke Pisga, na Bet-jeshimot;" 
Joshua13:21 na obodo nile nke ala di lari, na ala-eze nile nke Saihon, bú eze ndi-Amorait, onye buri eze nime Heshbon, onye Moses tib͕uru, ya na ndi-isi Midian, bú Evi, na Rekem, na Zua, na Hua, na Reba, ndi bu ndi-isi nke Saihon, ndi bi n'ala ahu." 
Joshua13:22 Umu Israel were kwa mma-agha b͕ue Belam nwa Beoa, bu onye nāju ase, n'etiti ndi ha b͕uru." 
Joshua13:23 Òkè-ala umu Reuben we buru Jọdan, na ókè-ala-ya. Nka bu ihe-nketa umu Reuben dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, obodo nile na obodo ntà nile ha." 
Joshua13:24 Moses we nye ebo Gad, bú umu Gad, dika ab͕uru nile ha si di." 
Joshua13:25 Ókè-ala-ha we buru Jeza, na obodo nile nke Gilead, na nkera ala umu Amon, rue Aroea nke di n'iru Raba;" 
Joshua13:26 site kwa na Heshbon rue Remat-mizpe, na Betonim; site kwa na Mahanaim rue ókè-ala Debia;" 
Joshua13:27 na nime ndagwurugwu ahu, Bet-heram, na Bet-nimra, na Sukot, na Zafon, bú nke fọduru nke ala-eze Saihon, bú eze Heshbon, Jọdan na ókè-ala-ya, rue nsọtu oké osimiri Kineret n'ofè Jọdan n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu." 
Joshua13:28 Nka bu ihe-nketa umu Gad dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, obodo nile na obodo ntà nile ha." 
Joshua13:29 Moses we nye nkera ebo Manase ihe-nketa: ọ we diri nkera ebo umu Manase dika ab͕uru nile ha si di. 
Joshua13:30 Ókè-ala-ya we di site na Mahanaim, Beshan nile, ala-eze nile nke Og, bú eze Beshan, na ebe-obibi nile nke Jaia, nke di na Beshan, ọgu obodo atọ:" 
Joshua13:31 nkera Gilead, na Ashtarot, na Edrei, bú obodo ala-eze Og nime Beshan, we diri umu Makia nwa Manase, diri nkera umu Makia dika ab͕uru nile ha si di." 
Joshua13:32 Ndia bu ndi Moses mere ka ha keta ihe n'ala ihe nādighi nke Moab, n'ofè Jọdan n'akuku Jeriko, n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu." 
Joshua13:33 Ma Moses enyeghi ebo Livai ihe-nketa: Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, bu ihe-nketa-ha, dika Ọ gwara ha okwu." 
Joshua14:1 Ma ndi bu ihe nke umu Israel ketara n'ala Kenean, ndi Eleeza, bú onye-nchu-àjà, na Joshua nwa Nun, na ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna nke ebo nile nke umu Israel, mere ka ha keta;" 
Joshua14:2 n'ifè-nzà ka ihe-nketa-ha di, dika Jehova nyere iwu n'aka Moses, bayere ebo iteghete ahu, baye-kwa-ra nkera ebo ahu." 
Joshua14:3 N'ihi na Moses nyere ihe-nketa nke ebo abua na nkera ebo ahu n'ofè Jọdan: ma o nyeghi ndi Livai ihe-nketa n'etiti ha. 
Joshua14:4 N'ihi na umu Josef bu ebo abua, bú Manase na Efraim: ha enyeghi kwa ndi Livai òkè n'ala ahu, ma-ọbughi obodo ufọdu ibi obi, ha na ebe-ita-nri-ha nke diri anu-ulo-ha na àkù ha kpatara." 
Joshua14:5 Dika Jehova nyere Moses iwu, otú a ka umu Israel mere, ha we kè ala ahu." 
Joshua14:6 Umu Juda we biarue nso Joshua nime Gilgal: Keleb nwa Jefune, bú onye-Kenizait, we si ya, Gi onwe-gi amawo okwu Jehova gwara Moses, bú onye nke Chineke, bayerem, baye-kwa-ra gi, nime Kedesh-banea." 
Joshua14:7 Ọgu arọ abua ka m'b͕ara mb͕e Moses, bú orù Jehova, si na Kedesh-banea zipum iledo ala nka; m'we weghachiri ya okwu dika o si di n'obim." 
Joshua14:8 Ma umu-nnem ndi mu na ha rigoro mereka obi lọ ndi Israel miri: ma mu onwem sozuru Jehova, bú Chinekem, n'azu." 
Joshua14:9 Moses we ṅua iyi n'ubọchi ahu, si, Ala nke i zọkwasiri ukwu aghaghi iburu gi na umu-gi ihe-nketa rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi, n'ihi na i sozuwo Jehova, bú Chinekem, n'azu." 
Joshua14:10 Ma ub͕u a, le, Jehova emewo ka m'di ndu, dika O kwuru, ọgu arọ abua na ise ndia, site na mb͕e Jehova gwara Moses okwu a, mb͕e Israel jere ije n'ọzara: ma ub͕u a, le, mu onwem b͕ara ọgu arọ anọ na ise ta." 
Joshua14:11 Rue ub͕u a m'di ike ta dika m'di n'ubọchi Moses zigaram: dika ikem si di mb͕e ahu, otú a ka ikem di kwa ub͕u a, ibu agha, na ipu apu, na ibata abata." 
Joshua14:12 Ma ub͕u a, nyem ugwu a, nke Jehova kwuru okwu bayere ya n'ubọchi ahu; n'ihi na i nuru n'ubọchi ahu na ndi Anak nọ n'ebe ahu, na obodo di uku nke ewusiri ike: eleghi anya Jehova gānọyerem, m'gānapu kwa ha ala-ha, dika Jehova kwuru." 
Joshua14:13 Joshua we gọzie ya; ọ we nye Keleb nwa Jefune Hebron ibu ihe-nketa. 
Joshua14:14 N'ihi nka Hebron we ghọrọ Keleb nwa Jefune, bú onye-Kenizait, ihe-nketa, rue ta; n'ihi na o sozuru Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, n'azu." 
Joshua14:15 Ma aha Hebron na mb͕e gara aga bu Kiriat-aba; onye dikarisiri uku n'etiti ndi Anak ka Aba ahu bu. Ala ahụ we rapu ibu agha, di jū." 
Joshua15:1 Ife-nzà nke mara ebo umu Juda dika ab͕uru nile ha si di we dirue ókè-ala Edom, rue ọzara Zin n'akuku Ndida, na nsọtu Ndida." 
Joshua15:2 Ókè-ala Ndida nke ha nwere we di site na nsọtu Oké Osimiri Nnú, site n'ọnu-miri nke nēche iru na Ndida:" 
Joshua15:3 o we pua rue akuku Ndida nke nrigo Akrabim, gabiga rue Zin, rigo n'akuku Ndida nke Kedesh-banea, gabiga Hezron, rigorue Ada, b͕a buruburu rue Kaka:" 
Joshua15:4 o we gabiga rue Azmon, pua na miri-iyi Ijipt; ọpupu ókè-ala ahu we di n'oké osimiri: nka gāburu unu ókè-ala Ndida." 
Joshua15:5 Ókè-ala ọwuwa-anyanwu we buru Oké Osimiri Nnú, rue nsọtu Jọdan. Ókè-ala akuku Ugwu we site n'ọnu-miri nke oké osimiri ahu na nsọtu Jọdan:" 
Joshua15:6 ókè-ala ahu we rigo rue Bet-họgla, gabiga n'akuku Ugwu nke Bet-araba; ókè-ala ahu we rigo rue nkume Bohan nwa Reuben:" 
Joshua15:7 ókè-ala ahu we rigo rue Debia site na ndagwurugwu Ekoa, ga n'akuku Ugwu, nēche Gilgal iru, nke di na ncherita-iru nrigo Adumim, nke di n'akuku Ndida nke miri-iyi ahu: ókè-ala ahu we gabiga rue miri En-shemesh, ọpupu-ya we dirue En-rogel:" 
Joshua15:8 ókè-ala ahu we rigo na ndagwurugwu nwa Hinom rue akuku ndi Jebus n'akuku Ndida (ndida ahu bu Jerusalem): ókè-ala ahu we rigo rue elu ugwu ahu nke di n'iru ndagwurugwu Hinom n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu, nke di na nsọtu ndagwurugwu Refaim n'akuku Ugwu:" 
Joshua15:9 ewe kpa ókè-ala ahu site n'elu ugwu rue isi-iyi miri Neftoa, ọ we pua rue obodo nile nke ugwu Efron; ewe kpa ókè-ala ahu rue Beala (nke ahu bu Kiriat-jearim):" 
Joshua15:10 ókè-ala ahu we b͕a buruburu site na Beala ga n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu, rue ugwu Sia, we gabiga rue akuku ugwu Jearim n'Ugwu (nke ahu bu Kesalon), rida rue Bet-shemesh, gabiga Timna:" 
Joshua15:11 ókè-ala ahu we pua rue akuku Ekron n'akuku Ugwu: ewe kpa ókè-ala ahu rue Shikeron, o we gabiga rue ugwu Beala, we pua na Jabneel; ọpupu ókè-ala ahu di n'oké osimiri." 
Joshua15:12 Ókè-ala Ọdida-anyanwu we di rue oké osimiri uku ahu, na ókè-ala-ya. Nka bu ókè-ala umu Juda buruburu, dika ab͕uru nile ha si di." 
Joshua15:13 Ọ nye-kwa-ra Keleb Jefune òkè n'etiti umu Juda, dika okwu-ọnu Jehova gwara Joshua si di, bú Kiriat-aba; Aba bu nna Anak (nke ahu bu Hebron)." 
Joshua15:14 Keleb we si n'ebe ahu napu umu-ndikom Anak atọ, bú Sheshai, na Ahiman, na Talmai, umu Anak, ala-ha." 
Joshua15:15 Ọ we si n'ebe ahu rigo imegide ndi bi na Debia: ma aha Debia na mb͕e gara aga bu Kiriat-sefa. 
Joshua15:16 Keleb we si, Onye ahu nke gētib͕u Kiriat-sefa, were ya, m'gēnye kwa ya Aksa, bú nwam nwayi, na nwunye." 
Joshua15:17 Ọtniel nwa Kenaz, nwa-nne Keleb, we were ya: o we nye ya Aksa, bú nwa-ya nwayi, na nwunye." 
Joshua15:18 O rue, mb͕e Aksa biara, na ọ kpaliri di-ya iriọ ubi n'aka nna-ya: Aksa si n'inyinya-ibu-ya rida; Keleb we si ya, Gini ka i nāchọ?" 
Joshua15:19 Ọ si, Nyem ngọzi; n'ihi na ọ bu ala Negeb ka i nyeworom, nyekwam isi miri ufọdu. Ọ we nye ya isi miri di n'elu, na isi miri di n'okpuru." 
Joshua15:20 Nka bu ihe-nketa nke ebo umu Juda dika ab͕uru nile ha si di. 
Joshua15:21 Obodo nke di na nsọtu ebo umu Juda nwere n'akuku ókè-ala Edom nime Negeb bu Kabzeel, na Ida, na Jagua;" 
Joshua15:22 na Kina, na Dimona, na Adada;" 
Joshua15:23 na Kedesh, na Hezoa, na Itnan;" 
Joshua15:24 na Zif, na Telem, na Bealot;" 
Joshua15:25 na Hezoa-hadata, na Keriot-hezron (nke ahu bu Hezoa);" 
Joshua15:26 na Amam, na Shema, na Molada;" 
Joshua15:27 na Haza-gada, na Heshmon, na Bet-pelet;" 
Joshua15:28 na Haza-shual, na Bia-sheba, na Biziotia;" 
Joshua15:29 na Beala, na Iyim, na Ezem;" 
Joshua15:30 na Eltolad, na Kesil, na Họma;" 
Joshua15:31 na Ziklag, na Madmana, na Sansana;" 
Joshua15:32 na Lebaot, na Shilhim, na Ain, na Rimon: obodo nile di orú na iteghete, ha na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua15:33 N'ebe di ala ala, Eshtaol, na Zọra, na Ashna;" 
Joshua15:34 na Zanoa, na En-ganim, na Tapua, na Inam;" 
Joshua15:35 na Jamut, na Adulam, na Soko, na Azeba;" 
Joshua15:36 na Shaaraim, na Aditaim, na Gedira, na Gedirotaim; obodo iri na anọ na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua15:37 Zenan, na Hadasha, na Migdal-gad;" 
Joshua15:38 na Dilan, na Mizpe, na Jọkteel;" 
Joshua15:39 na Lekish, na Bọzkat, na Eglon;" 
Joshua15:40 na Kabon, na Lahmam, na Kitlish;" 
Joshua15:41 na Gedirot, na Bet-degon, na Neama, na Makeda; obodo iri na isi na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua15:42 Libna, na Eta, na Ashan;" 
Joshua15:43 na Ifta, na Ashna, na Nezib;" 
Joshua15:44 na Keila, na Akzib, na Marisha; obodo iteghete na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua15:45 Ekron, na umu-obodo-ya na obodo ntà ya nile:" 
Joshua15:46 site n'Ekron we rue oké osimiri, obodo nile nke di n'akuku Ashdod, na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua15:47 Ashdod, na umu-obodo-ya na obodo ntà ya nile; Geza, na umu-obodo-ya na obodo ntà ya nile; rue miri-iyi Ijipt, na oké osimiri uku ahu, na ókè-ala-ya." 
Joshua15:48 N'ugwu kwa, Shamia, na Jatia, na Soko;" 
Joshua15:49 na Dana, na Kiriat-sana (nke ahu bu Debia);" 
Joshua15:50 na Anab, na Eshtemo, na Anim;" 
Joshua15:51 na Goshen, na Holon, na Gailo; obodo iri na otù na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua15:52 Arab, na Duma, na Eshan;" 
Joshua15:53 na Janim, na Bet-tapua, na Afika;" 
Joshua15:54 na Humta, na Kiriat-aba (nke ahu bu Hebron), na Zioa; obodo iteghete na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua15:55 Maon, na Kamel, na Zif, na Juta;" 
Joshua15:56 na Jesreel; na Jokdeam, na Zanoa;" 
Joshua15:57 na Kain, na Gibea, na Timna; obodo iri na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua15:58 Halhul, na Bet-zua, na Gedoa;" 
Joshua15:59 na Maarat, na Bet-anot, na Eltekon; obodo isi na obdo ntà ha." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriat-beal (nke ahu bu Kiriat-jearim), na Raba; obodo abua na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua15:61 N'ọzara, Bet-araba, na Midin, na Sekaka;" 
Joshua15:62 na Nibshan, na Obodo Nnú, na En-gedi; obodo isi na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua15:63 Ma ndi Jebus, ndi bi na Jerusalem, umu Juda apughi inapu ha ala-ha: ndi Jebus we biri n'etiti umu Juda nime Jerusalem, rue ta." 
Joshua16:1 Ife-nzà nke mara umu Josef siri na Jọdan pua Jeriko, na miri Jeriko n'ọwuwa-anyanwu, bú ọzara ahu, nēsi na Jeriko rigo n'ugwu rue Bet-el;" 
Joshua16:2 o si na Bet-el pua rue Luz, gabiga rue ókè-ala ndi-Akait rue Atarot;" 
Joshua16:3 ọ rida n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu rue ókè-ala ndi-Jafletait, rue ókè-ala Bet-horon di n'okpuru, rue Gezea: ọpupu-ya we di n'oké osimiri." 
Joshua16:4 Umu Josef, bú Manase na Efraim, we keta nke ha." 
Joshua16:5 Ókè-ala umu Efraim, dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, we di otú a: ókè-ala nke ihe-nketa-ha n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu bu Atarot-ada, rue Bet-horon di n'elu;" 
Joshua16:6 ókè-ala ahu we pua n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu na Mikmetat n'Ugwu; ókè-ala ahu we b͕a buruburu n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu, rue Taanat-shailo, we gabiga ya n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu Janoa;" 
Joshua16:7 o si na Janoa rida rue Atarot, ru kwa Naarah, metu Jeriko, we pua na Jọdan." 
Joshua16:8 Ókè-ala ahu siri na Tapua je n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu rue miri-iyi Kena; ọpupu-ya we di n'oké osimiri. Nka bu ihe-nketa nke ebo umu Efraim dika ab͕uru nile ha si di; 
Joshua16:9 tiyere obodo nile akpaputara umu Efraim n'etiti ihe-nketa nke umu Manase, obodo ahu nile na obodo ntà nile ha." 
Joshua16:10 Ma ha anapughi ndi Kenean ndi bi na Gezea ala-ha: ndi Kenean we biri n'etiti Efraim, rue ta, ghọ ndi nēfè òfùfè orù." 
Joshua17:1 Ife-nzà nke mara ebo Manase di kwa: n'ihi na ya onwe-ya bu ọkpara Josef. Ọ diri Makia ọkpara Manase, bú nna Gilead, n'ihi na onye ahu bu onye-agha, o we nwe Gilead na Beshan." 
Joshua17:2 Ife-nzà di kwa nke mara umu Manase fọduru dika ab͕uru nile ha si di; ọ diri umu Abieza, di-kwa-ra umu Hilek, di-kwa-ra umu Asriel, di-kwa-ra umu Shekem, di-kwa-ra umu Hifa, di-kwa-ra umu Shemida: ndia bu umu-ndikom Manase nwa Josef dika ab͕uru nile ha si di." 
Joshua17:3 Ma Zelọfehad, nwa Hifa, nwa Gilead, nwa Makia, nwa Manase, enweghi umu-ndikom, ma ọ nwere umu-ndinyom: ndia bu kwa aha umu-ya ndinyom, Mahla, na Noa, na Họgla, na Milka, na Tiaza." 
Joshua17:4 Ha we biarue nso n'iru Eleeza, bú onye-nchu-àjà, na n'iru Joshua nwa Nun, na n'iru ndi-isi, si, Jehova nyere Moses iwu inye ayi ihe-nketa n'etiti umu-nne-ayi: o we nye ha ihe-nketa n'etiti umu-nne nna-ha dika okwu-ọnu Jehova si di." 
Joshua17:5 Òkè iri we dabara Manase, nāgughi ala Gilead na Beshan, nke di n'ofè Jọdan;" 
Joshua17:6 n'ihi na umu-ndinyom Manase ketara ihe-nketa n'etiti umu-ya ndikom: ala Gilead kwa, umu-ndikom Manase fọduru nwere ya." 
Joshua17:7 Ókè-ala Manase we si n'Asha rue Mikmetat, nke di n'iru Shekem; ókè-ala ahu we je rue aka-nri, rue ndi bi n'En-tapua." 
Joshua17:8 Manase nwe ala Tapua: ma umu Efraim nwe Tapua rue ókè-ala Manase. 
Joshua17:9 Ókè-ala ahu we rida rue miri-iyi Kena, n'akuku Ndida nke miri-iyi ahu: obodo ndia ka Efraim nwere n'etiti obodo Manase: ókè-ala Manase we di n'akuku Ugwu miri-iyi ahu, ọpupu-ya we di n'oké osimiri:" 
Joshua17:10 n'akuku Ndida ọ diri Efraim, ma n'akuku Ugwu ọ diri Manase, oké osimiri bu kwa ókè-ala-ya; ha we metu Asha n'Ugwu, metu kwa Isaka n'ọwuwa-anyanwu." 
Joshua17:11 Manase nwekwara obodo n'Isaka na n'Asha, bú Bet-shean na umu-obodo-ya, na Ibleam na umu-obodo-ya, na ndi bi na Doa na umu-obodo-ya, na ndi bi na En-doa na umu-obodo-ya, na ndi bi na Teanak na umu-obodo-ya, na ndi bi na Megido na umu-obodo-ya, bú ebe di elu atọ ahu." 
Joshua17:12 Ma umu Manase apughi inapu ndi bi n'obodo ahu ala-ha; ma ndi Kenean jisiri ike ibiri n'ala ahu. 
Joshua17:13 O rue, mb͕e umu Israel di ike, na ha tiyere ndi Kenean n'ifè-òfùfè, ma ha anapusighi ha ala-ha." 
Joshua17:14 Umu Josef we gwa Joshua okwu, si, Gini mere i nyeworom otù ihe-ife-nzà na otù òkè n'ihe-nketa; ma mu onwem bu ndi bara uba, n'ihi na Jehova agọziwom rue ub͕u a?" 
Joshua17:15 Joshua we si ha, Ọ buru ndi bara uba ka i bu, rigorue oké ọhia n'onwe-gi, b͕utu-kwa-ra onwe-gi n'ebe ahu n'ala ndi-Perizait na Refaim; ebe ugwu Efraim diri gi nkpa." 
Joshua17:16 Umu Josef we si, Ugwu a ezughi ayi: ma ub͕ọ-ala ígwè di n'aka ndi Kenean nile ndi bi n'ala ndagwurugwu, ma ndi bi na Bet-shean na umu-obodo-ya, ma ndi bi na Jezreel." 
Joshua17:17 Joshua we gwa ulo Josef, bú Efraim na Manase, okwu, si, Ndi bara uba ka i bu, ọ bu kwa ike uku ka i nwere: i gaghi-enwe nání otù ihe-ife-nzà:" 
Joshua17:18 n'ihi na ugwu ahu ka i gēnwe; n'ihi na oké ọhia ka ọ bu, i gēb͕utu kwa ya, i gēnwe kwa ọpupu-ya nile: n'ihi na i gānapu ndi Kenean ala-ha, ọ bu ezie na ha nwere ub͕ọ-ala ígwè, ọ bu kwa ezie na ndi di ike ka ha bu." 
Joshua18:1 Nzukọ nile nke umu Israel we kpọkọta onwe-ha na Shailo, ma ulo-ikwū nzute n'ebe ahu: ewe buda ala ahu n'iru ha." 
Joshua18:2 Ebo asa we fọdu n'etiti umu Israel, ndi anēkeghi ihe-nketa-ha." 
Joshua18:3 Joshua we si umu Israel, Rùe ole mb͕e ka unu onwe-unu gābu ndi-ume-ngwu ibà inweta ala ahu, nke Jehova, bú Chineke nke nna-unu-hà, nyeworo unu?" 
Joshua18:4 Doronu onwe-unu ndikom atọ inọrọ ebo ọ bula: m'gēziga kwa ha, ha gēbili kwa, jegharia n'ala nka, de ya n'akwukwọ dika ihe-nketa-ha si di; ha gābiakutekwam." 
Joshua18:5 Ha gēkè kwa ya òkè asa: Juda gēguzo n'ókè-ala-ya na Ndida, ulo Josef gēguzo kwa n'ókè-ala-ha n'Ugwu." 
Joshua18:6 Unu onwe-unu gēde kwa ala ahu n'akwukwọ n'òkè asa, wetaram akwukwọ ahu n'ebe a: m'gēfe-kwa-ra unu nzà n'ebe a n'iru Jehova, bú Chineke-ayi." 
Joshua18:7 N'ihi na ndi Livai enweghi òkè n'etiti unu; n'ihi na ọlu-nchu-àjà Jehova bu ihe-nketa-ha: Gad na Reuben na nkera ebo Manase anarawo kwa ihe-nketa-ha n'ofè Jọdan n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu, nke Moses, bú orù Jehova nyere ha." 
Joshua18:8 Ndikom ahu we bilie, je: Joshua we nye ndi nēje ide ala ahu n'akwukwọ iwu, si, Jenu, jegharia n'ala nka, de ya n'akwukwọ, laghachikutem, m'gēfe-kwa-ra unu nzà n'ebe a n'iru Jehova, nime Shailo." 
Joshua18:9 Ndikom ahu we je, gabiga n'ala ahu, de ya n'akwukwọ dika obodo nile si di n'òkè asa, ha we biakute Joshua rue ọmuma-ulo-ikwū nime Shailo." 
Joshua18:10 Joshua we fere ha nzà nime Shailo n'iru Jehova: Joshua we kère umu Israel ala n'ebe ahu dika esi kè ha n'òkè n'òkè. 
Joshua18:11 Ife-nzà nke ebo umu Benjamin we puta dika ab͕uru nile ha si di; ókè-ala nke ihe-ife-nzà-ha we puta n'etiti umu Juda na umu Josef. 
Joshua18:12 Ókè-ala ha nwere n'akuku Ugwu we site na Jọdan; ókè-ala ahu we rigo rue akuku Jeriko n'Ugwu, rigo kwa n'ugwu n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu; ọpupu-ya di kwa n'ọzara Bet-even." 
Joshua18:13 Ókè-ala ahu we si n'ebe ahu gabiga rue Luz, rue akuku Luz (nke ahu bu Bet-el), n'akuku Ndida; ókè-ala ahu we rida rue Atarot-ada, n'elu ugwu nke di na Ndida nke Bet-horon di n'okpuru." 
Joshua18:14 Ewe kpa ókè ahu, o we b͕a buruburu rue akuku Ọdida-anyanwu n'akuku Ndida, site n'ugwu nke di n'iru Bet-horon n'akuku Ndida; ọpupu-ya di kwa na Kiriat-beal (nke ahu bu Kiriat-jearim), bú obodo umu Juda: nka bu akuku Ọdida-anyanwu." 
Joshua18:15 Akuku Ndida we site na nsọtu Kiriat-jearim, ókè-ala ahu we pua n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu, pua rue isi-iyi miri Neftoa:" 
Joshua18:16 ókè-ala ahu we rida rue nsọtu ugwu ahu nke di n'iru ndagwurugwu nwa Hinom, nke di na ndagwurugwu Refaim n'akuku Ugwu; ọ rida rue ndagwurugwu Hinom, rue akuku ndi Jebus n'akuku Ndida, we rida rue En-rogel;" 
Joshua18:17 ewe kpa ókè-ala ahu n'Ugwu, ọ pua n'En-shemesh, pu kwa rue Gelilot, nke di na ncherita-iru nrigo Adumim; ọ rida rue nkume Bohan nwa Reuben;" 
Joshua18:18 ọ gabiga rue akuku na ncherita-iru Araba n'akuku Ugwu, we rida rue Araba:" 
Joshua18:19 ókè-ala ahu we gabiga rue akuku Bet-họgla n'akuku Ugwu: ọpupu ókè-ala ahu di kwa n'ọnu-miri Ugwu nke Oké Osimiri Nnú, na nsọtu Ndida nke Jọdan; nka bu ókè-ala Ndida." 
Joshua18:20 Jọdan bu kwa ókè-ala-ya n'akuku Iru-anyanwu. Nka bu ihe-nketa umu Benjamin, dika ókè-ala-ya nile si di buruburu dika ab͕uru nile ha si di." 
Joshua18:21 Ma obodo ebo umu Benjamin nwere dika ab͕uru nile ha si di bu Jeriko, na Bet-họgla, na Emek-keziz;" 
Joshua18:22 na Bet-araba, na Zemaraim, na Bet-el;" 
Joshua18:23 na Avim, na Para, na Ọfra;" 
Joshua18:24 na Kefa-amoni, na Ọfni, na Geba; obodo iri na abua na obodo ntà ha:" 
Joshua18:25 na Gibeon, na Rema, na Beirot;" 
Joshua18:26 na Mizpeh, na Kefira, na Moza;" 
Joshua18:27 na Rekem, na Iapeel, na Tarala;" 
Joshua18:28 na Zela, na Elef, na ndi Jebus (nke ahu bu Jerusalem), na Gibeat, na Kiriat; obodo iri na anọ na obodo ntà ha. Nka bu ihe-nketa umu Benjamin dika ab͕uru nile ha si di." 
Joshua19:1 Ife-nzà nke-abua we putara Simeon, bú ebo umu Simeon dika ab͕uru nile ha si di: ihe-nketa-ha di n'etiti ihe-nketa umu Juda." 
Joshua19:2 Ha we nwe n'ihe-nketa-ha Bia-sheba, ma-ọbu Sheba, na Molada;" 
Joshua19:3 na Haza-shual, na Bala, na Ezem;" 
Joshua19:4 na Eltolad, na Betul, na Họma;" 
Joshua19:5 na Ziklag, na Bet-makabot, na Haza-susa;" 
Joshua19:6 na Bet-lebaot, na Sharuhen; obodo iri na atọ na obodo ntà ha:" 
Joshua19:7 na Ain, na Rimon, na Eta, na Ashan; obodo anọ na obodo ntà ha:" 
Joshua19:8 na obodo ntà nile nke di obodo ndia buruburu rue Bealat-bia, bú Rema nke Negeb. Nka bu ihe-nketa nke ebo umu Simeon dika ab͕uru nile ha si di." 
Joshua19:9 Site n'òkè umu Juda ka ihe-nketa umu Simeon di: n'ihi na òkè umu Juda riri nne kari ha: umu Simeon we keta ihe n'etiti ihe-nketa-ha. 
Joshua19:10 Ife-nzà nke-atọ we putara umu Zebulun dika ab͕uru nile ha si di: ókè-ala ihe-nketa-ha we di rue Sarid: 
Joshua19:11 ókè-ala-ha we rigo n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu, ru kwa Marala, we metu Dabeshet, metu kwa miri-iyi nke di n'iru Jọkneam;" 
Joshua19:12 o si na Sarid chigharia n'akuku Iru-anyanwu n'ọwuwa-anyanwu rue ókè-ala Kislot-teboa; ọ pua rue Daberat, we rigo rue Jafia;" 
Joshua19:13 o si n'ebe ahu gabiga n'akuku Iru-anyanwu n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu rue Gat-hefa, rue Et-kazin; ọ pua na Rimon, nke akpara rue Nea;" 
Joshua19:14 ókè-ala ahu we b͕a ya buruburu n'Ugwu rue Hanaton: ọpupu-ya di kwa na ndagwurugwu Ifta-el; 
Joshua19:15 na Katat, na Nahalal, na Shimron, na Idala, na Bet-lehem: obodo iri na abua na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua19:16 Nka bu ihe-nketa umu Zebulun dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, obodo ndia na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua19:17 Ife-nzà nke-anọ we putara Isaka, bú umu Isaka dika ab͕uru nile ha si di." 
Joshua19:18 Ókè-ala-ha we rue Jezreel, na Kesulot, na Shunem;" 
Joshua19:19 na Hafaraim, na Shion, na Anaharat;" 
Joshua19:20 na Rabit, na Kishion, na Ebez;" 
Joshua19:21 na Remet, na En-ganim, na En-hada, na Bet-pazez:" 
Joshua19:22 ókè-ala ahu we metu Teboa, na Shahazuma, na Bet-shemesh; ọpupu ókè-ala-ha di kwa na Jọdan: obodo iri na isi na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua19:23 Nka bu ihe-nketa ebo umu Isaka dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, obodo ahu na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua19:24 Ife-nzà nke-ise we putara ebo umu Asha dika ab͕uru nile ha si di. 
Joshua19:25 Ókè-ala-ha we buru Helkat, na Hali, na Beten, na Akshaf;" 
Joshua19:26 na Alamelek, na Amad, na Mishal; ọ metu Kamel n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu, metu kwa Shaihoa-libnat;" 
Joshua19:27 ọ we chigharia n'ọwuwa-anyanwu rue Bet-degon, we metu Zebulun, metu kwa ndagwurugwu Ifta-el n'akuku Ugwu rue Bet-emek na Neiel; ọ pua rue Kabul n'aka-ekpe," 
Joshua19:28 na Ebron, na Rehob, na Hamon, na Kena, we rue Zaidon bara uba;" 
Joshua19:29 ókè-ala ahu we chigharia rue Rema, ru kwa obodo ahu ewusiri ike, bú Taia; ókè-ala ahu we chigharia rue Hosa; ọpupu-ya di kwa n'oké osimiri site na Hebel rue Akzib:" 
Joshua19:30 na Uma, na Efek, na Rehob: orú obodo na abua na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua19:31 Nka bu ihe-nketa nke ebo umu Asha dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, obodo ndia na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua19:32 Ọ bu umu Naftali ka ife-nzà nke-isi putara, bú umu Naftali dika ab͕uru nile ha si di." 
Joshua19:33 Ókè-ala-ha we site na Helef, site n'osisi terebinth nime Zaananim, na Adami-nekeb, na Jabneel, rue Lakum; ọpupu-ya we di na Jọdan:" 
Joshua19:34 ókè-ala ahu we chigharia n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu rue Aznot-teboa, si n'ebe ahu pua rue Hukok; ọ metu Zebulun na Ndida, metu kwa Asha n'Ọdida-anyanwu, metu kwa Juda n'akuku Jọdan n'ọwuwa-anyanwu." 
Joshua19:35 Obodo ewusiri ike bu Zidim, na Zea, na Hamat, na Rakat, na Kineret;" 
Joshua19:36 na Adama, na Rema, na Hezoa;" 
Joshua19:37 na Kedesh, na Edrei, na En-hezoa;" 
Joshua19:38 na Iron, na Migdal-el, na Horem, na Bet-anat, na Bet-shemesh; obodo iri na iteghete na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua19:39 Nka bu ihe-nketa nke ebo umu Naftali dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, obodo nile na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua19:40 Ọ bu ebo umu Dan dika ab͕uru nile ha si di ka ife-nzà nke-asa putara. 
Joshua19:41 Ókè-ala ihe-nketa-ha we buru Zọra, na Eshtaol, na Ia-shemesh;" 
Joshua19:42 na Shaalabin na Ajalon, na Itla;" 
Joshua19:43 na Ilon, na Timna, na Ekron;" 
Joshua19:44 na Elteke, na Gibeton, na Bealat;" 
Joshua19:45 na Jihud, na Bene-berak, na Gat-rimon;" 
Joshua19:46 na Me-jakon, na Rakon, tiyere ókè-ala di na ncherita-iru Jafo." 
Joshua19:47 Ókè-ala umu Dan we si n'ebe ha nọ pua: umu Dan we rigo, buso Leshem agha, were ya, were ọnu mma-agha tib͕ue ya, ha we nweta ya, biri nime ya, we kpọ Leshem, Dan, dika aha Dan, bú nna-ha, si di." 
Joshua19:48 Nka bu ihe-nketa ebo umu Dan dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, obodo ndia na obodo ntà ha." 
Joshua19:49 Ha we mesia ka eketa ala ahu dika ókè-ala-ya nile si di; umu Israel we nye Joshua nwa Nun ihe-nketa n'etiti ha: 
Joshua19:50 n'okwu-ọnu Jehova ka ha nyere ya obodo ahu nke ọ riọrọ, bú Timnat-sera n'ugwu Efraim: o wue obodo ahu, biri nime ya." 
Joshua19:51 Ndia bu ihe-nketa, nke Eleeza, bú onye-nchu-àjà, na Joshua nwa Nun, na ndi-isi ulo ndi bu nna ebo umu Israel, mere ka eketa n'ife-nzà nime Shailo n'iru Jehova, n'ọnu-uzọ ulo-ikwū nzute. Ha we kebìe ala ahu." 
Joshua20:1 Jehova we gwa Joshua okwu, si," 
Joshua20:2 Gwa umu Israel okwu, si, Wezugara onwe-unu obodo nb͕abà ahu, nke M'gwara unu okwu bayere ha n'aka Moses:" 
Joshua20:3 ka ob͕u-madu onye nētib͕u madu n'ọghọm nāmaghi ama we b͕alaga n'ebe ahu: ha gābu-kwa-ra unu ebe-nb͕abà ipu n'aka onye-ọ́bọ̀ ọbara. 
Joshua20:4 Ọ gāb͕alaga kwa n'otù nime obodo ahu, guzo n'oghere ọnu-uzọ-ama obodo ahu, kwue okwu-ya nile na nti ndi-okenye obodo ahu; ha gākpọbata kwa ya n'obodo tiyere onwe-ha, nye ya ọnọdu, ka o we biri n'etiti ha." 
Joshua20:5 Ma mb͕e onye-ọ́bọ̀ ọbara gāchu ya n'azu, ha agaghi ekwe ka ob͕u-madu ahu ba n'aka-ya; n'ihi na ọ bu n'amaghi-ama ka o tib͕uru madu-ibe-ya, ma ọ kpọghi ya asì na mb͕e gara aga." 
Joshua20:6 O gēbi kwa n'obodo ahu, rue mb͕e o gēguzo n'iru nzukọ Israel ka ekpe ya ikpe, rue ọnwu onye-isi-nchu-àjà nke gānọ na mb͕e ahu: mb͕e ahu ob͕u-madu ahu gālaghachi, ba n'obodo-ya, ba kwa n'ulo-ya, rue obodo ahu nke o si n'ebe ahu b͕alaga." 
Joshua20:7 Ha we do obodo ndia nsọ, bú Kedesh nime Galili, n'ugwu Naftali, na Shekem n'ugwu Efraim, na Kiriat-aba (nke ahu bu Hebron) n'ugwu Juda." 
Joshua20:8 N'ofè Jọdan n'akuku Jeriko n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu ha nye-kwa-ra Beza n'ọzara n'ala di lari site n'ebo Reuben, na Remot nime Gilead site n'ebo Gad, na Golan nime Beshan site n'ebo Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Ndia bu obodo akara àkà bayere umu Israel nile, baye-kwa-ra ọbìa nke nānọ dika ọbìa n'etiti ha, ka onye ọ bula nke nētib͕u madu n'ọghọm we b͕alaga n'ebe ahu, ghara kwa onwu n'aka onye-ọ́bọ̀ ọbara, rue mb͕e ọ gēguzo n'iru nzukọ Israel." 
Joshua21:1 Ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna ndi Livai we biarue nso Eleeza, bú onye-nchu-àjà, biaru kwa nso Joshua nwa Nun, biaru kwa nso ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna nke ebo nile nke umu Israel;" 
Joshua21:2 ha we gwa ha okwu nime Shailo n'ala Kenean, si, Jehova nyere iwu n'aka Moses inye ayi obodo ufọdu ayi gēbi, ha na ebe-ita-nri-ha nke gādiri anu-ulo-ayi." 
Joshua21:3 Umu Israel we si n'ihe-nketa-ha nye ndi Livai, dika okwu-ọnu Jehova si di, obodo ndia na ebe-ita-nri-ha." 
Joshua21:4 Ife-nzà we putara ab͕uru nile nke ndi Kohat: umu Eron, bú onye-nchu-àjà, ndi sitere na ndi Livai, we nwe obodo iri na atọ sitere n'ebo Juda, site kwa n'ebo ndi Simeon, site kwa n'ebo Benjamin, n'ife-nzà." 
Joshua21:5 Umu Kohat fọduru we nwe obodo iri sitere n'ab͕uru nile nke ebo Efraim, site kwa n'ebo Dan, site kwa na nkera ebo Manase, n'ife-nzà." 
Joshua21:6 Umu Giashon we nwe obodo iri na atọ sitere n'ab͕uru nile nke ebo Isaka, site kwa n'ebo Asha, site kwa n'ebo Naftali, site kwa na nkera ebo Manase nime Beshan, n'ife-nzà." 
Joshua21:7 Umu Merari dika ab͕uru nile ha si di we nwe obodo iri na abua sitere n'ebo Reuben, site kwa n'ebo Gad, site kwa n'ebo Zebulun." 
Joshua21:8 Umu Israel we nye ndi Livai obodo ndia na ebe-ita-nri-ha n'ife-nzà, dika Jehova nyere iwu n'aka Moses." 
Joshua21:9 Ha we si n'ebo umu Juda, si kwa n'ebo umu Simeon, nye obodo ndia nke akpọrọ ha n'aha n'ebe a:" 
Joshua21:10 ha we diri umu Eron, ndi sitere n'ab͕uru ndi Kohat, ndi sitere n'umu Livai: n'ihi na ha ka ife-nzà mbu diri." 
Joshua21:11 Ha we nye ha Kiriat-aba, nna Anak ka Aba ahu bu, (nke ahu bu Hebron,) n'ugwu Juda, ya na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile buruburu ya." 
Joshua21:12 Ma ọhia nke obodo ahu, na obodo ntà ya nile, ka ha nyere Keleb nwa Jefune n'ihe-onwunwe-ya." 
Joshua21:13 Umu Eron, bú onye-nchu-àjà, ka ha nyere Hebron na ebe-ita-nri-ya, bú obodo nb͕abà nke ob͕u-madu, na Libna na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
Joshua21:14 na Jatia na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Eshtemoa na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile," 
Joshua21:15 na Holon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Debia na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
Joshua21:16 na Ain na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Juta na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Bet-shemesh na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile; obodo iteghete site n'ebo abua ahu." 
Joshua21:17 Site kwa n'ebo Benjamin, Gibeon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Geba na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
Joshua21:18 na Anatot na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Almon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile: obodo anọ." 
Joshua21:19 Obodo nile nke umu Eron, bú ndi-nchu-àjà, di obodo iri na atọ na ebe-ita-nri-ha." 
Joshua21:20 Ab͕uru nile nke umu Kohat, bú ndi Livai, bú ndi fọduru site n'umu Kohat, ha nwere obodo ife-nzà-ha site n'ebo Efraim." 
Joshua21:21 Ha we nye ha Shekem na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile n'ugwu Efraim, bú obodo nb͕abà nke ob͕u-madu, na Gezea na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
Joshua21:22 na Kibzaim na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Bet-horon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile; obodo anọ." 
Joshua21:23 Site kwa n'ebo Dan, Elteke na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Gibeton na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
Joshua21:24 na Ajalon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Gat-rimon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile; obodo anọ." 
Joshua21:25 Site kwa na nkera ebo Manase, Tanak na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Gat-rimon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile; obodo abua." 
Joshua21:26 Obodo nile di iri, ha na ebe-ita-nri-ha, bú nke diri ab͕uru umu Kohat fọduru." 
Joshua21:27 Ha nye-kwa-ra umu Giashon, ndi sitere n'ab͕uru ndi Livai, Golan nime Beshan na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, bú obodo nb͕abà nke ob͕u-madu; na Be-eshtera na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, site na nkera ebo Manase; obodo abua." 
Joshua21:28 Site kwa n'ebo Isaka, Kishion na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Daberat na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
Joshua21:29 na Jamut na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na En-ganim na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, obodo anọ." 
Joshua21:30 Site kwa n'ebo Asha, Mishal na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Abdon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
Joshua21:31 na Helkat na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Rehob na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile; obodo anọ." 
Joshua21:32 Site kwa n'ebo Naftali, Kedesh nime Galili na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, bú obodo nb͕abà nke ob͕u-madu, na Hamot-doa na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Katan na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile; obodo atọ." 
Joshua21:33 Obodo nile nke ndi Giashon, dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, di obodo iri na atọ na ebe-ita-nri-ha." 
Joshua21:34 Ha nye-kwa-ra ab͕uru nile nke umu Merari, bú Livai fọduru, Jokneam na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile; na Kata na ebe-ita-nri ya nile," 
Joshua21:35 na Dimna na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Nahalal na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, sitere n'ebo Zebulun; obodo anọ." 
Joshua21:36 Site kwa n'ebo Reuben, Beza na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Jehaz na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile," 
Joshua21:37 na Kedimot na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Mefaat na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile; obodo anọ." 
Joshua21:38 Site n'ebo Gad, Remot nime Gilead na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, bú obodo nb͕abà nke ob͕u-madu, na Mahanaim na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
Joshua21:39 na Heshbon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Jeza na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile; obodo ahu nile di anọ." 
Joshua21:40 Obodo ahu nile diri umu Merari dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, bú ndi fọduru site n'ab͕uru nile nke ndi Livai; ihe-ife-nzà-ha we di obodo iri na abua." 
Joshua21:41 Obodo nile nke ndi Livai n'etiti ihe-onwunwe umu Israel di ọgu obodo abua na asatọ na ebe-ita-nri-ha. 
Joshua21:42 Obodo ndia di otú a, obodo ọ bula na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile buruburu ya: otú a ka ọ diri obodo ndia nile." 
Joshua21:43 Jehova we nye Israel ala ahu nile nke Ọ ṅuru iyi inye ndi bu nna-ha; ha we nweta ya, we biri nime ya." 
Joshua21:44 Jehova we me ka ha zuru ike buruburu, dika ihe nile si di nke Ọ ṅuru ndi bu nna-ha iyi: ọ dighi kwa nwoke ọ bula n'etiti ndi-iro-ha nile guzoro n'iru ha; ndi-iro-ha nile ka Jehova nyere n'aka-ha." 
Joshua21:45 Ọ dighi ihe ọ bula dapuru n'ezi ihe nile nke Jehova gwara ulo Israel; ha nile mere. 
Joshua22:1 Mb͕e ahu Joshua kpọrọ ndi Reuben, kpọ kwa ndi Gad, kpọ kwa nkera ebo Manase," 
Joshua22:2 si ha, Unu onwe-unu edebewo ihe nile nke Moses, bú orù Jehova, nyere unu n'iwu, unu egewo kwa nti olum n'ihe nile m'nyere unu n'iwu:" 
Joshua22:3 unu arapughi umu-nne-unu ọtutu ubọchi ndia rue ta, ma unu edebewo ihe-ndebe nke ihe Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, nyere n'iwu." 
Joshua22:4 Ma ub͕u a Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, emewo ka umu-nne-unu zuru ike, dika Ọ gwara ha okwu: ub͕u a kwa chigharianu, jerue ulo-ikwū-unu n'onwe-unu, rue ala ihe-onwunwe-unu, nke Moses, bú orù Jehova, nyere unu n'ofè Jọdan." 
Joshua22:5 Nání, lezienu anya nke-ọma ime ihe enyere n'iwu na iwu ahu, nke Moses, bú orù Jehova, nyere unu n'iwu, ihu Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, n'anya, na ije íjè n'uzọ-Ya nile, na idebe ihe nile O nyere n'iwu, na irapara n'aru Ya, na iwere obi-unu nile na nkpuru-obi-unu nile fè Ya òfùfè." 
Joshua22:6 Joshua we gọzie ha, zilaga ha: ha we jerue ulo-ikwū-ha." 
Joshua22:7 Ma nkera ebo Manase ka Moses nyere ihe-nketa nime Beshan: ma Joshua nyere nkera-ya ọzọ ihe-nketa n'etiti umu-nne-ha n'ofè Jọdan n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu. Ọzọ kwa, mb͕e Joshua zilagara ha n'ulo-ikwū-ha, ọ gọzie ha," 
Joshua22:8 gwa ha okwu, si, Werenu ọtutu àkù laghachi n'ulo-ikwū-unu, were kwa anu-ulo bara uba nke-uku, were kwa ọla-ọcha, were kwa ọla-edo, were kwa ọla, were ígwè, were kwa uwe bara uba nke-uku: soronu umu-nne-unu kere ihe-nkwata ndi-iro-unu." 
Joshua22:9 Umu Reuben na umu Gad na nkera ebo Manase we laghachi, si n'ebe umu Israel nọ site na Shailo, nke di n'ala Kenean, ga, ijeru ala Gilead, iru ala ihe-onwunwe-ha, nke ha nwere ihe-onwunwe nime ya, dika okwu-ọnu Jehova n'aka Moses si di." 
Joshua22:10 Ha we biarue buruburu-ala Jọdan, nke di n'ala Kenean, umu Reuben na umu Gad na nkera ebo Manase we wue ebe-ichu-àjà n'ebe ahu n'akuku Jọdan, bú ebe-ichu-àjà uku n'ile ya anya." 
Joshua22:11 Umu Israel we nu, si, Le, umu Reuben na umu Gad na nkera ebo Manase ewuwo ebe-ichu-àjà na ncherita-iru ala Kenean, nime buruburu-ala Jọdan, n'ofè umu Israel nwe." 
Joshua22:12 Mb͕e umu Israel nuru ya, nzukọ nile nke umu Israel we kpọkọta onwe-ha nime Shailo, irigokuru ha ibu agha." 
Joshua22:13 Umu Israel we ziga Finehas nwa Eleeza, bú onye-nchu-àjà, ijekuru umu Reuben, na ijekuru umu Gad, na ijekuru nkera ebo Manase, rue ala Gilead;" 
Joshua22:14 ya na ndi-isi iri, otù onye-isi otù onye-isi diri ulo nna ọ bula, inọrọ ebo nile nke Israel; ha nile n'otù n'otù, ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha ka ha bu, ha diri usu nile nke nnù madu abua na ọgu iri nke Israel." 
Joshua22:15 Ha we biakute umu Reuben, biakute kwa umu Gad, biakute kwa nkera ebo Manase, rue ala Gilead, ha we gwa ha okwu, si," 
Joshua22:16 Otú a ka nzukọ nile nke Jehova siri, Gini bu ihe-nmekpu a nke unu mekpuworo megide Chineke Israel, isi n'iso Jehova chigharia ta, n'iwuru onwe-unu ebe-ichu-àjà, inupu isi n'okpuru Jehova ta?" 
Joshua22:17 Ọ̀ bu na ajọ omume Peoa diri ayi ntà, nke ayi nāsapughi onwe-ayi na ya rue ta, ihe-otiti ahu we si nime nzukọ Jehova," 
Joshua22:18 na unu onwe-unu gēsi n'iso Jehova chigharia ta? ọ gēru kwa, ọ buru na unu anupu isi ta n'okpuru Jehova, na Ọ gēwesa nzukọ nile nke Israel iwe echi." 
Joshua22:19 Otú ọ di, ọ buru na ala ihe-onwunwe-unu arua árú, gabigaranu onwe-unu rue ala ihe-onwunwe Jehova, ebe ebe-obibi Jehova nēbi, nwe-kwa-nu ihe-onwunwe n'etiti ayi: ma unu anupula isi n'okpuru Jehova, unu anupu-kwa-la isi n'okpuru ayi, n'iwuru onwe-unu ebe-ichu-àjà nābughi ebe-ichu-àjà Jehova, bú Chineke-ayi." 
Joshua22:20 Ekan nwa Zera, ọ̀ mekpughi ihe-nmekpu n'ihe ahu ewezugara nye Jehova, ma n'aru nzukọ nile nke Israel ka iwe dikwasi? ma ọ bughi nání ya onwe-ya, bú otù onye, kubirì ume n'ajọ omume-ya." 
Joshua22:21 Umu Reuben na umu Gad na nkera ebo Manase we za, gwa ndi-isi usu nile nke nnù ndikom abua na ọgu iri nke Israel okwu, si," 
Joshua22:22 Chineke Nke kachasi chi nile, bú Jehova, Chineke Nke kachasi chi nile, bú Jehova, Ya onwe-ya mara, Israel kwa, ya onwe-ya gāmara; ọ buru na ọ bu nime nnupu-isi, ọ buru kwa na ọ bu nime nmekpu megide Jehova, (azọputala ayi ta,)" 
Joshua22:23 ka ayi wuworo onwe-ayi ebe-ichu-àjà isi n'iso Jehova chigharia; ọ buru kwa na ọ bu isure àjà-nsure-ọku ma-ọbu onyinye-inata-iru-ọma n'elu ya, ọ buru kwa na ọ bu ichu ihe àjà nke àjà-udo n'elu ya, ka Jehova Onwe-ya jua ase ya;" 
Joshua22:24 ọ buru kwa na ayi emeghi nka site n'iche uche okwu, si, N'ọdi-n'iru umu-unu gāgwa umu-ayi okwu, si, Gini ka unu na Jehova, bú Chineke nke Israel, nwekọrọ?" 
Joshua22:25 n'ihi na Jehova etiyewo ókè-ala n'etiti ayi na unu, umu Reuben na umu Gad, bú Jọdan; unu enweghi òkè nime Jehova: umu-unu ewe me ka umu-ayi kwusi n'itu egwu Jehova." 
Joshua22:26 Ayi we si, Biko, ka ayi doziere onwe-ayi iwu ebe-ichu-àjà nka, ọ bughi isure àjà-nsure-ọku, ọ bughi kwa ichu àjà:" 
Joshua22:27 kama ihe-àmà ka ọ gābu n'etiti ayi na unu, na n'etiti ọb͕ọ nile nke umu-ayi ndi gānọchi ayi, ka ayi we were àjà-nsure-ọku nile ayi, were kwa àjà nile ayi, were kwa àjà-udo nile ayi, fè òfùfè Jehova n'iru Ya; ka umu-unu we ghara isi umu-ayi n'ọdi-n'iru, Unu enweghi òkè nime Jehova." 
Joshua22:28 Ayi we si, O gēru kwa, mb͕e ha gāsi ayi, si kwa ọb͕ọ nile nke umu-ayi n'ọdi-n'iru, otú a, na ayi gāsi, Lenu ihe-atù nke ebe-ichu-àjà Jehova, nke nna-ayi-hà mere, ọ bughi isure àjà-nsure-ọku, ọ bughi kwa ichu àjà: kama ihe-àmà ka ọ bu n'etiti ayi na unu." 
Joshua22:29 Ya buru ayi ihe-árú inupu isi n'okpuru Jehova, na isi n'iso Jehova chigharia ta, iwu ebe-ichu-àjà isure àjà-nsure-ọku, ma-ọbu inye onyinye-inata-iru-ọma, ma-ọbu ichu àjà, nāgughi ebe-ichu-àjà Jehova, bú Chineke-ayi, di n'íru ebe-obibi-Ya." 
Joshua22:30 Finehas, bú onye-nchu-àjà, na ndi isi nzukọ Israel, bú ndi-isi usu nile nke nnù ndikom abua na ọgu iri nke Israel, ndi soro ya je, we nu okwu nile nke umu Reuben na umu Gad na umu Manase kwuru, ọ we di nma n'anya-ha." 
Joshua22:31 Finehas nwa Eleeza, bú onye-nchu-àjà, we si umu Reuben, si kwa umu Gad, si kwa umu Manase, Ta ka ayi mara na Jehova nọ n'etiti ayi, n'ihi na unu emekpughi ihe-nmekpu a megide Jehova: ub͕u a ka unu naputaworo umu Israel n'aka Jehova." 
Joshua22:32 Finehas nwa Eleeza, bú onye-nchu-àjà, na ndi-isi we si n'ebe umu Reuben nọ, na ebe umu Gad nọ, n'ala Gilead, lata, rue ala Kenean, lakuru umu Israel, we weghachiri ha okwu." 
Joshua22:33 Okwu ahu we di nma n'anya umu Israel; umu Israel we gọzie Chineke, ha ekwughi kwa okwu irigokuru ha ibu agha, ibibi ala nke umu Reuben na umu Gad nēbi nime ya." 
Joshua22:34 Umu Reuben na umu Gad we kpọsa okwu bayere ebe-ichu-àjà ahu, N'ihi na, ka ha kwuru, ihe-àmà ka ọ bu n'etiti ayi, na Jehova bu Chineke." 
Joshua23:1 O rue, mb͕e ọtutu ubọchi gasiri site na mb͕e Jehova mere ka Israel zuru ike pua n'aka ndi-iro-ha nile buruburu, mb͕e Joshua ghọrọ agadi, mb͕e ubọchi ndu-ya nāgwu," 
Joshua23:2 na Joshua kpọrọ Israel nile, bú ndi-okenye-ha, na ndi-isi-ha, na ndi-ikpé-ha, na ndi-odozi-okwu-ha, si ha, Mu onwem aghọwo agadi, ubọchi ndum nāgwu:" 
Joshua23:3 unu onwe-unu ahuwo kwa ihe nile nke Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, meworo mba ndia nile n'ihi unu; n'ihi na Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, Ya onwe-ya bu onye nāluru unu ọ̀gù." 
Joshua23:4 Lenu, emewom ka mba ndia nke fọduru dayere unu n'ihe-nketa diri ebo nile unu, site na Jọdan, ha na mba ahu nile ndi m'bipuworo, we rue oké osimiri uku ahu n'ọdida anyanwu." 
Joshua23:5 Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, Ya onwe-ya gākwapu kwa ha n'iru unu, napu kwa ha ala-ha n'iru unu; unu gēnweta kwa ala-ha, dika Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, gwara unu okwu." 
Joshua23:6 Di-kwa-nu ike nke-uku idebe na ime ihe nile edeworo n'akwukwọ iwu Moses, ka unu ghara isi nime ya wezuga onwe-unu n'aka-nri ma-ọbu n'aka-ekpe;" 
Joshua23:7 ka unu ghara ibà nime mba ndia, ndi fọduru n'etiti unu; unu ehota-kwa-la aha chi nile ha, unu eme-kwa-la ka ewere ha ṅua iyi, unu efè-kwa-la ha òfùfè, unu akpọ-kwa-la isi ala nye ha:" 
Joshua23:8 kama Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, ka unu gārapara n'aru, dika unu meworo rue ta." 
Joshua23:9 Jehova nānapu kwa mba uku nke nwere ume ala-ha n'iru unu: ma unu onwe-unu, ọ dighi nwoke ọ bula guzoworo n'iru unu rue ta." 
Joshua23:10 Otù nwoke nime unu nāchu nnù ndikom abua na ọgu iri: n'ihi na Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, Ya onwe-ya bu onye nāluru unu ọ̀gù, dika Ọ gwara unu okwu." 
Joshua23:11 Lezi-kwa-nu onwe-unu anya nke-ọma, ihu Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, n'anya." 
Joshua23:12 Ma ọ buru na unu alaghachi ma-ọli, we rapara n'aru ndi fọduru nke mba ndia, bú ndia fọduru n'etiti unu, unu na ha ewe lurita nwunye, unu ewe bakuru ha, ha ewe bakuru kwa unu:" 
Joshua23:13 maranu nke-ọma na Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, agaghi-anapu kwa mba ndia ala-ha ọzọ n'iru unu, kama ha gāburu unu ib͕udu na ọnyà, na utari n'akuku-aru-unu, na ogwu n'anya-unu, rue mb͕e unu gālapu n'iyì n'ezi ala nka, nke Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, nyeworo unu." 
Joshua23:14 Ma, le, mu onwem nēje n'uzọ uwa nile ta: ma unu amawo n'obi-unu nile na nime nkpuru-obi-unu nile, na ọ dighi otù ihe dapuru n'ezi ihe nile nke Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, kwuru bayere unu; ha nile emeworo unu, ọ dighi otù ihe dapuru nime ya." 
Joshua23:15 Ọ gēru kwa, na dika ezi ihe nile nke Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, gwara unu biakwasiworo unu, otú a ka Jehova gēme ka ihe ọjọ ahu nile biakwasi unu, rue mb͕e Ọ gēkpochapu unu n'ezi ala nka nke Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, nyeworo unu." 
Joshua23:16 Mb͕e unu gāgabiga ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, nke O nyere unu n'iwu, mb͕e unu gēje kwa fè chi ọzọ, kpọ isi ala nye ha; iwe Jehova gādi kwa ọku n'aru unu, unu gālapu kwa n'iyì ngwa ngwa n'ezi ala ahu nke O nyeworo unu." 
Joshua24:1 Joshua we chikọta ebo nile nke Israel rue Shekem, ọ kpọ ndi-okenye Israel, na ndi-isi-ha, na ndi-ikpé-ha, na ndi-odozi-okwu-ha; ha we guzo onwe-ha n'iru Chineke." 
Joshua24:2 Joshua we si ndi Israel nile, Otú a ka Jehova, bú Chineke nke Israel, siri, N'ofè Osimiri ahu ka nna-unu-hà biri site na mb͕e ebighi-ebi gara aga, bú Tira, nna Abraham, na nna Nehoa: ha we fè chi ọzọ di iche iche." 
Joshua24:3 M'we si n'ofè Osimiri ahu kuru nna-unu, bú Abraham, me ka ọ nēje ije n'ala Kenean nile, M'we me ka nkpuru-ya ba uba, M'we nye ya Aisak." 
Joshua24:4 M'we nye Aisak Jekob na Isọ: M'we nye Isọ ugwu Sia, ka ọ nweta ya; ma Jekob na umu-ya ridara n'Ijipt." 
Joshua24:5 M'we ziga Moses na Eron, tie Ijipt ihe, dika ihe ahu si di nke M'mere n'etiti ya: emesia M'we me ka unu puta." 
Joshua24:6 M'we me ka nna-unu-hà si n'Ijipt puta: unu we biarue oké osimiri; ndi Ijipt we chiri ub͕ọ-ala na ndi-inyinya chua nna-unu-hà n'azu rue Oké Osimiri Uhie. 
Joshua24:7 Ha we tikue Jehova, O we tiye oké ọchichiri n'etiti unu na ndi Ijipt, me ka oké osimiri biakwasi ha, O we kpuchie ha; anya-unu hu-kwa-ra ihe M'mere n'Ijipt: unu we biri n'ọzara ọtutu ubọchi." 
Joshua24:8 M'we me ka unu ba n'ala ndi-Amorait, ndi bi n'ofè Jọdan; ha we buso unu agha: M'we nye ha n'aka-unu, unu we nweta ala-ha; M'we kpochapu ha n'iru unu." 
Joshua24:9 Belak nwa Zipoa, bú eze Moab, we bilie buso Israel agha; o we ziga kpọ Belam nwa Beoa ikọcha unu:" 
Joshua24:10 ma ekweghm ige Belam nti; o we nāgọzi unu agọzi: M'we naputa unu n'aka-ya. 
Joshua24:11 Unu we gabiga Jọdan, biarue Jeriko: ndi-nwe Jeriko we buso unu agha, bú ndi-Amorait, na ndi-Perizait, na ndi Kenean, na ndi Het, na ndi-Giagashait, na ndi-Haivait, na ndi Jebus; M'we nye ha n'aka-unu." 
Joshua24:12 M'we ziga ebu n'iru unu, nke chupuru ha n'iru unu, bú eze abua nke ndi-Amorait; ọ bughi na mma-agha-gi, ọ bughi kwa n'uta-gi." 
Joshua24:13 M'we nye unu ala nke i nādọb͕ughi onwe-gi n'ọlu nime ya, na obodo nke unu nēwughi, unu we biri nime ha; ubi-vine na ubi-olive nke unu nākughi ka unu nēri nkpuru-ha." 
Joshua24:14 Ma ub͕u a, nātunu egwu Jehova, nēfè-kwa-nu Ya òfùfè n'izu-okè na ezi-okwu: wezuga-kwa-nu chi nile nke nna-unu-hà fère òfùfè n'ofè Osimiri ahu, na n'Ijipt; ma fènu Jehova òfùfè." 
Joshua24:15 Ma ọ buru na ọ jọ njọ n'anya-unu ifè Jehova òfùfè, rọputaranu onwe-unu ta onye unu gēfè òfùfè; ma ọ bu chi nile nke nna-unu-hà fère òfùfè nke di n'ofè Osimiri ahu, ma-ọbu chi nile nke ndi-Amorait, ndi unu onwe-unu bi n'ala-ha: ma mu onwem na ulom, ayi gēfè Jehova òfùfè." 
Joshua24:16 Ndi Israel we za, si, Ya buru ayi ihe-árú irapu Jehova, ifè chi ọzọ òfùfè;" 
Joshua24:17 n'ihi na Jehova, bú Chineke-ayi, Ya onwe-ya bu onye mere ka ayi na nna-ayi-hà si n'ala Ijipt, si n'ulo ndi-orù, rigota, Onye me-kwa-ra ihe-iriba-ama uku ahu nile n'anya-ayi, debe ayi n'uzọ ahu nile nke ayi jere ije nime ya, na n'etiti ndi nile nke ayi gabigara n'etiti ha:" 
Joshua24:18 Jehova we chupu ndi ahu nile n'iru ayi, bú ndi-Amorait ndi bi n'ala nka: ayi onwe-ayi gēfè kwa Jehova òfùfè; n'ihi na Ya onwe-ya bu Chineke-ayi." 
Joshua24:19 Joshua we si ndi Israel, Unu apughi ifè Jehova òfùfè; n'ihi na Chineke di nsọ ka Ọ bu; Chineke ekworo ka Ọ bu; Ọ gaghi-ab͕aghara njehie-unu na nmehie nile unu." 
Joshua24:20 Mb͕e unu gārapu Jehova, fè chi ala ọzọ òfùfè, Ọ gēchighari kwa mejọ unu, me ka unu gwusia, mb͕e O mesiri unu nma." 
Joshua24:21 Ndi Israel we si Joshua, É-è; kama Jehova ka ayi gēfè òfùfè." 
Joshua24:22 Joshua we si ndi Israel, Ndi-àmà megide onwe-unu ka unu bu, na unu onwe-unu arọputaworo onwe-unu Jehova, ifè Ya òfùfè. Ha we si, Ndi-àmà ka ayi bu." 
Joshua24:23 Ọ si, Ma ub͕u a, wezuganu chi ala ọzọ nile nke di n'etiti unu, do-kwa-ra Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, obi-unu." 
Joshua24:24 Ndi Israel we si Joshua, Jehova, bú Chineke-ayi, ka ayi gēfè òfùfè, olu-Ya ka ayi gēge kwa nti." 
Joshua24:25 Joshua na ndi Israel we b͕a ndu ubọchi ahu, o we doro ha ukpuru na ikpé nime Shekem." 
Joshua24:26 Joshua we de okwu ndia n'akwukwọ iwu Chineke; o we were nkume uku, me ka o guzo ọtọ n'ebe ahu n'okpuru osisi oak ahu nke di n'ebe nsọ Jehova." 
Joshua24:27 Joshua we si ndi Israel nile, Le, nkume a gābu àmà megide ayi; n'ihi na ọ nuwo okwu-ọnu nile nke Jehova nke Ọ gwara ayi: ọ gābu kwa àmà megide unu, ka unu we ghara igọnari Chineke-unu." 
Joshua24:28 Joshua we zilaga ndi Israel, nwoke ọ bula n'ihe-nketa-ya." 
Joshua24:29 O rue, mb͕e ihe ndia gasiri, na Joshua nwa Nun, bú orù Jehova, nwuru, mb͕e ọ b͕ara ọgu arọ ise na iri." 
Joshua24:30 Ha we lìe ya n'ókè-ala nke ihe-nketa-ya nime Timnat-sera, nke di n'ugwu Efraim, n'akuku Ugwu nke ugwu Gaash." 
Joshua24:31 Israel we fè Jehova òfùfè ubọchi nile nke Joshua, na ubọchi nile nke ndi-okenye ndi emere ka ubọchi-ha di anya ka Joshua nwusiri, ndi ma-kwa-ra omume nile nke Jehova, nke O mere Israel." 
Joshua24:32 Ha we lìe ọkpukpu Josef, nke umu Israel si n'Ijipt bugota, nime Shekem, n'òkè ọhia ahu nke Jekob zutara n'aka umu Hemoa nna Shekem n'ọgu nkpuru-ego ise: ha we ghọrọ umu Josef ihe-nketa." 
Joshua24:33 Eleeza nwa Eron we nwua; ha we lìe ya n'ugwu Finehas nwa-ya, nke enyere ya n'ugwu Efraim." 
Judges1:1 O rue, mb͕e ọnwu Joshua gasiri, na umu Israel juru Jehova ase, si, Ònye gēbu uzọ rigoro ayi imegide ndi Kenean, ibuso ha agha?" 
Judges1:1 O rue, mb͕e ọnwu Joshua gasiri, na umu Israel juru Jehova ase, si, Ònye gēbu uzọ rigoro ayi imegide ndi Kenean, ibuso ha agha?" 
Judges1:2 Jehova we si, Juda gārigo: le, enyewom ala nka n'aka-ya." 
Judges1:3 Juda we si Simeon, bú nwa-nne-ya, Sorom rigo n'ala-ife-nzàm, ka ayi we buso ndi Kenean agha; mu onwem gēsoro kwa gi je n'ala-ife-nzà-gi. Simeon we soro ya je." 
Judges1:4 Juda we rigo; Jehova we nye ndi Kenean na ndi-Perizait n'aka-ha: ha we tib͕ue ha nime Bezek, orú nnù ndikom na nnù ise." 
Judges1:5 Ha we hu Adoni-bezek nime Bezek: ha we buso ya agha, tib͕ue ndi Kenean na ndi-Perizait." 
Judges1:6 Ma Adoni-bezek b͕alagara; ha we chua ya n'azu, jide ya, bipu isi-aka-ya abua na isi-ukwu-ya abua." 
Judges1:7 Adoni-bezek we si, Ọgu eze atọ na iri, ndi ebipuru isi-aka-ha na isi-ukwu-ha, nāchikọta ihe n'okpuru table nkem: dika m'meworo, otú a ka Chineke kwughachiworom. Ha we me ka ọ ba na Jerusalem, ọ nwua n'ebe ahu." 
Judges1:8 Umu Juda we buso Jerusalem agha, were ya, were ọnu nma-agha tib͕ue ya, su obodo ahu ọku." 
Judges1:9 Emesia umu Juda ridara ibuso ndi Kenean agha, bú ndi bi n'ugwu, na nime Negeb, na n'ebe di ala ala." 
Judges1:10 Juda we jekuru ndi Kenean ndi bi na Hebron: (ma aha Hebron na mb͕e gara aga bu Kiriat-aba:) na tib͕ue Sheshai, na Ahiman, na Talmai." 
Judges1:11 O si n'ebe ahu jekuru ndi bi na Debia. (Ma aha Debia na mb͕e ara aga bu Kiriat-sefa.) 
Judges1:12 Keleb we si, Onye ahu nke gētib͕u Kiriat-sefa, were ya, m'gēnye kwa ya Aksa, bú nwam nwayi, na nwunye." 
Judges1:13 Ọtniel nwa Kenaz, nwa-nne ntà Keleb, we were ya: o we nye ya Aksa, bú nwa-ya nwayi, na nwunye." 
Judges1:14 O rue, mb͕e Aksa biara, na ọ kpaliri di-ya iriọ ubi n'aka nna-ya: Aksa we si n'inyinya-ibu-ya rida; Keleb we si ya, Gini ka i nāchọ?" 
Judges1:15 Ọ si ya, Nyem ngọzi; n'ihi na ọ bu ala Negeb a ka i nyeworom, gi nyekwam isi miri ufọdu. Keleb we nye ya isi miri di n'elu, na isi miri di n'okpuru." 
Judges1:16 Umu onye-Kinait, bú nna nwunye Moses, we si n'obodo nkwu soro umu Juda rigo n'ọzara Juda, nke di na Ndida nke Arad, ha we je biri n'etiti ndi ahu." 
Judges1:17 Juda we je, ya na Simeon, bú nwa-nne-ya, tib͕ue ndi Kenean ndi bi na Zefat, we wezuga ya ka ebibie ya. Ewe kpọ aha obodo ahu Họma." 
Judges1:18 Juda were kwa Geza na ókè-ala-ya, na Ashkelon na ókè-ala-ya, na Ekron na ókè-ala-ya." 
Judges1:19 Jehova nọye-kwa-ra Juda; o we nweta ugwu; ma ọ pughi inapu ndi bi na ndagwurugwu ala-ha, n'ihi na ha nwere ub͕ọ-ala ígwè." 
Judges1:20 Ha we nye Keleb Hebron, dika Moses kwuru: o we napu umu Anak atọ ala-ha n'ebe ahu." 
Judges1:21 Ma umu Benjamin anapughi ndi Jebus ndi bi na Jerusalem ala-ha: ndi Jebus we biri n'etiti umu Benjamin nime Jerusalem, rue ta." 
Judges1:22 Ma ulo Josef, ha onwe-ha rigoru-kwa-ra Bet-el: Jehova we nọyere ha." 
Judges1:23 Ulo Josef we ziga iledo Bet-el. (Ma aha obodo ahu na mb͕e gara aga bu Luz.) 
Judges1:24 Ndi nēche nche we hu otù nwoke ka o nēsi n'obodo ahu puta, ha we si ya, Biko, gosi ayi nbata obodo a, ayi gēme-kwa-ra gi ebere." 
Judges1:25 Ọ we gosi ha nbata obodo ahu, ha we were ọnu mma-agha tib͕ue obodo ahu; ma ha zipuru nwoke ahu na ab͕uru-ya nile." 
Judges1:26 Nwoke ahu we je ala ndi Het, wue obodo, kpọ aha-ya Luz: nke ahu bu aha-ya rue ta." 
Judges1:27 Manase anapughi ndi bi na Bet-shan na umu-obodo-ya, na ndi bi na Teanak na umu-obodo-ya, na ndi bi na Doa na umu-obodo-ya, na ndi bi na Ibleam na umu-obodo-ya, na ndi bi na Megido na umu-obodo-ya, ala-ha: ma ndi Kenean jisiri ike ibiri n'ala ahu." 
Judges1:28 O rue, mb͕e Israel di ike, na ha tiyere ndi Kenean n'ifè-òfùfè, ma ha anapusighi ha ala-ha." 
Judges1:29 Efraim anapughi kwa ndi Kenean ndi bi na Gezea ala-ha; ndi Kenean we biri na Gezea n'etiti ha. 
Judges1:30 Zebulun anapughi ndi bi na Kitron, na ndi bi na Nahalol, ala-ha; ndi Kenean we biri n'etiti ha, ghọ ndi nọ n'ifè-òfùfè." 
Judges1:31 Asha anapughi kwa ndi bi n'Ako, na ndi bi na Zaidon, na Ahlab, na Akzib, na Helba, na Afik, na Rehob, ala-ha:" 
Judges1:32 ndi Asha we biri n'etiti ndi Kenean, bú ndi bi n'ala ahu: n'ihi na ha anapughi ha ala-ha." 
Judges1:33 Naftali anapughi kwa ndi bi na Bet-shemesh, na ndi bi na Bet-anat, ala-ha; ha we biri n'etiti ndi Kenean, bú ndi bi na n'ala ahu: ma ndi bi na Bet-shemesh na Bet-anat ghọrọ ndi nēfè ha òfùfè." 
Judges1:34 Ndi-Amorait we kpagide umu Dan n'ugwu: n'ihi na ha ekweghi ka ha rida na ndagwurugwu: 
Judges1:35 ma ndi-Amorait jisiri ike ibiri n'ugwu Heres, na n'Ajalon, na nime Shaalbim: ma aka ulo Josef dikariri arọ́, ha we ghọ ndi nọ n'ifè-òfùfè." 
Judges1:36 Ókè-ala ndi-Amorait we site na nrigo Akrabim, site na ukume di elu ahu, we rigo." 
Judges2:1 Onye-ozi Jehova we si na Gilgal rigorue Bokim. Ọ we si, Emerem unu ka unu si n'Ijipt rigota, M'we me ka unu bata n'ala nke M'ṅuru nna-unu-hà iyi inye ha; M'we si, M'gaghi-emebi ọb͕ub͕a-ndum rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi, bú nke Mu ńa unu b͕ara;" 
Judges2:2 ma unu onwe-unu na ndi bi n'ala nka ab͕ala ndu; unu gākwatu ebe-ichu-aja nile ha: ma unu egeghi nti olum: gini bu nka unu meworo? 
Judges2:3 M'we si kwa, M'gaghi-achupu ha n'iru unu; kama ha gāburu unu ogwu n'akuku-aru-unu, chi nile ha gābu-kwa-ra unu ọnyà." 
Judges2:4 O rue, mb͕e onye-ozi Jehova gwasiri umu Israel nile okwu ndia, na ndi Israel weliri olu-ha, kwa ákwá." 
Judges2:5 Ha we kpọ aha ebe ahu Bokim: ha we chuara Jehova àjà n'ebe ahu. 
Judges2:6 Joshua we zilaga ndi Israel, umu Israel we la, nwoke ọ bula n'ihe-nketa-ya, inweta ala ahu." 
Judges2:6 Joshua we zilaga ndi Israel, umu Israel we la, nwoke ọ bula n'ihe-nketa-ya, inweta ala ahu." 
Judges2:7 Ndi Israel we fè Jehova òfùfè ubọchi nile nke Joshua, na ubọchi nile nke ndi-okenye ndi emere ka ubọchi-ha di anya ka Joshua nwusiri, ndi huru omume uku nile nke Jehova, nke O mere Israel." 
Judges2:7 Ndi Israel we fè Jehova òfùfè ubọchi nile nke Joshua, na ubọchi nile nke ndi-okenye ndi emere ka ubọchi-ha di anya ka Joshua nwusiri, ndi huru omume uku nile nke Jehova, nke O mere Israel." 
Judges2:8 Joshua nwa Nun, bú orù Jehova, we nwua, mb͕e ọ b͕ara ọgu arọ ise na iri." 
Judges2:8 Joshua nwa Nun, bú orù Jehova, we nwua, mb͕e ọ b͕ara ọgu arọ ise na iri." 
Judges2:9 Ha we lìe ya n'ókè-ala nke ihe-nketa-ya nime Timnat-heres, n'ugwu Efraim, n'akuku Ugwu nke ugwu Gaash." 
Judges2:10 Ewe chikọta kwa ọb͕ọ ahu nile na ndi bu nna-ha n'ala-mọ: ọb͕ọ ọzọ we bilie inọchi ha, ndi nāmaghi Jehova, ha amaghi kwa omume nke O mere Israel." 
Judges2:11 Umu Israel we me ihe ọjọ n'anya Jehova, fè Bealim òfùfè:" 
Judges2:12 ha we rapu Jehova, bú Chineke nke ndi bu nna-ha, Onye nēme ka ha si n'ala Ijipt puta, ha we jezo chi ọzọ, ndi sitere na chi nke ndi ahu ndi nọ ha gburugburu, ha we kpọ isi ala nye ha: we kpasue Jehova iwe." 
Judges2:13 Ha we rapu Jehova, fè Baal na Ashtarot òfùfè." 
Judges2:14 Iwe Jehova we di ọku megide Israel, O we nye ha n'aka ndi nāpunara madu ihe, ha we punara ha ihe, O renye kwa ha n'aka ndi-iro-ha gburugburu, ha apughi kwa iguzo n'iru ndi-iro-ha ọzọ." 
Judges2:15 Ebe ọ bula ha puru, aka Jehova adigide ha ime ha ihe ọjọ, dika Jehova kwuru, na dika Jehova ṅuru ha iyi: ewe kpab͕ue ha nke-uku." 
Judges2:16 Jehova we me ka ndi-ikpé bilie, ha we zọputa ha n'aka ndi nāpunara ha ihe." 
Judges2:17 Ọzọ kwa, ha egeghi nti ndi-ikpé-ha, n'ihi na ha soro chi ọzọ nākwa iko, we kpọ isi ala nye ha: ha siri n'uzọ ahu wezuga onwe-ha ngwa, bú nke ndi bu nna-ha jere nime ya, n'inu ihe nile Jehova nyere n'iwu; ma ha emeghi otú a." 
Judges2:18 Ma mb͕e Jehova mere ka ndi-ikpe biliere ha, Jehova nọye-kwara-ra onye-ikpe ahu, we zọputa ha n'aka ndi-iro-ha ubọchi nile nke onye-ikpe ahu: n'ihi na Jehova cheghariri uche n'ihi isu-ude-ha n'iru ndi nēmeb͕u ha nākpab͕u kwa ha." 
Judges2:19 O rue, n'ọnwu onye-ikpe ahu, na ha laghachiri, we bibie onwe-ha kari ndi bu nna-ha, n'ijeso chi ọzọ ifè ha òfùfè, na ikpọ isi ala nye ha; ha ekweghi ka ihe si n'omume nile ha, ma-ọbu n'uzọ-ha siri ike, dapu." 
Judges2:20 Iwe Jehova we di ọku megide Israel; O we si, N'ihi na mba nka agabigawo ọb͕ub͕a-ndum nke M'nyeworo ndi bu nna-ha n'iwu, n'ihi na ha egeghi kwa nti olum;" 
Judges2:21 Mu onwem agaghi-anapu kwa onye ọ bula ala-ya n'iru ha ọzọ site na mba nile ndi Joshua rapuru mb͕e ọ nwuru: 
Judges2:21 Mu onwem agaghi-anapu kwa onye ọ bula ala-ya n'iru ha ọzọ site na mba nile ndi Joshua rapuru mb͕e ọ nwuru: 
Judges2:22 ka M'we were ha nwa Israel, ma ha nēdebe uzọ Jehova ije ije nime ya, dika ndi bu nna-ha debere ya, ma-ọbu na ha edebeghi ya." 
Judges2:23 Jehova we rapu mba ahu, ghara inapu ha ala-ha ngwa ngwa; O nyeghi kwa ha n'aka Joshua." 
Judges2:23 Jehova we rapu mba ahu, ghara inapu ha ala-ha ngwa ngwa; O nyeghi kwa ha n'aka Joshua." 
Judges3:1 Ma ndia bu mba ndi Jehova rapuru, iji ha nwa Israel, bú ndi nile nāmaghi agha nile nke Kenean;" 
Judges3:2 nání ka ọb͕ọ nile nke umu Israel we mara, izí ha agha, nání ndi nāmaghi ha na mb͕e gara aga;" 
Judges3:3 bú ndi-isi ise nke ndi Filistia, na ndi Kenean nile, na ndi Zaidon, na ndi-Haivait ndi bi n'ugwu Lebanon, site n'ugwu Beal-heamon rue nbata Hemat." 
Judges3:4 Ha di kwa ka ewere ha nwa Israel, imara ma ha gānu ihe nile Jehova nyere n'iwu, nke O nyere ndi bu nna-ha n'iwu n'aka Moses." 
Judges3:5 Umu Israel we biri n'etiti ndi Kenean, na ndi Het, na ndi-Amorait, na ndi-Perizait, na ndi-Haivait, na ndi Jebus:" 
Judges3:6 ha we lutara onwe-ha umu-ha ndinyom na nwunye, were umu-ha ndinyom nye umu-ha ndikom, fè kwa chi nile ha òfùfè." 
Judges3:7 Umu Israel we me ihe ọjọ n'anya Jehova, chezọ Jehova, bú Chineke-ha, fè Bealim na Asherot." 
Judges3:8 Iwe Jehova we di ọku megide Israel, O we renye ha n'aka Kushan-rishataim, bú eze Mesọpọtemia; umu Israel we fè Kushan-rishataim òfùfè arọ asatọ." 
Judges3:9 Umu Israel we tikue Jehova, Jehova we me ka onye-nzọputa biliere umu Israel, ọ we zọputa ha, bú Ọtniel nwa Kenaz, nwa-nne ntà Keleb." 
Judges3:10 Mọ nke Jehova we dikwasi ya, o we kpe Israel ikpe; ọ pua ibu agha, Jehova we nye Kushan-rishataim, bú eze Mesọpọtemia, n'aka-ya: aka-ya we di ike n'aru Kushan-rishataim." 
Judges3:11 Ala ahu we di jū ọgu arọ abua. Ọtniel nwa Kenaz we nwua. 
Judges3:12 Umu Israel we me kwa ihe ọjọ n'anya Jehova ọzọ: Jehova we me ka Eglon, bú eze Moab, di ike imegide Israel, n'ihi na ha emewo ihe ọjọ n'anya Jehova." 
Judges3:13 O we chikọtara onwe-ya umu Amon na Amalek, je tib͕ue Israel, ha we nweta obodo nkwu ahu." 
Judges3:14 Umu Israel we fè Eglon, bú eze Moab, òfùfè arọ iri na asatọ." 
Judges3:15 Umu Israel we tikue Jehova, Jehova we me ka onye-nzọputa biliere ha, bú Ihud nwa Gira, onye Benjamin, onye nēme aka-ekpe: umu Israel we si n'aka-ya zigara Eglon eze Moab onyinye-inata-iru-ọma." 
Judges3:16 Ihud we mere onwe-ya mma-agha nke nwere ọnu abua, ogologo-ya bu otù cubit; o ke ya n'okpuru uwe-nwuda-ya n'apata-ukwu aka-nri ya." 
Judges3:17 Ọ weta onyinye-inata-iru-ọma ahu nso Eglon eze Moab: ma Eglon bu nwoke mara abuba nke-uku. 
Judges3:18 O rue, mb͕e o wetasiri onyinye-inata-iru-ọma ahu nso, na o zilagara ndi nēbu onyinye-inata-iru-ọma ahu." 
Judges3:19 Ma ya onwe-ya si n'arusi apiri api ndi di na Gilgal laghachi, si, Okwu nzuzo ka m'nwere igwa gi, eze. Ọ si, Nọdunu du. Ndi nile ndi nēguzo ya buruburu we si n'ebe ọ nọ pua." 
Judges3:20 Ihud we biakute ya; ma ya onwe-ya nānọdu nání ya n'ime-ulo-elu ọjuju-oyi nke o nwere. Ihud we si, Okwu Chineke ka m'nwere igwa gi. O we si n'oche-eze-ya bilie." 
Judges3:21 Ihud we setipu aka-ekpe-ya, si n'apata-ukwu aka-nri ya were mma-agha ahu, ma ya n'afọ-ya:" 
Judges3:22 isi-mma we soro kwa iru-mma ba; abuba we b͕ochipu iru-mma, na ọ dọputaghi mma-agha ahu n'afọ-ya; o we pua n'otule-ya." 
Judges3:23 Ihud we pua n'uzọ-nbata, mechibido ya ọnu-uzọ ime-ulo-elu ahu, kpachie ha." 
Judges3:24 Ma mb͕e ya onwe-ya pusiri, ndi-orù-ya batara; ha we hu, ma, le, akpachiwo ọnu-uzọ ime-ulo-elu ahu; ha si, Ọ bu nání na o nēkpuchi ukwu-ya abua n'ime-ulo ọjuju-oyi ya." 
Judges3:25 Ha we nēche rue mb͕e ihere mere ha: ma, le, o meghepughi ọnu-uzọ ime-ulo-elu ahu; ha we were nkpisi-ugodi, meghe ha: ma, le, onye-nwe-ha adawo n'ala nwua." 
Judges3:26 Ihud we wepuga onwe-ya mb͕e ọ nāb͕agwoju ha anya, ya onwe-ya we gabiga arusi ahu apiri api, wepuga onwe-ya rue Seira." 
Judges3:27 O rue, mb͕e ọ biara, na ọ fùru opì-ike n'ugwu Efraim, umu Israel we si n'ugwu ahu soro ya rida, ya onwe-ya we nọ n'iru ha." 
Judges3:28 Ọ si ha, B͕asonum n'azu: n'ihi na Jehova enyewo ndi-iro-unu, bú ndi Moab, n'aka-unu. Ha we soro ya rida, were ngabiga-miri Jọdan nile n'uzọ ije Moab, ha ekweghi kwa ka nwoke ọ bula gabiga." 
Judges3:29 Ha we tib͕ue Moab na mb͕e ahu, ihe ra ka orú nnù madu na nnù ise, nwoke ọ bula nke buru ibù, na nwoke ọ bula bu dìnkpà; ọ dighi kwa nwoke ọ bula wepugara onwe-ya." 
Judges3:30 Ewe me ka Moab ruru ala n'okpuru aka Israel n'ubọchi ahu. Ala ahu we di jū ọgu arọ anọ. 
Judges3:31 Mb͕e ọ gasiri Shamga nwa Anat we di, nke were ndudu eji achu ehi tib͕ue ndi Filistia, nnù ndikom na ọgu iri: ya onwe-ya kwa, ọ zọputara Israel." 
Judges4:1 Umu Israel we me kwa ọzọ ihe ọjọ n'anya Jehova, mb͕e Ihud nwusiri." 
Judges4:2 Jehova we renye ha n'aka Jebin, bú eze Kenean, onye bu eze nime Hezoa; onye-isi usuu-ndi-agha-ya bu kwa Sisera, ma onye ahu bi nime Haroshet nke mba di iche iche ọzọ." 
Judges4:3 Umu Israel we tikue Jehova: n'ihi na o nwere nnù ub͕ọ-ala ígwè abua na ọgu ise; ya onwe-ya we meb͕usie umu Israel ike orú arọ. 
Judges4:4 Ma Debora, bú nwayi nke bu onye-amuma, bú nwunye Lapidot, ya onwe-ya nēkpe Israel ikpe na mb͕e ahu." 
Judges4:5 Nwayi ahu bi kwa n'okpuru nkwu Debora n'etiti Rema na Bet-el n'ugwu Efraim: umu Israel we rigokute ya ka o kpe ha ikpe. 
Judges4:6 O zìe kpọ Berak nwa Abinoam ka o si na Kedesh-naftali bia, ọ si ya, Ọ̀ nyeghi iwu, bú Jehova, Chineke nke Israel, si, Je, dọrọ rue n'ugwu Teboa, chiri kwa n'onwe-gi orú nnù ndikom na nnù ise sitere n'umu Naftali, site kwa n'umu Zebulun?" 
Judges4:7 M'gadọ kwa Sisera, bú onye-isi usu-ndi-agha Jebin, rue gi aru, rue mìri-iyi Kaishon, ya na ub͕ọ-ala-ya na ìgwè ndi-ya; M'gēnye kwa ya n'aka-gi." 
Judges4:8 Berak we si ya, Ọ buru na i sorom je, m'gēje kwa: ma ọ buru na i soghm je, m'gaghi-eje." 
Judges4:9 Debora we si, Aghaghm isoro gi je: nání na ọjija-gi agaghi-adi n'ije nke gi onwe-gi nēje; n'ihi na ọ bu n'aka nwayi ka Jehova gērenye Sisera. Debora we bilie, soro Berak jerue Kedesh." 
Judges4:10 Berak we kpọkọta Zebulun na Naftali rue Kedesh; o we were ukwu-ya rigo, ya na orú nnù ndikom na nnù ise: Debora we soro ya rigo." 
Judges4:11 Ma Heba, bú onye-Kenait, siri na Ken kewapu onwe-ya, bú site n'umu Hobab nwa-nne nwunye Moses, we ma ulo-ikwū-ya rue osisi terebinth nime Zaananim, nke di n'akuku Kedesh." 
Judges4:12 Ha we gosi Sisera na Berak nwa Abinoam arigowo n'ugwu Teboa. 
Judges4:13 Sisera we kpọkọta ub͕ọ-ala-ya nile, bú nnù ub͕ọ-ala ígwè abua na ọgu ise, na ndi nile ndi soro ya, site na Haroshet nke mba di iche iche ọzọ, rue miri-iyi Kaishon." 
Judges4:14 Debora we si Berak, Bilie; n'ihi na nka bu ubọchi nke Jehova nyeworo Sisera n'aka-gi: Jehova, Ọ̀ pughi we je n'iru gi? Berak we si n'ugwu Teboa rida, ya na orú nnù ndikom na nnù ise ndi soro ya n'azu." 
Judges4:15 Jehova we were ọnu mma-agha chusa Sisera, na ub͕ọ-ala-ya nile, na ọmuma-ulo-ikwū-ya nile, n'iru Berak; Sisera we si n'ub͕ọ-ala-ya rida, b͕alaga n'ukwu-ya." 
Judges4:16 Ma Berak churu ub͕ọ-ala-ya nile n'azu, na n'azu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū-ya, rue Haroshet nke mba di iche iche ọzọ: ọmuma-ulo-ikwū nile nke Sisera we da n'ọnu mma-agha; ọ dighi otù nwoke fọduru." 
Judges4:17 Ma Sisera b͕alagara n'ukwu-ya rue ulo-ikwū Jael, bú nwunye Heba onye-Kenait: n'ihi na udo di n'etiti Jebin, bú eze Hezoa, na ulo Heba, bú onye-Kenait." 
Judges4:18 Jael we pua izute Sisera, si ya, Wezuga onwe-gi, onye-nwem, wezuga onwe-gi bakutem; atula egwu. O we wezuga onwe-ya bakuru ya n'ulo-ikwū, o were ákwà-ichu-oyi kpuchie ya." 
Judges4:19 Ọ si ya, Biko, me ka m'ṅua nwantī miri; n'ihi na akpiri kpọrọm nku. O we meghe karama-akpukpọ miri-ara-ehi, me ka ọ ṅua, o kpuchie ya." 
Judges4:20 Sisera we si ya, Guzo n'ọnu-uzọ ulo-ikwū, o gēru kwa, ọ buru na nwoke ọ bula abia, jua gi, si, Ọ̀ di nwoke ọ bula nọ n'ebe a? na i gāsi, É-è." 
Judges4:21 Jael, bú nwunye Heba, we were ǹtú ulo-ikwū, jide kwa otùtù n'aka-ya, bakuru ya nwayọ, kpọbà ǹtú ahu n'akuku egedege-iru-ya, ǹtú we kpọpue ba n'ala; n'ihi na nwoke ahu di n'oké ura, ike gwu-kwa-ra ya; o we nwua." 
Judges4:22 Ma, le, Berak nāchu Sisera, Jael we puta izute ya, si ya, Bia, m'gēme kwa ka i hu nwoke ahu nke gi onwe-gi nācho. O we bakuru ya; ma, le, Sisera adawo nwua, ǹtú ahu di kwa n'akuku egedege-iru-ya." 
Judges4:23 Chineke we me ka Jebin, bú eze Kenean, ruru ala ubọchi ahu n'iru umu Israel." 
Judges4:24 Aka umu Israel we nāga nēsi ike n'aru Jebin, bú eze Kenean, rue mb͕e ha bipuru Jebin, bú eze Kenean." 
Judges5:1 Debora na Berak nwa Abinoam we bùa abù n'ubọchi ahu, si," 
Judges5:2 N'ihi na ndi-ndú nēdu edu n'Israel, N'ihi na ndi Israel were afọ-ofufo nye onwe-ha, Gọzienu Jehova." 
Judges5:3 Nurunu, ndi-eze; ṅanu nti, ndi-isi; Mu onwem gābùku Jehova abù, ọbuná mu onwem; M'gābùku Jehova, bú Chineke nke Israel, abù ọma." 
Judges5:4 Jehova, mb͕e I siri na Sia puta, Mb͕e I siri n'ọhia Edom zọ ije, Ala mara jijiji, elu-igwe bu-kwa-ra miri, Igwe-oji nile nke b͕ara ọchichiri bu-kwa-ra miri." 
Judges5:5 Ugwu nile rudara dika miri n'iru Jehova, Ọbuná Sainai ahu n'iru Jehova, bú Chineke nke Israel." 
Judges5:6 N'ubọchi Shamga nwa Anat, N'ubọchi Jael, okporo-uzọ nile ghara idi, Ndi nēje ije n'uzọ we je n'okporo-uzọ b͕agọrọ ab͕agọ." 
Judges5:7 Obodo ntà we ghara idi n'Israel, ha we ghara idi, Rue mb͕e mu, bú Debora, biliri, Rue mb͕e mu, bú nne n'Israel, biliri." 
Judges5:8 Ha rọputara chi ọhu di iche iche; Mb͕e ahu agha di n'ọnu-uzọ-ama nile: Àhuru ọta ma-ọbu ube N'etiti orú nnù madu uzọ ise n'Israel? 
Judges5:9 Obim di n'ebe ndi-ònyé-ukpuru nke Israel nọ, Ndi nēwere afọ-ofufo nye onwe-ha n'etiti ndi Israel: Gọzienu Jehova." 
Judges5:10 Unu ndi inyinya-ibu ọcha nēbu, Ndi nānọkwasi n'uwe-nwuda, Unu na ndi nēje ije n'uzọ, Tugharinu uche." 
Judges5:11 N'ebe dipuru anya n'olu ndi-uta, n'etiti ebe isere miri, N'ebe aku ka ha gākọ akukọ ezi omume nile nke Jehova, Bú ezi omume nile O mere obodo ntà Ya n'Israel. Mb͕e ahu ndi Jehova ridara rue ọnu-uzọ-ama nile." 
Judges5:12 Teta, teta, Debora; Teta, teta, kwue okwu abù: Bilie, Berak, dọta usu ndi i dọtara n'agha n'agha, gi nwa Abinoam." 
Judges5:13 Mb͕e ahu ndi fọduru nime ndi di ike nke-uku, bú ndi Israel, ridara; Jehova ridara n'ihim imegide ndi-dike." 
Judges5:14 Ndi nkpọrọgwu-ha di nime Amalek siri n'Efraim rida; Nēso gi n'azu, Benjamin, n'etiti umu-nna-gi. Ndi-ònyé-ukpuru siri na Makia rida, Ndi ji nka-n'aka ode-akwukwọ ese ihe si-kwa-ra na Zebulun rida." 
Judges5:15 Ndi-isi n'Isaka nọye-kwa-ra Debora; Dika Isaka si di, otú a ka Berak di; Na ndagwurugwu ka ezigara ya n'ukwu-ya abua. Na miri-iyi nile nke Reuben Ka oké nzube obi di." 
Judges5:16 N'ìhi gini ka i nọduru n'etiti ogige-aturu-gi, Inu ob͕ub͕u-ọ̀jà anēb͕uru ìgwè aturu? Na miri-iyi nile nke Reuben Ka oké nnyocha obi di." 
Judges5:17 Gilead biri n'ofè Jọdan: Dan kwa, n'ìhi gini ka ọ nọ n'ub͕o? Asha nọduru n'ọnu-miri oké osimiri, Ọ bu kwa n'akuku ọwara-miri-ya nile ka o nēbi." 
Judges5:18 Zebulun bu ndi nyebigara ndu-ha rue ọnwu, Naftali kwa, n'elu ebe nile di elu nke ọhia." 
Judges5:19 Ndi-eze biara, bū agha; Mb͕e ahu ndi-eze Kenean būru agha, Nime Teanak n'akuku miri Megido: Ọ dighi urù ego ha nara." 
Judges5:20 N'elu-igwe ka ha si bū agha, Kpakpando si n'uzọ nile ha atuliri atuli buso Sisera agha." 
Judges5:21 Miri-iyi Kaishon bupuru ha, Miri-iyi ochie ahu, bú miri-iyi Kaishon. Nkpuru-obim, i nāzọda ike." 
Judges5:22 Mb͕e ahu ka ukwu inyinya zọsiri ike Site n'iwuli-elu ahu nile, bú iwuli-elu nke ihe nile ya di ike." 
Judges5:23 Buanu Miroz ọnu, ka mọ-ozi nke Jehova siri, Buanu ndi bi nime ya ọnu nke-uku; N'ihi na ha abiaghi iyere Jehova aka, Iyere Jehova aka imegide ndi-dike." 
Judges5:24 Agāgọzi Jael kari ndinyom, Bú nwunye Heba onye-Kenait, Kari ndinyom n'ulo-ikwū ka agāgọzi ya." 
Judges5:25 Miri ka Sisera riọrọ, miri-ara-ehi ka ọ nyere ya; O weta nso ya miri-ara-ehi nke raru araru n'ọkwa ndi di ebube." 
Judges5:26 Aka-ya ka ọ setiri na ǹtú, Aka-nri-ya n'otùtù ndi nālu ọlu ike; O were otùtù kpọ Sisera, ọ kpọrọ ya n'isi, O we kpọpue ya, ǹtú ahu we bapue n'akuku egedege-iru-ya." 
Judges5:27 N'ab͕ata ukwu-ya abua ka o ruru ala, da, tọb͕ọ: N'ab͕ata ukwu-ya abua ka o ruru ala, da: Ebe o ruru ala, n'ebe ahu ka ọ dara, la n'iyì." 
Judges5:28 Na window-ya ka ọ lepuru anya, tie nkpu, Bú nne Sisera, site n'oghere inara ifufe, Gini mere ub͕o-ala-ya nānọ ọdù ibia? Gini mere wheel nke ub͕ọ-ala-ya nile ji la azu?" 
Judges5:29 Ndi-isi-ya ndinyom ndi mara ihe nāza ya, E, ya onwe-ya nēkwughachiri onwe-ya okwu-ọnu-ya nile," 
Judges5:30 Hà achọtaghi? hà ekèghi ihe-nkwata? Otù nwa-ab͕ọghọ, umu-ab͕ọghọ abua, gādiri nwoke ọ bula, n'isi n'isi; Ihe-nkwata, bú uwe esijiri esiji, diri Sisera, Ihe-nkwata, bú uwe esijiri esiji nke akpara nke-ọma, Bú uwe esijiri esiji nke akpara nke-ọma n'akuku abua, nke diri olu ndi akwatara?" 
Judges5:31 Otú a ka ndi-iro-Gi nile gāla n'iyi, Jehova: Ma ndi nāhu Ya n'anya gādi ka anyanwu mb͕e ọ nāputa n'ike-ya. Ala we di jū ọgu arọ abua." 
Judges6:1 Umu Israel we me ihe ọjọ n'anya Jehova: Jehova we nye ha n'aka Midian arọ asa. 
Judges6:2 Aka Midian we di ike n'aru Israel: n'ihi Midian ka umu Israel mere onwe-ha ebe miri nērù nke di n'ugwu, na ọb͕à, na ebe ewusiri ike." 
Judges6:3 O rue, ọ buru na Israel agha nkpuru, na ndi Midian rigoro ya, na ndi Amalek, na umu Iru-anyanwu; ha we rigo imegide ha;" 
Judges6:4 ha we ma ulo-ikwū-ha imegide ha, we bibie ihe-omume ala, rue ebe i gābà na Geza, ha arapughi kwa ihe nēdebe ndu n'Israel, ma ọ bu aturu, ma-ọbu ehi, ma-ọbu inyinya-ibu." 
Judges6:5 N'ihi na ha na anu-ulo-ha na ulo-ikwū nile ha rigoro, ha batara dika ojuju igurube n'iba-uba; ọnu-ọgugu adighi kwa ha, ọ dighi kwa camel-ha: ha we bata n'ala ibibi ya." 
Judges6:6 Ewe me ka Israel ghara inwe ike ma ọli n'ihi Midian; umu Israel we tikue Jehova. 
Judges6:7 O rue, mb͕e umu Israel tikuru Jehova n'ihi Midian," 
Judges6:8 na Jehova ziri otù nwoke, bú onye-amuma, jekuru umu Israel: ọ si ha, Otú a ka Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, siri, Mu onwem mere ka unu si n'Ijipt rigota, eme-kwa-ram ka unu si n'ulo ndi-orù puta:" 
Judges6:9 M'we naputa unu n'aka ndi Ijipt, na n'aka ndi nile nēmeb͕u unu, M'we chupu ha n'iru unu, nye unu ala-ha:" 
Judges6:10 M'we si unu, Mu onwem bu Jehova, bú Chineke-unu; unu atula egwu chi nile nke ndi-Amorait, ndi unu onwe-unu bi n'ala-ha: ma unu egeghi nti olum." 
Judges6:11 Mọ-ozi nke Jehova we bia, nọdu n'okpuru osisi terebinth ahu nke di n'Ọfra, nke Joash, bú onye Abieza, nwere: ma Gideon nwa-ya nēticha ọka wheat n'ebe-nzọcha-nkpuru-vine, iwepu ya n'iru Midian." 
Judges6:12 Mọ-ozi nke Jehova we me ka ọ hu ya anya, si ya, Jehova nọyere gi, gi dike bu dìnkpà." 
Judges6:13 Gideon we si ya, Biko, onye-nwem, ọ buru na Jehova nọyere ayi, n'ìhi gini kwa ka ihe a nile dakwasiworo ayi? òle ebe kwa ka ihe-ebube-Ya nile di, nke nna-ayi-hà kọrọ ayi akukọ ha, si, Jehova, Ọ̀ meghi ka ayi si n'Ijipt rigota? ma ub͕u a Jehova arapuwo ayi, nye kwa ayi n'aka Midian." 
Judges6:14 Jehova we che ya iru, si, Je n'ike-gi a, zọputa Israel n'aka Midian: èzigaghm i?" 
Judges6:15 Ọ si Ya, Biko, Onye-nwe-ayi, #M'gēji gini zọputa Israel? le, usu nnù ndikom abua na ọgu iri nkem bu nke nēnweghi ike nime Manase, mu onwem bu kwa onye pekasiri npe n'ulo nnam." 
Judges6:16 Jehova we si ya, N'ihi na Mu na gi gānọ, i gētib͕u kwa Midian dika otù nwoke." 
Judges6:17 Ọ si ya, Biko, ọ buru na ahutawom amara n'iru Gi, Gi me-kwa-ram ihe-iriba-ama na Gi onwe-gi nākpayerem uka." 
Judges6:18 Biko, esila n'ebe a pua, rue mb͕e m'gābiakute Gi, weputa onyinyem inata iru-ọma, dọba ya n'iru Gi. Ọ si, Mu onwem gānọdu rue mb͕e i gābiaghachi." 
Judges6:19 Gideon we ba n'ulo, dozie nwa-ewu, na achicha ekoghi-eko nke ephah utu ọka: o tiyere anu ahu nime nkata, tiye kwa ofè n'ite, weputa ya nye ya n'okpuru osisi terebinth ahu, we weta ya nso." 
Judges6:20 Mọ-ozi nke Chineke we si ya, Were anu nka na achicha ekoghi-eko nka, dọba n'elu nkume a di elu, wusi kwa ofé. O me otú a." 
Judges6:21 Mọ-ozi nke Jehova we setipu nsọtu nkpa-n'aka nke di n'aka-ya, metu anu ahu na achicha ekoghi-eko ahu; ọku we si na nkume ahu di elu rigo, ripia anu ahu na achicha ekoghi-eko; mọ-ozi nke Jehova we pua n'anya-ya." 
Judges6:22 Gideon we hu na mọ-ozi nke Jehova ka ọ bu; Gideon we si, Ewó, Onye-nwe-ayi Jehova! n'ihi na ahuwom mọ-ozi nke Jehova iru n'iru." 
Judges6:23 Jehova we si ya, Udo diri gi; atula egwu: i gaghi-anwu." 
Judges6:24 Gideon we wuere Jehova ebe-ichu-àjà n'ebe ahu, kpọ ya Jehova-shalom: rue ta ọ digide n'Ọfra nke ndi Abieza." 
Judges6:25 O rue, n'abali ahu, na Jehova siri ya, Were oke-ehi nke nna-gi nwere, bú oke-ehi nke-abua, nke b͕ara arọ asa, kwadà kwa ebe-ichu-àjà Beal nke nna-gi nwere, b͕utu kwa Ashera nke di n'akuku ya:" 
Judges6:26 wu-kwa-ra Jehova, bú Chineke-gi, ebe-ichu-àjà n'elu ebe a siri ike, n'usoro, were kwa oke-ehi nke-abua ahu, were kwa nkù Ashera nke i gēb͕utu, sure àjà-nsure-ọku." 
Judges6:27 Gideon we chiri ndikom iri sitere na ndi-orù-ya, o me dika Jehova gwara ya okwu: o rue, n'ihi na ọ turu egwu ulo nna-ya na ndikom obodo-ya, ime ya n'ehihie, na o mere ya n'abali." 
Judges6:28 Ndikom obodo ahu we bilie n'isi-ututu, ma, le, akwaturu ebe-ichu-àjà Beal, b͕utu kwa Ashera nke di n'akuku ya, sure kwa oke-ehi nke-abua ahu n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà nke ewuru." 
Judges6:29 Ha we sirita onwe-ha, Ònye mere ihe a? Ha we jua ajuju, chọ kwa, si, Gideon nwa Joash emewo ihe a." 
Judges6:30 Ndikom obodo ahu we si Joash, Me ka nwa-gi puta, ka ọ nwua: n'ihi na ọ kwatuwo ebe-ichu-àjà Beal, na n'ihi na o b͕utuwo Ashera nke di n'akuku ya." 
Judges6:31 Joash we si ndi nile nke guzoro megide ya, Unu onwe-unu, ùnu gēkpere Beal ọnu-ya? ma-ọbu unu onwe-unu, ùnu gāzọputa ya? Onye nke gēkpere ya ọnu-ya, ka eme ka ọ nwua: rapu ya rue ututu; ọ buru na chi ka ọ bu, ya kpere onwe-ya ọnu-ya, n'ihi na akwatuwo ebe-ichu-àjà-ya." 
Judges6:32 Ọ we kpọ ya Jerubeal n'ubọchi ahu, si, Ka Beal kpegide ya, n'ihi na ọ kwatuwo ebe-ichu-àjà-ya." 
Judges6:33 Ndi Midian nile na ndi Amalek na umu Iru-anyanwu we chikọta onwe-ha, gabiga, ma ulo-ikwū-ha na ndagwurugwu Jezreel." 
Judges6:34 Mọ nke Jehova we were Gideon kpuchie Onwe-ya dika uwe; o we fùa opì-ike; Abieza we kpọkọta onwe-ha n'azu ya. 
Judges6:35 O we ziga ndi-ozi nime Manase nile; ha onwe-ha kpọkọta-kwa-ra onwe-ha n'azu ya: o we ziga ndi-ozi nime Asha, na nime Zebulun, na nime Naftali; ha we rigo izute ha." 
Judges6:36 Gideon we si Chineke, Ọ buru na I nēsi n'akam zọputa Israel, dika I kwuworo," 
Judges6:37 le, mu onwem nētiye aji-anu ebìri ebì n'ebe-nzọcha-ọka; ọ buru na igirigi adikwasi nání n'aji-anu ebìri ebì ahu, ma ọkpukpọ-nku adikwasi n'ala nile buruburu, m'gāmara kwa na I gēsi n'akam zọputa Israel, dika I kwuworo." 
Judges6:38 O we di otú a: o we bilie n'isi-ututu n'echi-ya, pikọta aji-anu ebìri ebì ahu, hichapu igirigi n'aji-anu ebìri ebì ahu, ojuju ọkwa miri." 
Judges6:39 Gideon we si Chineke, Ka iwe-Gi ghara idi ọku megidem, ka m'kwu kwa nání otù ub͕ò a: biko, ka m'were aji-anu ebìri ebì ahu nwa nání otù ub͕ò a; biko, ka ọkpukpọ-nku dikwasi nání n'aji-anu ebìri ebì ahu, ma ka igiriri dikwasi n'ala nile buruburu." 
Judges6:40 Chineke we me otú a n'abali ahu: ọkpukpọ-nku we dikwasi nání n'aji-anu ebìri ebì ahu, ma igirigi dikwasiri n'ala nile buruburu." 
Judges7:1 Jerubeal (onye ahu bu Gideon), na ndi nile soro ya, we bilie n'isi-ututu, ma ulo-ikwū-ha n'akuku isi-iyi Harod: ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Midian we di n'akuku Ugwu ha, site n'ugwu ntà More, nime ndagwurugwu." 
Judges7:2 Jehova we si Gideon, Ndi nke nēso gi baram uba inye Midian n'aka-ha, ka Israel we ghara inya isi megidem, si, Akam azọputawom." 
Judges7:3 Ma ub͕u a, biko, kpọ òkù na nti ndi nka, si, Ònye nātu egwu, nāma kwa jijiji? ya laghachi, si n'ugwu Gilead b͕alaga. Orú nnù ndikom uzọ abua na nnù iri-na-ise we si na ndi Israel laghachi; ma orú nnù ndikom na nnù ise fọduru." 
Judges7:4 Jehova we si Gideon, Ndi Israel bara uba rue ub͕u a; me ka ha ridarue miri ahu, M'gānwaputa-kwa-ra gi ha n'ebe ahu: ọ gēru kwa, na onye ọ bula M'gāsi gi, Onye a gēsoro gi je, ọ bu onye ahu gēsoro gi je; ma onye ọ bula M'gāsi gi, Onye a agaghi-eso gi je, ọ bu onye ahu nāgaghi-eje." 
Judges7:5 O we me ka ndi Israel ridarue miri ahu: Jehova we si Gideon, Onye ọ bula nke ji ire-ya ra miri, dika nkita nāra, onye ahu ka i gēdo n'onwe-ya iche; onye ọ bula kwa nke nēruru n'ikperè-ya abua iṅu miri." 
Judges7:6 Ọnu-ọgugu ndi nāra miri, n'itiye aka-ha n'ọnu-ha, di ọgu ndikom iri-na-ise: ma ndi nile fọduru nime ndi Israel ruru n'ikperè-ha iṅu miri." 
Judges7:7 Jehova we si Gideon, Ọ bu ọgu ndikom iri-na-ise ahu ndi nāra miri ka M'gēji zọputa unu, nye kwa Midian n'aka-gi; ma ka ndi Israel nile la, onye ọ bula n'ebe nke ya." 
Judges7:8 Ndi ahu we were ihe-oriri-uzọ n'aka-ha, na opì-ike-ha: ma o zilagara ndikom nile nke Israel, onye ọ bula n'ulo-ikwū-ya, ma ọgu ndikom iri-na-ise ahu ka o jidere: ma ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Midian di n'okpuru ya nime ndagwurugwu ahu." 
Judges7:9 O rue, n'abali ahu, na Jehova siri ya, Bilie, rida imegide ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ahu; n'ihi na enyewom ya n'aka-gi." 
Judges7:10 Ma ọ buru na gi onwe-gi atua egwu irida, gi na Pura, bú nwa-okorọbia-gi, ridarue ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ahu:" 
Judges7:11 i gānu kwa ihe ha nēkwu: emesia agēme kwa ka aka-gi abua di ike ka i we rida imegide ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ahu. O we rida, ya onwe-ya na Pura, bú nwa-okorọbia-ya, rue nsọtu ndi chiri ihe-ekike-agha, ndi nọ n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ahu." 
Judges7:12 Ma ndi Midian na ndi Amalek na umu Iru-anyanwu nile nāmade nime ndagwurugwu ahu dika igurube n'uba; iguta-ọgugu adighi kwa camel-ha, dika ájá nke di n'usọ oké osimiri n'uba." 
Judges7:13 Gideon we bia, ma, le, otù nwoke nēzere ibe-ya nrọ, si, Le, arọrọm nrọ, ma, le, buruburu achicha ọka barley nākpọre ba n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Midian, ọ biarue ulo-ikwū, tie ya, o we da, achicha ahu we me ka o kpue iru, ulo-ikwū ahu we tọb͕ọ n'ala." 
Judges7:14 Ibe-ya we za, si, Nka abughi ihe ọzọ ma-ọbughi mma-agha Gideon nwa Joash, bú nwoke Israel: Chineke enyewo Midian na ọmuma-ulo-ikwū-ya nile n'aka-ya." 
Judges7:15 O rue, mb͕e Gideon nuru ọzize nrọ ahu na akukọ-isi-ya, na ọ kpọrọ isi ala; o we laghachi n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Israel, si, Bilienu; n'ihi na Jehova enyewo ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Midian n'aka unu." 
Judges7:16 O we kewa ọgu ndikom iri-na-ise ahu n'usu atọ, o tiye n'aka-ha nile opì-ike, na ite nke ihe nādighi nime ha, na ọwa n'etiti ite ahu." 
Judges7:17 Ọ si ha, Lenum anya, me-kwa-unu otú a: ma, le, mb͕e mu onwem nābà na nsọtu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū-ha, ọ gēru kwa na, dika m'nēme, otú a ka unu gēme." 
Judges7:18 Mb͕e m'fùru opì-ike, mu onwem na ndi nile nke sorom, unu gāfù kwa opì-ike, ọbuná unu onwe-unu, buruburu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ahu nile, si, Ayi diri Jehova, di-kwa-ra Gideon." 
Judges7:19 Gideon, na ọgu ndikom ise ndi soro ya, we ba na nsọtu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū na nmalite nche etiti abali, (ọ bu nání mb͕e ahu ka ha guzoro ndi-nche): ha we fùa opì-ike-ha, tupia kwa ite nke di n'aka-ha." 
Judges7:20 Usu atọ ahu we fùa opì-ike-ha, tiwa kwa ite-ha, jide kwa ọwa-ha n'aka-ekpe-ha, na opì-ike-ha n'aka-nri-ha, ifù afù: ha we tie nkpu, si, Mma-agha diri Jehova di-kwa-ra Gideon." 
Judges7:21 Ha we guzo, nwoke ọ bula n'ọnọdu-ya, buruburu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ahu: ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ahu nile we b͕a ọsọ; ha we tie nkpu, b͕alaga." 
Judges7:22 Ha we fùa ọgu opì-ike iri-na-ise ahu, Jehova we me ka mma-agha nwoke ọ bula di n'aru ibe-ya, na n'aru ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ahu nile: ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ahu we b͕alaga rue Bet-shita n'uzọ Zerera, rue uzọ Ebel-mehola, n'akuku Tabat." 
Judges7:23 Ndikom Israel we si Naftali, na n'Asha, na nime Manase nile, kpọkọta onwe-ha, chua Midian n'azu." 
Judges7:24 Gideon we ziga ndi-ozi n'ugwu Efraim nile, si, Ridatanu izute Midian, burunu ha uzọ were miri, rue Bet-bara, bú Jọdan. Ndikom nile nke Efraim we kpọkọta onwe-ha, were miri ahu rue Bet-bara, bú Jọdan."
