1Kings3:3 Ma Solomon huru Jehova n'anya, nēje ije n'ukpuru nile nke Devid, bú nna-ya: ọ bu nání na ya onwe-ya nāchu àjà, nēsure kwa ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ n'ebe di elu." 
1Kings3:4 Eze we jerue Gibeon ichu àjà n'ebe ahu; n'ihi na nke ahu bu oké ebe di elu: nnù àjà-nsure-ọku abua na ọgu iri ka Solomon surere n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà ahu. 
1Kings3:5 Na Gibeon ka Jehova mere ka Solomon hu Ya anya na nrọ nke abali: Chineke we si, Riọ ihe M'gēnye gi." 
1Kings3:6 Solomon we si, Gi onwe-gi emeworo orù-Gi, bú Devid nnam, ebere uku, dika o jere ije n'iru Gi n'ezi-okwu na n'ezi omume, na nime obi ziri ezi n'ebe I nọ; I we debere ya ebere uku a, nye ya nwa-nwoke nke nānọkwasi n'oche-eze-ya, dika ọ di ta." 
1Kings3:7 Ma ub͕u a, Jehova, bú Chinekem, Gi onwe-gi emewo orù-Gi eze n'ọnọdu Devid, bú nnam: ma mu onwem bu nwatakiri; amaghm ipu apu na ibata abata." 
1Kings3:8 Orù-Gi nọ kwa n'etiti ndi-Gi I rọputaworo, ndi bara uba, ndi anādighi-aguta ha, ndi anādighi-agu kwa ha ọnu, n'ihi iba-uba-ha." 
1Kings3:9 Ma nye orù-Gi obi nānu ihe ikpe ndi-Gi ikpe, ighọta ihe di iche n'etiti ezi ihe na ihe ọjọ; n'ihi na ònye puru ikpe ndi-Gi nka di arọ́ ikpe?" 
1Kings3:10 Okwu-ya we di nma n'anya Onye-nwe-ayi, na Solomon riọrọ ihe a." 
1Kings3:11 Chineke we si ya, N'ihi na i riọrọ ihe a, ma i riọghi nye onwe-gi ọtutu ubọchi; i riọghi kwa àkù nye onwe-gi, i riọghi kwa ndu ndi-iro-gi; kama i riọworo onwe-gi nghọta inu ikpé;" 
1Kings3:12 le, emewom dika okwu-gi si di: le, enyewom i obi mara ihe na nke nāghọta ihe; ya mere ọ dighi onye dika gi buru gi uzọ nọ, ọ dighi kwa onye gēbili dika gi n'azu gi." 
1Kings3:13 Ọzọ kwa, enyewom i ihe i nāriọghi, ma àkù ma nsọpuru, ya mere ọ dighi nwoke ọ bula n'etiti ndi-eze gādi ka gi ubọchi-gi nile." 
1Kings3:14 Ọ buru kwa na i je ije n'uzọm nile, idebe ukpurum nile na ihe nile M'nyere n'iwu dika nna-gi, bú Devid, jere, M'gēme kwa ka ubọchi-gi di ogologo." 
1Kings3:15 Solomon we teta, ma, le, ọ bu nrọ: o we bata na Jerusalem, guzo n'iru ib͕e ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Onye-nwe-ayi, sure àjà-nsure-ọku, chua àjà-udo, mere ndi-orù-ya nile oké oriri." 
1Kings3:16 Mb͕e ahu ndinyom abua, bú ndi nākwa iko, biakutere eze, guzo n'iru ya." 
1Kings3:17 Otù nwayi we si, Biko, onye-nwem, Mu onwem na nwayi a nēbi n'otù ulo; m'we mua nwa mb͕e mu na ya nọ n'ulo." 
1Kings3:18 O rue, n'ubọchi nke-atọ mb͕e m'musiri nwa, na nwayi a mu-kwa-ra nwa; ayi onwe-ayi nọ kwa n'otù ebe; ọ dighi onye ala ọzọ ayi na ya nọ n'ulo, nání ayi abua nọ n'ulo." 
1Kings3:19 Nwa nwayi a we nwua n'abali; n'ihi na o dinakwasiri ya. 
1Kings3:20 O we bilie n'etiti abali, kupu nwam n'akukum, ma orù-gi nwayi nāraru ura, o we dọba ya n'obi-ya, ma nwa-ya nke nwuru anwu ka ọ dọbara n'obim." 
1Kings3:21 M'we bilie n'ututu inye nwam ara, ma, le, ọ nwuwo: m'we tule ya n'ututu, ma, le, ọ bughi nwam nke m'muru." 
1Kings3:22 Nwayi nke-ọzọ we si, É-è; kama nke di ndu bu nwam, nke nwuru anwu bu kwa nwa-gi. Ma nke-mbu nāsi, É-è; kama nke nwuru anwu bu nwa-gi, nke di ndu bu kwa nwam. Ha we kwue otú a n'iru eze." 
1Kings3:23 Eze we si, Otù nwayi nāsi, Nka nke di ndu bu nwam, ma nwa-gi bu nke nwuru anwu: ma nke-ọzọ nāsi, É-è; kama nwa-gi bu nke nwuru anwu, ma nwam bu nke di ndu." 
1Kings3:24 Eze we si, Wetaram mma-agha. Ha we weta mma-agha n'iru eze." 
1Kings3:25 Eze we si, Kpọwanu nwa di ndu abua, nye otù nwayi otù nkera, nye kwa nwayi nke-ọzọ nkera ọzọ." 
1Kings3:26 Nwayi ahu nke nwere nwa di ndu we si eze, (n'ihi na afọ chighariri ya n'aru nwa-ya,) o we si, Biko, onye-nwem, nyenu ya nwa di ndu, unu eme-kwa-la ka ọ nwua ma-ọli. Ma nwayi nke-ọzọ nāsi, M'gaghi-enwe ya, i gaghi-enwe kwa ya; kpọwanu ya." 
1Kings3:27 Eze we za, si, Nyenu ya nwa di ndu, unu eme-kwa-la ka ọ nwua ma-ọli: nwayi a bu nne-ya." 
1Kings3:28 Israel nile we nu ikpe eze kpere; ha we tua egwu eze: n'ihi na ha huru na amam-ihe Chineke di nime ya, ime ihe ekpere n'ikpe." 
1Kings4:1 Eze, bú Solomon, we buru eze Israel nile." 
1Kings4:2 Ma ndia bu ndi-isi o nwere; Azaraia nwa Zedok bu onye-nchu-àjà; 
1Kings4:3 Elihoref na Ahaija, umu-ndikom Shisha, bu ndi-ode-akwukwọ; Jehoshafat nwa Ahailud bu onye-ncheta;" 
1Kings4:4 Benaia nwa Jehoiada bu onye-isi usu-ndi-agha; Zedok na Abaiata bu ndi-nchu-àjà; 
1Kings4:5 Azaraia nwa Netan bu onye-isi nke ndi edoro ndi-isi; Zabud nwa Netan bu onye-isi n'ije ozi na eyì eze; 
1Kings4:6 Ahisha bu onye-isi ulo eze; Adonairam nwa Abda bu onye-isi usu ndi nēfè òfùfè. 
1Kings4:7 Solomon nwe-kwa-ra ndikom iri na abua edoro ndi-isi Israel nile, ndi nāzù eze na ulo-ya: nwoke ọ bula nime ha nwe izù eze otù ọnwa n'arọ." 
1Kings4:8 Ndia bu kwa aha-ha: Ben-hua, n'ugwu Efraim:" 
1Kings4:9 Ben-deka, nime Makaz, na nime Shaalbim na Bet-shemesh, na Ilon-bet-hanan:" 
1Kings4:10 Ben-hesed, n'Arubot; ya nwere Soko na ala Hefa nile:" 
1Kings4:11 Ben-abinadab, n'ebe nile di elu nke Doa; Tafat nwa Solomon ka ọ nwere na nwunye:" 
1Kings4:12 Beana nwa Ahailud, nime Teanak na Megido, na Bet-shean nile nke di n'akuku Zaretan, n'okpuru Jezreel, site na Bet-shean rue Ebel-mehola, rue ofè Jọkmeam:" 
1Kings4:13 Ben-geba, nime Remot-gilead; ya nwere Havot nke Jaia nwa Manase, nke di na Gilead; ya nwere akuku Agob, nke di na Beshan, ọgu obodo uku atọ nke nwere mb͕idi na nkpọrọ ọla:" 
1Kings4:14 Ahinadab nwa Ido, nime Mahanaim:" 
1Kings4:15 Ahimaaz, nime Naftali; onye ahu lu-kwa-ra Basemat nwa Solomon na nwunye:" 
1Kings4:16 Beana nwa Hushai, n'Asha na Bealot:" 
1Kings4:17 Jehoshafat nwa Parua, n'Isaka:" 
1Kings4:18 Shimai nwa Ila, nime Benjamin:" 
1Kings4:19 Gebea nwa Uri, n'ala Gilead, bú ala Saihon eze ndi-Amorait na nke Og, bú eze Beshan; ma nání ya bu onye edoro onye-isi nke di n'ala ahu." 
1Kings4:20 Juda na Israel di ọtutu, dika ájá nke di n'akuku oké osimiri n'iba-uba, nēri ihe, nāṅu kwa ihe-ọṅuṅu, nāṅuri kwa ọṅu." 
1Kings4:21 Solomon we nāchi ala-eze nile site n'Osimiri rue ala ndi Filistia, ru kwa ókè-ala Ijipt: ha nēweta nso onyinye-inata-iru-ọma, nēfè kwa Solomon òfùfè ubọchi nile nke ndu-ya." 
1Kings4:22 Ihe-oriri Solomon nke diri otù ubọchi bu kwa orú ọtùtù ọka na iri nke utu ọka flour, na ọgu ọtùtù ọka atọ nke utu ọka;" 
1Kings4:23 ehi iri mara abuba, na orú ehi site n'ebe anāzù anu, na ọgu aturu ise, nāgughi ele, na mb͕ada, na ob͕o-miri, na ọkuku emere ka ha ma abuba." 
1Kings4:24 N'ihi na ya onwe-ya nwere ike n'aru ndi nile bi n'ofè Osimiri, site na Tifsa we rue Geza, bú n'aru eze nile n'ofè Osimiri: o nwe-kwa-ra udo site n'ofè ọzọ nile di ya buruburu." 
1Kings4:25 Juda na Israel we biri na ntukwasi-obi, nwoke ọ bula n'okpuru osisi vine ya na n'okpuru osisi fig ya, site na Dan we rue na Biasheba, ubọchi nile nke Solomon." 
1Kings4:26 Solomon nwe-kwa-ra orú nnù ulo uzọ ise nke inyinya diri ub͕ọ-ala-ya, na orú nnù ndi-inyinya na nnù iri." 
1Kings4:27 Ndi ahu edoro ndi-isi zù-kwa-ra eze, bú Solomon, na ndi nile nābiaru table nke eze Solomon nso, nwoke ọ bula n'ọnwa-ya: ha ekweghi ka ihe ọ bula kọ ukọ." 
1Kings4:28 Ha nēweta kwa ọka barley na okporo-ọka n'ebe ndi ahu edoro ndi-isi nọ, nwoke ọ bula dika ihe ekpere ya n'ikpe si di, inye inyinya na inye inyinya ukwu ọsọ." 
1Kings4:29 Chineke nye-kwa-ra Solomon amam-ihe na nghọta riri nne nke-uku, na obi sara mbara, dika ájá nke di n'usọ oké osimiri." 
1Kings4:30 Amam-ihe Solomon we ba uba kari amam-ihe umu Iru-anyanwu nile, kari kwa amam-ihe Ijipt nile." 
1Kings4:31 Ọ we mara ihe kari madu nile; kari Itan onye-Ezrahait, na Himan, na Kalkol, na Dada, bú umu-ndikom Mahol: aha-ya we di na mba nile b͕ara ha buruburu." 
1Kings4:31 Ọ we mara ihe kari madu nile; kari Itan onye-Ezrahait, na Himan, na Kalkol, na Dada, bú umu-ndikom Mahol: aha-ya we di na mba nile b͕ara ha buruburu." 
1Kings4:32 Ọ tua nnù ilu asa na ọgu iri: abù-ya di kwa nnù abua na ọgu iri na abù ise. 
1Kings4:33 O kwu-kwa-ra okwu bayere osisi, site na cedar nke di na Lebanon we rue hyssop nke nēpuputa na mb͕idi: o kwu-kwa-ra okwu bayere anu, baye-kwa-ra anu-ufe, baye-kwa-ra ihe nākpu akpu, baye-kwa-ra azù." 
1Kings4:34 Ha we si na ndi nile bia inu amam-ihe Solomon, si n'eze nile nke uwa, bú ndi nuru amam-ihe-ya." 
1Kings5:1 Hairam, bú eze Taia, we zìe ndi-orù-ya jekuru Solomon: n'ihi na ọ nuru na ya ka ha tere manu ibu eze n'ọnọdu nna-ya: n'ihi na onye nāhu Devid n'anya ubọchi nile ka Hairam bu." 
1Kings5:2 Solomon we zigara Hairam ozi, si," 
1Kings5:3 Gi onwe gi amawo Devid, bú nnam, na ọ pughi iwuru aha Jehova, bú Chineke-ya, ulo n'ihi agha nke b͕ara ya buruburu, rue mb͕e Jehova tiyere ha n'okpuru ọbu-ukwu-ya abua." 
1Kings5:4 Ma ub͕u a Jehova, bú Chinekem, emewo ka m'zuru ike buruburu; ọ dighi onye-nmegide, ọ dighi kwa ihe ọjọ daputara ayi." 
1Kings5:5 Ma, le, m'nāsi na m'gēwuru aha Jehova, bú Chinekem, ulo, dika Jehova gwara Devid, bú nnam, okwu, si, Nwa-gi, onye M'gētiyekwasi n'oche-eze-gi n'ọnọdu gi, ya onwe-ya gēwuru aham ulo." 
1Kings5:6 Ma ub͕u a nye iwu ka ha b͕utuerem osisi cedar site na Lebanon; ndi-orùm gēso kwa ndi-orù-gi; m'gēnye kwa gi ugwọ-ọlu ndi-orù-gi dika ihe nile si di nke i gāsim: n'ihi na gi onwe-gi amawo na ọ dighi nwoke n'etiti ayi mara ib͕utu osisi dika ndi Zaidon. 
1Kings5:7 O rue, mb͕e Hairam nuru okwu nile nke Solomon, na ọ ṅuriri ọṅu nke-uku, si, Onye agọziri agọzi ka Jehova bu ta, Onye nyeworo Devid nwa mara ihe ibu onye-isi ndi uku a." 
1Kings5:8 Hairam we zigara Solomon ozi, si, Anuwom ozi nke i ziterem: mu onwem gēme ihe nile nātọ gi utọ bayere osisi cedar, baye-kwa-ra osisi fir." 
1Kings5:9 Ndi-orùm gēsi na Lebanon buputa ha oké osimiri: mu onwem gāb͕a kwa ha ka ha se n'elu oké osimiri rue ebe ahu nke i gēziterem ozi, m'gātọsa kwa ha n'ebe ahu, gi onwe-gi gēburu kwa ha: gi onwe-gi gēme kwa ihe nātọm utọ, n'inye ulom nri." 
1Kings5:10 Hairam we nēnye Solomon osisi cedar na osisi fir, bú ka ihe nile nātọ ya utọ ra." 
1Kings5:11 Solomon we nye Hairam orú nnù ọtùtù ọka uzọ abua na nnù iri nke ọka wheat iburu ulo-ya ihe-oriri, na orú ọtùtù cor nke manu asuru asu: otú a ka Solomon nēnye Hairam kwa-arọ." 
1Kings5:12 Jehova nye-kwa-ra Solomon amam-ihe, dika Ọ gwara ya; udo we di n'etiti Hairam na Solomon; ha abua we b͕a ndu." 
1Kings5:13 Eze, bú Solomon, we weputa usu ndi nēfè òfùfè n'Israel nile; usu ahu ndi nēfè òfùfè bu orú nnù ndikom uzọ atọ na nnù iri-na-ise." 
1Kings5:14 O ziga ha na Lebanon, orú nnù ndikom na nnù ise n'ọnwa na nb͕anwe: otù ọnwa ka ha nọ na Lebanon, ọnwa abua n'ulo: Adonairam bu kwa onye-isi usu ndi nēfè òfùfè." 
1Kings5:15 Solomon nwe-kwa-ra orú nnù ndikom uzọ asatọ na nnù iri-na-ise ndi nēbu ibu, na orù nnù ndikom uzọ iri ndi nāwa ihe-ọwuwa n'ugwu;" 
1Kings5:16 nāgughi ndi-isi nke ndi edoro ndi-isi, bú ndi Solomon nwere, ndi bu isi n'ije-ozi ahu, nnù ndikom asatọ na ọgu ise, ndi nwere ike n'aru ndi ahu ndi nālu ọlu n'ije-ozi ahu." 
1Kings5:17 Eze we nye iwu, ha we bute nkume uku, nkume di oké ọnu-ahia, iwere nkume awaputara awaputa tọ ntọ-ala ulo ahu." 
1Kings5:18 Ndi-owu-ulo nke Solomon na ndi-owu-ulo nke Hairam na ndi Gebal we, dozie osisi na nkume iwu ulo ahu." 
1Kings6:1 O rue, n'arọ nke-nnù-na-ọgu-anọ site na mb͕e umu Israel siri n'ala Ijipt putasia, n'arọ nke-anọ nke Solomon bu eze Israel, n'ọnwa Ziv, nke bu ọnwa nke-abua, na o wubere Jehova ulo." 
1Kings6:2 Ma ulo ahu nke eze, bú Solomon, wuru Jehova, ọgu cubit atọ ka ogologo-ya di, orú cubit ka obosara-ya di, orú cubit na iri ka idi-elu-ya di." 
1Kings6:3 Uzọ-nbata kwa nke di n'iru ulo uku nke ulo ahu, orú cubit ka ogologo-ya di, n'iru obosara ulo ahu; cubit iri ka obosara-ya di n'iru ulo ahu." 
1Kings6:4 O we mere ulo ahu window ufọdu di obosara nime, kpa kwa nkpa n'èzi." 
1Kings6:5 O wu-kwa-ra okpukpu-ulo n'akuku mb͕idi ulo ahu buruburu, bú mb͕idi nile nke ulo ahu buruburu, ma nke ulo uku Chineke ahu, ma nke ime-ime-ulo ahu: o me-kwa-ra ulo ntà nke akuku buruburu:" 
1Kings6:6 Okpukpu-ulo nke dikarisiri ala, cubit ise ka obosara-ya di, okpukpu-ulo nke-etiti kwa, cubit isi ka obosara-ya di, okpukpu-ulo nke-atọ kwa, cubit asa ka obosara-ya di: n'ihi na o tiyere ngwe n'ulo ahu buruburu n'èzí, ka ihe we ghara ibà na mb͕idi ulo ahu." 
1Kings6:7 Ulo ahu, mb͕e anēwu ya, eji nkume nke awazuru awazu mb͕e ebutere ya wue ya: anughi kwa otùtù ma-ọbu anyu-ike ma-ọbu ihe-ọlu ọ bula nke ígwè n'ulo ahu, mb͕e anēwu ya." 
1Kings6:8 Ọnu-uzọ nke ulo ntà nke akuku nke-etiti di n'akuku aka-nri nke ulo ahu: ha we si n'uzọ-nrigo nke nāga buruburu nārigo n'ulo ntà nke-etiti, si kwa na nke-etiti je rue nke-atọ." 
1Kings6:9 O we wue ulo ahu, wusia ya; o we were ibo na akuku osisi cedar kpue ulo ahu." 
1Kings6:10 O wue okpukpu-ulo n'aru ulo ahu nile, cubit ise ka idi-elu-ha di: ha we dabere n'ulo ahu n'osisi cedar." 
1Kings6:11 Okwu Jehova we biakute Solomon, si," 
1Kings6:12 Ulo a nke gi onwe-gi nēwu, ọ buru na i jegharia n'ukpurum nile, ọ buru kwa na i me ihe nile M'kpere n'ikpe, ọ buru kwa na i debe ihe nile M'nyere n'iwu ijeghari nime ha; M'gēme kwa ka okwum guzosie ike n'ebe i nọ, bú nke M'gwara Devid, bú nna-gi." 
1Kings6:13 M'gēbi kwa n'etiti umu Israel, M'gaghi-arapu kwa ndim, bú Israel." 
1Kings6:14 Solomon we wue ulo ahu, wusia ya." 
1Kings6:15 O were ibo osisi cedar wue mb͕idi ulo ahu nime; site n'ala ulo rue mb͕idi nke okpukpu, o were osisi machita ha nime: o were ibo osisi fir machita ala ulo." 
1Kings6:16 O were ibo osisi cedar wue ebe di orú cubit n'azu ulo ahu, site n'ala ulo rue mb͕idi: o were ha wuere ya nime, ibu ime-ime-ulo, ibu ebe nsọ kachasi ebe nsọ nile." 
1Kings6:17 Ulo ahu, nke ahu bú, ulo uku Chineke nke di n'iru ya, di ọgu cubit abua n'ogologo." 
1Kings6:18 Osisi cedar di kwa n'aru ulo ahu nime, nke apiri ihe otutu, bú afufa-ọhia na okoko-osisi wara awa: ime ulo ahu nile bu osisi cedar; ọ dighi nkume ahuru anya." 
1Kings6:19 O dozi-kwa-ra ime-ime-ulo n'etiti ulo ahu nime, itiye ib͕e ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Jehova n'ebe ahu." 
1Kings6:20 Ma n'iru ime-ime-ulo ahu di orú cubit n'ogologo, na orú cubit n'obosara, na orú cubit n'idi-elu-ya; ọ machita ya ọla-edo makarisiri nma: o were kwa osisi cedar machita ebe-ichu-àjà." 
1Kings6:21 Solomon we were ọla-edo makarisiri nma machita ulo ahu nime: o me ka iyab͕a ọla-edo gabiga n'iru ime-ime-ulo ahu; ọ machita kwa ya ọla-edo. 
1Kings6:22 Ọ machita-kwa-ra ulo ahu nile ọla-edo, rue mb͕e amachitazuru ulo nile: o were kwa ọla-edo machita ebe-ichu-àjà ahu nile bu nke diri ime-ime-ulo ahu." 
1Kings6:23 O me-kwa-ra cherubim abua nke osisi manu olive n'ime-ime-ulo ahu, cubit iri ka elu-ha di." 
1Kings6:24 Cubit ise ka otù nku cherub di, cubit ise ka nkù nke-ọzọ nke cherub di kwa: site na nsọtu nkù-ya we rue nsọtu nke-ọzọ nke nkù-ya di cubit iri." 
1Kings6:25 Cubit iri ka cherub nke-ọzọ di kwa: cherubim abua ahu nwere otù ọtùtù na otù ọpipi. 
1Kings6:26 Idi-elu otù cherub di cubit iri, otú a ka cherub nke-ọzọ di kwa." 
1Kings6:27 O we tiye cherubim n'etiti ime-ulo: ha we b͕asa nkù cherubim ahu, nkù nke otù we metu mb͕idi, nkù cherub nke-ọzọ nēmetu kwa mb͕idi nke-ọzọ; nkù-ha nēmeturita onwe-ha, nkù na nkù, n'etiti ulo ahu." 
1Kings6:28 Ọ machita cherubim ọla-edo. 
1Kings6:29 Ọ tu-kwa-ra mb͕idi nile nke ulo ahu buruburu n'eb͕ub͕u nke ihe-ọpipi, bú cherubim na nkwu na okoko-osisi wara awa, n'ime na n'èzí." 
1Kings6:30 Ọ machita-kwa-ra ala ulo ahu ọla-edo, n'ime na n'èzí." 
1Kings6:31 O me ibo-uzọ osisi manu olive tiye n'ọnu-uzọ ime-ime-ulo ahu: ọfiere-uzọ na awara-uzọ abua bu otù uzọ n'uzọ ise nke mb͕idi. 
1Kings6:32 Ibo-uzọ abua ahu bu osisi manu olive; ọ pia n'elu ha ihe-ọpipi, bú cherubim na nkwu na okoko-osisi wara awa, ọ machita ha ọla-edo; o tisa kwa ọla-edo n'aru cherubim, na n'aru nkwu." 
1Kings6:33 Otú a ka o me-kwa-ra awara-uzọ abua nke osisi manu olive itiye n'ọnu-uzọ ulo uku Chineke, site n'otù uzọ n'uzọ anọ nke mb͕idi;" 
1Kings6:34 na ibo-uzọ abua nke osisi fir; ibewa-uzọ abua nke otù ibo-uzọ nāga buruburu, ibewa-uzọ abua nke ibo-uzọ nke-ọzọ nāga kwa buruburu." 
1Kings6:35 Ọ pia n'elu ha cherubim na nkwu na okoko-osisi wara awa: ọ were ọla-edo nke emere ka ọ dabà n'elu ihe eb͕uru eb͕ub͕u machita ha. 
1Kings6:36 O were akuku nkume awara awa atọ na otù ariri osisi cedar awara awa wue ogige ime-ime. 
1Kings6:37 N'arọ nke-anọ ka atọrọ ntọ-ala ulo Jehova, n'ọnwa Ziv." 
1Kings6:38 Ma n'arọ nke-iri-na-otù, n'ọnwa Bul, nke bu ọnwa nke-asatọ, ka ewusiri ulo ahu n'ihe-ya nile na n'ikpé-ya nile. O we nọ arọ asa n'iwu ya." 
1Kings7:1 Ma Solomon nọ arọ iri na atọ n'iwu ulo nke aka ya, ọ we wubìe ulo-ya nile." 
1Kings7:2 O we wue ulo oké ọhia Lebanon; ọgu cubit ise ka ogologo-ya di, ọgu cubit abua na iri ka obosara-ya di kwa, orú cubit na iri ka idi-elu-ya di, ọ di n'elu akuku anọ nke ogidi osisi cedar, osisi cedar awara awa di kwa n'elu ogidi ahu." 
1Kings7:3 Ewere osisi cedar kpuchie ya n'elu, n'elu ọgu ulo ntà nke akuku abua na ise, nke di n'elu ogidi; iri na ise n'otù akuku." 
1Kings7:4 Ọnọdu window di kwa n'akuku atọ, ebe nleputa-anya di kwa na ncherita-iru ebe nleputa-anya n'okpukpu atọ." 
1Kings7:5 Ọnu-uzọ nile na awara-uzọ nile nwere akuku anọ ra nrata, n'ọnọdu window: ebe nleputa-anya di kwa na ncherita-iru ebe nleputa-anya n'okpukpu atọ." 
1Kings7:6 O me-kwa-ra uzọ-nbata nke ogidi; ọgu cubit abua na iri ka ogologo-ya di, orú cubit na iri ka obosara-ya di kwa; uzọ-nbata di kwa n'iru ha; ogidi na nbata-uzọ di kwa n'iru ha." 
1Kings7:7 Ọ me-kwa-ra uzọ-nbata nke oche-eze ebe ọ ganēkpe ikpe, bú uzọ-nbata ikpé: ewere kwa osisi cedar kpuchie ya site n'ala ulo rue ala ulo." 
1Kings7:8 Ma ulo-ya ebe o nēbi, bú ogige ọzọ nke di nime uzọ-nbata, ọ di ka ọlu a si di. O wu-kwa-ra ulo nye nwa-nwayi Fero, (bú nwayi nke Solomon luru na nwunye,) dika uzọ-nbata nka." 
1Kings7:9 Eji nkume di oké ọnu-ahia wu ndia nile, bú nkume awara awa, dika ọtùtù si di, nkume eji mma-nkwọ kwọ, n'ime na n'èzí, bú site na ntọ-ala rue ndobi-ya, na n'èzí rue ogige uku ahu." 
1Kings7:10 Ntọ-ala-ya bu kwa nkume di oké ọnu-ahia, bú nkume uku, nkume di cubit iri, na nkume di cubit asatọ." 
1Kings7:11 Nkume nke di oké ọnu-ahia di kwa n'elu, dika ọtùtù nke osisi awara awa si di, na osisi cedar." 
1Kings7:12 Ogige uku nke di buruburu nwe-kwa-ra akuku atọ nke nkume awara awa, na otù ariri nke osisi cedar awara awa; ọbuná dika ogige ime-ime ulo Jehova si enwe, na dika uzọ-nbata ulo si enwe." 
1Kings7:13 Eze Solomon we ziga si na Taia kuputa Hairam. 
1Kings7:14 Nwa nke nwayi di-ya nwuru ka ọ bu, sitere n'ebo Naftali, ma nna-ya bu nwoke Taia, bú ọkpu-ọla; o juputara n'amam-ihe na nghọta na ihe-ọmuma, ije ozi ọ bula n'ọla. O we biakute eze, bú Solomon, je ozi-ya nile." 
1Kings7:15 O we kpua ogidi ọla abua, cubit iri na asatọ ka idi-elu otù ogidi di: ogho cubit iri na abua b͕a-kwa-ra ogidi nke-abua buruburu." 
1Kings7:16 O me-kwa-ra isi abua nke ọla awuru awu, itiye n'elu ogidi: cubit ise ka idi-elu otù isi di, cubit ise ka idi-elu isi nke-ọzọ di kwa." 
1Kings7:17 Ihe-ọkpukpa, bú ihe emere ka ha yie ihe-ọkpukpa, na ihe aturu atu, bú ihe emere ka ha yie iyab͕a, diri isi nke di n'elu ogidi abua; asa diri otù isi, asa di-kwa-ra isi nke-ọzọ." 
1Kings7:18 O me ogidi abua ahu; akuku abua dikwasi otù ihe-ọkpukpa buruburu, ikpuchi isi nke di n'elu pomegranate: otú a ka o me-kwa-ra isi nke-ọzọ." 
1Kings7:19 Isi nke di n'elu ogidi n'uzọ-nbata ahu bu ihe emere ka ha yie urodi, cubit anọ." 
1Kings7:20 Ma isi di kwa n'elu ogidi abua ahu n'elu, na ncherita-iru afọ nke di n'akuku ihe-ọkpukpa: pomegranate di ọgu iri, n'akuku nke dikwasi isi nke-ọzọ buruburu." 
1Kings7:21 O guzo ogidi abua ahu n'uzọ-nbata nke ulo uku Chineke: o guzo ogidi aka-nri, kpọ aha-ya Jakin: o guzo ogidi aka-ekpe, kpọ aha-ya Boaz." 
1Kings7:22 Ma n'elu ogidi ihe di nke emere ka o yie urodi: ewe luzue ọlu ogidi abua ahu. 
1Kings7:23 O me-kwa-ra oké osimiri awuru awu, cubit iri site n'otù ọnu-ya rue ọnu-ya nke-ọzọ, ọ di gburugburu gburugburu, cubit ise ka idi-elu-ya di: eriri nke orú cubit na iri b͕a-kwa-ra ya buruburu." 
1Kings7:24 Afufa-ọhia di kwa n'okpuru ọnu-ya buruburu nke nāb͕a ya buruburu, iri di n'otù cubit, nāb͕a oké osimiri ahu buruburu: afufa-ọhia ahu di ariri abua, awuru mb͕e awuru ya." 
1Kings7:25 Ọ nēguzo n'elu ehi iri na abua, atọ nēche iru n'Ugwu, atọ nēche iru n'Ọdida-anyanwu, atọ nēche iru na Ndida, atọ nēche iru n'Ọwuwa-anyanwu: oké osimiri ahu we dikwasi ha n'elu, azu-ha nile di kwa nime." 
1Kings7:26 Ib͕idi-ya di otù ntù-ọbu-aka; emere ọnu-ya dika anēme ọnu iko, dika okoko urodi: nnù bath ise ka ọ nānagide." 
1Kings7:27 Ọ me ihe-ndọkwasi iri nke ọla; cubit anọ ka ogologo otù ihe-ndọkwasi di, cubit anọ ka obosara-ya di kwa, cubit atọ ka idi-elu-ya di kwa." 
1Kings7:28 Ma nka bu otú emere ihe-ndọkwasi: ha nwere ihe-njikọ, bú ihe-njikọ n'etiti nkwukọta-ya:" 
1Kings7:29 ọdum na ehi na cherubim di n'ihe-njikọ nke di n'etiti nkwukọta ahu; ihe-ndọkwasi dikwasi na nkwukọta n'elu: ihe aturu atu nke emere ka o yie ihe-nkwuba di kwa n'okpuru ọdum nile na ehi nile. 
1Kings7:30 Ihe-ndọkwasi ọ bula nwere wheel ọla anọ, na axle ọla: ukwu-ya anọ nwere ubu: n'okpuru ite ọsisa-miri ahu ka ubu ahu akpuru akpu di, n'akuku ihe aturu atu ọ bula." 
1Kings7:31 Ọnu-ya nime isi-ya na n'elu di otù cubit: ọnu-ya di kwa buruburu, otú emere ihe-ndọkwasi, otù cubit na nkera cubit: ihe-ọpipi dikwasi kwa n'ọnu-ya, ihe-njikọ nile ha nwere akuku anọ ra nrata, ha adighi buruburu." 
1Kings7:32 Wheel anọ ahu di n'okpuru ihe-njikọ: aka wheel di n'ihe-ndọkwasi: idi-elu otù wheel di otù cubit na nkera cubit. 
1Kings7:33 Otú emere wheel nile di ka esi eme wheel ub͕ọ-ala: aka nile ha, na azu nile ha, na ihe nile nējikọta ha, na etiti nile ha, awuru ha nile awu." 
1Kings7:34 Ubu anọ di na nkuku anọ nke ihe-ndọkwasi ọ bula: ubu-ya sitere n'ihe-ndọkwasi ahu. 
1Kings7:35 Ihe di gburugburu gburugburu, nke idi-elu-ya di nkera cubit, di n'elu ihe-ndọkwasi ahu: aka-ya nile na ihe-njikọ-ya nile, nke di n'elu ihe-ndọkwasi ahu sitere na ya." 
1Kings7:36 O b͕ue eb͕ub͕u cherubim na ọdum na nkwu n'elu mbadamba aka-ya nile, na n'elu ihe-njikọ-ya nile, dika ọnọdu di efu nke ebe ọ bula si di, ha na ihe aturu atu buruburu." 
1Kings7:37 Otú a ka o mere ihe-ndọkwasi iri ahu: ha nile nwere otù ọwuwu, na otù ọtùtù, na otù ọpipi." 
1Kings7:38 O me kwa ite ọsisa-miri iri nke ọla: ọgu bath abua ka otù ite ọsisa-miri nānagide: cubit anọ ka ite ọsisa-miri ọ bula di: otù ite ọsisa-miri di n'elu ihe-ndọkwasi ọ bula n'ihe-ndọkwasi iri ahu. 
1Kings7:39 O tiye ihe-ndọkwasi ahu, ise n'akuku aka-nri ulo ahu, ise n'akuku aka-ekpe ulo ahu: o tiye kwa oké osimiri ahu n'akuku aka-nri ulo ahu n'akuku Iru-anyanwu, na ncherita iru Ndida." 
1Kings7:40 Hairam me-kwa-ra ite ọsisa-miri nile, na osekè nile, na ọkwa-nwusa nile. Hairam we jebìe ozi nile nke o jere eze, bú Solomon, n'ulo Jehova:" 
1Kings7:41 ogidi abua ahu, na ọkwa abua nke isi nke di n'elu ogidi abua; na ihe-ọkpukpa abua ahu ikpuchi ọkwa abua nke isi nke di n'elu ogidi;" 
1Kings7:42 na nnù pomegranate ahu nke diri ihe-ọkpukpa abua ahu; bú akuku pomegranate abua bayere otù ihe-ọkpukpa, ikpuchi ọkwa abua nke isi nke di n'iru ogidi;" 
1Kings7:43 na ihe-ndọkwasi iri ahu, na ite ọsisa-miri iri ahu nke di n'elu ihe-ndọkwasi;" 
1Kings7:44 na otù oké osimiri ahu, na ehi iri na abua ahu nke di n'okpuru oké osimiri;" 
1Kings7:45 na ite nile, na osekè nile, na ọkwa-nwusa nile: ma ihe ndia nile, nke Hairam mere eze, bú Solomon, n'ulo Jehova, bu ọla nēb͕u maramara." 
1Kings7:46 Na buruburu-ala Jọdan ka eze wuru ha, n'ala urọ n'etiti Sukot na Zaretan." 
1Kings7:47 Solomon we dọba ihe ahu nile ghara itù ha, n'ihi na ha bara uba nke ukwu: achọputaghi ọtùtù ọla ahu." 
1Kings7:48 Solomon me-kwa-ra ihe nile nke di n'ulo Jehova: ebe-ichu-àjà ọla-edo, na table nke achicha iru Chineke di n'elu ya, ọ bu ọla-edo:" 
1Kings7:49 na ihe-idọba-oriọna, ise n'aka-nri, ise n'aka-ekpe, n'iru ime-ime-ulo ahu, ha bu ọla-edo makarisiri nma; na okoko-osisi nile, na oriọna nile, na nkpa nile, ha bu ọla-edo;" 
1Kings7:50 na iko nile, na ihe-ikpakepu-ọku nile, na ọkwa-nwusa nile, na ngaji nile, na ihe-igu-ọku nile, ha bu ọla-edo makarisiri nma; na ihe-nkoye-ibo nile, ma nke diri ọnu-uzọ ime-ime ulo ahu, bú ebe nsọ kachasi ebe nsọ nile, ma nke diri ọnu-uzọ ulo, bú ulo uku Chineke, ha bu ọla-edo." 
1Kings7:51 Ewe jezue ozi nile nke eze, bú Solomon, jere n'ulo Jehova. Solomon we webata ihe nile Devid, bú nna-ya, doro nsọ, bú ọla-ọcha, na ọla-edo, na ihe nile, o we tiye ha n'ulo-àkù nke ulo Jehova." 
1Kings8:1 Mb͕e ahu Solomon kpọkọtara ndi-okenye Israel, na ndi-isi nile nke ebo nile ha, bú ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna umu Israel, ibiakute eze, bú Solomon, nime Jerusalem, isi n'obodo Devid, nke ahu bu Zaion, bugota ib͕e ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Jehova." 
1Kings8:2 Ndikom nile nke Israel we kpọkọta onwe-ha biakute eze, bú Solomon, n'ememe, n'ọnwa Etanim, nke ahu bu ọnwa nke-asa." 
1Kings8:3 Ndi-okenye nile nke Israel we bia, ndi-nchu-àjà we bulie ib͕e ahu." 
1Kings8:4 Ha we bugota ib͕e Jehova, na ulo-ikwū nzute, na ihe nsọ nile nke di n'Ulo-ikwū ahu; ndi-nchu-àjà na ndi Livai we bugota ha." 
1Kings8:5 Eze, bú Solomon, na nzukọ nile nke Israel, bú ndi nēzukọta n'ebe ọ nọ, nọyere ya n'iru ib͕e ahu, n'āchu àjà ìgwè ewu na aturu na ìgwè ehi, nke anādighi-agu ha ọnu, nke anādighi-aguta kwa ha n'ihi iba-uba-ha." 
1Kings8:6 Ndi-nchu-àjà we bubata ib͕e ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Jehova n'ebe-ya, nime ime-ime-ulo nke ulo ahu, rue ebe nsọ kachasi ebe nsọ nile, rue n'okpuru nkù cherubim." 
1Kings8:7 N'ihi na cherubim nāb͕asa nkù-ha rue ebe ib͕e ahu, cherubim we nēkpuchi ib͕e ahu na nkpa-n'aka-ya abua n'elu." 
1Kings8:8 Nkpa-n'aka we di ogologo, ewe hu isi nkpa-n'aka site n'ebe nsọ n'iru ime-ime-ulo ahu; ma adighi-ahu ha n'èzí: ha we di n'ebe ahu, rue ta." 
1Kings8:9 Ọ dighi ihe di n'ib͕e ahu, ọ bu nání mbadamba nkume abua nke Moses dọbara n'ebe ahu na Horeb, mb͕e Jehova na umu Israel b͕ara ndu, mb͕e ha siri n'ala Ijipt puta." 
1Kings8:10 O rue, mb͕e ndi-nchu-àjà siri n'ebe nsọ puta, na igwe-oji juputara ulo Jehova," 
1Kings8:11 ndi-nchu-àjà we ghara inwe ike iguzo ije ozi n'ihi igwe-oji ahu: n'ihi na ebube Jehova juputara ulo Jehova. 
1Kings8:12 Mb͕e ahu Solomon siri, Jehova asiwo na O gēbi n'oké ọchichiri." 
1Kings8:13 N'ezie ewuworom I ulo obibi, bú ọnọdu guzosiri ike ebe I gēbi rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi." 
1Kings8:14 Eze we chigharia iru-ya, gọzie nkpọkọta nile nke Israel: nkpọkọta nile nke Israel nēguzo kwa." 
1Kings8:15 Ọ si, Onye agọziri agọzi ka Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, bu, Onye were ọnu-Ya gwa Devid, bú nnam, okwu, were kwa aka-Ya mezue ya, si," 
1Kings8:16 Site n'ubọchi mb͕e M'mere ka ndim, bú Israel, si n'Ijipt puta, arọputaghm obodo n'ebo nile nke Israel iwu ulo, ka aham we di n'ebe ahu; ma arọputaram Devid ibu onye-isi ndim, bú Israel." 
1Kings8:17 O we di n'obi Devid, bú nnam, iwuru aha Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, ulo." 
1Kings8:18 Jehova we si Devid, bú nnam, N'ihi na ọ di n'obi-gi iwuru aham ulo, i mere nke-ọma na ọ di n'obi-gi:" 
1Kings8:19 otú ọ di, gi onwe-gi agaghi-ewu ulo ahu: kama, nwa-gi nwoke nke nēsi n'úkwù-gi puta, onye ahu gēwuru aham ulo." 
1Kings8:20 Jehova emewo kwa ka okwu-Ya nke O kwuru guzosie ike; m'we bilie n'ọnọdu Devid, bú nnam, nọkwasi n'oche-eze Israel, dika Jehova kwuru, m'we wuere aha Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, ulo," 
1Kings8:21 doro ib͕e ahu ọnọdu n'ebe ahu, bú ib͕e nke ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Jehova di n'ebe ahu, bú ọb͕ub͕a-ndu nke Ya na nna-ayi-hà b͕ara, mb͕e O mere ka ha si n'ala Ijipt puta." 
1Kings8:22 Solomon we guzo n'iru ebe-ichu-àjà Jehova n'iru nkpọkọta nile nke Israel, we b͕asa ọbu-aka-ya abua n'ebe elu-igwe di:" 
1Kings8:23 ọ si, Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, ọ dighi Chineke dika Gi, n'elu-igwe di n'elu, ma-ọbu n'elu uwa di n'okpuru; I nēdebere ndi-orù-Gi ọb͕ub͕a-ndu na ebere, bú ndi were obi-ha nile nējeghari n'iru Gi:" 
1Kings8:24 I debeworo orù-Gi Devid, bú nnam, ihe I gwara ya: I we were ọnu-Gi kwue, were kwa aka-Gi mezue ya, otú ọ di ta." 
1Kings8:25 Ma ub͕u a, Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, debere orù-Gi Devid, bú nnam, okwu nke I gwaworo ya, si, Ọ dighi nwoke ọ bula i nwere agēbipu n'irum n'inọkwasi n'oche-eze Israel; nání ọ buru na umu-gi elezi uzọ-ha anya, ijeghari n'irum dika i jeghariworo n'irum." 
1Kings8:26 Ma ub͕u a, Chineke Israel, biko, ka okwu-Gi kwesi ntukwasi-obi, nke I gwara orù-Gi, bú Devid nnam." 
1Kings8:27 Ma ọ̀ bu ezie na Chineke gēbi n'elu uwa? le, elu-igwe na elu-igwe nke elu-igwe agaghi-anagide Gi; ulo a nke m'wuworo, ò gēsi kwa aṅa rue inagide Gi?" 
1Kings8:28 Ma che iru n'ekpere orù-Gi, na n'aririọ-amara-ya, Jehova, bú Chinekem, ige nti iti-nkpu na ekpere orù-Gi nēkpe n'iru Gi ta:" 
1Kings8:29 ka anya-Gi abua we nāsaghe n'ebe ulo a di abali na ehihie, bú n'ebe ebe ahu di nke I siworo, Aham gādi n'ebe ahu: ige nti ekpere nke orù-Gi gēkpe n'ebe a di." 
1Kings8:30 Ge kwa nti aririọ-amara orù-Gi, na nke ndi-Gi, bú Israel, mb͕e ha nēkpe ekpere n'ebe ebe a di: Gi onwe-gi nuru kwa n'ebe obibi-Gi, n'elu-igwe; mb͕e I nuworo, Gi b͕aghara." 
1Kings8:31 Ihe ọ bula nke nwoke gēmehie nime ya megide madu-ibe-ya, ewe tukwasi ya iyi ime ka ọ ṅua, iyi ahu we bia n'iru ebe-ichu-àjà-Gi n'ulo a:" 
1Kings8:32 Gi onwe-gi nuru kwa n'elu-igwe, me kwa, kpe ndi-orù-Gi ikpe, igu onye nēmebi iwu n'onye nēmebi iwu, itukwasi uzọ-ya n'isi-ya; na igu onye ezi omume n'onye ezi omume, inye ya dika ezi omume-ya si di." 
1Kings8:33 Mb͕e anētib͕u ndi-Gi, bú Israel, n'iru onye-iro, n'ihi na ha nēmehie megide Gi; ọ buru na ha alaghachikute Gi, kwuputa aha-Gi, kpe ekpere, riọ Gi amara n'ulo a:" 
1Kings8:34 Gi onwe-gi nuru kwa n'elu-igwe, b͕aghara nmehie ndi-Gi, bú Israel, me ka ha lata n'ala nke I nyere ndi bu nna-ha." 
1Kings8:35 Mb͕e eb͕ochiri elu-igwe, mb͕e miri-ozuzo nādighi kwa, n'ihi na ha nēmehie megide Gi; ọ buru na ha ekpe ekpere n'ebe a, kwuputa aha-Gi, si na nmehie-ha laghachi, n'ihi na I nēweda ha n'ala:" 
1Kings8:36 Gi onwe-gi nuru kwa n'elu-igwe, b͕aghara nmehie ndi-orù-Gi, na nke ndi-Gi, bú Israel, n'ihi na I nēzí ha ezi uzọ nke ha ganēje ije nime ya; Gi me kwa ka miri zokwasi ala-Gi, nke I nyeworo ndi-Gi ibu ihe-nketa." 
1Kings8:37 Mb͕e oké unwu gādi n'ala, mb͕e ajọ ọria nke nēfe efe gādi, mb͕e nchakpọ gādi, ma-ọbu ọmuma-ebu, ma-ọbu igurube, ma-ọbu ọbubu; mb͕e onye-iro-ha gānọchigide ha n'agha n'ala nke ọnu-uzọ-ama nile ha; ihe-otiti ọ bula, ọria ọ bula;" 
1Kings8:38 ekpere ọ bula, aririọ ọ bula, nke gādiri madu ọ bula, ma-ọbu nke gādiri ndi-Gi nile, bú Israel, ndi gāmara, nwoke ọ bula ihe-otiti nke obi-ya, o we b͕asa ọbu-aka-ya abua n'ebe ulo a di:" 
1Kings8:39 Gi onwe-gi nuru kwa n'elu-igwe, bú ọnọdu obibi-Gi guzosiri ike, b͕aghara, me kwa, nye nwoke ọ bula dika uzọ-ya nile si di, onye I mara obi-ya; (n'ihi na Gi onwe-gi amawo obi umu madu nile, nání Gi;)" 
1Kings8:40 ka ha we tua egwu Gi ubọchi nile nke ha onwe-ha nēbi n'elu ala ahu nke I nyere nna-ayi-hà. 
1Kings8:41 Ọzọ kwa, ihe bayere onye ala ọzọ, nke ọ bughi na ndi-Gi, bú Israel, ka o sitere, ma o siwo n'ala di anya bia n'ihi aha-Gi;" 
1Kings8:42 (n'ihi na ha gānu aha uku Gi, na aka-Gi di ike, na ogwe-aka-Gi esetiri eseti;) mb͕e ọ gābia kwa kpe ekpere n'ulo a;" 
1Kings8:43 Gi onwe-gi nuru kwa n'elu-igwe, bú ọnọdu obibi-Gi guzosiri ike, me dika ihe nile si di nke onye ala ọzọ ahu nākpọku Gi; ka ndi nile nke uwa we mara aha-Gi, itu egwu Gi, dika ndi-Gi, bú Israel, si eme, na imara na akpọkwasiri aha-Gi n'ulo a nke m'wuworo." 
1Kings8:44 Mb͕e ndi-Gi gāpu ibuso onye-iro-ha agha, n'uzọ ọ bula I gēziga ha, ha we kpere Jehova n'uzọ obodo ahu nke I rọputaworo, na n'ebe ulo a di nke m'wuworo aha-Gi:" 
1Kings8:45 Gi nuru kwa n'elu-igwe ekpere-ha na aririọ-amara-ha, mezie ikpé-ha." 
1Kings8:46 Mb͕e ha gēmehie megide Gi, (n'ihi na ọ dighi madu ọ bula nke nādighi-emehie,) I we wesa ha iwe, rara ha nye n'iru onye-iro-ha, ndi nādọta ha n'agha ewe dọta ha n'agha je n'ala onye-iro, n'ebe di anya ma-ọbu n'ebe di nso;" 
1Kings8:47 ha we chegharia n'obi-ha n'ala ebe adọtara ha n'agha, we chigharia, riọ Gi amara n'ala ndi nādọta ha n'agha, si, Ayi emehiewo, me ajọ omume, mebie iwu-Gi;" 
1Kings8:48 ọ buru kwa na ha ewere obi-ha nile, were kwa nkpuru-obi-ha nile, laghachikute Gi n'ala ndi-iro-ha, bú ndi dọtara ha n'agha, ha ewe kpere Gi n'uzọ ala-ha, nke I nyere ndi bu nna-ha, na obodo ahu nke I rọputaworo, na ulo nke m'wuworo aha-Gi:" 
1Kings8:49 Gi nuru kwa n'elu-igwe, bú ọnọdu obibi-Gi guzosiri ike, ekpere-ha na aririọ-amara-ha, mezie ikpé-ha;" 
1Kings8:50 Gi b͕aghara kwa ndi-Gi ndi mehieworo megide Gi, na njehie-ha nile nke ha jehieworo megide Gi; Gi nye kwa ha ka enwe obi-ebere n'aru ha n'iru ndi nādọta ha n'agha, ka ha we nwe obi-ebere n'aru ha:" 
1Kings8:51 n'ihi na ndi-Gi na ihe-nketa-Gi ka ha bu, ndi I mere ka ha si n'ala Ijipt, n'etiti oké ọku ígwè ahu, puta:" 
1Kings8:52 ka anya-Gi abua we nāsaghe n'aririọ-amara orù-Gi, na n'aririọ-amara ndi-Gi, bú Israel, ige nti ha na nkpọku nile ha nākpọku Gi." 
1Kings8:53 N'ihi na Gi onwe-gi kewaputara ha n'etiti ndi nile nke uwa, iburu Gi ihe-nketa, dika I kwuru n'aka Moses, bú orù-Gi, mb͕e I mere ka nna-ayi-hà si n'Ijipt puta, Onye-nwe-ayi, bú Jehova." 
1Kings8:54 O rue, mb͕e Solomon kpebìri ekpere a nile na aririọ-amara a nile nye Jehova, na o siri n'iru ebe-ichu-àjà Jehova bilie, site n'ib͕u ikperè-ya abua n'ala, site kwa n'ime ka aka-ya abua b͕asa n'ebe elu-igwe di." 
1Kings8:55 O we guzo, were oké olu gọzie nkpọkọta nile nke Israel, si," 
1Kings8:56 Onye agọziri agọzi ka Jehova bu, Onye nyeworo ndi-Ya, bú Israel, izu-ike, dika ihe nile nke O kwuru si di: ọ dighi otù okwu dapuru n'okwu-Ya nile di nma, nke O kwuru n'aka Moses, bú orù-Ya." 
1Kings8:57 Ka Jehova, bú Chineke-ayi, nọyere ayi, dika Ọ nọyere nna-ayi-hà: ka Ọ ghara irapu ayi, ka Ọ ghara kwa ib͕anari ayi:" 
1Kings8:58 ka O we wezuga obi-ayi ka ha biakute Ya, ije ije n'uzọ-Ya nile, na idebe ihe nile O nyere n'iwu, na ukpuru-Ya nile, na ikpé-Ya nile, nke O nyere nna-ayi-hà n'iwu." 
1Kings8:59 Ka okwum ndia, nke m'jiri riọ amara n'iru Jehova, di kwa nso Jehova, bú Chineke-ayi, ehihie na abali, ka O we mezie ikpé orù-Ya, na ikpé ndi-Ya, bú Israel, ihe ubọchi n'ubọchi-ya:" 
1Kings8:60 ka ndi nile nke uwa we mara na Jehova, Ya onwe-ya bu Chineke; onye ọzọ adighi." 
1Kings8:61 Ka obi-unu zu kwa okè n'ebe Jehova, bú Chineke-ayi, nọ, ijeghari n'ukpuru-Ya nile, na idebe ihe nile O nyere n'iwu, otú ọ di ta." 
1Kings8:62 Eze, ya na Israel nile, nāchu kwa àjà n'iru Jehova." 
1Kings8:63 Solomon we chua ihe àjà nke àjà-udo nke ọ churu nye Jehova, bú orú nnù ehi uzọ abua na nnù iri-na-ise, na orú nnù aturu uzọ iri-na-ise. Eze na umu Israel nile we ra ulo Jehova nye Chineke." 
1Kings8:64 N'ubọchi ahu ka eze doro etiti ogige nke di n'iru ulo Jehova nsọ; n'ihi na ọ churu àjà-nsure-ọku na onyinye-inata-iru-ọma na abuba àjà-udo n'ebe ahu: n'ihi na ebe-ichu-àjà ọla nke di n'iru Jehova di ntà kari inagide àjà-nsure-ọku, na onyinye-inata-iru-ọma, na abuba àjà-udo." 
1Kings8:65 Solomon we me ememe na mb͕e ahu, ya na Israel nile, nkpọkọta uku, site na nbata Hemat rue miri-iyi Ijipt, n'iru Jehova, bú Chineke-ayi, ubọchi asa na ubọchi asa, bú ubọchi iri na anọ." 
1Kings8:66 N'ubọchi nke-asatọ o zilagara ndi Israel, ha we gọzie eze, la n'ulo-ikwū-ha nāṅuri ọṅu, obi di kwa ha nma, n'ihi ezi ihe nile nke Jehova mere Devid, bú orù-Ya, nke O me-kwa-ra Israel, bú ndi-Ya." 
1Kings9:1 O rue, mb͕e Solomon wubìri ulo Jehova, na ulo eze, na ihe nile nke di Solomon ezi nma n'obi nke tọrọ ya utọ ime," 
1Kings9:2 na Jehova mere ka Solomon hu Ya anya nke ub͕ò abua, dika O mere ka ọ hu Ya anya na Gibeon." 
1Kings9:3 Jehova we si ya, Anuwom ekpere-gi na aririọ-amara-gi, nke i riọworo n'irum: edowom ulo a, nke i wuworo, nsọ, itiye aham n'ebe ahu rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi; anyam abua na obim gādi kwa n'ebe ahu ubọchi nile." 
1Kings9:4 Ma gi onwe-gi, ọ buru na i jegharia n'irum, dika Devid, bú nna-gi, jeghariri, n'izu-okè nke obi, na n'izi-ezi, ime dika ihe nile si di nke M'nyeworo gi n'iwu, ọ buru na i debe ukpurum nile na ikpém nile;" 
1Kings9:5 M'gēme kwa ka oche-eze ala-eze-gi n'isi Israel guzosie ike rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi; dika M'gwara Devid, bú nna-gi, okwu si, Ọ dighi nwoke ọ bula i nwere agēbipu n'inọkwasi n'oche-eze Israel." 
1Kings9:6 Ma ọ buru na unu esi n'isom laghachi ma-ọli, unu onwe-unu ma-ọbu umu-unu, unu-we ghara idebe ihe nile M'nyere n'iwu na ukpurum nile nke M'tiyeworo n'iru unu, unu we je fè chi ọzọ òfùfè, kpọ isi ala nye ha:" 
1Kings9:7 M'gēbipu kwa Israel n'elu ala nka nke M'nyeworo ha; M'gēsi kwa n'irum tupu ulo a, nke M'doworo nsọ nye aham; Israel gāghọ kwa ilu na ihe-àkùkù n'etiti ndi ọzọ nile:" 
1Kings9:8 ulo a kwa, nke kachasi elu, o gēju onye ọ bula nke nāgabiga ya anya, ọ gāma ọsọ; ha gāsi kwa, N'ìhi gini ka Jehova meworo ala nka na ulo a otú a?" 
1Kings9:9 Ha gāsi kwa, Ọ bu n'ihi na ha rapuru Jehova, bú Chineke-ha, Onye mere ka ndi bu nna-ha si n'ala Ijipt puta, ha we jide chi ọzọ, kpọ isi ala nye ha, fè ha òfùfè: n'ihi ya ka Jehova meworo ka ihe ọjọ a nile biakwasi ha." 
1Kings9:10 O rue, n'ọgwugwu orú arọ, nke Solomon wuru ulo abua nime ha, bú ulo Jehova na ulo eze," 
1Kings9:11 (ma Hairam, bú eze Taia, were osisi cedar, were kwa osisi fir, were kwa ọla-edo, yere Solomon aka, dika ihe nile si di nke nātọ ya utọ,) na eze Solomon nyere Hairam orú obodo n'ala Galili mb͕e ahu." 
1Kings9:12 Hairam we si na Taia puta ihu orú obodo ahu nke Solomon nyere ya; ma ha ezighi ezi n'anya-ya. 
1Kings9:13 O we si, Gini bu obodo ndia nke i nyeworom, nwa-nnem? Ọ we kpọ ha ala Kabul, rue ta." 
1Kings9:14 Hairam we zigara eze ọgu talent ọla-edo isi. 
1Kings9:15 Ma nka bu ihe kpatara usu ndi nēfè òfùfè nke eze, bú Solomon, weputara; iwu ulo Jehova, na ulo nke aka ya, na Milo, na mb͕idi Jerusalem, na Hezoa, na Megido, na Gezea." 
1Kings9:16 N'ihi na Fero, bú eze Ijipt, rigoro, were Gezea, sure ya n'ọku, b͕ue ndi Kenean ndi bi n'ọbodo ahu, were ya nye nwa-ya nwayi, bú nwunye Solomon, ka ọ buru ihe idu-ulo." 
1Kings9:17 Solomon we wue Gezea, na Bet-horon di n'okpuru," 
1Kings9:18 na Bealat, na Tema n'ọzara, n'ala-ya," 
1Kings9:19 na obodo nile nke nchikọbata-ihe nke Solomon nwere, na obodo nile nke ub͕ọ-ala-ya, na obodo nile nke ndi-inyinya-ya, na ihe di Solomon ezi nma n'obi, bú nke di ya ezi nma n'obi iwu na Jerusalem, na nime Lebanon, na n'ala nile ọ nāchi." 
1Kings9:20 Ma ndi nile fọduru n'etiti ndi-Amorait, na ndi Het, na ndi-Perizait, na ndi-Haivait, na ndi Jebus, ndi nēsiteghi n'umu Israel;" 
1Kings9:21 umu-ha ndi fọduru inọchi ha n'ala, ndi umu Israel nāpughi iwezuga ka ebibie ha, Solomon we si nime ha weputa usu ndi nēfè òfùfè, bú ndi-orù, rue ta." 
1Kings9:22 Ma ọ dighi orù Solomon mere site n'umu Israel: kama ndi ahu bu ndikom agha, na ndi-orù-ya, na ndi-isi-ya, na ndi-ọchi-agha-ya, na ndi-isi ub͕ọ-ala-ya na ndi-inyinya-ya." 
1Kings9:23 Ndia bu ndi-isi nke ndi ahu edoro ndi-isi, ndi bu ndi-isi n'ozi anējere Solomon, nnù madu na ọgu asa na iri, ndi nwere ike n'aru ndi nālu ọlu n'ije-ozi ahu." 
1Kings9:24 Otú ọ di, nwa-nwayi Fero siri n'obodo Devid rigorue ulo-ya nke Solomon wuru nye ya: mb͕e ahu ka o wuru Milo." 
1Kings9:25 Ub͕ò atọ n'arọ ka Solomon surere àjà-nsure-ọku na àjà-udo nye Jehova n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà nke o wuru, o we sure ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ tiyere ya n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà nke di n'iru Jehova. O we wuzue ulo ahu." 
1Kings9:26 Eze, bú Solomon, me-kwa-ra ub͕ọ n'Ezion-geba, nke di n'akuku Ilot, n'usọ Oké Osimiri Uhie, n'ala Edom." 
1Kings9:27 Hairam we zìe ndi-orù-ya n'ub͕ọ-ya, bú ndi-ub͕ọ ndi mara oké osimiri, ha na ndi-orù Solomon." 
1Kings9:28 Ha we biarue Ofia, si n'ebe ahu weta ọla-edo, nnù talent na orú talent, wetara eze, bú Solomon." 
1Kings10:1 Eze-nwayi Sheba we nānu akukọ Solomon bayere aha Jehova, o we bia iwere ilu di iche iche nwa ya." 
1Kings10:2 Ọ biarue Jerusalem, ya na usu di ọtutu nke-uku, camel nēbu uda di iche iche, na ọla-edo bara uba nke-uku, na nkume di oké ọnu-ahia: o we biakute Solomon, gwa ya okwu nile nke di ya n'obi." 
1Kings10:3 Solomon we gosi ya okwu-ya nile: ọ dighi okwu ọ bula ezonariri eze nke ọ nēgosighi ya. 
1Kings10:4 Eze-nwayi Sheba we hu amam-ihe nile nke Solomon, na ulo nke o wuru," 
1Kings10:5 na ihe-oriri nke table-ya, na nnọdu nke ndi-orù-ya, na nguzo nke ndi nējere ya ozi, na uwe-ha, na ndi-obu-ihe-ọṅuṅu-ya, na àjà-nsure-ọku-ya nke ọ nēsure n'ulo Jehova; mọ adighi kwa nime ya ọzọ." 
1Kings10:6 O we si eze, Ezi-okwu ka okwu ahu bu nke m'nuru n'alam bayere okwu-gi nile, baye-kwa-ra amam-ihe-gi." 
1Kings10:7 Ma ekweghm okwu ahu, rue mb͕e m'biara, anyam abua we hu ya: ma, le, egosighm nkera-ya: i tukwasiwo amam-ihe na idi-nma n'akukọ nke m'nuru." 
1Kings10:8 Ndi ihe nāgara nke-ọma ka ndikom-i bu, ndi ihe nāgara nke-ọma ka ndi-orù-gi ndia bu, ndi nēguzo n'iru gi mb͕e nile, ndi nānu amam-ihe-gi." 
1Kings10:9 Ka Jehova, bú Chineke-gi, buru onye agọziri agọzi, Onye ihe-gi tọrọ Ya utọ, itiyekwasi gi n'oche-eze Israel: ọ bu n'ihi na Jehova huru Israel n'anya rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi ka O doro gi eze, ime ihe ekpere n'ikpe na ezi omume." 
1Kings10:10 O nye eze ọgu talent ọla-edo isi, na uda di iche iche bara uba nke-uku, na nkume di oké ọnu-ahia: ọ dighi uda biara ọzọ nke di ka uda ahu n'iba-uba, bú nke eze-nwayi Sheba nyere eze, bú Solomon." 
1Kings10:11 Ọzọ kwa, ub͕ọ Hairam, nke siri n'Ofia bute ọla-edo, ha siri n'Ofia bubata osisi almug bara uba nke-uku, na nkume di oké ọnu-ahia." 
1Kings10:12 Eze we were osisi almug ahu mere ulo Jehova, me-kwa-ra ulo eze, ihe-ndabere, ọ were kwa ha mere ndi nābù abù ubọ-akwara na une: osisi almug di otú a abiaghi, ahughi kwa ha, rue ta." 
1Kings10:13 Eze, bú Solomon, nye-kwa-ra eze-nwayi Sheba ihe nile nātọ ya utọ, ihe ọ bula ọ riọrọ, nāgughi ihe o nyere ya dika aka eze, bú Solomon, si di. O we chigharia la n'ala-ya, ya onwe-ya na ndi-orù-ya." 
1Kings10:14 Ma ọtùtù ọla-edo nke biakutere Solomon n'otù arọ di nnù talent ọla-edo na ọgu iri-na-atọ na isi," 
1Kings10:15 nāgughi ihe ndikom ndi nējeghari izu ahia wetara, na ọzuzu-ahia nke ndi nāzu ahia, na ọla-edo nke eze nile nke ndi gwara ọgwa, na ọla-edo nke ndi nāchi ala." 
1Kings10:16 Eze, bú Solomon, we me ọgu ọta uku iri, ha bu ọla-edo etisara etisa: nnù shekel ọla-edo na ọgu iri bara n'otù ọta uku." 
1Kings10:17 O me-kwa-ra ọgu ọta iri-na-ise, ha bu ọla-edo etisara etisa; pound ọla-edo atọ bara n'otù ọta: eze we tiye ha n'ulo oké ọhia Lebanon." 
1Kings10:18 Eze me-kwa-ra oké oche-eze ọdu, machita ya ọla-edo anuchara anucha." 
1Kings10:19 Oche-eze ahu nwere ihe-nrigo isi, oche-eze ahu nwe-kwa-ra elu di buruburu n'azu ya: aka di kwa n'otù akuku na n'akuku nke-ọzọ n'ebe ọnọdu-ya, ọdum abua nēguzo kwa n'akuku aka ahu." 
1Kings10:20 Ọdum iri na abua we nēguzo n'ebe ahu n'elu ihe-nrigo isi ahu n'otù akuku na n'akuku nke-ọzọ: emeghi ya otú a nye ala-eze ọ bula. 
1Kings10:21 Ihe nile Solomon nwere, bú nke eji aṅu ihe, bu ọla-edo, ihe nile nke ulo oké ọhia Lebanon bu kwa ọla-edo makarisiri nma: ọ dighi nke bu ọla-ọcha; agughi ya n'ihe ọ bula n'ubọchi Solomon." 
1Kings10:22 N'ihi na eze nwere ub͕ọ Tashish n'oké osimiri tiyere ub͕ọ Hairam: otù ub͕ò n'arọ atọ ka ub͕ọ Tashish nābia, nēbute ọla-edo, na ọla-ọcha, na ọdu, na enwe, na ekwuru-ulo." 
1Kings10:23 Eze, bú Solomon, we di uku kari eze nile nke uwa n'àkù na n'amam-ihe." 
1Kings10:24 Uwa nile we nāchọ iru Solomon, inu amam-ihe-ya, nke Chineke tiyere n'obi-ya." 
1Kings10:25 Ndi ahu nēbute kwa, nwoke ọ bula onyinye-inata-iru-ọma-ya, ihe ọla-ọcha, na ihe ọla-edo, na uwe, na ihe-ekike-agha, na uda di iche iche, na inyinya, na inyinya mule, ihe anēnye n'arọ n'arọ-ya." 
1Kings10:26 Solomon we chikọta ub͕ọ-ala na ndi-inyinya: o we nwe nnù ub͕ọ-ala atọ na ọgu iri, na orú nnù ndi-inyinya na nnù iri, ọ we do ha n'obodo ub͕ọ-ala, na n'ebe eze nọ na Jerusalem." 
1Kings10:27 Eze we me ọla-ọcha ka ọ di ka nkume na Jerusalem, ọ me-kwa-ra osisi cedar ka ha di ka osisi sycomore nke di n'ebe di ala n'uba." 
1Kings10:28 Anēme kwa ka inyinya Solomon nwere si n'Ijipt puta; n'usu ka ndi-ahia eze nānara ha, otù usu n'ọnu-ahia-ya." 
1Kings10:29 Otù ub͕ọ-ala we rigota si n'Ijipt puta na nnù shekel ọla-ọcha na ọgu iri, na otù inyinya n'ọgu shekel asa na iri: otú a ka ha nēweputara eze nile nke ndi Het, nēweputa-kwa-ra ndi-eze Siria, site n'aka-ha." 
1Kings11:1 Ma eze, bú Solomon, huru ọtutu ndinyom ala ọzọ n'anya, tiyere nwa-nwayi Fero, ndinyom Moab, ndinyom Amon, ndinyom Edom, ndinyom Zaidon, ndinyom Het;" 
1Kings11:2 bú ndi sitere na mba ndi Jehova siri umu Israel, Unu abala n'etiti ha, ndi ahu aba-kwa-la n'etiti unu: n'ezie ha gēwezuga obi-unu ka o so chi nile ha: ndi ahu ka Solomon rapara n'ihu-n'anya." 
1Kings11:3 O we nwe nnù ndinyom na ọgu iri-na-ise, bú umu ndi-isi, na ọgu ndi-iko-nwayi iri-na-ise: ndinyom-ya we wezuga obi-ya." 
1Kings11:4 O rue, na mb͕e agadi Solomon, na ndinyom-ya wezugara obi-ya ka o so chi ọzọ: obi-ya ezughi kwa okè n'ebe Jehova, bú Chineke-ya, nọ, dika obi Devid, bú nna-ya." 
1Kings11:5 Solomon we jeso Ashtoret, bú chi ndi Zaidon, jeso kwa Milkom, bú ihe-árú ndi Amon." 
1Kings11:6 Solomon we me ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova, o jesozughi kwa Jehova, dika Devid, bú nna-ya, mere." 
1Kings11:7 Mb͕e ahu Solomon wubere ebe di elu nye Kemosh, bú ihe-árú Moab, n'ugwu nke di n'iru Jerusalem, nye kwa Molek, bú ihe-árú umu Amon." 
1Kings11:8 Otú a ka o me-kwa-ra ndinyom-ya nile, bú ndi ala ọzọ, ndi nēsure ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ, nāchu-kwa-ra chi nile ha àjà." 
1Kings11:9 Jehova we wesa Solomon iwe, n'ihi na ewezugara obi-ya n'ebe Jehova nọ, bú Chineke Israel, Onye mere ka ọ hu Ya anya ub͕ò abua," 
1Kings11:10 Onye nye-kwa-ra ya iwu bayere ihe a, ka ọ ghara ijeso chi ọzọ: ma o debeghi ihe ahu nke Jehova nyere n'iwu." 
1Kings11:11 Jehova we si Solomon, N'ihi na nka di n'aka-gi, i we ghara idebe ọb͕ub͕a-ndum na ukpurum nile, nke M'nyeworo gi n'iwu, aghaghm idọwapu ala-eze n'aru gi, nye orù-gi." 
1Kings11:12 Ọ bu nání na ọ bughi n'ubọchi-gi ka M'gēme ya, n'ihi Devid, bú nna-gi: ọ bu n'aka nwa-gi ka M'gādọwapu ya." 
1Kings11:13 Otú ọ di, ọ bughi ala-eze-gi nile ka M'gādọwapu; otù ebo ka M'gēnye nwa-gi, n'ihi Devid, bú orùm, na n'ihi Jerusalem, nke M'rọputaworo." 
1Kings11:14 Jehova we me ka onye-nmegide biliere Solomon, bú Hedad, onye Edom: na nkpuru eze n'Edom ka o sitere." 
1Kings11:15 O rue, mb͕e Devid nọ n'Edom, mb͕e Joab, bú onye-isi usu-ndi-agha, rigoro ilì ndi eb͕uru eb͕u, na o tib͕uru nwoke ọ bula n'Edom;" 
1Kings11:16 (n'ihi na ọnwa isi ka Joab na Israel nile nọduru n'ebe ahu, rue mb͕e o bipusiri nwoke ọ bula n'Edom;)" 
1Kings11:17 Hedad we b͕alaga, ya onwe-ya na ndikom Edom ufọdu n'etiti ndi-orù nna-ya tiyere ya, ibà n'Ijipt; ma Hedad bu nwa-okoro ntà." 
1Kings11:18 Ha we si na Midian bilie, biarue Peran: ha we si na Peran chiri ndikom tiyere onwe-ha, bata n'Ijipt, biakute Fero, bú eze Ijipt; o we nye ya ulo, si ka enye ya nri, o nye-kwa-ra ya ala." 
1Kings11:19 Hedad we huta amara n'iru Fero nke-uku, o we nye ya nwa-nne nwunye-ya na nwunye, bú nwa-nne Tahpenes nwunye eze." 
1Kings11:20 Nwa-nne Tahpenes we muara ya Genubat, bú nwa-ya nwoke, onye Tahpenes mere ka ọ rapu ara n'etiti ulo Fero: Genubat we nọ n'ulo Fero n'etiti umu-ndikom Fero." 
1Kings11:21 Ma Hedad nuru n'Ijipt na Devid soro nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu, na Joab, bú onye-isi usu-ndi-agha, anwuwo kwa, Hedad we si Fero, Zilagam, ka m'we la n'alam." 
1Kings11:22 Fero we si ya, Ma gini nākọ gi onwe-gi n'ebe m'nọ, na, le, i nācho ila n'ala-gi? Ọ si, Ọ dighi ihe kọrọm: otú ọ di, zilagam nọ̄." 
1Kings11:23 Chineke we me ka onye-nmegide ọzọ biliere ya, bú Rezon nwa Eliada, onye b͕anariri Hedadeza eze Zoba, bú onye-nwe-ya:" 
1Kings11:24 ọ chikọta ndikom n'ebe ọ nọ, ghọ onye-isi usu ndi nāpunara madu ihe, mb͕e Devid buru ndi Zoba: ha we jerue Damaskọs, biri nime ya, buru eze na Damaskọs." 
1Kings11:25 Ọ we ghọrọ Israel onye-nmegide ubọchi nile nke Solomon, tiyere ihe ọjọ nke Hedad mere: ike Israel we gwusia ya, o we buru eze Siria." 
1Kings11:26 Ma Jeroboam nwa Nebat, onye Efrata nke Zerida, bu orù Solomon nwere, aha nne-ya bu Zerua, nwayi di-ya nwuru, o weli-kwa-ra aka-ya megide eze." 
1Kings11:27 Ma nka bu ihe kpatara o ji welie aka-ya megide eze: Solomon wuru Milo, mechie ntipú obodo Devid, bú nna-ya." 
1Kings11:28 Nwoke ahu, bú Jeroboam, bu dike nke bu dìnkpà: Solomon we hu nwa-okorọbia ahu, na onye nēje ozi nke-ọma ka ọ bu, o we me ya ka ọ buru onye-nlekọta ibū nile nke ulo Josef." 
1Kings11:29 O rue, na mb͕e ahu, na Jeroboam siri na Jerusalem pua, onye-amuma, bú Ahaija, bú onye Shailo, we chọta ya n'uzọ; ma Ahaija nēwere uwe ọhu yikwasi n'aru-ya; ha abua nọ kwa iche, nání ha, n'ọhia." 
1Kings11:30 Ahaija we jide uwe ọhu ahu nke di n'aru ya, dọwa ya na ndọwa iri na abua." 
1Kings11:31 Ọ si Jeroboam, Chiri n'onwe-gi ndọwa iri: n'ihi na otú a ka Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, siri, Le, M'nādọwapu ala-eze a n'aka Solomon, M'gēnye kwa gi ebo iri:" 
1Kings11:32 (ma ọ gēnwe otù ebo ahu, n'ihi orùm, bú Devid, na n'ihi Jerusalem, bú obodo nke M'rọputaworo n'ebo nile nke Israel:)" 
1Kings11:33 n'ihi na ha arapuwom, kpọ isi ala nye Ashtoret, bú chi ndi Zaidon, nye kwa Kemosh, bú chi Moab, nye kwa Milkom, bú chi umu Amon; ha ejeghi kwa ije n'uzọm nile, ime ihe ziri ezi n'anyam, na idebe ukpurum nile na ikpém nile, dika Devid, bú nna-ya, mere." 
1Kings11:34 Ma M'gaghi-ewepu ala-eze nile n'aka-ya: kama onye-isi ka M'gēdo ya ubọchi nile nke ndu-ya, n'ihi Devid, bú orùm, onye M'rọputara, n'ihi na ọ debere ihe nile M'nyere n'iwu na ukpurum nile:" 
1Kings11:35 ma M'gēwepu ala-eze n'aka nwa-ya, were ya nye gi, bú ebo iri." 
1Kings11:36 Ma nwa-ya ka M'gēnye otù ebo, ka Devid, bú orùm, we nwe oriọna ubọchi nile n'irum na Jerusalem, bú obodo nke M'rọputaworo Onwem itiye aham n'ebe ahu." 
1Kings11:37 Ma gi ka M'gēwere, i gābu kwa eze n'ihe nile nke nkpuru-obi-gi nāchọsi ike, i gābu kwa eze Israel." 
1Kings11:38 O gēru kwa, ọ buru na i nu ihe nile M'gēnye gi n'iwu, ọ buru kwa na i je ije n'uzọm nile, me ihe ziri ezi n'anyam, idebe ukpurum nile na ihe nile M'nyere n'iwu, dika Devid, bú orùm, mere; na M'gānọyere gi, wu-kwa-ra gi ulo kwesiri ntukwasi-obi, dika M'wuru Devid, M'gēnye kwa gi Israel." 
1Kings11:39 M'gēweda kwa nkpuru Devid n'ihi nka, ma ọ bughi ubọchi nile." 
1Kings11:40 Solomon we chọ ime ka Jeroboam nwua: Jeroboam we bilie, b͕alaga n'Ijipt jekuru Shaishak, bú eze Ijipt, ọ we nọ n'Ijipt rue ọnwu Solomon." 
1Kings11:41 Ma okwu Solomon nile nke fọduru, na ihe nile O mere, na amam-ihe-ya, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ okwu Solomon?" 
1Kings11:42 Ma ubọchi nile Solomon bu eze Israel nile nime Jerusalem di ọgu arọ abua. 
1Kings11:43 Solomon we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu, elìe ya n'obodo Devid, bú nna-ya: Rehoboam, bú nwa-ya, we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya." 
1Kings12:1 Rehoboam we jerue Shekem: n'ihi na Shekem ka Israel nile biaruru, ime ya eze." 
1Kings12:2 O rue, mb͕e Jeroboam nwa Nebat nuru ya, (ma onye ahu nānọ n'Ijipt rue mb͕e ahu, ebe o siri n'iru Solomon, bú eze, b͕alaga, Jeroboam we biri n'Ijipt," 
1Kings12:3 ha we ziga, kpọ ya;) na Jeroboam na nkpọkọta Israel nile biara, we gwa Rehoboam okwu, si," 
1Kings12:4 Nna-gi mere yoke-ayi ka o sie ike: ma ub͕u a gi onwe-gi me ka ọ di nfe kari, bú òfùfè siri ike nke nna-gi, na yoke-ya di arọ́ nke ọ tukwasiri ayi, ayi gēfè kwa gi òfùfè." 
1Kings12:5 Ọ si ha, Lanu rue ubọchi atọ ọzọ, laghachikutekwam. Ndi Israel we la." 
1Kings12:6 Eze, bú Rehoboam, we me ka ndi-okenye dua ya ọdu, bú ndi nēguzo n'iru Solomon, bú nna-ya, mb͕e ọ nọ na ndu, si, Ùnu onwe-unu si aṅa nādu ọdu iweghachiri ndi nka okwu?" 
1Kings12:7 Ha we gwa ya okwu, si, Ọ buru na i ghọrọ ndi nka orù ta, we fè ha òfùfè, za ha, gwa ha okwu di nma, ha gāghọ-kwa-ra gi orù ubọchi nile." 
1Kings12:8 Ma ọ rapuru idu-ọdu nke ndi-okenye, nke ha nādu ya, o me ka umu-okorọbia dua ya ọdu, bú ndi ya na ha tokọzuru okè, ndi nēguzo n'iru ya." 
1Kings12:9 Ọ si ha, Gini ka unu onwe-unu nādu ọdu, ka ayi we weghachiri ndi nka okwu, bú ndi gwaworom okwu, si, Me ka ọ di nfe kari, bú yoke nke nna-gi tukwasiri ayi?" 
1Kings12:10 Umu-okorọbia ndi ya na ha tokọzuru okè we gwa ya okwu, si, Otú a ka i gāsi ndi nka, ndi gwara gi okwu, si, Nna-gi mere yoke-ayi ka ọ di arọ́, ma gi onwe-gi me ka ọ di ayi nfe kari; otú a ka i gāgwa ha, si, Nkpisi-aka nke-ntà nkem di okpotokpo kari úkwù nnam." 
1Kings12:11 Ma ub͕u a nnam boro unu yoke di arọ́, ma mu onwem gātukwasi ihe na yoke-unu: nnam were utari dọ unu aka na nti, ma mu onwem gēwere akpi dọ unu aka na nti." 
1Kings12:12 Jeroboam na ndi Israel nile we biakute Rehoboam n'ubọchi nke-atọ, dika eze kwuru, si, Laghachikutem n'ubọchi nke-atọ." 
1Kings12:13 Eze we za ndi ahu okwu ike, rapu idu-ọdu nke ndi-okenye, nke ha nādu ya;" 
1Kings12:14 o we gwa ha okwu dika idu-ọdu nke umu-okorọbia si di, si, Nnam mere yoke-unu ka ọ di arọ́, ma mu onwem gātukwasi ihe na yoke-unu: nnam were utari dọ unu aka na nti, ma mu onwem gēwere akpi dọ unu aka na nti." 
1Kings12:15 Eze we ghara ige ndi Israel nti; n'ihi na nchighari nka sitere n'aka Jehova, ka O we me ka okwu-Ya guzosie ike, bú nke Jehova gwara Jeroboam nwa Nebat site n'aka Ahaija onye Shailo." 
1Kings12:16 Israel nile we hu na eze egeghi ha nti, ndi Israel we weghachiri eze okwu, si, Òkè gini ka ayi nwere nime Devid? ọ dighi kwa ihe-nketa di nime nwa Jese: lanu n'ulo-ikwū-unu, Israel: ub͕u a le ulo-gi, Devid. Israel we la n'ulo-ikwū-ha." 
1Kings12:17 Ma umu Israel ndi bi n'obodo nile nke Juda, Rehoboam we buru eze-ha." 
1Kings12:18 Eze, bú Rehoboam, we ziga Adoram, onye bu onye-isi usu ndi nēfè òfùfè; Israel nile we were nkume tub͕ue ya, o we nwua. Eze, bú Rehoboam, we b͕a onwe-ya ume irigo n'ub͕ọ-ala-ya, ib͕alaga na Jerusalem." 
1Kings12:19 Israel we jehie megide ulo Devid, rue ta." 
1Kings12:20 O rue, mb͕e Israel nile nuru na Jeroboam alatawo, ha we zìe kpọ ya ibia na nzukọ-ha, ha we me ya eze Israel nile: ọ dighi ebo ọ bula soro ulo Devid, ma-ọbughi ebo Juda, nání ya." 
1Kings12:21 Rehoboam we biarue Jerusalem, kpọkọta ulo Juda nile, na ebo Benjamin, orú nnù ndikom orú uzọ na abua na nnù iri, bú ndi arọputara arọputa, ndi nēbu agha, ibuso ulo Israel agha, iweghachiri Rehoboam nwa Solomon ala-eze." 
1Kings12:22 Okwu Chineke we rue Shemaia nti, bú onye nke Chineke, si," 
1Kings12:23 Gwa Rehoboam nwa Solomon, bú eze Juda, gwa kwa ulo nile nke Juda na Benjamin, gwa kwa ndi Israel fọduru, okwu, si," 
1Kings12:24 Otú a ka Jehova siri, Unu arigola, unu ebuso-kwa-la umu-nne-unu, bú umu Israel, agha: laghachinu, nwoke ọ bula n'ulo-ya; n'ihi na n'ebe M'nọ ka ihe a siteworo. Ha we nu okwu Jehova, laghachi azu n'ulo-ha, dika okwu Jehova si di." 
1Kings12:25 Jeroboam we wue Shekem n'ugwu Efraim, biri n'ebe ahu; o si n'ebe ahu pua, wue Penuel." 
1Kings12:26 Jeroboam we si n'obi-ya, Ub͕u a ka ala-eze gālaghachikuru ulo Devid:" 
1Kings12:27 ọ buru na ndi nka arigo ichu àjà n'ulo Jehova na Jerusalem, obi ndi nka gālaghachikuru kwa onye-nwe-ha, bú Rehoboam eze Juda; ha gēb͕ukwam, laghachikuru Rehoboam, bú eze Juda." 
1Kings12:28 Eze we me ka adua ya ọdu, o we me umu-ehi abua nke ọla-edo; ọ si ha, Unu arigozuwo Jerusalem; le chi-gi, Israel, ndi mere ka i si n'ala Ijipt rigoputa." 
1Kings12:29 Ọ dọba otù nime Bet-el, tiye nke-ọzọ nime Dan." 
1Kings12:30 Ihe a we ghọ nmehie: ndi Israel we je n'iru otù nime ha, rue Dan." 
1Kings12:31 O me ulo nke ebe di elu, me kwa ndi-nchu-àjà sitere n'ọnu-ọgugu ndi Israel nile, ndi nēsiteghi n'umu Livai." 
1Kings12:32 Jeroboam we me ememe n'ọnwa nke-asatọ, n'ubọchi nke-iri-na-ise nke ọnwa ahu, dika ememe nke di na Juda, o we rigorue ebe-ichu-àjà ahu; otú a ka o mere na Bet-el, ichuru umu-ehi ahu, bú nke o mere, àjà: o guzo na Bet-el ndi-nchu-àjà nke ebe di elu nke o mere." 
1Kings12:33 Ọ rigorue ebe-ichu-àjà nke o mere na Bet-el n'ubọchi nke-iri-na-ise n'ọnwa nke-asatọ, bú n'ọnwa nke ọ chèputara n'obi-ya: o we mere umu Israel ememe, rigorue ebe-ichu-àjà isure ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ." 
1Kings13:1 Ma, le, onye nke Chineke siri na Juda bia n'okwu Jehova rue Bet-el: ma Jeroboam nēguzo n'akuku ebe-ichu-àjà isure ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ." 
1Kings13:2 O we kpọ òkù megide ebe-ichu-àjà ahu n'okwu Jehova, si, Ebe-ichu-àjà, ebe-ichu-àjà, otú a ka Jehova siri: Le, agāmuru ulo Devid otù nwa-nwoke, Josaia bu aha-ya; ọ gāchu kwa n'elu gi ndi-nchu-àjà nke ebe di elu ndi nēsure ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ n'elu gi, ọkpukpu madu ka ha gēsure kwa ọku n'elu gi." 
1Kings13:3 O nye-kwa-ra ihe-iriba-ama n'ubọchi ahu, si, Nka bu ihe-iriba-ama ahu nke Jehova kwuworo: Le, agāb͕awa ebe-ichu-àjà nka, wusi kwa ntu nke di n'elu ya." 
1Kings13:4 O rue, mb͕e eze nuru okwu onye nke Chineke ahu, nke ọ kpọrọ megide ebe-ichu-àjà nime Bet-el, na Jeroboam siri n'ebe-ichu-àjà setipu aka-ya, si, Jidenu ya. Aka-ya, nke o setiri imegide ya, we kpọnwua, ọ pughi kwa iseghachi ya n'aru ya." 
1Kings13:5 Ab͕awa-kwa-ra ebe-ichu-àjà ahu, ewe si n'ebe-ichu-àjà wusi ntu, dika ihe-iriba-ama si di nke onye nke Chineke nyere n'okwu Jehova." 
1Kings13:6 Eze we za, si onye nke Chineke, Biko, chọ ime ka iru Jehova, bú Chineke-gi, dajua, gi kpe kwa ekpere bayerem, ka akam we laghachikutem. Onye nke Chineke ahu we chọ ka iru Jehova dajua, aka eze we laghachikuru ya, we di ka ọ di na mbu." 
1Kings13:7 Eze we si onye nke Chineke ahu, Sorom ba n'ulo, b͕a onwe-gi ume, m'gēnye kwa gi onyinye." 
1Kings13:8 Onye nke Chineke ahu we si eze, Ọ buru na i nyem nkera ulo-gi, m'gaghi-esoro gi ba, m'gaghi-eri kwa nri, m'gaghi-aṅu kwa miri n'ebe a:" 
1Kings13:9 n'ihi na otú a ka enyerem iwu n'okwu Jehova, si, Erila nri, aṅu-kwa-la miri, alaghachi-kwa-la n'uzọ i siri je." 
1Kings13:10 O we la n'uzọ ọzọ, ọ laghachighi kwa n'uzọ o siri biaru Bet-el." 
1Kings13:11 Ma otù onye-amuma, bú agadi, bi na Bet-el; nwa-ya we bia, kọrọ ya akukọ omume nile nke onye nke Chineke mere ubọchi ahu na Bet-el: okwu nile ọ gwara eze, ha we kọrọ nna-ha akukọ okwu ahu." 
1Kings13:12 Nna-ha we gwa ha okwu, si, Òle nke bu uzọ o jere? Ma umu-ya ndikom ahuwo uzọ nke onye nke Chineke ahu jere, bú onye siri na Juda bia." 
1Kings13:13 O we si umu-ya, Jikwaranum inyinya-ibu. Ha we jikwara ya inyinya-ibu: ọ nọkwasi n'elu ya." 
1Kings13:14 O we jeso onye nke Chineke ahu n'azu, chọta ya ka ọ nānọdu n'okpuru osisi terebinth: ọ si ya, Ọ̀ bu gi onwe-gi bu onye Chineke ahu nke siri na Juda bia? Ọ si, Ọ bu mu onwem." 
1Kings13:15 Ọ si ya, Sorom je n'ulo, ri kwa nri." 
1Kings13:16 Ọ si, Apughm isoro gi laghachi, ma-ọbu isoro gi ba n'ulo: m'gaghi-esoro kwa gi ri nri ma-ọbu iṅu miri n'ebe a:" 
1Kings13:17 n'ihi na okwu rurum nti n'okwu Jehova, si, Erila nri, aṅu-kwa-la miri, n'ebe ahu, alaghachi-kwa-la ila n'uzọ ahu i jere nime ya." 
1Kings13:18 Ọ si ya, Mu onwem bu kwa onye-amuma dika gi; mọ-ozi we gwam okwu n'okwu Jehova, si, Me ka o soro gi lata n'ulo-gi, ka o we rie nri ṅu kwa miri. Ma ọ gwara ya okwu-ugha." 
1Kings13:19 O we soro ya laghachi, rie nri n'ulo-ya, ṅu kwa miri." 
1Kings13:20 O rue, mb͕e ha abua nānọdu nēri ihe na table, na okwu Jehova ruru onye-amuma ahu nti, bú onye mere ka ọ laghachi:" 
1Kings13:21 ọ kpọ onye nke Chineke ahu òkù, bú onye siri na Juda bia, si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, N'ihi na i nupuwo isi n'okwu-ọnu Jehova, i we ghara idebe ihe enyere n'iwu, nke Jehova, bú Chineke-gi, nyere gi n'iwu," 
1Kings13:22 i we laghachi, rie nri, ṅua miri, n'ebe nke Ọ gwara gi okwu, si, Erila nri, aṅu-kwa-la miri; ozu-gi agaghi-abiaru ílì nna-gi-hà." 
1Kings13:23 O rue, mb͕e o risiri nri, mb͕e ọ ṅusi-kwa-ra ihe-ọṅuṅu, na o were inyinya-ibu jikwara ya, bú onye-amuma ahu nke o mere ka ọ laghachi." 
1Kings13:24 Ọ we la, ọdum we huta ya n'uzọ, me ka ọ nwua: ewe tupu ozu-ya n'uzọ, inyinya-ibu-ya nēguzo kwa n'akuku ya; ọdum ahu nēguzo kwa n'akuku ozu ahu." 
1Kings13:25 Ma, le, ndikom nāgabiga, ha we hu ozu, ka atupuru ya n'uzọ, hu kwa ọdum, ka o nēguzo n'akuku ozu ahu: ha we bia, kwue ya n'obodo nke onye-amuma ahu, bú agadi, nēbi nime ya." 
1Kings13:26 Onye-amuma ahu nke mere ka o si n'uzọ laghachi we nu ya, ọ si, Onye nke Chineke ahu ka ọ bu, bú onye nupuru isi n'okwu-ọnu Jehova: Jehova we were ya nye ọdum, o we dọb͕ue ya, me ka ọ nwua, dika okwu Jehova si di, nke Ọ gwara ya." 
1Kings13:27 O we gwa umu-ya okwu, si, Jikwaranum inyinya-ibu. Ha we jikwa ya." 
1Kings13:28 O je chọta ozu-ya, ka atupuru ya n'uzọ, na inyinya-ibu na ọdum, ka ha nēguzo n'akuku ozu ahu: ọdum erighi ozu ahu, ọ dọb͕ughi kwa inyinya-ibu ahu." 
1Kings13:29 Onye-amuma ahu we bulie ozu onye nke Chineke ahu, dọba ya n'elu inyinya-ibu ahu, bughachi ya: ọ biarue obodo onye-amuma ahu, bú agadi, iti aka n'obi, na ilì ya." 
1Kings13:30 Ọ dọba ozu-ya n'ílì-ya; ha we tiere ya aka n'obi, si, Ewó, nwa-nnem!" 
1Kings13:31 O rue, mb͕e o lìsiri ya na ọ gwara umu-ya okwu, si, Mb͕e m'nwuru, lì-kwa-num n'ílì nke elìri onye nke Chineke; dọba ọkpukpum n'akuku ọkpukpu-ya." 
1Kings13:32 N'ihi na okwu ahu aghaghi irè, bú nke ọ kpọrọ òkù n'okwu Jehova megide ebe-ichu-àjà nke di na Bet-el, megide kwa ulo nile nke ebe di elu nke di n'obodo nile nke Sameria." 
1Kings13:33 Mb͕e ihe a gasiri, Jeroboam esighi n'uzọ ọjọ ya laghachi, ma o me-kwa-ra ndi-nchu-àjà nke ebe di elu ọzọ site n'ọnu-ọgugu nile nke ndi Israel: onye ihe-ya nātọ ya utọ, o mejue ya aka, o we ghọ otù nime ndi-nchu-àjà nke ebe di elu." 
1Kings13:34 Ihe a we ghọrọ ulo Jeroboam nmehie, ọbuná izopu ya, na ikpochapu ya n'elu uwa." 
1Kings14:1 Na mb͕e ahu Abaija nwa Jeroboam riara ọria. 
1Kings14:2 Jeroboam we si nwunye-ya, Biko, bilie, nwogharia onwe-gi, ka aghara imara na gi onwe-gi bu nwunye Jeroboam: i gēje kwa Shailo; le, n'ebe ahu ka Ahaija, bú onye-amuma, nọ; onye ahu kwuru okwu bayerem na m'gābu eze ndi nka." 
1Kings14:3 Chiri kwa n'aka-gi ob͕e achicha iri, na achicha ntà, na karama manu-aṅu, jekuru ya: onye ahu gēgosi gi ihe gēme nwa-okoro." 
1Kings14:4 Nwunye Jeroboam we me otú a, we bilie, je Shailo, ba n'ulo Ahaija. Ma Ahaija apughi ihu uzọ; n'ihi na anya-ya guzoro eguzo n'ihi agadi-ya." 
1Kings14:5 Ma Jehova siri Ahaija, Le, nwunye Jeroboam nābia iju ase bayere nwa-ya nwoke n'aka-gi; n'ihi na ọ nāria ọria: otú a na ọtú a ka i gāgwa ya: ọ gēru kwa, mb͕e ọ batara, na nwayi ahu ganēme onwe-ya dika onye ala ọzọ." 
1Kings14:6 O rue, mb͕e Ahaija nuru olu ukwu-ya ka ha nāzọ, mb͕e ọ nābata n'ọnu-uzọ, na ọ siri, Bata, nwunye Jeroboam; n'ìhi gini kwa ka gi onwe-gi nēme onwe-gi dika onye ala ọzọ? ma mu onwem bu onye-ozi siri ike n'ebe i nọ." 
1Kings14:7 Je, si Jeroboam, Otú a ka Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, siri: N'ihi na esim n'etiti ndim welie gi elu, me gi onye-ndú ndim, bú Israel," 
1Kings14:8 we dowapu ala-eze n'ulo Devid, nye gi ya: ma i dighi ka orùm, bú Devid, onye debere ihe nile M'nyere n'iwu, o were obi-ya nile jesom, ime nání ihe ziri ezi n'anyam;" 
1Kings14:9 ma i mewo ihe ọjọ kari ndi nile buru gi uzọ, i we je mere onwe-gi chi ọzọ di iche iche, na arusi a kpuru akpu, ikpasum iwe, i we tufuem n'azu gi:" 
1Kings14:10 n'ihi nka, le, M'nēme ka ihe ọjọ biakute ulo Jeroboam, M'gēbipu kwa n'aru Jeroboam nwa-nwoke ọ bula, onye eb͕ochiri eb͕ochi na onye arapuru arapu n'Israel, M'gēkpochapu kwa nke fọduru nke ulo Jeroboam, dika madu si ekpochapu ǹsí-anu, rue mb͕e agēkpochapuzu ya." 
1Kings14:11 Onye nke Jeroboam nke nwuru anwu n'obodo, nkita gēri ya; onye nke nwuru anwu n'ọhia, anu-ufe nke elu-igwe gēri kwa ya: n'ihi na Jehova ekwuwo ya." 
1Kings14:12 Ma gi onwe-gi bilie, la n'ulo-gi: mb͕e ukwu-gi nābà n'obodo, nwata ahu gānwu kwa." 
1Kings14:13 Ma Israel nile gētiri ya aka n'obi, lìe ya; n'ihi na onye a, nání ya, nime ndi Jeroboam nwere gābiaru ílì: n'ihi na ahuru nime ya ezi ihe n'ebe Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, nọ, n'ulo Jeroboam." 
1Kings14:14 Jehova gēme kwa ka otù eze Israel biliere Ya, onye gēbipu ulo Jeroboam ubọchi a: ma gini? ọbuná ub͕u a." 
1Kings14:15 Jehova gētib͕u kwa Israel, dika amì nēme nkpatu nime miri; Ọ gēropu kwa Israel n'ezi ala nka, nke O nyere ndi bu nna-ha, Ọ gēfesa kwa ha n'ofè Osimiri; n'ihi na ha emewo Asherim-ha, nākpasu Jehova iwe." 
1Kings14:16 Ọ gārara kwa Israel nye n'ihi nmehie Jeroboam nile, nke o mehieworo, na nke o ji me ka Israel mehie." 
1Kings14:17 Nwunye Jeroboam we bilie, la, biarue Tiaza: mb͕e nwayi ahu nābata na nbata-uzọ ulo, nwa-okoro ahu we nwua." 
1Kings14:18 Israel nile we lìe ya, tiere ya aka n'obi; dika okwu Jehova si di, nke O kwuru n'aka orù-Ya, bú Ahaija onye-amuma." 
1Kings14:19 Ma ihe nile nke fọduru nke Jeroboam mere, ka o si bu agha, na ka o si buru eze, le, edewo ha n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Israel." 
1Kings14:20 Ubọchi nke Jeroboam buru eze we di orú arọ na abua: o we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu, Nedab, bú nwa-ya, we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya." 
1Kings14:21 Ma Rehoboam, bú nwa Solomon, bu eze na juda. Rehoboam b͕ara ọgu arọ abua na otù mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze, o we buru eze arọ iri na asa nime Jerusalem, bú obodo nke Jehova rọputara n'etiti ebo nile nke Israel, itiye aha-Ya n'ebe ahu. Aha nne-ya bu Neama, bú nwayi Amon." 
1Kings14:22 Juda we me ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova; ha we were nmehie-ha nile nke ha mehiere kpasue Ya ekworo, kari ihe nile ndi bu nna-ha mere." 
1Kings14:23 Ha onwe-ha we wu-kwa-ra onwe-ha ebe di elu, na ogidi, na Asherim, n'elu ugwu ọ bula di elu, na n'okpuru osisi ndu ọ bula;" 
1Kings14:24 Ọzọ kwa, ndi edoro nsọ ikwa iko di n'ala: ha mere dika ihe-árú nile nke mba ọzọ si di, bú ndi Jehova napuru ala-ha n'iru umu Israel." 
1Kings14:25 O rue, n'arọ nke-ise nke eze Rehoboam, na Shaishak, bú eze Ijipt, rigotara imegide Jerusalem:" 
1Kings14:26 o wepu àkù nile nke ulo Jehova, na àkù nile nke ulo eze; ọbuná ha nile ka o wepuru: o wepu-kwa-ra ọta ọla-edo nile nke Solomon mere." 
1Kings14:27 Eze, bú Rehoboam, we me ọta ọla n'ọnọdu ha, nye ha n'aka ndi-isi ndi-ọb͕a-ọsọ, bú ndi nēche ọnu-uzọ ulo eze, ka ha lekọta ha anya." 
1Kings14:28 O rue, mb͕e ọ bula eze nābà n'ulo Jehova, na ndi-ọb͕a-ọsọ nēbu ha, we bughachi ha n'ime-ulo ndi-ọb͕a-ọsọ." 
1Kings14:29 Ma okwu Rehoboam nile nke fọduru, na ihe nile o mere, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Juda?" 
1Kings14:30 Ma agha di n'etiti Rehoboam na Jeroboam ubọchi nile. 
1Kings14:31 Rehoboam we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu, elìe ya n'ebe elìri nna-ya-hà n'obodo Devid: aha nne-ya bu Neama, bú nwayi Amon. Abaijam nwa-ya we buru eze n'ọnọdu-ya." 
1Kings15:1 Ma n'arọ nke-iri-na-asatọ nke eze, bú Jeroboam nwa Nebat, ka Abaijam malitere ibu eze Juda." 
1Kings15:2 Arọ atọ ka ọ bu eze na Jerusalem: aha nne-ya bu Meaka nwa-nwayi Abishalom. 
1Kings15:3 Ọ nējeghari na nmehie nile nke nna-ya, nke o buru ya uzọ me: obi-ya ezughi kwa okè n'ebe Jehova, bú Chineke-ya, nọ, dika obi Devid, bú nna-ya." 
1Kings15:4 Ma n'ihi Devid ka Jehova, bú Chineke-ya, nyere ya oriọna na Jerusalem, ime ka nwa-ya bilie n'ọnọdu ya, na ime ka Jerusalem guzo:" 
1Kings15:5 n'ihi na Devid mere ihe ziri ezi n'anya Jehova, o sighi kwa n'ihe ọ bula O nyere ya n'iwu wezuga onwe-ya ubọchi nile nke ndu-ya, ọ bu nání n'okwu Uraia onye Het." 
1Kings15:6 Ma agha di n'etiti Rehoboam na Jeroboam ubọchi nile nke ndu-ya. 
1Kings15:7 Ma okwu Abaijam nile nke fọduru, na ihe nile o mere, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Juda? Ma agha di n'etiti Abaijam na Jeroboam." 
1Kings15:8 Abaijam we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu; ha we lìe ya n'obodo Devid: Esa nwa-ya we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya. 
1Kings15:9 Ma n'arọ nke-orú nke Jeroboam eze Israel ka Esa malitere ibu eze Juda. 
1Kings15:10 Ọgu arọ abua na otù ka ọ bu eze na Jerusalem: aha nne-ya bu Meaka nwa-nwayi Abishalom. 
1Kings15:11 Esa mere ihe ziri ezi n'anya Jehova, dika Devid, bú nna-ya, mere." 
1Kings15:12 O we me ka ndi edoro nsọ ikwa iko si n'ala-ya gabiga, o wezuga-kwa-ra arusi nile nke nna-ya-hà mere." 
1Kings15:13 Ọzọ kwa, Meaka, bú nne-ya, o wezuga-kwa-ra ya n'ibu eze-nwayi, n'ihi na o mere ihe kpatara ima-jijiji nye Ashera; Esa we b͕utue ihe-ya kpatara ima-jijiji, o sure ya ọku na miri-iyi Kidron." 
1Kings15:14 Ma ewezugaghi ebe di elu: otú ọ di, obi Esa zuru okè n'ebe Jehova nọ ubọchi-ya nile." 
1Kings15:15 Ọ chibata n'ulo Jehova ihe nile nna-ya doro nsọ, na ihe nile ya onwe-ya doro nsọ, bú ọla-ọcha, na ọla-edo, na ihe di iche iche ọzọ." 
1Kings15:16 Ma agha di n'etiti Esa na Beasha, bú eze Israel, ubọchi-ha nile." 
1Kings15:17 Beasha, bú eze Israel, we rigo imegide Juda, wue Rema, ka ọ ghara ikwe Esa, bú eze Juda, ka o nwe onye nāpu apu ma-ọbu onye nābata abata." 
1Kings15:18 Esa we chiri ọla-ọcha nile na ọla-edo nile nke fọduru n'àkù ulo Jehova, na àkù ulo eze nile, nye ha n'aka ndi-orù-ya: eze, bú Esa, we ziga ha jekuru Ben-hedad, nwa Tab-rimon, nwa Hezion, bú eze Siria, nke bi na Damaskọs, si," 
1Kings15:19 Ọb͕ub͕a-ndu di n'etiti mu na gi, na n'etiti nnam na nna-gi: le, eziteworom gi onyinye, bú ọla-ọcha na ọla-edo; je, mebie ọb͕ub͕a-ndu gi na Beasha, bú eze Israel, b͕ara, ka o we si n'arum rigo." 
1Kings15:20 Ben-hedad we ge eze, bú Esa, nti, zite ndi-isi usu nile nke ndi-agha o nwere imegide obodo nile nke Israel, o we tib͕ue Ijon, na Dan, na Ebel-bet-meaka, na Kinerot nile, tiyere ala nile nke Naftali." 
1Kings15:21 O rue, mb͕e Beasha nuru ya, na ọ rapuru iwu Rema, we biri na Tiaza." 
1Kings15:22 Ma eze, bú Esa, mere ka Juda nile nu; ọ dighi onye puru ya: ha we bupu nkume nile nke Rema, na osisi-ya nile, nke Beasha ji wu ya; eze, bú Esa, we were ha wue Geba Benjamin na Mizpa." 
1Kings15:23 Ma okwu Esa nile nke fọduru, na idi-ike-ya nile, na ihe nile o mere, na obodo nile o wuru, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Juda? Nání na ọ riara ọria n'ukwu-ya abua na mb͕e agadi-ya." 
1Kings15:24 Esa we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu, elìe ya n'ebe elìri nna-ya-hà n'obodo Devid, bú nna-ya: Jehoshafat nwa-ya we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya." 
1Kings15:25 Ma Nedab, bú nwa Jeroboam, malitere ibu eze Israel n'arọ nke-abua nke Esa, bú eze Juda, ọ we buru eze Israel arọ abua." 
1Kings15:26 O me ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova, je ije n'uzọ nna-ya, na nime nmehie-ya nke o ji me ka Israel mehie." 
1Kings15:27 Beasha, bú nwa Ahaija, nke ulo Isaka, we kekọta madu imegide ya; Beasha we tib͕ue ya na Gibeton, nke diri ndi Filistia; n'ihi na Nedab na Israel nile nānọchigide Gibeton n'agha." 
1Kings15:28 Beasha we me ka ọ nwua n'arọ nke-atọ nke Esa, bú eze Juda, o we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya." 
1Kings15:29 O rue, mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze, na o tib͕uru ulo Jeroboam nile; o kweghi ka onye ọ bula nke nēku ume fọduru Jeroboam, rue mb͕e o kpochapuru ya; dika okwu Jehova si di, nke O kwuru n'aka orù-Ya, bú Ahaija onye Shailo:" 
1Kings15:30 n'ihi nmehie nile nke Jeroboam nke o mehiere, na nke o ji me ka Israel mehie; nime nkpasu-iwe-ya nke o ji kpasu Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, iwe." 
1Kings15:31 Ma okwu Nedab nile nke fọduru, na ihe nile o mere, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Israel?" 
1Kings15:32 Ma agha di n'etiti Esa na Beasha, bú eze Israel, ubọchi-ha nile." 
1Kings15:33 N'arọ nke-atọ nke Esa, bú eze Juda, ka Beasha, bú nwa Ahaija, malitere ibu eze Israel nile nime Tiaza, orú arọ na anọ." 
1Kings15:34 O me ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova, je ije n'uzọ Jeroboam, na nime nmehie-ya nke o ji me ka Israel mehie." 
1Kings16:1 Okwu Jehova we rue Jihu, bú nwa Hanani, nti, imegide Beasha, si," 
1Kings16:2 N'ihi na esim n'ájá welie gi elu, me gi onye-ndú ndim, bú Israel; i we je ije n'uzọ Jeroboam, me ndim, bú Israel, ka ha mehie, iwere nmehie nile ha kpasuem iwe;" 
1Kings16:3 le, M'nēkpochapu nke fọduru nke Beasha, bú nke fọduru nke ulo-ya; M'gēme kwa ulo-gi ka ọ di ka ulo Jeroboam, bú nwa Nebat." 
1Kings16:4 Onye nke Beasha nke nwuru anwu n'obodo, nkita gēri ya; onye nke ya nke nwuru anwu n'ọhia, anu-ufe nke elu-igwe gēri kwa ya." 
1Kings16:5 Ma okwu Beasha nile nke fọduru, na ihe o mere, na idi-ike-ya, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Israel?" 
1Kings16:6 Beasha we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu, elìe ya na Tiaza; Ila, bú nwa-ya, we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya." 
1Kings16:7 Ọzọ kwa, n'aka Jihu, bú nwa Hanani, onye-amuma, ka okwu Jehova biara imegide Beasha, na imegide ulo-ya, ma n'ihi ihe ọjọ nile nke o mere n'anya Jehova, iwere omume aka-ya kpasue Ya iwe, n'idi ka ulo Jeroboam; ma n'ihi na o tib͕uru ya." 
1Kings16:8 N'arọ nke-orú-na-isi nke Esa, bú eze Juda, ka Ila nwa Beasha malitere ibu eze Israel nime Tiaza, arọ abua." 
1Kings16:9 Orù-ya Zimri, bú onye-isi nkera ub͕ọ-ala-ya, we kekọta madu imegide ya: ma ya onwe-ya nọ na Tiaza, nāṅu manya nāṅubiga ya okè n'ulo Aza, onye bu onye-isi ulo-ya na Tiaza:" 
1Kings16:10 Zimri we ba, tib͕ue ya, me ka ọ nwua, n'arọ nke-orú-na-asa nke Esa, bú eze Juda, o we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya." 
1Kings16:11 O rue, mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze, mb͕e ọ nọkwasiri n'oche-eze-ya, na o tib͕uru ulo Beasha nile: o kweghi ka otù nwa-nwoke fọduru ya, ma ọ bu nime ndi-ikwu-ya, ma-ọbu nime ndi-eyì-ya." 
1Kings16:12 Zimri we kpochapu ulo Beasha nile, dika okwu Jehova si di, nke O kwuru megide Beasha n'aka Jihu, bú onye-amuma," 
1Kings16:13 bayere nmehie nile nke Beasha, na nmehie nile nke Ila, bú nwa-ya, nke ha mehiere, na nke ha ji me Israel mehie, iwere ihe-efu nile ha kpasue Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, iwe." 
1Kings16:14 Ma okwu Ila nile nke fọduru, na ihe nile o mere, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Israel?" 
1Kings16:15 N'arọ nke-orú-na-asa nke Esa, bú eze Juda, ka Zimri bu eze ubọchi asa na Tiaza. Ma ndi Israel nọ n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū imegide Gibeton, nke diri ndi Filistia." 
1Kings16:16 Ndi nọ n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū we nu, si, Zimri ekekọtawo madu, ọzọ kwa, o tib͕uwo eze: Israel nile we me Ọmri, bú onye-isi usu-ndi-agha, ka ọ buru eze Israel n'ubọchi ahu n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū." 
1Kings16:17 Ọmri we si na Gibeton rigo, ya na Israel nile, ha we nọchigide Tiaza n'agha." 
1Kings16:18 O rue, mb͕e Zimri huru na ewerewo obodo, na ọ bara n'ulo-elu nke ulo eze, sure ulo eze n'ọku n'isi onwe-ya, nwua," 
1Kings16:19 n'ihi nmehie-ya nile nke ọ mehiere, n'ime ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova, n'ije ije n'uzọ Jeroboam, na nime nmehie nke o mere, ime ka Israel mehie." 
1Kings16:20 Ma okwu Zimri nile nke fọduru, na nkekọta nke ọ kekọtara madu imegide eze, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Israel?" 
1Kings16:21 Mb͕e ahu ekewara ndi Israel na nkera abua: otù nkera ndi Israel soro Tibni, bú nwa Ginat, ime ya ka ọ buru eze; nkera ọzọ soro Ọmri." 
1Kings16:22 Ndi soro Ọmri we di ike kari ndi soro Tibni, bú nwa Ginat: Tibni we nwua, Ọmri we buru eze." 
1Kings16:23 N'arọ nke-orú-na-iri-na-otù nke Esa, bú eze Juda, ka Ọmri malitere ibu eze Israel, arọ iri na abua: ọ bu eze na Tiaza arọ isi." 
1Kings16:24 Ọ zuru ugwu Sameria n'aka Shema na talent ọla-ọcha abua; o wue ulo n'ugwu ahu, kpọ aha obodo ahu o wuru Sameria, n'aha Shema, bú onye-nwe ugwu ahu." 
1Kings16:25 Ọmri mere ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova, me kwa ihe ọjọ kari ndi nile buru ya uzọ." 
1Kings16:26 Ọ je ije n'uzọ nile nke Jeroboam, bú nwa Nebat, na nime nmehie-ya nile nke o jiri me ka Israel mehie, iwere ihe-efu nile ha kpasue Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, iwe." 
1Kings16:27 Ma ihe Ọmri nile nke fọduru, bú nke o mere, na ihe idi-ike-ya nke o mere, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Israel?" 
1Kings16:28 Ọmri we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu, elìe ya na Sameria: Ehab, bú nwa-ya, we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya." 
1Kings16:29 Ma n'arọ nke-orú-na-iri-na-asatọ nke Esa, bú eze Juda, ka Ehab, bú nwa Ọmri, malitere ibu eze Israel: Ehab nwa Ọmri we buru eze Israel nime Sameria orú arọ na abua." 
1Kings16:30 Ehab nwa Ọmri mere ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova kari ndi nile buru ya uzọ. 
1Kings16:31 O rue, dika agāsi na ọ bu ihe nfe na ọ nējeghari na nmehie nile nke Jeroboam, bú nwa Nebat, na ọ luru Jezebel na nwunye, bú nwa-nwayi Etbeal eze ndi Zaidon, ọ we je fè Beal òfùfè, kpọ kwa isi ala nye ya." 
1Kings16:32 O we me ka ebe-ichu-àjà guzoro Beal n'ulo Beal, nke o wuru na Sameria." 
1Kings16:33 Ehab me-kwa-ra Ashera; Ehab we me ihe ọzọ ikpasu Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, iwe, kari ndi-eze nile nke Israel ndi buru ya uzọ." 
1Kings16:34 N'ubọchi-ya ka Hiel, bú onye Bet-el, wuru Jeriko: Abairam, bú ọkpara-ya, ka o were tọ ntọ-ala-ya; Segub, bú nwa-ya nwoke nke-ntà ka ọ were kwa guzo ọnu-uzọ-ama-ya ọtọ; dika okwu Jehova si di, nke O kwuru n'aka Joshua nwa Nun." 
1Kings16:34 N'ubọchi-ya ka Hiel, bú onye Bet-el, wuru Jeriko: Abairam, bú ọkpara-ya, ka o were tọ ntọ-ala-ya; Segub, bú nwa-ya nwoke nke-ntà ka ọ were kwa guzo ọnu-uzọ-ama-ya ọtọ; dika okwu Jehova si di, nke O kwuru n'aka Joshua nwa Nun." 
1Kings17:1 Elaija, bu onye Tisbe, onye sitere na ndi-nnọdu nke Gilead, we si Ehab, Jehova, bú Chineke nke Israel, nādi ndu, Onye m'guzoworo n'iru Ya, igirigi ma-ọbu miri-ozuzo agaghi-adi ma-ọli n'arọ ndia, ma ọ bu nání dika okwum si di." 
1Kings17:2 Okwu Jehova we rue ya nti, si," 
1Kings17:3 Si n'ebe a pua, chere onwe-gi iru n'Iru-anyanwu, zo onwe-gi na miri-iyi Kerit, nke di n'iru Jọdan." 
1Kings17:4 O gēru kwa, na i gāṅu miri sitere na miri-iyi ahu; ọ bu kwa ugolo-ọma ka M'nyeworo iwu izù gi n'ebe ahu." 
1Kings17:5 O we je, me dika okwu Jehova si di: o je biri na miri-iyi Kerit, nke di n'iru Jọdan." 
1Kings17:6 Ugolo-ọma we nēbutere ya achicha na anu n'ututu, na achicha na anu n'anyasi; ọ nāṅu kwa miri sitere na miri-iyi ahu." 
1Kings17:7 O rue, mb͕e ubọchi ufọdu gasiri, na miri-iyi ahu takọrọ, n'ihi na miri-ozuzo adighi n'ala." 
1Kings17:8 Okwu Jehova we rue ya nti, si," 
1Kings17:9 Bilie, je Zarefat, nke diri Zaidon, biri n'ebe ahu: le, enyewom otù nwayi di-ya nwuru nọ n'ebe ahu iwu izù gi." 
1Kings17:10 O we bilie, je Zarefat, biarue ọnu-uzọ-ama obodo ahu, ma, le, n'ebe ahu ka nwayi di-ya nwuru nọ nāchikọta nkú: o we kpọ ya òkù, si, Biko, kuterem nwantī miri n'ihe, ka m'we ṅua." 
1Kings17:11 O we je ikute ya, Elaija we kpọ ya òkù, si, Biko, wetaram iberibe achicha n'aka-gi." 
1Kings17:12 Nwayi ahu we si, Jehova, bú Chineke-gi, nādi ndu, Ọ dighi ob͕e achicha m'nwere ma-ọli, ma nání otù nju-aka utu ọka n'okpokoro, na nwantī manu n'ite: ma, le, anamachikọta nkú abua, ka m'we ba, were ya doziere onwem, dozi-kwa-ra nwam nwoke, ka ayi we rie ya, nwua." 
1Kings17:13 Elaija we si ya, Atula egwu; ba, mere dika okwu-gi si di: nání buru uzọ merem ob͕e achicha ntà site na ya, weputaram ya, ma mere onwe-gi, me-kwa-ra nwa-gi nwoke, n'ikpe-azu." 
1Kings17:14 N'ihi na otú a ka Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, siri, Okpokoro utu ọka ahu agaghi-agwu, ite manu ahu agaghi-akọ gi kwa, rue ubọchi Jehova gēnye miri-ozuzo n'elu uwa." 
1Kings17:15 O we je me dika okwu Elaija si di: nwayi ahu we rie, ya onwe-ya, na Elaija, na ulo-ya, ọtutu ubọchi." 
1Kings17:16 Okpokoro utu ọka ahu agwughi, ite manu ahu akọghi kwa, dika okwu Jehova si di, nke O kwuru n'aka Elaija." 
1Kings17:17 O rue, mb͕e ihe ndia gasiri, na nwa nke nwayi ahu, bú nwayi nwe ulo, riara ọria; ọria-ya we di ike nke-uku, rue mb͕e ume nāfọdughi nime ya." 
1Kings17:18 Nwayi ahu we si Elaija, Gini ka mu na gi nwekọrọ, gi onye nke Chineke? ì biakutewom ime ka echeta nmehiem, na ime ka nwam nwoke nwua?" 
1Kings17:19 Ọ si ya, Nyem nwa-gi nwoke. O we kuputa ya n'obi-ya, kugo ya n'ime-ulo-elu, ebe ya onwe-ya nānọdu, ọ tọb͕ọ ya n'ihe-ndina-ya." 
1Kings17:20 Ọ kpọkue Jehova, si, Jehova, bú Chinekem, ọ̀ bu kwa nwayi a di-ya nwuru, nke mu onwem nānọ n'ulo-ya dika ọbìa, ka I mejọworo, n'ime ka nwa-ya nwoke nwua?" 
1Kings17:21 O setia onwe-ya n'aru nwata ahu ub͕ò atọ, kpọkue Jehova, si, Biko, Jehova, bú Chinekem, ka nkpuru-obi nwata nka biaghachi nime ya." 
1Kings17:22 Jehova we ge nti olu Elaija; nkpuru-obi nwata ahu we biaghachi nime ya, ọ we di ndu." 
1Kings17:23 Elaija we kuru nwata ahu, si n'ime-ulo-elu ahu kudata ya n'ulo, nye ya nne-ya: Elaija we si, Le, nwa-gi nādi ndu." 
1Kings17:24 Nwayi ahu we si Elaija, Ub͕u a amawom nka na onye nke Chineke ka i bu, na okwu Jehova bu kwa ezi-okwu n'ọnu-gi." 
1Kings18:1 O rue, mb͕e ọtutu ubọchi gasiri, na okwu Jehova ruru Elaija nti, n'arọ nke-atọ, si, Je, me ka Ehab hu gi anya; M'gēnye kwa miri-ozuzo n'elu uwa." 
1Kings18:2 Elaija we je ime ka Ehab hu ya anya. Ma oké unwu ahu siri ike na Sameria. 
1Kings18:3 Ehab we kpọ Obadaia, onye bu onye-isi ulo-ya. (Ma Obadaia nātu egwu Jehova nke-uku:" 
1Kings18:4 o we rue, mb͕e Jezebel bipuru ndi-amuma Jehova, na Obadaia chiri ọgu ndi-amuma ise, zo ha, ọgu ndikom abua na iri n'otù ọb͕à, were achicha na miri zùa ha.)" 
1Kings18:5 Ehab we si Obadaia, Jegharia n'ala, rue isi-iyi nile nke miri, ru kwa miri-iyi nile: eleghi anya ayi gāchọta ahihia, we me ka inyinya na inyinya mule di ndu, ka ayi we ghara ibipu anu n'anu-ulo-ayi." 
1Kings18:6 Ha we kewara onwe-ha ala ahu igabiga nime ya: Ehab jere n'otù uzọ, nání ya, Obadaia je-kwa-ra n'uzọ ọzọ, nání ya." 
1Kings18:7 Obadaia we nọ n'uzọ, ma, le, Elaija zutere ya: ọ mata ya, da kpue iru-ya n'ala, si, Ọ̀ bu gi bu nka, onye-nwem Elaija?" 
1Kings18:8 Ọ si ya, Mu ka ọ bu: je, si onye-nwe-gi, Le, Elaija abiawo." 
1Kings18:9 Ọ si, Gini ka m'mehieworo, na gi onwe-gi nēnye orù-gi n'aka Ehab, ime ka m'nwua?" 
1Kings18:10 Jehova, bú Chineke-gi, nādi ndu, ọ dighi mba ma-ọbu ala-eze ma-ọli, ebe onye-nwem nēzigaghi ichọ gi: ma mb͕e ha siri, Ọ nọghi n'ebe a, o me ka ala-eze ahu na mba ahu ṅua iyi, na ha achọtaghi gi." 
1Kings18:11 Ma ub͕u a gi onwe-gi nāsi, Je, si onye-nwe-gi, Le, Elaija abiawo."
