1Kings18:12 Ọ gēru kwa, mb͕e mu onwem si n'ebe i nọ je, na Mọ nke Jehova gēburu gi jerue ebe m'nāmaghi; ma mb͕e m'biara igosi Ehab, ma ọ chọtaghi gi, ọ gēb͕ukwam: ma orù-gi nātu egwu Jehova site na mb͕e m'di na nwata." 
1Kings18:13 Ègosighi onye-nwem ihe m'mere mb͕e Jezebel b͕uru ndi-amuma Jehova, na ezorom ọgu ndikom ise sitere na ndi-amuma Jehova, ọgu ndikom abua na iri n'otù ọb͕à, ogu ndikom abua na iri n'otù ọb͕à, were achicha na miri zùa ha?" 
1Kings18:14 Ma ub͕u a gi onwe-gi nāsi, Je, si onye-nwe-gi, Le, Elaija abiawo: ọ gēb͕ukwam." 
1Kings18:15 Elaija we si, Jehova nke usu nile nke ndi-agha nādi ndu, Onye m'guzoworo n'iru Ya, n'ezie ta ka m'gēme ka ọ hum anya." 
1Kings18:16 Obadaia we je izute Ehab, gosi ya: Ehab we je izute Elaija." 
1Kings18:17 O rue, mb͕e Ehab huru Elaija, na Ehab siri ya, Ọ̀ bu gi bu nka, gi onye nēmekpa Israel aru?" 
1Kings18:18 Ọ si, Emekpaghm Israel aru; kama ọ bu gi onwe-gi, na ulo nna-gi, nime nrapu unu rapuworo ihe nile Jehova nyere n'iwu, i we jeso Bealim." 
1Kings18:19 Ma ub͕u a ziga, chikọtaram Israel nile rue ugwu Kamel, na ndi-amuma Beal, ndi di nnù madu na ọgu abua na iri, na ndi-amuma Ashera, ndi di nnù madu, ndi nēri ihe na table Jezebel." 
1Kings18:20 Ehab we zisa ozi n'etiti umu Israel nile, chikọta ndi-amuma ahu rue ugwu Kamel." 
1Kings18:21 Elaija we biarue ndi Israel nile nso, si, Rùe ole mb͕e ka unu onwe-unu ganārughari n'etiti uzọ abua ndia? ọ buru na Jehova bu Chineke, jesonu Ya: ọ buru Beal, jesonu ya. Ma ndi Israel azaghi ya okwu ọ bula." 
1Kings18:22 Elaija we si ndi Israel, Mu onwem, abum onye-amuma Jehova fọduru, náním; ma ndi-amuma Beal di nnù ndikom na ọgu abua na iri." 
1Kings18:23 Ka ha nye kwa ayi oke-ehi abua; ka ha rọputa-kwa-ra onwe-ha otù oke-ehi, bọ ya n'ọbubọ-ya, tukwasi ya n'elu nkú, ma ka ha ghara itiye ọku: mu onwem gēdozi kwa oke-ehi nke-ọzọ, tiye n'elu nkú, ma m'gaghi-etiye ọku." 
1Kings18:24 Unu gākpọku kwa aha chi-unu, ma mu onwem gākpọku aha Jehova: ọ gēru kwa, na chi ahu nke nēwere ọku za, onye ahu bu Chineke. Ndi Israel nile we za, si, Ọ di nma, bú okwu a." 
1Kings18:25 Elaija we si ndi-amuma Beal, Rọputaranu onwe-unu otù oke-ehi, buru uzọ dozie ya; n'ihi na unu onwe-unu di ọtutu; kpọku-kwa-nu aha chi-unu, ma unu etiyela ọku." 
1Kings18:26 Ha we were oke-ehi nke enyere ha, ha we dozie ya, kpọkue aha Beal site n'ututu we rue etiti-ehihie, si, Beal, za ayi. Ma ọ dighi olu di, ọ dighi kwa onye nāza. Ha we wukwasi n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà nke emere." 
1Kings18:27 O rue, n'etiti-ehihie, na Elaija kwara ha emò, si, Werenu oké olu kpọ: n'ihi na chi ka ọ bu; n'ihi na ọ nātughari uche-ya, ma-ọbu na o wezugawo onwe-ya, ma-ọbu na ọ nọ n'ije, ma-ọbu eleghi anya ya onwe-ya nāraru ura, ma ọ gēteta." 
1Kings18:28 Ha we were oké olu kpọ, were mma-agha na ube bìe aru onwe-ha dika ha si eme, rue mb͕e ọbara wukwasiri ha." 
1Kings18:29 O rue, mb͕e etiti-ehihie gasiri, na ha nēbu amuma rue mb͕e nsure onyinye-inata-iru-ọma; ma ọ dighi olu di, ọ dighi kwa onye nāza, ọ dighi kwa ọṅuṅa-nti di." 
1Kings18:30 Elaija we si ndi Israel nile, Biaruenu nsom; ndi Israel nile we biarue ya nso. O dozie ebe-ichu-àjà Jehova nke etipiara." 
1Kings18:31 Elaija we chiri nkume iri na abua, dika ọnu-ọgugu ebo umu Jekob si di, bú onye okwu Jehova ruru nti, si, Israel gābu aha-gi." 
1Kings18:32 Ọ chiri nkume ahu wue ebe-ichu-àjà n'aha Jehova; ọ me ebe miri gādọrọ, ra ka ebe gānagide mb͕é nkpuru-ọghigha abua, buruburu ebe-ichu-àjà." 
1Kings18:33 O do nkú n'usoro, bọ oke-ehi-ya n'ọbubọ-ya, tukwasi ya n'elu nkú. Ọ si, B͕ajuenu okpokoro anọ miri, wukwasi ya n'elu àjà-nsure-ọku, na n'elu nkú." 
1Kings18:34 Ọ si, Menu ya nke ub͕ò abua; ha we me ya nke ub͕ò abua. Ọ si, Menu ya nke ub͕ò atọ; ha we me ya nke ub͕ò atọ." 
1Kings18:35 Miri ahu we nērughari ebe-ichu-àjà ahu buruburu; ọ b͕aju kwa ebe ahu miri nādọrọ miri. 
1Kings18:36 O rue, na mb͕e nsure onyinye-inata-iru-ọma, na Elaija, bú onye-amuma, biaruru nso, si, Jehova, bú Chineke Abraham na Aisak na Israel, ka amara ta na Gi onwe-gi bu Chineke n'Israel, na mu onwem bu kwa orù-Gi, na ọ bu kwa n'okwu-Gi ka m'meworo ihe nile ndia." 
1Kings18:37 Zam, Jehova, zam, ka ndi nka we mara na Gi onwe-gi, Jehova, bu Chineke, na Gi onwe-gi echighariwo kwa obi-ha ilata." 
1Kings18:38 Ọku Jehova we da, ripia àjà-nsure-ọku ahu, na nkú-ya, na nkume nile, na àjà, rachapu kwa miri nke di n'ebe ahu miri dọrọ." 
1Kings18:39 Ndi Israel nile we hu ya, da kpue iru-ha n'ala, si, Jehova, Ya onwe-ya bu Chineke; Jehova, Ya onwe-ya bu Chineke." 
1Kings18:40 Elaija we si ha, Jidenu ndi-amuma Beal; ekwela ka otù nwoke nime ha wepuga onwe-ya. Ha we jide ha: Elaija we me ka ha ridarue miri-iyi Kaishon, o b͕ue ha n'ebe ahu." 
1Kings18:41 Elaija we si Ehab, Rigo, rie ihe ṅu kwa ihe-ọṅuṅu; n'ihi na olu ùzù oké miri-ozuzo nāda." 
1Kings18:42 Ehab we rigo iri ihe na iṅu ihe-ọṅuṅu. Ma Elaija rigoro n'elu ugwu Kamel; o ruru ala, tiye iru-ya n'etiti ikperè-ya abua." 
1Kings18:43 Ọ si nwa-okorọbia-ya, Biko, rigo, legide anya n'uzọ oké osimiri. Ọ rigo, legide anya, si, Ọ dighi ihe ọ bula di. Ọ si, Jeghachi ub͕ò asa." 
1Kings18:44 O rue, na nke ub͕ò asa, na ọ siri, Le, igwe-oji, nke di ntà dika ọbu-aka madu, nēsi n'oké osimiri rigoputa. Ọ si, Rigo, si Ehab, Dozie ub͕ọ-ala-gi, rida, ka miri-ozuzo we ghara ib͕ochi gi." 
1Kings18:45 O rue, na nwa mb͕e ntà, na elu-igwe jiri nji n'igwe-oji na ifufe, oké miri-ozuzo di uku we di. Ehab we nọkwasi n'ub͕ọ-ala, la na Jezreel." 
1Kings18:46 Aka Jehova we di n'aru Elaija; o we ke ihe-ọkiké n'úkwù-ya, b͕a ọsọ n'iru Ehab, rue ebe i nābà Jezreel." 
1Kings19:1 Ehab we gosi Jezebel ihe nile Elaija mere, na ihe nile otú o were mma-agha b͕ue ndi-amuma nile." 
1Kings19:2 Jezebel we zigara Elaija onye-ozi, si, Ka chi me otú a, ka ha me kwa ihe ọzọ otú a, ma asi na emeghm ndu-gi ka ọ di ka ndu otù onye nime ha dika mb͕e a echi." 
1Kings19:3 O we tua egwu, bilie, je n'ihi ndu-ya, biarue Bia-sheba, nke Juda nwere, o me ka nwa- okorọbia-ya nọdu n'ebe ahu." 
1Kings19:4 Ma ya onwe-ya jere ije otù ubọchi n'ọzara, bia nọdu n'okpuru otù osisi broom: ọ riọ Chineke ndu-ya ka ọ nwua, si, O zuwo; ub͕u a, Jehova, wepu ndum; n'ihi na mu onwem adighi nma kari nnam-hà." 
1Kings19:5 O dina, raru ura n'okpuru otù osisi broom; ma, le, mọ-ozi nēmetu ya aka, si ya, Bilie, rie ihe." 
1Kings19:6 O we legide anya, ma, le, ob͕e achicha, nke esiri n'elu nkume di ọku, na ite miri di n'akuku isi-ya. O rie, ṅu kwa, dina kwa ọzọ." 
1Kings19:7 Mọ-ozi nke Jehova we biaghachi nke ub͕ò abua, metu ya aka, si, Bilie, rie ihe; n'ihi na ije riri nne kari ike-gi." 
1Kings19:8 O we bilie, rie ihe, ṅu kwa miri, je n'ike ihe-oriri ahu ọgu ubọchi abua ehihie na abali rue ugwu Chineke, bú Horeb." 
1Kings19:9 Ọ bia n'ebe ahu rue ọb͕à, nọ ọnọdu-abali n'ebe ahu; ma, le, okwu Jehova ruru ya nti, si ya, Gini ka i nēme n'ebe a, Elaija?" 
1Kings19:10 Ọ si, Ekwoworom Jehova, bú Chineke nke usu nile nke ndi-agha, ekworo nke-uku; n'ihi na umu Israel arapuwo ọb͕ub͕a-ndu-Gi, tipia ebe-ichu-àjà-Gi nile, were mma-agha b͕ue ndi-amuma-Gi: ọ fọduru mu onwem, náním; ha nāchọ kwa ndum, iwepu ya." 
1Kings19:11 Ọ si, Pua, guzo n'ugwu n'iru Jehova. Ma, le, Jehova nāgabiga, oké ifufe di ike nāb͕ọwa kwa ugwu nile, nētipia kwa nkume di elu nile n'iru Jehova; ma Jehova anọghi n'ifufe ahu: ma mb͕e ifufe gasiri ala-ọma-jijiji mara; ma Jehova anọghi n'ala-ọma-jijiji ahu:" 
1Kings19:12 ma mb͕e ala-ọma-jijiji gasiri ọku we di; ma Jehova anọghi n'ọku ahu: ma mb͕e ọku gasiri olu ntà nke di ezi nwayọ dara. 
1Kings19:13 O rue, mb͕e Elaija nuru ya, na ọ huchiri iru-ya n'uwe-nwuda-ya, pua, guzo n'ọnu-uzọ ọb͕à ahu. Ma, le, olu ruru ya nti, si, Gini ka i nēme n'ebe a, Elaija?" 
1Kings19:14 Ọ si, Ekwoworom Jehova, bú Chineke usu-ndi-agha, ekworo nke-uku; n'ihi na umu Israel arapuwo ọb͕ub͕a-ndu-Gi, tipia ebe-ichu-àjà-Gi nile, were mma-agha b͕ue ndi-amuma-Gi; ọ fọduru mu onwem, náním; ha nāchọ kwa ndum, iwepu ya." 
1Kings19:15 Jehova we si ya, Je, laghachi n'uzọ-gi rue ọzara Damaskọs: ma mb͕e i biara, i gēte Hazael manu ibu eze Siria:" 
1Kings19:16 i gēte kwa Jihu, bú nwa Nimshi, manu ibu eze Israel: i gēte kwa Elaisha, bú nwa Shefat, nke Ebel-mehola, ibu onye-amuma n'ọnọdu gi." 
1Kings19:17 Ọ gēru kwa, na onye nēwepuga onwe-ya na mma-agha Hazael, Jihu gēme ka ọ nwua: onye nēwepuga kwa onwe-ya na mma-agha Jihu, Elaisha gēme ka ọ nwua." 
1Kings19:18 Ma M'gēme ka nnù madu iri-na-asa na ọgu iri fọdu n'Israel, bú ikperè nile nke anēb͕ughi nye Beal, na ọnu ọ bula nke nēsutughi ya." 
1Kings19:19 O si n'ebe ahu je, chọta Elaisha nwa Shefat, ma onye ahu nēme ka ehi-ya dọghari ihe eji gwu ala ubi, orú ehi na anọ ejikọrọ abua abua di n'iru ya, ya onwe-ya nọye-kwa-ra ehi abua nke-iri-na-abua: Elaija we gabiga jekuru ya, wusara ya uwe-nwuda-ya." 
1Kings19:20 O we rapu ìgwè ehi-ya, b͕aso Elaija n'azu, si, Biko, ka m'sutu nnam na nnem ọnu, m'gējeso kwa gi. Ọ si ya, Laghachi; n'ihi na ọ̀ bu gini ka m'meworo gi?" 
1Kings19:21 O we si n'iso ya laghachi, were ehi abua ahu ejikọrọ n'otù, b͕ue ha, o were kwa ihe ehi ahu ji alu ọlu sie anu-ha, o nye ndi ahu, ha rie. O bilie, jeso Elaija, we jere ya ozi." 
1Kings20:1 Ma Ben-hedad, bú eze Siria, chikọtara usu-ndi-agha-ya nile: orú ndi-eze na iri na abua soro kwa ya, ha na inyinya na ub͕ọ-ala: o we rigo, nọchigide Sameria n'agha, buso ya agha." 
1Kings20:2 O we zigara Ehab, bú eze Israel, ndi-ozi, rue obodo, si ya," 
1Kings20:3 Otú a ka Ben-hedad siri, Ọla-ọcha-gi na ọla-edo-gi, nkem ka ọ bu; ndinyom-i kwa na umu-gi, bú nke di nma kari, nkem ka ha bu." 
1Kings20:4 Eze Israel we za, si, Dika okwu-gi si di, Onye-nwem, eze; nke gi ka mu onwem na ihe nile m'nwere bu." 
1Kings20:5 Ndi-ozi ahu we biaghachi, si, Otú a ka Ben-hedad kwuru, si, N'ezie eziterem i ozi, si, Ọla-ọcha-gi na ọla-edo-gi na ndinyom-i na umu-gi, mu ka i gēnye ha;" 
1Kings20:6 ma m'gēzitere gi ndi-orùm dika mb͕e a echi, ha gāchọ kwa n'ulo-gi, na ulo ndi-orù-gi;ọ gēru kwa, na ihe ọ bula anya-gi nāchọsi ike, ha gētiye ya n'aka-ha, were ya." 
1Kings20:7 Eze Israel we kpọ ndi-okenye nile nke ala, si, Biko, maranu, hu kwa, na ọ bu ihe ọjọ ka nwoke a nāchọ: n'ihi na o ziterem ozi ichinye ya ndinyom nkem, na ichinye ya umum, na inye ya ọla-ọcham, na inye ya ọla-edom; ma eb͕ochighm ha n'aka-ya." 
1Kings20:8 Ndi-okenye nile na ndi Israel nile we si ya, Anula okwu-ya, ekwe-kwa-la." 
1Kings20:9 O we si ndi-ozi Ben-hedad, Sinu onye-nwem, bú eze, Ihe nile i buru uzọ zitere orù-gi ozi ime, nke ahu ka m'gēme: ma ihe a, apughm ime ya. Ndi-ozi we la, weghachiri ya okwu." 
1Kings20:10 Ben-hedad we zigara ya ozi, si, Ka chi mem otú a, ka ha mekwam ihe ọzọ otú a, asi na ájá Sameria gēzu nju-aka inye ndi nile nọ n'ukwum." 
1Kings20:11 Eze Israel we za, si, Kwuenu, si ya, Ka onye nēke ekike-agha-ya ghara ito onwe-ya dika onye nēkepu ya." 
1Kings20:12 O rue, mb͕e Ben-hedad nuru okwu a, mb͕e ọ nāṅu ihe-ọṅuṅu, ya onwe-ya na ndi-eze, n'ulo-ntu, na ọ siri ndi-orù-ya, Donu onwe-unu n'usoro. Ha we do onwe-ha n'usoro imegide obodo ahu." 
1Kings20:13 Ma, le, otù onye-amuma biaruru Ehab, bú eze Israel, nso, si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, Ì huwo oké ìgwè madu nile a? le, anamenye ya n'aka-gi ta; i gāma kwa na Mu onwem bu Jehova." 
1Kings20:14 Ehab we si, Sìte n'aka onye? Ọ si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, Site n'aka umu-okorọbia nke ndi-isi ala anāchi achi. Ọ si, Ònye gāmalite agha ahu? Ọ si, Gi onwe-gi." 
1Kings20:15 O we gukọta umu-okorọbia nke ndi-isi ala anāchi achi, ha we di ọgu iri-na-otù na iri na abua: mb͕e agukọtasiri ha ọ gukọta ndi-ya nile, bú umu Israel nile, nnù iri-na-asa na ọgu iri." 
1Kings20:16 Ha we pua n'etiti-ehihie. Ma Ben-hedad nāṅu manya nāṅubiga ya okè n'ulo-ntu-ya, ya onwe-ya na ndi-eze, bú orú ndi-eze na iri na abua ahu ndi nēyere ya aka." 
1Kings20:17 Umu-okorọbia nke ndi-isi ala anāchi achi we buru uzọ pua; Ben-hedad we zipu, ha we gosi ya, si, Ndikom esiwo na Sameria puta." 
1Kings20:18 Ọ si, Ọ buru na ọ bu okwu udo ka ha putaworo, jidenu ha na ndu: ọ buru kwa na ọ bu ibu agha ka ha putaworo, jidenu ha na ndu." 
1Kings20:19 Ma ndia siri n'obodo pua, bú umu-okorọbia nke ndi-isi ala anāchi achi, na usu-ndi-agha ndi soro ha n'azu." 
1Kings20:20 Ha we tib͕ue, nwoke ọ bula nwoke-ibe-ya; ndi Siria we b͕alaga, Israel we chua ha n'azu: Ben-hedad, bú eze Siria, we wepuga onwe-ya n'elu inyinya, ya na ndi-inyinya." 
1Kings20:21 Eze Israel we pua, tib͕ue inyinya na ub͕ọ-ala, o tib͕u-kwa-ra ntib͕u uku n'etiti ndi Siria." 
1Kings20:22 Onye-amuma ahu we biarue eze Israel nso, si ya, Je ime onwe-gi ka i di ike, mara, hu kwa ihe i nēme: n'ihi na n'ọb͕ub͕a arọ ka eze Siria ganārigota imegide gi." 
1Kings20:23 Ma ndi-orù eze Siria siri ya, Chi ukwu ka chi-ha bu; n'ihi ya ka ha di ike kari ayi: ma otú ọ di, ka ayi buso ha agha n'ala di lari, ayi aghaghi kwa idi ike kari ha." 
1Kings20:24 Ma me ihe a; wezuga ndi-eze, nwoke ọ bula n'ebe-ya, do ndi nāchi ala n'ọnọdu ha:" 
1Kings20:25 ma gi onwe-gi, gutara onwe-gi usu-ndi-agha, dika usu-ndi-agha nke dapunariworo gi n'agha, inyinya n'ọnọdu inyinya, na ub͕ọ-ala n'ọnọdu ub͕ọ-ala: ayi gēbuso kwa ha agha n'ala di lari, ayi aghaghi kwa idi ike kari ha. O we ge nti olu-ha, me otú a." 
1Kings20:26 O rue, n'ọb͕ub͕a arọ, na Ben-hedad gukọtara ndi Siria, rigorue Efek, ibuso Israel agha." 
1Kings20:27 Agukọta-kwa-ra umu Israel, nye ha ihe-oriri, ha we je izute ha: umu Israel we ma ulo-ikwū-ha n'iru ha dika ìgwè ewu ntà abua; ma ndi Siria juputara ala." 
1Kings20:28 Onye nke Chineke we biarue nso, gwa eze Israel okwu, si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, N'ihi na Siria asiwo, Chi ugwu ka Jehova bu, ma Ọ bughi chi ndagwurugwu; n'ihi ya ka M'gēnye ìgwè uku a nile n'aka-gi, unu gāma kwa na Mu onwem bu Jehova." 
1Kings20:29 Ha we nọ n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū, ndi Israel na ncherita-iru ndi Siria, ubọchi asa. O rue, n'ubọchi nke-asa, na agha biaruru nso; umu Israel we tib͕ue Siria, orú nnù ndikom uzọ iri-na-abua na nnù iri, bú ndi ji ukwu eje, n'otù ubọchi." 
1Kings20:30 Ndi fọduru we b͕alaga n'Efek, rue obodo; mb͕idi obodo we dakwasi orú nnù ndikom atọ na nnù asa na ọgu iri fọduru. Ma Ben-hedad b͕alagara, ba n'obodo, n'ime-ulo nke di n'ime-ulo." 
1Kings20:31 Ndi-orù-ya we si ya, Biko, le, ayi anuwo na ndi-eze ulo Israel, na eze ebere ka ha bu: biko, ka ayi ke ákwà-nkpe n'úkwù-ayi, na udọ̀ n'isi-ayi, pukuru eze Israel: eleghi anya ọ gēdebe gi ndu." 
1Kings20:32 Ha we ke ákwà-nkpe n'úkwù-ha, na udọ̀ n'isi-ha, biakute eze Israel, si, Orù-gi, bú Ben-hedad, siri, Biko, ka mu onwem di ndu. Ọ si, Ọ̀ nọ ndu ub͕u a? nwa-nnem ka ọ bu." 
1Kings20:33 Ma ndikom ahu nāriba ama, ha we me ngwa imata ma ọ bu ihe si n'obi-ya puta; ha we si, Nwa-nne-gi, bú Ben-hedad. Ọ si, Banu n'obodo, kuta ya. Ben-hedad we pukute ya; o me ya ka ọ rigota n'ub͕ọ-ala-ya." 
1Kings20:34 Ben-hedad we si ya, Obodo nile nke nnam nara n'aka nna-gi, m'gēnyeghachi gi ha; i gākwa-kwa-ra onwe-gi amá nime Damaskọs, dika nnam kwara nime Sameria. Ma mu onwem, ka Ehab kwuru, n'ọb͕ub͕a-ndu nka ka m'gēzilaga gi. Ya na ya we b͕a ndu, o we zilaga ya." 
1Kings20:35 Ma otù nwoke n'etiti umu ndi-amuma siri ibe-ya n'okwu Jehova, Biko, tiem ihe. Ma nwoke ahu juru iti ya ihe." 
1Kings20:36 O we si ya, N'ihi na i geghi nti olu Jehova, le, mb͕e i nēsi n'ebe m'nọ la, ọdum gēb͕u gi. O si n'akuku ya la, ọdum we chọta ya. b͕ue ya." 
1Kings20:37 O we chọta nwoke ọzọ, si, Biko, tiem ihe. Nwoke ahu we tie ya ihe, nēti ya nēb͕u kwa ya mma." 
1Kings20:38 Onye-amuma ahu we je, guzoro eze n'uzọ, nwogharia onwe-ya, nātukwasi ákwà-ike-n'isi n'anya-ya abua." 
1Kings20:39 O rue, mb͕e eze nāgabiga, na onye ahu tikuru eze nkpu: ọ si, Orù-gi puru ba n'etiti agha; ma, le, otù nwoke wezugara onwe-ya, me ka otù nwoke biakutem, ọ si, Debe nwoke a: ọ buru na ele anya ya ma-ọli ma ahughi ya, ndu-gi gāla-kwa-ra ndu-ya, ma-ọbu na i gākwu talent ọla-ọcha." 
1Kings20:40 O rue, mb͕e orù-gi nēme ihe n'otù ebe na ebe ọzọ, na ahughm onye ahu. Eze Israel we si ya, Otú a ka ikpé-gi si di; gi onwe-gi ekwubìwo ya." 
1Kings20:41 O we me ngwa, wezuga ákwà-ike-n'isi n'anya-ya abua; eze Israel we mata ya na onye sitere na ndi-amuma ka ọ bu." 
1Kings20:42 Ọ si ya, Otú a ka Jehova siri, N'ihi na i zilagawo nwoke ahu ka ọ pua n'aka-gi, bú onye M'wezugara ka ebibie ya, ndu-gi gāla-kwa-ra ndu-ya, ndi-gi gāla-kwa-ra ndi-ya." 
1Kings20:43 Eze Israel we la n'ulo-ya n'obi arọ́ na nb͕aru-iru, o we ba na Sameria." 
1Kings21:1 O rue, mb͕e ihe ndia gasiri, na Nebot, bú onye Jezreel, nwere ubi-vine, nke di na Jezreel, n'akuku ulo uku Ehab, bú eze Sameria." 
1Kings21:2 Ehab we gwa Nebot okwu, si, Nyem ubi-vine-gi, ka o we burum ubi ab͕ara ogige ebe anāku akwukwọ nri, n'ihi na nke ahu di nso n'akuku ulom; ka m'nye kwa gi ubi-vine di nma kari ya n'ọnọdu ya: ma ọ buru na ọ di nma n'anya-gi, ka m'nye gi ego ruru ọnu-ahia-ya." 
1Kings21:3 Nebot we si Ehab, Ya burum ihe-árú sitere na Jehova, bú inye gi ihe-nketa nnam-hà." 
1Kings21:4 Ehab we ba n'ulo-ya n'obi arọ́ na nb͕aru-iru, n'ihi okwu nke Nebot, bú onye Jezreel, gwara ya: n'ihi na ọ siri, M'gaghi-enye gi ihe-nketa nnam-hà. O we dina n'ihe-ndina-ya, chigharia iru-ya, o righi kwa nri." 
1Kings21:5 Jezebel, bú nwunye-ya, we biakute ya, gwa ya okwu, si, Gini me-kwa-ra mọ-gi di arọ́, i nērighi kwa nri?" 
1Kings21:6 Ọ si ya, N'ihi na agwaram Nebot, bú onye Jezreel, okwu, si ya, Nyem ubi-vine-gi n'ego; ma-ọbu, ọ buru na ọ tọ gi onwe-gi utọ, ka m'nye gi ubi-vine ọzọ n'ọnọdu ya: o we si, M'gaghi-enye gi ubi-vine nkem." 
1Kings21:7 Jezebel, bú nwunye-ya, si ya, Ọ̀ bughi gi onwe-gi bu eze nāchi Israel ub͕u a? bilie, rie nri, ka obi-gi di nma: mu onwem gēnye gi ubi-vine Nebot, bú onye Jezreel." 
1Kings21:8 O we de akwukwọ n'aha Ehab, were nb͕a-aka-akàrà-ya ka ha, zigara ndi-okenye akwukwọ ahu, ziga-kwa-ra ndi amara aha-ha ndi nọ n'obodo-ya, ndi ha na Nebot bi." 
1Kings21:9 O we de n'akwukwọ ahu, si, Kpọsanu obu-bu-ọnu, me ka Nebot nọdu n'isi ọnọdu n'etiti ndi Israel:" 
1Kings21:10 me-kwa-nu ka ndikom abua, bú ndi jọb͕uru onwe-ha, nọdu n'iru ya, ka ha b͕a kwa àmà megide ya, si, I b͕akutere Chineke na eze azu. Me-kwa-nu ka ọ pua, werenu nkume tub͕ue ya, ka ọ nwua." 
1Kings21:11 Ndikom obodo-ya, bú ndi-okenye na ndi amara aha-ha ndi bi n'obodo-ya, we me dika Jezebel zitere ha ozi, dika edere ya n'akwukwọ nke o zitere ha." 
1Kings21:12 Ha kpọsara obubu-ọnu, me ka Nebot nọdu n'isi ọnọdu n'etiti ndi Israel." 
1Kings21:13 Ndikom abua ahu, bú ndi jọb͕uru onwe-ha, we bata, nọdu n'iru ya: ndikom ahu ndi jọb͕uru onwe-ha we b͕a àmà megide ya, bú Nebot, n'iru ndi Israel, si, Nebot b͕akutere Chineke na eze azu. Ha we me ka ọ pua rue azu obodo, ha were nkume tub͕ue ya, o we nwua." 
1Kings21:14 Ha we zigara Jezebel ozi, si, Atub͕uwo Nebot na nkume, ọ nwuwo kwa." 
1Kings21:15 O rue, mb͕e Jezebel nuru na atub͕uwo Nebot na nkume, na ọ nwuwo kwa, na Jezebel siri Ehab, Bilie, nweta ubi-vine Nebot, bú onye Jezreel, nke ọ juru inye gi n'ego: n'ihi na Nebot adighi ndu, kama ọ nwuwo." 
1Kings21:16 O rue, mb͕e Ehab nuru na Nebot anwuwo, na Ehab biliri iridaru ubi-vine Nebot, bú onye Jezreel, inweta ya." 
1Kings21:17 Okwu Jehova we rue Elaija, bú onye Tisbe, nti, si," 
1Kings21:18 Bilie, ridata izute Ehab, bú eze Israel, onye bi na Sameria; le, ọ nọ n'ubi-vine Nebot, ebe ọ ridara inweta ya." 
1Kings21:19 Ma i gāgwa ya okwu, si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, Ì b͕uwo ọchu, nweta kwa? I gāgwa kwa ya okwu, si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, N'ebe nkita rachara ọbara Nebot ka nkita gāracha ọbara-gi, ọbuná nke gi onwe-gi." 
1Kings21:20 Ehab we si Elaija, Ì chọtawom, onye-irom? Ọ si, Achọtawom i: n'ihi na i rewo onwe-gi ime ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova." 
1Kings21:21 Le, M'nēme ka ihe ọjọ bakute gi, M'gēkpochapu ndi-gi fọduru, M'gēbipu kwa n'aru Ehab nwa-nwoke ọ bula, na onye eb͕ochiri eb͕ochi na onye arapuru arapu n'Israel, ka Jehova kwuru:" 
1Kings21:22 M'gēme kwa ulo-gi ka ọ di ka ulo Jeroboam nwa Nebat, ka ọ di kwa ka ulo Beasha nwa Ahaija, n'ihi nkpasu-iwe nke i ji kpasum iwe, me kwa ka Israel mehie." 
1Kings21:23 Ọzọ kwa, Jehova kwuru okwu bayere Jezebel, si, Nkita gēri Jezebel n'ékpè Jezreel." 
1Kings21:24 Onye nke Ehab nke nwuru anwu n'obodo, nkita gēri ya; onye nke nwuru anwu n'ọhia, anu-ufe nke elu-igwe gēri kwa ya." 
1Kings21:25 (Otú ọ di, ọ dighi onye di ka Ehab, onye rere onwe-ya ime ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova, onye Jezebel, bú nwunye-ya, rafuru." 
1Kings21:26 Ọ we me ihe-árú nke-uku n'ijeso arusi di iche iche, dika ihe nile si di nke ndi-Amorait mere, ndi Jehova napuru ala-ha n'iru umu Israel.)" 
1Kings21:27 O rue, mb͕e Ehab nuru okwu ndia, na ọ dọwara uwe-ya nile, tukwasi ákwà-nkpe n'anu-aru-ya, bue ọnu, dina n'ákwà-nkpe, jegharia nwayọ." 
1Kings21:28 Okwu Jehova we rue Elaija, bú onye Tisbe, nti, si," 
1Kings21:29 Ì huwo na Ehab ewedawo onwe-ya n'ala n'irum? n'ihi na o wedawo onwe-ya n'ala n'irum, M'gaghi-eme ka ihe ọjọ ahu bia n'ubọchi-ya: ọ bu n'ubọchi nwa-ya ka M'gēme ka ihe ọjọ ahu biakwasi ulo-ya." 
1Kings22:1 Ha we nọdu arọ atọ agha adighi n'etiti Siria na Israel. 
1Kings22:2 O rue, n'arọ nke-atọ, na Jehoshafat, bú eze Juda, ridakuru eze Israel." 
1Kings22:3 Eze Israel we si ndi-orù-ya, Ùnu mara na ọ bu ayi nwe Remot-gilead, ma ayi onwe-ayi nāb͕a nkiti, ghara inaputa ya n'aka eze Siria?" 
1Kings22:4 Ọ si Jehoshafat, Ì gēsorom je agha na Remot-gilead? Jehoshafat we si eze Israel, Dika m'di, otú a ka i di; dika ndim di, otú a ka ndi-gi di; dika inyinyam di, otú a ka inyinya-gi di." 
1Kings22:5 Jehoshafat we si eze Israel, Biko, buru uzo ju ase okwu Jehova." 
1Kings22:6 Eze Israel we chikọta ndi-amuma, ra ka nnù ndikom, ọ si ha, M'gēje imegide Remot-gilead ibu agha, ma-ọbu m'gārapu? Ha we si, Rigo; Onye-nwe-ayi gēnye kwa ya n'aka eze." 
1Kings22:7 Jehoshafat we si, Ọ̀ dighi onye-amuma Jehova nọ n'ebe a tiyere ndia, ka ayi we jua ase n'aka-ya?" 
1Kings22:8 Eze Israel we si Jehoshafat, Otù nwoke ọzọ di kwa iju Jehova ase n'aka-ya, bú Maikaia nwa Imla: ma mu onwem kpọrọ ya asì; n'ihi na ọ dighi-ebu amuma ezi ihe bayerem, kama ihe ọjọ. Jehoshafat we si, Ka eze ghara ikwu otú a." 
1Kings22:9 Eze Israel we kpọ otù onye nēje ozi, si, Me ka Maikaia nwa Imla bia ọsọsọ." 
1Kings22:10 Ma eze Israel na Jehoshafat, bú eze Juda, nānọkwasi, nwoke ọ bula n'oche-eze-ya, yiri uwe-ha, n'ebe-nzọcha-ọka n'oghere ọnu-uzọ-ama Sameria; ndi-amuma nile nēbu kwa amuma n'iru ha." 
1Kings22:11 Zedekaia nwa Keneana we mere onwe-ya mpi ígwè, si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, Ndia ka i gēji sọ Siria, rue mb͕e agēme ka ha gwusia." 
1Kings22:12 Ndi-amuma nile nēbu kwa amuma otú a, si, Rigorue Remot-gilead, ka ihe ga-kwa-ra gi nke-ọma: Jehova enyewo kwa ya n'aka eze." 
1Kings22:13 Ma onye-ozi ahu nke jere ikpọ Maikaia gwara ya okwu, si, Biko, le, okwu nile nke ndi-amuma, dika otù ọnu, nēkwuru eze ezi ihe: biko, ka okwu-gi di ka okwu otù onye nime ha, gi kwu kwa ezi ihe." 
1Kings22:14 Maikaia we si, Jehova nādi ndu, n'ezie ihe Jehova gāsim, nke ahu ka m'gēkwu." 
1Kings22:15 O we biakute eze. Eze we si ya, Maikaia, àyi gējeru Remot-gilead ibu agha, ma-ọbu àyi gārapu? Ọ si ya, Rigo, ka ihe ga-kwa-ra gi nke-ọma; Jehova enyewo kwa ya n'aka eze." 
1Kings22:16 Eze we si ya, Ùb͕ò ole ka mu onwem ganāb͕a gi iyi ka i ghara igwam ihe ọ bula ma-ọbughi ezi-okwu n'aha Jehova?" 
1Kings22:17 Ọ si, Ahurum Israel nile ka ha b͕asaworo n'ugwu, dika ìgwè aturu nēnweghi onye-ọzùzù: Jehova we si, Ọ dighi onye nwe ndia; ka ha laghachi, nwoke ọ bula n'ulo-ya n'udo." 
1Kings22:18 Eze Israel we si Jehoshafat, Àsighm i na ọ gaghi-ebu amuma ezi ihe bayerem, kama ihe ọjọ?" 
1Kings22:19 Ọ si, N'ihi nka nuru okwu Jehova: ahurum Jehova ka Ọ nānọkwasi n'oche-eze-Ya, na usu-ndi-agha nke elu-igwe nile ka ha nēguzo n'akuku Ya n'aka-nri-Ya na n'aka-ekpe-Ya." 
1Kings22:20 Jehova we si, Ònye gārafu Ehab, ka o we rigo, da na Remot-gilead? Ọtù onye we si otú a; onye ọzọ si-kwa-ra otú a." 
1Kings22:21 Mọ ahu we puta, guzo n'iru Jehova, si, Mu onwem gārafu ya." 
1Kings22:22 Jehova we si ya, Gini ka i gēji? Ọ si, M'gāpu, buru mọ okwu-ugha n'ọnu ndi-amuma-ya nile. Ọ si, I gārafu ya, i gēnwe kwa ike: pua, me otú a." 
1Kings22:23 Ma ub͕u a, le, Jehova etiyewo mọ okwu-ugha n'ọnu ndi-amuma-gi ndia nile; Jehova ekwuwo kwa ihe ọjọ bayere gi." 
1Kings22:24 Zedekaia nwa Keneana we biarue nso, tie Maikaia aka na ǹtì, si, Òle uzọ Mọ Jehova siri n'ebe m'nọ gabiga igwa gi okwu?" 
1Kings22:25 Maikaia we si, Le, i ganāhu n'ubọchi ahu, mb͕e i gābà n'ime-ulo nke di n'ime-ulo izo onwe-gi." 
1Kings22:26 Eze Israel we si, Kuru Maikaia, me ka ọ laghachikuru Emon, bú onye-isi obodo, laghachikuru kwa Joash, bú nwa eze;" 
1Kings22:27 Igāsi kwa, Otú a ka eze siri, Tiyenu onye a n'ulo-nkpọrọ, me ka o rie nri nmeb͕u, ṅu kwa miri nmeb͕u, rue mb͕e m'gābia n'udo." 
1Kings22:28 Maikaia we si, Ọ buru na i laghachi ma-ọli n'udo, Jehova ekwughi okwu n'ọnum. Ọ si, Nurunu, ndi nile n'uwa, unu nile." 
1Kings22:29 Eze Israel na Jehoshafat, bú eze Juda, we rigorue Remot-gilead." 
1Kings22:30 Eze Israel we si Jehoshafat, M'gēnwoghari onwem, ba n'agha; ma gi onwe-gi yikwasi uwe-gi. Eze Israel we nwogharia onwe-ya, ba n'agha." 
1Kings22:31 Ma eze Siria nyere orú ndi-isi na iri na abua nke ub͕ọ-ala o nwere iwu, si, Unu ebusola onye ntà ma-ọbu onye uku agha, kama ọ bu eze Israel, nání ya." 
1Kings22:32 O rue, mb͕e ndi-isi ub͕ọ-ala huru Jehoshafat, na ha onwe-ha siri, N'ezie eze Israel ka ọ bu; ha we wezuga onwe-ha ibuso ya agha: Jehoshafat we tie nkpu." 
1Kings22:33 O rue, mb͕e ndi-isi ub͕ọ-ala huru na ya onwe-ya abughi eze Israel, ha we si n'iso ya laghachi." 
1Kings22:34 Ma otù nwoke dọrọ uta-ya nāmaghi onye ọ bu, we b͕ata eze Israel n'etiti njikọ ihe-agha-ya na uwe-agha-ya: o we si onye-ub͕ọ-ala-ya, Chigharia aka-gi, me ka m'si n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū pua; n'ihi na ọria nāriam." 
1Kings22:35 Agha we la elu n'ubọchi ahu: ewe me ka eze guzogide n'ub͕ọ-ala-ya imegide Siria, o we nwua n'anyasi: ọbara ebe ab͕aruru ya aru we b͕apu ba n'etiti ub͕ọ-ala-ya." 
1Kings22:36 Iti-nkpu we gazue n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū mb͕e anyanwu nāda, si, Nwoke ọ bula, ya la n'obodo-ya, nwoke ọ bula, ya la n'ala-ya." 
1Kings22:37 Eze we nwua, ewe bubata ya na Sameria; ha we lìe eze na Sameria." 
1Kings22:38 Ewe ṅachapu ub͕ọ-ala-ya n'akuku ọdọ-miri Sameria; nkita we racha ọbara-ya; (ma ndinyom nākwa iko sara aru-ha n'ebe ahu;) dika okwu Jehova si di nke O kwuru. 
1Kings22:39 Ma okwu Ehab nile nke fọduru, na ihe nile ọ mere, na ulo ọdu nke o wuru, na obodo nile nke o wuru, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Israel?" 
1Kings22:40 Ehab we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu; Ehazaia, bú nwa-ya, we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya." 
1Kings22:41 Jehoshafat nwa Esa malitere ibu eze Juda n'arọ nke-anọ nke Ehab, bú eze Israel." 
1Kings22:42 Jehoshafat b͕ara orú arọ na iri na ise mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze; o we buru eze orú arọ na ise na Jerusalem. Aha nne-ya bu Azuba nwa-nwayi Shilhi. 
1Kings22:43 O jere ije n'uzọ Esa, bú nna-ya; o sighi nime ya wezuga onwe-ya, nēme ihe ziri ezi n'anya Jehova: nání na ewezugaghi ebe di elu; ndi Israel nọ nāchu àjà nēsure kwa ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ n'ebe di elu nile." 
1Kings22:44 Jehoshafat me-kwa-ra ka ya na eze Israel di n'udo. 
1Kings22:45 Ma okwu Jehoshafat nile nke fọduru, na ihe idi-ike-ya nke o mere, na otú o buru agha, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Juda?" 
1Kings22:46 Ọzọ, ndi fọduru n'etiti ndi edoro nsọ ikwa iko, bú ndi fọduru n'ubọchi Esa nna-ya, o kpochapuru ha n'ala." 
1Kings22:47 Ma eze adighi n'Edom: onye edoro onye-isi bu eze. 
1Kings22:48 Jehoshafat mere ub͕ọ Tashish ijeru Ofia ibute ọla-edo: ma ha ejeghi; n'ihi na etiwara ub͕ọ ahu n'Ezion-geba. 
1Kings22:49 Mb͕e ahu Ehazaia nwa Ehab siri Jehoshafat, Ka ndi-orùm soro ndi-orù-gi je n'ub͕ọ-gi. Ma Jehoshafat ekweghi." 
1Kings22:50 Jehoshafat we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu, elìe ya n'ebe elìri nna-ya-hà n'obodo Devid nna-ya: Jehoram nwa-ya we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya." 
1Kings22:51 Ehazaia nwa Ehab malitere ibu eze Israel nime Sameria n'arọ nke-iri-na-asa nke Jehoshafat, bú eze Juda, o we buru eze Israel arọ abua." 
1Kings22:52 O me ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova, je kwa ije n'uzọ nna-ya, na n'uzọ nne-ya, na n'uzọ Jeroboam nwa Nebat, nke o ji me ka Israel mehie." 
1Kings22:53 O fè-kwa-ra Beal òfùfè, kpọ isi ala nye ya, we kpasue Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, iwe, dika ihe nile si di nke nna-ya mere." 
2Kings1:1 Moab we jehie megide Israel mb͕e ọnwu Ehab gasiri. 
2Kings1:2 Ehazaia we dapu n'ihe-ọkpukpa window nke ime-ulo-elu-ya nke di na Sameria, o we ria ọria: o ziga ndi-ozi, si ha, Jenu, jua Beal-zebub, bú chi Ekron, ase ma m'gādiri ndu n'ọria nka." 
2Kings1:3 Ma mọ-ozi Jehova gwara Elaija, bú onye Tisbe, okwu, si, Bilie, rigo izute ndi-ozi eze Sameria, gwa ha okwu, si, Ọ̀ bu n'ihi na ọ dighi Chineke di n'Israel, na unu onwe-unu nēje iju Beal-zebub, bú chi Ekron, ase?" 
2Kings1:4 Ma n'ihi nka otú a ka Jehova siri, Ihe-ndina ahu ebe i rigoro, i gaghi-esi na ya rida, kama i ghaghi inwu. Elaija we la." 
2Kings1:5 Ndi-ozi ahu we laghachikuru ya, ọ si ha, Gini bu nka na unu laghachiworo?" 
2Kings1:6 Ha si ya, Otù nwoke rigotara izute ayi, ọ si ayi, Jenu, laghachikuru eze nke zìri unu, gwa ya okwu, si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, Ọ̀ bu n'ihi na ọ dighi Chineke di n'Israel na gi onwe-gi nēziga iju Beal-zebub, bú chi Ekron, ase? n'ihi ya ihe-ndina ahu ebe i rigoworo, i gaghi-esi na ya rida, kama i ghaghi inwu." 
2Kings1:7 Ọ si ha, Òle aha madu ọ bu, bú nwoke ahu nke rigoro izute unu, we gwa unu okwu ndia?" 
2Kings1:8 Ha si ya, Ọ bu nwoke nwere aji nke-uku, eke-kwa-ra ya ihe-ọkiké akpukpọ n'úkwù-ya. Ọ si, Elaija onye Tisbe ka ọ bu." 
2Kings1:9 O we zigara ya onye-isi ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri, ya na ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri ya. O we rigokuru ya: ma, le, ọ nānọdu n'elu ugwu. O we gwa ya okwu, si, Gi onye nke Chineke, Eze asiwo, Ridata." 
2Kings1:10 Elaija we za, si onye-isi ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri ahu, Ọ buru na onye nke Chineke ka m'bu, ka ọku si n'elu-igwe ridata, ripia gi na ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri gi. Ọku we si n'elu-igwe ridata, ripia ya na ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri ya." 
2Kings1:11 O we ziga-kwa-ra ya onye-isi ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri ọzọ, ya na ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri ya. Ọ za, si ya, Onye nke Chineke, otú a ka eze siworo, Ngwa ngwa, ridata." 
2Kings1:12 Elaija we za, si ha, Ọ buru na onye nke Chineke ka m'bu, ka ọku si n'elu-igwe ridata, ripia gi na ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri gi. Ọku nke Chineke we si n'elu-igwe ridata, ripia ya na ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri ya." 
2Kings1:13 Ọ we ziga kwa onye-isi ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri nke-atọ, ya na ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri ya. Onye-isi nke-atọ nke ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri we rigo, bia b͕ue ikperè-ya n'ala n'iru Elaija, riọ ya amara, si ya, Onye nke Chineke, biko, ka ndum, na ndu ọgu ndi-orù-gi abua na iri ndia, di oké ọnu-ahia n'anya-gi." 
2Kings1:14 Le, ọku siri n'elu-igwe ridata, ripia ndi-isi abua mbu ahu nke ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri, ha na ọgu ndi-agha abua na iri ha: ma ub͕u a ka ndum di oké ọnu-ahia n'anya-gi." 
2Kings1:15 Mọ-ozi nke Jehova we si Elaija, Soro ya rida: atula egwu ya. O we bilie, soro ya ridakuru eze." 
2Kings1:16 O we gwa ya okwu, si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, N'ihi na i zigawo ndi-ozi iju Beal-zebub, bú chi Ekron, ase, ọ̀ bu n'ihi na ọ dighi Chineke di n'Israel iju ase okwu-Ya? n'ihi ya ihe-ndina ahu ebe i rigoworo, i gaghi-esi na ya rida, kama i ghaghi inwu." 
2Kings1:17 O we nwua, dika okwu Jehova si di nke Elaija kwuru. Jehoram we malite ibu eze n'ọnọdu ya n'arọ nke-abua nke Jehoram nwa Jehoshafat, bú eze Juda; n'ihi na o nweghi nwa-nwoke." 
2Kings1:18 Ma ihe Ehazaia nile nke fọduru nke o mere, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Israel?" 
2Kings2:1 O rue, mb͕e Jehova gaje ime ka Elaija rigorue elu-igwe n'oké ifufe, na Elaija siri na Gilgal je, ya na Elaisha." 
2Kings2:2 Elaija we si Elaisha, Biko, nọdu n'ebe a; n'ihi na Jehova ezigawom ijeru Bet-el, Elaisha we si, Jehova nādi ndu, nkpuru-obi-gi nādi kwa ndu, m'gaghi-arapu gi ma-ọli. Ha we ridarue Bet-el." 
2Kings2:3 Umu ndi-amuma ndi nọ na Bet-el we pukute Elaisha, si ya, Ì mawo na ta ka Jehova nēwepu onye-nwe-gi n'ibu onye-isi-gi? Ọ si, Mu onwem amawo kwa ya; b͕anu nkiti." 
2Kings2:4 Elaija we si ya, Elaisha, biko, nọdu n'ebe a; n'ihi na Jehova ezigawom ijeru Jeriko. Ọ si, Jehova nādi ndu, nkpuru-obi-gi nādi kwa ndu, m'gaghi-arapu gi ma-ọli. Ha we biarue Jeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Umu ndi-amuma ndi nọ na Jeriko we biarue Elaisha nso, si ya, Ì mawo na ta ka Jehova nēwepu onye-nwe-gi n'ibu onye-isi-gi? Ọ si, Mu onwem amawo kwa ya; b͕anu nkiti." 
2Kings2:6 Elaija we si ya, Biko, nọdu n'ebe a; n'ihi na Jehova ezigawom ijeru Jọdan. Ọ si, Jehova nādi ndu, nkpuru-obi-gi nādi kwa ndu, m'gaghi-arapu gi ma-ọli. Ha abua we je." 
2Kings2:7 Ọgu ndikom abua na iri n'etiti umu ndi-amuma je-kwa-ra, guzo na ncherita-iru ha n'ebe di anya: ha abua we guzo n'akuku Jọdan." 
2Kings2:8 Elaija we chiri uwe - nwuda - ya, piakọta ya, tie miri ahu, ewe kera ya, otù uzọ ga n'otù akuku, otù uzọ ga n'akuku ọzọ, ha abua we gabiga n'ala-akọrọ." 
2Kings2:9 O rue, mb͕e ha gabigasiri, na Elaija siri Elaisha, Riọ ihe m'gēmere gi, tutu ewepum n'ebe i nọ. Elaisha we si, Biko, ka òkè abua nke mọ-gi dikwasim." 
2Kings2:10 Ọ si, I riọwo ihe siri ike: ma ọ buru na i hum mb͕e anēwepum n'ebe i nọ, ọ gādiri gi otú a; ma ọ buru na i hughm, ọ gaghi-adi otú a." 
2Kings2:11 O rue na, mb͕e ha nọ nēje, nēje ije nēkwu kwa okwu, le, ub͕ọ-ala ọku na inyinya ọku, nke kewara ha abua; Elaija we rigorue elu-igwe n'oké ifufe." 
2Kings2:12 Ma Elaisha nēle ya anya; ya onwe-ya nēti kwa nkpu, si, Nnam, nnam, ub͕ọ-ala Israel, na ndi-inyinya-ya! ma ọ hughi ya ọzọ: o we jide uwe nke aka ya, dọwa ha ibe abua." 
2Kings2:13 Ọ chili kwa uwe-nwuda Elaija, nke danariri ya, ọ laghachi, guzo n'usọ Jọdan." 
2Kings2:14 O we chiri uwe-nwuda Elaija, nke danariri ya, o we tie miri, si, Òle ebe Jehova nọ, bú Chineke Elaija? Ya onwe-ya kwa, o we tie miri, ewe kera ya otù uzọ ga n'otù akuku, otù uzọ ga n'akuku ọzọ; Elaisha we gabiga." 
2Kings2:15 Umu ndi-amuma ndi nọ na Jeriko na ncherita-iru ya we hu ya, si, Mọ Elaija anọkwasiwo Elaisha. Ha we bia izute ya, ha we kpọrọ ya isi ala." 
2Kings2:16 Ha we si ya, Biko, le, ọgu ndikom abua na iri, bú ndi-dìnkpà, nọ n'etiti ndi-orù-gi n'ebe a; biko, ka ha je, chọ onye-nwe-gi: eleghi anya Mọ nke Jehova eweliwo ya, tuda ya n'otù ugwu, ma-ọbu n'otù ndagwurugwu. Ọ si, Unu ezigala." 
2Kings2:17 Ha we rugide ya rue mb͕e ihere mere ya, o we si, Ziganu. Ha we ziga ọgu ndikom abua na iri; ha we chọ ya ubọchi atọ, ma ha achọtaghi ya." 
2Kings2:18 Ha we laghachikuru ya, ma ya onwe-ya nānọ na Jeriko; ọ si ha, Àsighm unu, Ejela?" 
2Kings2:19 Ndikom obodo ahu we si Elaisha, Biko, le, ọnọdu obodo a di nma, dika onye-nwem nāhu: ma miri-ya jọrọ njọ, ala nādighi-ekwe kwa ka ihe ka aka." 
2Kings2:20 Ọ si, Wetaranum ọkwa ọhu, tiye-kwa-nu nnú nime ya. Ha we wetara ya." 
2Kings2:21 Ọ pua je n'ebe miri si asuputa, o we tubà nnú n'ebe ahu, si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, Emewom ka miri a buru ihe inye ezi-ndu; ọnwu ma-ọbu ala nādighi-ekwe ka ihe ka aka agaghi-adi kwa ọzọ site n'ebe ahu." 
2Kings2:22 Ewe me ka miri ahu buru ihe inye ezi-ndu rue ta, dika okwu Elaisha si di, nke o kwuru." 
2Kings2:23 O si n'ebe ahu rigorue Bet-el: ma mb͕e ya onwe-ya nārigo n'uzọ, umu-okoro siri n'obodo puta, we kwa ya emò, si ya, Rigo, onye-isi-nkwọcha; rigo, onye-isi-nkwọcha." 
2Kings2:24 Ọ le anya n'azu-ya, hu ha, kọcha ha n'aha Jehova. Nne anu-ọhia bear abua we si n'oké ọhia puta, dọka ọgu umu-okoro abua na abua n'etiti ha." 
2Kings2:25 O si n'ebe ahu jerue ugwu Kamel, si kwa n'ebe ahu laghachi na Sameria." 
2Kings3:1 Ma Jehoram nwa Ehab malitere ibu eze Israel nime Sameria n'arọ nke-iri-na-asatọ nke Jehoshafat, bú eze Juda, o we buru eze arọ iri na abua." 
2Kings3:2 O me ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova; nání na o meghi dika nna-ya, na dika nne-ya: o wezuga ogidi Beal nke nna-ya mere." 
2Kings3:3 Otú ọ di, ọ rapara na nmehie nile nke Jeroboam nwa Nebat, nke o ji me ka Israel mehie; o wezugaghi onwe-ya nime ya." 
2Kings3:4 Ma Misha, bú eze Moab, bu onye-nwe ìgwè anu-ulo; o we tuara eze Israel utu aji nke orú nnù umu-aturu uzọ iri-na-abua na nnù iri, na nke orú nnù ebulu uzọ iri-na-abua na nnù iri." 
2Kings3:5 O rue, mb͕e Ehab nwuru, na eze Moab jehiere megide eze Israel." 
2Kings3:6 Eze, bú Jehoram, we si na Sameria pua n'ubọchi ahu, gukọta Israel nile." 
2Kings3:7 O je kwa, zigara Jehoshafat, bú eze Juda, ozi, si, Eze Moab ejehiewo megidem: ì gēsorom jekuru Moab ibu agha? Ọ si, M'gārigo: dika m'di, otú a ka i di; dika ndim di, otú a ka ndi-gi di; dika inyinyam di, otú a ka inyinya-gi di." 
2Kings3:8 Ọ si, Òle nke bu uzọ ayi gēsi rigo? Ọ si, Uzọ ọzara Edom." 
2Kings3:9 Eze Israel we je, ya na eze Juda, na eze Edom: ha we ga ije ubọchi asa buruburu: ma ọ dighi miri diri ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ahu, ma ọbu nke diri anu-ulo nke ha chiri je." 
2Kings3:10 Eze Israel we si, Ewó! n'ihi na Jehova akpọwo eze atọ ndia inye ha n'aka Moab." 
2Kings3:11 Jehoshafat we si, Ọ̀ dighi onye-amuma Jehova nọ ebe a, ka ayi we jua Jehova ase site n'aka-ya? Otù nime ndi-orù eze Israel we za, si, Elaisha nwa Shefat nọ ebe a, onye wukwasiri miri n'aka Elaija." 
2Kings3:12 Jehoshafat we si, Okwu Jehova di n'ebe ọ nọ. Eze Israel na Jehoshafat na eze Edom we ridakuru ya." 
2Kings3:13 Elaisha we si eze Israel, Gini ka mu na gi nwekọrọ? jekuru ndi-amuma nna-gi, jekuru kwa ndi-amuma nne-gi. Eze Israel we si ya, É-è: n'ihi na Jehova akpọwo eze atọ ndia inye ha n'aka Moab." 
2Kings3:14 Elaisha we si, Jehova nke usu nile nke ndi-agha nādi ndu, Onye m'guzoworo n'iru Ya, n'ezie, ọ buru na ahughm Jehoshafat, bú eze Juda, iru-ọma, m'gaghi-elegide anya n'ebe i nọ ma-ọli, m'gaghi-ahu kwa gi anya ma-ọli." 
2Kings3:15 Ma ub͕u a kutaranum ọkpọ-ubọ. O rue, mb͕e ọkpọ-ubọ ahu nākpọ, na aka Jehova di n'aru ya." 
2Kings3:16 Ọ si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, Me ndagwurugwu a ka ọ buru olùlù olùlù." 
2Kings3:17 N'ihi na otú a ka Jehova siri, Unu agaghi-ahu ifufe, unu agaghi-ahu kwa oké miri-ozuzo, ma ndagwurugwu ahu gējuputa na miri: unu gāṅu kwa, unu onwe-unu, na anu-ulo-unu, na anumanu-unu nile." 
2Kings3:18 Ma nka di nfe n'anya Jehova: Ọ gēnye kwa Moab n'aka-unu. 
2Kings3:19 Unu gētib͕u kwa obodo ọ bula ewusiri ike, na obodo ọ bula kachasi nma, unu gēme kwa ka ezi osisi ọ bula da, unu gēkpochi kwa isi-iyi miri nile, were kwa nkume mebie ezi òkè ala-ubi ọ bula." 
2Kings3:20 O rue n'ututu, na, mb͕e anēsure onyinye-inata-iru-ọma, le, miri nēsi n'uzọ Edom bia, ala we juputa na miri." 
2Kings3:21 Moab nile we nu na ndi-eze ahu arigotawo ibuso ha agha, ha we kpọkọta onwe-ha, site n'onye ọ bula nke nēke onwe-ya ihe-ọkiké agha n'úkwù, we rigorue ndi bu okenye, ha we guzo n'ókè-ala-ha." 
2Kings3:22 Ha we bilie n'isi-ututu, ma anyanwu mukwasiri miri ahu, Moab we hu miri ahu na ncherita-iru ha ka ọ nācha ọbara dika ọbara:" 
2Kings3:23 ha we si, Nka bu ọbara; ekpochapuwo ndi-eze ahu nọ̄, ha etib͕uwo kwa, nwoke ọ bula ibe-ya: ma ub͕u a, Moab, kwatanu ihe-nkwata." 
2Kings3:24 Ha biarue ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Israel, Israel we bilie, tib͕ue Moab, ha we si n'iru ha b͕alaga: ha we ba nime ya nētib͕u Moab." 
2Kings3:25 Ha we tipia obodo nile ha; ha nātubà kwa, nwoke ọ bula nkume-ya, n'ezi òkè ala-ubi ọ bula, tujue ya; ha nēkpochi kwa isi-iyi miri nile, me ka ezi osisi nile da: rue mb͕e ọ bu nání na Kia-hareset ka emere ka nkume-ya fọdu; ma ndi-ọma-èbè b͕ara ya buruburu, tib͕ue ya." 
2Kings3:26 Eze Moab we hu na agha ahu di ike kari ya, o we chiri nnù ndikom na ọgu iri-na-ise tiyere onwe-ya, bú ndi nāmiputa mma-agha, itiwaru eze Edom:" 
2Kings3:27 O we were ọkpara-ya, nke gābu eze n'ọnọdu ya, sure ya ọku n'elu mb͕idi, ka ọ buru àjà-nsure-ọku. Oké iwe we di megide Israel: ha we si n'ebe ọ nọ bulie ije, laghachi n'ala-ha." 
2Kings4:1 Ma otù nwayi n'etiti ndinyom umu ndi-amuma tikuru Elaisha nkpu, si, Orù-gi, bú dim, anwuwo: ma gi onwe-gi amawo na orù-gi nātu egwu Jehova: ma onye-nbinye-ego abiawo ichiri n'onwe-ya umum abua ka ha buru orù." 
2Kings4:2 Elaisha we si ya, Gini ka m'gēmere gi? gosim; gini ka i nwere n'ulo? Ọ si, Ọ dighi ihe ọ bula orù-gi nwayi nwere n'ulo, ọ bu nání ite manu." 
2Kings4:3 Ọ si, Je, riọtara onwe-gi ihe n'èzí n'aka ndi-ab͕ata-obi-gi nile, bú ihe ihe nādighi nime ha; ha abula ole-na-ole." 
2Kings4:4 I gābà kwa n'ulo, mechibido onwe-gi, mechibido kwa umu-gi ndikom, uzọ, b͕aye manu di n'ite ahu n'ihe ahu nile, buzuga nke juru eju." 
2Kings4:5 O we si n'ebe ọ nọ la, mechibido onwe-ya, mechibido kwa umu-ya ndikom, uzọ; ha onwe-ha nēbutere ya ihe ahu nso, ma ya onwe-ya nāb͕aye ab͕aye." 
2Kings4:6 O rue, mb͕e ihe nile juru, na ọ siri nwa-ya, Buterem nso ihe ọzọ. Ọ si ya, Ọ dighi ihe ọzọ di. Manu ahu we kwusi." 
2Kings4:7 O we bia, gosi onye nke Chineke. Ọ si, Je, re manu ahu, kwua ugwọ-gi, gi onwe-gi na umu-gi ndikom were nke fọduru di ndu." 
2Kings4:8 Ubọchi we rue, na Elaisha gabigara rue Shunem, ma otù nwayi uku nọ n'ebe ahu; o rugide ya ka o rie nri. O rue, mb͕e ọ bula ọ nāgabiga, na o wezugara onwe-ya ba n'ebe ahu iri nri." 
2Kings4:9 Nwayi ahu we si di-ya, Biko, le, amawom na onye di nsọ nke Chineke ka ọ bu, bú onye a nagabiga n'akuku ayi mb͕e nile." 
2Kings4:10 Biko, ka ayi me ime-ulo-elu ntà nke mb͕idi; ka ayi dọba-kwa-ra ya n'ebe ahu ihe-ndina, na table, na oche, na ihe-idọba-oriọna: o gēru kwa, mb͕e ọ biakutere ayi, na ọ gēwezuga onwe-ya ba n'ebe ahu." 
2Kings4:11 Ubọchi we rue, na ọ biara n'ebe ahu, wezuga onwe-ya ba n'ime-ulo-elu ahu, dina n'ebe ahu." 
2Kings4:12 Ọ si Gihezi, bú nwa-okorọbia-ya, Kpọ nwayi Shunem nka. O we kpọ ya, o we guzo n'iru ya." 
2Kings4:13 Elaisha we si Gihezi, Biko, si ya, Le, i werewo ncheb͕u a nile cheb͕u onwe-gi bayere ayi; gini ka agēmere gi? ọ̀ bu igwa eze okwu bayere gi, ma-ọbu igwa onye-isi usu-ndi-agha? Ọ si, N'etiti ndim ka mu onwem nēbi." 
2Kings4:14 Ọ si, Gini kwa ka agēmere ya? Gihezi we si, N'ezie ọ nweghi nwa-nwoke, di-ya aghọwo kwa agadi." 
2Kings4:15 Ọ si, Kpọ ya. O we kpọ ya, nwayi ahu we guzo n'ọnu-uzọ." 
2Kings4:16 Ọ si, Na mb͕e nka akara àkà, dika mb͕e a aka-nile, gi onwe-gi ganāb͕aku nwa-nwoke. Ọ si, É-è, onye-nwem, gi onye nke Chineke, agwala orù-gi nwayi okwu-ugha." 
2Kings4:17 Nwayi ahu we turu ime, mua nwa-nwoke na mb͕e ahu akara àkà, dika mb͕e ahu aka-nile, otú Elaisha gwara ya." 
2Kings4:18 Nwata ahu we toputa, ubọchi we rue, na ọ pukuru nna-ya jekuru ndi nēbì ọka." 
2Kings4:19 Ọ si nna-ya, Isim, isim. O we si nwa-okorọbia-ya, Kuru ya bakuru nne-ya." 
2Kings4:20 O kuru ya, me ka ọ biakute nne-ya, ọ nọkwasi n'ikperè nne-ya rue etiti-ehihie, we nwua." 
2Kings4:21 Ọ rigo, tọb͕ọ ya n'ihe-ndina onye nke Chineke ahu, mechibido ya uzọ, pua." 
2Kings4:22 Ọ kpọ di-ya, si, Biko, ziterem otù nime umu-okorọbia, na otù nime nne-inyinya-ibu, ka m'we b͕akuru onye nke Chineke, lata kwa." 
2Kings4:23 Ọ si, Gini mere gi onwe-gi nējekuru ya ta? ọ bughi ọnwa ọhu, ọ bughi kwa ubọchi-izu-ike. Ọ si, Udo." 
2Kings4:24 O we jikwa inyinya-ibu, si nwa-okorọbia-ya, Nēdu, nēje kwa; eb͕ochilaram inyinya-ibu n'ibum b͕a ọsọ, ma ọ buru na asighm i." 
2Kings4:25 O we je, biakute onye nke Chineke ahu, rue ugwu Kamel. O rue, mb͕e onye nke Chineke huru ya site na ncherita-iru ya, na ọ siri Gihezi, bú nwa-okorọbia-ya, Le, nwayi Shunem ahu:" 
2Kings4:26 biko, b͕a ọsọ izute ya ub͕u a, si ya, Ì nọ n'udo? di-gi, ọ̀ nọ n'udo? nwa-gi, ọ̀ nọ n'udo? Ọ si, Ayi nọ n'udo." 
2Kings4:27 O we biakute onye nke Chineke rue ugwu ahu, jide ya n'ukwu-ya abua. Gihezi we biarue nso inupu ya; ma onye nke Chineke siri, Ra ya aka: n'ihi na nkpuru-obi-ya di ilu nime ya; ma Jehova ezonariwom ya, O gosighkwam ya." 
2Kings4:28 O we si, Àriọrọm nwa-nwoke n'aka onye-nwem? àsighm, Arafulam?" 
2Kings4:29 O we si Gihezi, Ke ihe-ọkiké n'úkwù-gi, were kwa nkpa-n'akam n'aka-gi, je: mb͕e i zutere nwoke ọ bula, ekelela ya; mb͕e nwoke ọ bula gēkele gi, azala ya: tukwasi nkpa-n'akam n'iru nwa-okoro ahu." 
2Kings4:30 Nne nwa-okoro ahu we si, Jehova nādi ndu, nkpuru-obi-gi nādi kwa ndu, m'gaghi-arapu gi ma-ọli. O we bilie, jeso ya." 
2Kings4:31 Gihezi we gabiga n'iru ha, tukwasi nkpa-n'aka ahu n'iru nwa-okoro ahu; ma ọ dighi olu di, ọ dighi kwa ọṅuṅa-nti di. O we jeghachi izute ya, gosi ya, si, Nwa-okoro ahu etetaghi." 
2Kings4:32 Elaisha we bata n'ulo ahu, ma, le, nwa-okoro ahu anwuwo, atọb͕ọ-kwa-ra ya n'ihe-ndina-ya." 
2Kings4:33 O we ba, mechibido ha abua uzọ kpere Jehova." 
2Kings4:34 Ọ rigo, dina n'elu nwata ahu, tukwasi ọnu-ya n'ọnu-ya, na anya-ya abua n'anya-ya abua, na ọbu-aka-ya abua n'ọbu-aka-ya abua, ruru ala n'elu ya: anu-aru nwata ahu we di ọku." 
2Kings4:35 O we biaghachi, jegharia iru na azu n'ulo otù ub͕ò; ọ rigo, ruru kwa n'elu ya: nwa-okoro ahu we ze uzere rue ub͕ò asa, nwa-okoro we saghe anya-ya abua." 
2Kings4:36 Ọ kpọ Gihezi, si, Kpọ nwayi Shunem nka. Ọ kpọ ya. Nwayi ahu we bakute ya, ọ si, Kuru nwa-gi." 
2Kings4:37 O we ba nime, da n'ala n'ukwu-ya, kpọ isi ala, kuru nwa-ya, pua." 
2Kings4:38 Ma Elaisha biaghachiri rue Gilgal: ma oké unwu di n'ala ahu; umu ndi-amuma nānọdu kwa ala n'iru ya: o we si nwa-okorọbia-ya, Tukwasi ite uku n'ọku, siere umu ndi-amuma ofé." 
2Kings4:39 Otù onye we pua ba n'ọhia ichikọta akwukwọ nri, ọ huta osisi vine ọhia, chikọta afufa-ọhia nime ya nju uwe-ya, bia, biye ha n'ite ofé: n'ihi na ha amaghi ha." 
2Kings4:40 Ha we wuputara ndikom ahu, ka ha rie. O rue, mb͕e ha nēri ofé ahu, na ndi ahu tiri nkpu, si, Ọnwu di n'ite, gi onye nke Chineke. Ha apughi kwa iri ya." 
2Kings4:41 O we si, Weta-kwa-nu utu ọka. O we tiye ya n'ite ahu, si, Wuputara ndi-ayi, ka ha we rie. Ihe ọjọ adighi kwa n'ite ahu." 
2Kings4:42 Ma otù nwoke siri na Beal-shalisha bia, butere onye nke Chineke achicha nke nkpuru mbu, orú ob͕e achicha barley, na ọka nke ubi n'akpa-ya. Ọ we si, Nye ndi-ayi, ka ha we rie." 
2Kings4:43 Onye nējere ya ozi we si, Gini, M'gēche nka n'iru ọgu ndikom ise? Ọ si, Nye ndi-ayi, ka ha we rie; n'ihi na otú a ka Jehova siri, Ha gēri, rifọ kwa." 
2Kings4:44 O we che ya n'iru ha, ha we rie, rifọ kwa, dika okwu Jehova si di." 
2Kings5:1 Ma Neaman, bú onye-isi usu-ndi-agha eze Siria, bu nwoke di uku n'iru onye-nwe-ya, buru kwa onye anāhu iru-ọma, n'ihi na ọ bu n'aka-ya ka Jehova nyere Siria nzọputa: nwoke ahu bu kwa dike nke bu dìnkpà, ma ọ bu onye-ekpenta." 
2Kings5:2 Ndi Siria apuwo nēje n'usu ndi nāpunara madu ihe, we si n'ala Israel dọta otù nwa-ob͕ọghọ ntà n'agha; o we nọ n'iru nwunye Neaman." 
2Kings5:3 Ọ si nwayi-nwe-ya, Ọ gādim nọ̄ nma, ma asi na onye-nwem nọ n'iru onye-amuma nke nọ na Sameria! mb͕e ahu ọ gēme ka o si n'ekpenta-ya di ọcha soro ndi-ya zukọta." 
2Kings5:4 Otù onye we ba, gosi onye-nwe-ya, si, Otú a na otú a ka nwa-ab͕ọghọ ahu nke sitere n'ala Israel kwuru." 
2Kings5:5 Eze Siria we si, Je, ba, ka m'ziga-kwa-ra eze Israel akwukwọ. O we je, chiri n'aka-ya talent ọla-ọcha iri, na nnù ọla-edo iri-na-ise, na uwe nb͕anwe iri." 
2Kings5:6 O were akwukwọ ahu biakute eze Israel, si, Ma ub͕u a, mb͕e akwukwọ a biakutere gi, le, ezìwom Neaman, bú orùm, biakute gi, ka i we me ka o si n'ekpenta-ya di ọcha soro ndi-ya zukọta." 
2Kings5:7 O rue, mb͕e eze Israel guru akwukwọ ahu, na ọ dọwara uwe-ya nile, si, Ọ̀ bu Chineke ka m'bu, ime ka madu nwua na ime ka madu di ndu, na nwoke a nēziterem ozi ime ka nwoke si n'ekpenta-ya di ọcha soro ndi-ya zukọta? ma otú ọ di, biko, maranu hu kwa na ya onwe-ya nāchọ uzọ isi megidem." 
2Kings5:8 O rue, mb͕e Elaisha bú onye nke Chineke, nuru na eze Israel dọwara uwe-ya nile, o we zigara eze ozi, si, N'ìhi gini ka i dọwara uwe-gi nile? biko, ka ọ biakutem, ọ gāmara kwa na onye-amuma di n'Israel." 
2Kings5:9 Neaman we bia, ya na inyinya-ya nile na ub͕ọ-ala-ya, o guzo n'ọnu-uzọ ulo Elaisha nwere." 
2Kings5:10 Elaisha we zigara ya onye-ozi, si, Je, sa aru ub͕ò asa nime Jọdan, anu-aru-gi gālaghachikute kwa gi, i gādi kwa ọcha." 
2Kings5:11 Ma Neaman were iwe, laba, si, Le, m'siri, Ọ ghaghi ipukutem, guzo, kpọkue aha Jehova, bú Chineke-ya, fufe aka-ya n'elu ebe ahu, me ka onye-ekpenta di ọcha soro ndi-ya zukọta." 
2Kings5:12 Abana na Fapa, bú osimiri Damaskọs, hà adighi nma kari miri Israel nile? #m'gaghi-asa aru nime ha, di ọcha? O we chigharia, laba n'ọnuma." 
2Kings5:13 Ndi-orù-ya we biarue nso, gwa ya okwu, si, Nnam, asi na ọ bu ihe uku onye-amuma gwara gi me, ì gaghi-eme ya? ì gēsi kwa aṅa ghara ime ya mb͕e ọ siri gi, Sa aru, di kwa ọcha?" 
2Kings5:14 O we rida, suye onwe-ya nime Jọdan ub͕ò asa, dika okwu onye nke Chineke si di: anu-aru-ya we laghachi dika anu-aru nwa-okoro ntà, o we di ọcha." 
2Kings5:15 O we laghachikute onye nke Chineke, ya onwe-ya na ọmuma-ulo-ikwū-ya nile, bia, guzo n'iru ya, si, Biko, le, amawom na ọ dighi Chineke di n'uwa nile, ọ bu nání n'Israel: ma ub͕u a, biko, nara ihe-ngọzi n'aka orù-gi." 
2Kings5:16 Ọ si, Jehova nādi ndu, Onye m'guzoworo n'iru Ya, m'gaghi-anara ihe ọ bula ma-ọli. O we rugide ya inara ya; ma ọ juru aju." 
2Kings5:17 Neaman we si, Ọ buru na i naghi, biko, ka enye orù-gi ibu ájá nke inyinya mule abua gēbu; n'ihi na orù-gi agaghi-emere chi ọzọ àjà-nsure-ọku ma-ọbu àjà ọzọ site n'ub͕u a, ma ọ bu náni Jehova." 
2Kings5:18 Ka Jehova b͕aghara orù-gi ihe a; mb͕e onye-nwem nābà n'ulo Rimon ikpọ isi ala n'ebe ahu, mb͕e ya onwe-ya nādabere kwa n'akam, m'we kpọ isi ala n'ulo Rimon, mb͕e m'kpọrọ isi ala n'ulo Rimon, biko, ka Jehova b͕aghara orù-gi n'ihe a." 
2Kings5:19 Ọ si ya, La n'udo. O we si n'ebe ọ nọ je n'uzọ-ya nwantī." 
2Kings5:20 Ma Gihezi, bú nwa-okorọbia Elaisha onye nke Chineke, siri, Le, onye-nwem eb͕ochiwo onwe-ya n'ebe Neaman onye Siria nka nọ, n'ighara inara n'aka-ya ihe o wetara: Jehova nādi ndu, n'ezie m'gāb͕aso ya, nara ihe ufọdu n'aka-ya." 
2Kings5:21 Gihezi we chuso Neaman. Neamam we hu otù onye nāb͕aso ya, o we si n'ub͕ọ-ala-ya rida izute ya, si, Ùdo di kwa?" 
2Kings5:22 Ọ si, Udo di. Onye-nwem ezitewom, si, Le, ọbuná ub͕u a umu-okorọbia abua nime umu ndi-amuma esiwo n'ugwu Efraim biakutem; biko, nye ha otù talent ọla-ọcha, na uwe nb͕anwe abua." 
2Kings5:23 Neaman we si, Kwere, nara talent abua. O rugide ya, ke talent ọla-ọcha abua n'akpa abua, chiri uwe nb͕anwe abua, nye umu-okorọbia-ya abua; ha we būru ha ga n'iru ya." 
2Kings5:24 Ọ biarue ugwu ntà ahu, nara ha n'aka-ha, tiye ha n ulo: o zilaga ndikom ahu, ha we la." 
2Kings5:25 Ma ya onwe-ya bara nime, guzo n'akuku onye-nwe-ya. Elaisha we si ya, Òle ebe i si bia, Gihezi? Ọ si, Orù-gi ejeghi ebe ọ bula." 
2Kings5:26 Ọ si ya, Òbim ejesoghi gi, mb͕e nwoke ahu siri n'ub͕ọ-ala-ya chigharia izute gi? ọ̀ bu mb͕e inara ego, na inara uwe, na ubi-olive na ubi-vine, na ìgwè ewu na aturu na ìgwè ehi, na ndi-orù ndikom na ndinyom nēje ozi?" 
2Kings5:27 Ekpenta Neaman gārapara kwa n'aru gi, na n'aru nkpuru-gi rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi. Ọ we si n'iru ya pua, buru onye-ekpenta nēnwu dika snow." 
2Kings6:1 Umu ndi-amuma we si Elaisha, Biko, le, ebe ayi onwe-ayi nēbi n'iru gi adikara ayi nkpa." 
2Kings6:2 Biko, ka ayi jerue Jọdan, si kwa n'ebe ahu were, nwoke ọ bula otù ntuhie, mere onwe-ayi otù ebe n'ebe ahu, ibiri n'ebe ahu. Ọ si, Jenu." 
2Kings6:3 Otù onye we si, Biko, kwere, soro ndi-orù-gi je. Ọ si, Mu onwem gēje." 
2Kings6:4 O we so ha je. Ha we biarue Jọdan, b͕utue osisi." 
2Kings6:5 O rue, mb͕e otù onye nēb͕utu ntuhie-ya, na anyu-ike dabàra na miri: o we tie nkpu, si, Ewó, onye-nwem! nke ahu bu ihe ariọtara ariọta." 
2Kings6:6 Onye nke Chineke we si, Òle ebe ọ dara? Ọ we me ka ọ hu ebe ahu. O we b͕utue otù osisi, tubà ya n'ebe ahu, me ka anyu-ike se n'elu miri." 
2Kings6:7 O si, Weliere onwe-gi. O we setia aka-ya, were ya." 
2Kings6:8 Ma eze Siria nēbuso Israel agha; o we me ka ndi-orù-ya dua ya ọdu, si, N'ebe di otú a otú a ka ọmuma-ulo-ikwūm gādi." 
2Kings6:9 Onye nke Chineke we zigara eze Israel ozi, si, Lezie onwe-gi anya, ka i ghara igabiga ebe ahu; n'ihi na n'ebe ahu ka Siria nāridata." 
2Kings6:10 Eze Israel we ziga ozi n'ebe ahu nke onye nke Chineke siri ya dọ kwa ya aka na nti bayere ya; ewe debe ya ndu n'ebe ahu, ọ bughi otù ub͕ò, ọ bughi kwa ub͕ò abua." 
2Kings6:11 Ma obi eze Siria anọghi n'otù ebe n'ihi ihe a; o we kpọ ndi-orù-ya, si ha, Ùnu agaghi-egosim onye nime ayi diri eze Israel?" 
2Kings6:12 Otù onye nime ndi-orù-ya we si, É-è, onye-nwem eze: kama Elaisha, bú onye-amuma nke nọ n'Israel, o nēgosi eze Israel okwu nile nke i nēkwu n'ime-ulo-ndina-gi." 
2Kings6:13 Ọ si, Jenu, hu ebe ya onwe-ya nọ, ka m'we ziga kuta ya. Ewe gosi ya, si, Le, ọ nọ na Dotan." 
2Kings6:14 O we ziga inyinya na ub͕ọ-ala na oké usu-ndi-agha n'ebe ahu: ha we bia n'abali, je obodo ahu buruburu." 
2Kings6:15 Onye nējere onye nke Chineke ozi we bilie n'isi-ututu, pua, ma, le, usu-ndi-agha nāb͕a obodo ahu buruburu, ha na inyinya na ub͕ọ-ala. Nwa-okorọbia-ya we si ya, Ewó, onye-nwem! àyi gēme aṅa?" 
2Kings6:16 Ọ si, Atula egwu: n'ihi na ndi ayi na ha nọ di ọtutu kari ndi ha na ha nọ." 
2Kings6:17 Elaisha we kpe ekpere, si, Jehova, biko, saghe anya-ya abua, ka ọ we hu. Jehova we saghe anya nwa-okorọbia ahu; o we hu: ma, le, ugwu ahu juputara n'inyinya na ub͕ọ-ala ọku buruburu Elaisha." 
2Kings6:18 Ha we ridakute ya, Elaisha we kpere Jehova, si, Biko, were ìsì tie mba nka. O we were ìsì tie ha dika okwu Elaisha si di." 
2Kings6:19 Elaisha we si ha, Nka abughi uzọ, nka abughi kwa obodo; sonum je, m'gēme kwa ka unu jekuru nwoke ahu onye unu nāchọ. O we me ka ha je Sameria." 
2Kings6:20 O rue, mb͕e ha bara na Sameria, na Elaisha siri, Jehova, saghe anya ndikom ndia, ka ha we hu. Jehova we saghe anya-la, ha we hu; ma, le, ha nọ n'etiti Sameria." 
2Kings6:21 Eze Israel we si Elaisha, mb͕e ọ huru ha, Nnam, #m'gētib͕u ha? #m'gētib͕u ha?" 
2Kings6:22 Ọ si, Etib͕ula ha: ì gētib͕u ndi i wereworo mma-agha-gi, were kwa uta-gi, dọta n'agha? dọba nri na miri n'iru ha, ka ha we rie, ṅu kwa, lakuru onye-nwe-ha." 
2Kings6:23 O we mere ha oké oriri: ha we rie, ṅu kwa, o we zilaga ha, ha we lakuru onye-nwe-ha. Ma usu ndi nāpunara madu ihe nke Siria abataghi ọzọ n'ala Israel." 
2Kings6:24 O rue, mb͕e nka gasiri, na Ben-hedad, bú eze Siria, chikọtara ọmuma-ulo-ikwū-ya nile, rigo, nọchigide Sameria n'agha." 
2Kings6:25 Oké unwu uku we di na Sameria: ma, le, ha nānọchigide ya n'agha, rue mb͕e anēre isi inyinya-ibu ọgu ọla-ọcha anọ na otù uzọ n'uzọ anọ nke otù kab ǹsí nduru ọla-ọcha ise." 
2Kings6:26 O rue, mb͕e eze Israel nāgabiga n'elu mb͕idi, na otù nwayi tikuru ya nkpu, si, Zọputa, onye-nwem eze." 
2Kings6:27 Ọ si, Ọ buru na Jehova azọputaghi gi, òle ebe m'gēsi zọputa gi? ọ̀ bu site n'ebe-nzọcha-ọka, ma-ọbu site n'ebe-nzọcha-nkpuru-vine?" 
2Kings6:28 Eze we si ya, Gini nēme gi? Ọ si, Nwayi a sirim, Nye nwa-gi nwoke, ka ayi we rie ya ta, nwam nwoke ka ayi gēri kwa echi." 
2Kings6:29 Ayi we sie nwam nwoke, rie ya: m'we si ya n'ubọchi soro ya, Nye nwa-gi nwoke, ka ayi we rie ya: ma o zowo nwa-ya nwoke." 
2Kings6:30 O rue, mb͕e eze nuru okwu nile nke nwayi ahu, na ọ dọwara uwe-ya nile; (ma ya onwe-ya nāgabiga n'elu mb͕idi;) ndi Israel we le anya, ma, le, ákwà-nkpe dikwasi n'anu-aru-ya n'okpuru uwe-ya." 
2Kings6:31 O we si, Ka Chineke mem otú a, ka O me kwa ihe ọzọ otú a, ma ọ buru na isi Elaisha nwa Shefat gēguzo n'aru ya ta." 
2Kings6:32 Ma Elaisha nānọdu n'ulo-ya, ndi-okenye nānọdu kwa n'ebe ọ nọ: eze we ziga otù nwoke site n'iru ya: ma tutu onye-ozi ahu abiakute ya, ya onwe-ya siri ndi-okenye, Ùnu ahuwo na nwa ob͕u-madu a ezitewo iwezuga isim? hunu, mb͕e onye-ozi ahu nābia, mechienu uzọ, were ibo-uzọ kwagide ya: òlu ukwu abua nke onye-nwe-ya adighi n'azu ya?" 
2Kings6:33 Mb͕e ọ nọ nākpayere ha uka, le, onye-ozi ahu nāridakuru ya: ọ si, Le, ihe ọjọ a sitere n'aka Jehova; gini mere m'nēle anya Jehova ọzọ?" 
2Kings7:1 Elaisha we si, Nurunu okwu Jehova: otú a ka Jehova siri, Dika mb͕e a echi agēre otù mb͕é utu ọka flour otù shekel, na mb͕é barley abua otù shekel, n'ọnu-uzọ-ama Sameria." 
2Kings7:2 Ọchi-agha ahu onye eze nwere, onye ọ nādabere n'aka-ya, we za onye nke Chineke, si, Le, ọ buru na Jehova eme window n'elu-igwe, ihe a, ọ̀ gādi? Ọ si, Le, i ganēwere anya-gi abua hu ya, ma i gaghi-eri nime ya." 
2Kings7:3 Ma ndikom anọ, bú ndi-ekpenta, nọ n'oghere ọnu-uzọ-ama: ha we sirita, onwe-ha, Gini mere ayi onwe-ayi nānọdu n'ebe a rue mb͕e ayi nwuru?" 
2Kings7:4 Ọ buru na ayi asi, Ayi gābà n'obodo, oké unwu di kwa n'obodo, ayi gānwu kwa n'ebe ahu: ọ buru kwa na ayi anọdu n'ebe a, ayi gānwu kwa. Ma ub͕u a, bianu, ka ayi dabà n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Siria: ọ buru na ha edebe ayi ndu, ayi gādi ndu; ọ buru kwa na ha eme ka ayi nwua, ayi gānwu kwa." 
2Kings7:5 Ha we bilie n'ururuchi, ibà n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Siria: ha we biarue nsọtu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Siria, ma, le, ọ dighi nwoke nọ n'ebe ahu." 
2Kings7:6 N'ihi na Onwe-nwe-ayi mere ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Siria ka ha nu olu ub͕ọ-ala, na olu inyinya, bú olu oké usu-ndi-agha: ha we sirita onwe-ha, Le, eze Israel egowo ndi-eze ndi Het, na ndi-eze Ijipt, imegide ayi, ibiakwasi ayi." 
2Kings7:7 Ha we bilie, b͕alaga n'ururuchi, rapu ulo-ikwū nile ha, na inyinya nile ha, na inyinya-ibu nile ha, ọbuná ọmuma-ulo-ikwū-ha otú di, b͕alaga n'ihi ndu-ha." 
2Kings7:8 Ndi-ekpenta ahu we biarue nsọtu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū, ba n'otù ulo-ikwū, rie ihe, ṅu kwa ihe-ọṅuṅu, si n'ebe ahu chiri ọla-ọcha, na ọla-ebo, na uwe, je zo ha; ha we biaghachi, ba n'ulo-ikwū ọzọ, si n'ebe ahu chiri kwa ihe, je zo ha." 
2Kings7:9 Ha we sirita onwe-ha, Ọ bughi ihe ziri ezi ka ayi onwe-ayi nēme: ubọchi ta, ubọchi ozi ọma ka ọ bu, ma ayi onwe-ayi nāb͕a nkiti: ọ buru na ayi echere rue ìhè ututu, ajọ omume-ayi gāchọputa ayi: ma ub͕u a bianu, ka ayi ba gosi ulo eze." 
2Kings7:10 Ha we bia, kpọ onye-ọnu-uzọ-ama obodo òkù, gosi ha, si, Ayi bara n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Siria, ma, le, ọ dighi nwoke nọ n'ebe ahu, ọ dighi kwa olu madu di, ma inyinya elibere elibe, na inyinya-ibu elibere elibe, na ulo-ikwū otú ha di." 
2Kings7:11 O we kpọ ndi-ọnu-uzọ-ama; ha we gosi ya ulo eze nime. 
2Kings7:12 Eze we bilie n'abali, si ndi-orù-ya, Biko, ka m'gosi unu ihe Siria meworo ayi. Ha mara na agu nāgu ayi onwe-ayi, ha we si n'ọmuma-ulo-ikwū-ha pua izo onwe-ha n'ọhia, si, Mb͕e ha siri n'obodo puta, ayi gējide ha na ndu, ba n'obodo-ha." 
2Kings7:13 Otù nime ndi-orù-ya we za, si, Biko, ka achiri inyinya ise nime inyinya fọduru, nke fọduru nime ya, (le, ha di ka ìgwè nile nke Israel nke fọduru nime ya; le, ha di ka ìgwè nile nke Israel ndi gwusiri agwusi:) ka ayi ziga hu kwa." 
2Kings7:14 Ha we chiri ub͕ọ-ala abua, ha na inyinya; eze we ziga ha iso ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Siria, si, Jenu, hu." 
2Kings7:15 Ha we jeso ha rue Jọdan: ma, le, uzọ nile juputara n'uwe na ihe, nke ndi Siria tufuru n'ime-ngwa-ngwa-ha. Ndi-ozi we lata, gosi eze." 
2Kings7:16 Ndi Israel we pua, luta ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Siria n'agha. Ewe re otù mb͕é utu ọka flour otù shekel, na mb͕é barley abua otù shekel, dika okwu Jehova si di." 
2Kings7:17 Eze we me ka onye-isi-agha ahu, bú onye ọ nādabere n'aka-ya, lekọta ọnu-uzọ-ama: ndi Israel we zọkwasi ya ukwu n'ọnu-uzọ-ama, ọ nwua dika onye nke Chineke kwuru, onye kwuru mb͕e eze ridakuru ya." 
2Kings7:18 O rue, dika onye nke chineke gwara eze okwu, si, Agēre mb͕é barley abua otù shekel, na otù mb͕é utu ọka flour otù shekel, dika mb͕è a echi, n'ọnu-uzọ-ama Sameria;" 
2Kings7:19 onye-isi-agha we za onye nke Chineke, si, Ma, le, ọ buru na Jehova eme window n'elu-igwe, ọ̀ gādi ka okwu a si di? Ọ si, Le, i ganēwere anya-gi abua hu ya, ma i gaghi-eri nime ya:" 
2Kings7:20 o we diri ya otú a; ndi Israel we zọkwasi ya ukwu n'ọnu-uzọ-ama, ọ nwua." 
2Kings8:1 Ma Elaisha gwara nwayi ahu okwu, bú onye o mere ka nwa-ya nwoke di ndu, si, Bilie, je, gi onwe-gi na ulo-gi, nọ dika ọbìa n'ebe ọ bula i gānọ dika ọbìa: n'ihi na Jehova akpọwo oké unwu ka ọ da: ọzọ kwa, ọ gābiakwasi ala arọ asa." 
2Kings8:2 Nwayi ahu we bilie, me dika okwu onye nke Chineke si di: ọ we je, ya onwe-ya na ulo-ya, nọ dika ọbìa n'ala ndi Filistia arọ asa." 
2Kings8:3 O rue, n'ọgwugwu arọ asa ahu, na nwayi ahu si n'ala ndi Filistia lata: ọ pua itiku eze nkpu bayere ulo-ya na ala-ya." 
2Kings8:4 Ma eze nāgwa Gihezi, bú nwa-okorọbia onye nke Chineke, okwu, si, Biko, kọrọm akukọ ihe uku nile nke Elaisha meworo." 
2Kings8:5 O rue na, mb͕e ya onwe-ya nākọrọ eze otú o mere ka onye nwuru anwu di ndu ọzọ, le, nwayi ahu, onye o mere ka nwa-ya nwoke di ndu ọzọ nētiku eze nkpu bayere ulo-ya, baye-kwa-ra ala-ya. Gihezi we si, Onye-nwem eze, nka bu nwayi ahu, nka bu kwa nwa-ya nwoke, onye Elaisha mere ka ọ di ndu ọzọ." 
2Kings8:6 Eze we jua nwayi ahu, o we kọrọ ya akukọ ahu. Eze we nye ya otù onye nējere ya ozi, si, Nyeghachi ihe nile o nwere, na ihe-ọmume nile nke ubi site n'ubọchi ọ rapuru ala-ya, we rue ub͕u a." 
2Kings8:7 Elaisha we biarue Damaskọs; ma Ben-hedad, bú eze Siria, nāria ọria; ewe gosi ya, si, Onye nke Chineke abiawo n'ebe a." 
2Kings8:8 Eze we si Hazael, Were onyinye-inata-iru-ọma n'aka-gi, je izute onye nke Chineke, jua Jehova ase site n'aka-ya, si, M'gādiri ndu n'ọria nka?" 
2Kings8:9 Hazael we je izute ya, were onyinye-inata-iru-ọma n'aka-ya, bú ezi ihe nile nke Damaskọs, ibu ọgu camel abua gēbu, o we bia guzo n'iru ya, si, Nwa-gi, bú Ben-hedad eze Siria, ezìwom biakute gi, si, M'gādiri n'ọria nka?" 
2Kings8:10 Elaisha we si ya, Je, si ya, I ghaghi idiri ndu; ma Jehova emewo ka m'hu na ọ ghaghi inwu." 
2Kings8:11 Ọ we legide ya anya, che ya iru, rue mb͕e ihere mere ya: onye nke Chineke we kwa ákwá." 
2Kings8:12 Hazael we si, Gini mere onye-nwem nākwa ákwá? Ọ si, N'ihi na amawom ihe ọjọ nke i gēme umu Israel: i gēsu ebe nile ha ewusiri ike ọku, i gēwere kwa mma-agha b͕ue umu-okorobia-ha, i gātupia kwa umu-ha nāṅu ara, i gāb͕awa ndinyom-ha di ime afọ." 
2Kings8:13 Hazael we si, Ma gini bu orù-gi, bú nkita nka, na ọ gēme ihe uku a? Elaisha we si, Jehova emewo ka m'hu na i gābu eze Siria." 
2Kings8:14 O we si n'ebe Elaisha nọ la, biakute onye-nwe-ya; ọ si ya, Gini ka Elaisha siri gi? Ọ si, Ọ sirim na i ghaghi idiri ndu." 
2Kings8:15 O rue, n'echi-ya, na ọ chiri ákwà-ob͕ub͕o, biaye na miri, b͕asa ya n'iru-ya, ọ we nwua: Hazael we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya." 
2Kings8:16 Ma n'arọ nke-ise nke Joram nwa Ehab, bú eze Israel, mb͕e Jehoshafat bu kwa eze Juda, Jehoram nwa Jehoshafat, bú eze Juda, malitere ibu eze." 
2Kings8:17 Orú arọ na iri na abua ka ọ b͕ara mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze; o we buru eze arọ astọ na Jerusalem. 
2Kings8:18 Ọ je ije n'uzọ ndi-eze Israel, dika ulo Ehab mere: n'ihi na ọ bu nwa-nwayi Ehab ka o nwere na nwunye: o we me ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova." 
2Kings8:19 Ma Jehova ekweghi ibibi Juda, n'ihi Devid, bú orù-Ya, dika Ọ siri ya na Ọ gēnye ya oriọna, nye kwa umu-ya, ubọchi nile." 
2Kings8:20 N'ubọchi-ya ka Edom siri n'okpuru aka Juda jehie, mere onwe-ha eze." 
2Kings8:21 Joram we gabiga rue Zaia, ya na ub͕ọ-ala-ya nile: o rue na o biliri n'abali, tib͕ue Edom ndi nāb͕a ya buruburu, ha na ndi-isi ub͕ọ-ala: ndi ahu we b͕alaga n'ulo-ikwū-ha." 
2Kings8:22 Edom we si n'okpuru aka Juda jehie, rue ta. Mb͕e ahu ka Libna jehiere n'otù mb͕e ahu." 
2Kings8:23 Ma okwu Joram nile nke fọduru, na ihe nile o mere, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Juda?" 
2Kings8:24 Joram we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu, elìe ya n'ebe elìri nna-ya-hà n'obodo Devid: Ehazaia, bú nwa-ya, we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya." 
2Kings8:25 N'arọ nke-iri-na-abua nke Joram nwa Ehab, bú eze Israel, ka Ehazaia nwa Jehoram, bú eze Juda, malitere ibu eze." 
2Kings8:26 Orú arọ na abua ka Ehazaia b͕ara mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze; o we buru eze otù arọ na Jerusalem. Ma aha nne-ya bu Atalaia nwa Ọmri, bú eze Israel." 
2Kings8:27 O we je ije n'uzọ ulo Ehab, me ihe jọrọ njọ n'anya Jehova, dika ulo Ehab mere: n'ihi na nwa nwa ulo Ehab ka ọ bu." 
2Kings8:28 O we soro Joram nwa Ehab ibuso Hazael, bú eze Siria, agha na Remot-gilead: ndi Siria we tib͕ue Joram." 
2Kings8:29 Eze, bú Joram, we lata ka agwọ ya nime Jezreel na ntib͕u ndi Siria tib͕uru ya na Rema, mb͕e o nēbuso Hazael, bú eze Siria, agha. Ehazaia nwa Jehoram, bú eze Juda, we rida ihu Joram nwa Ehab nime Jezreel, n'ihi na ọ nāria ọria." 
2Kings9:1 Ma Elaisha, bú onye-amuma, kpọrọ otù onye nime umu ndi-amuma, si ya, Ke ihe-ọkiké n'úkwù-gi, were karama manu a n'aka-gi, je Remot-gilead." 
2Kings9:2 Mb͕e i biara ebe ahu, gi hu Jihu nwa Jehoshafat nwa Nimshi anya n'ebe ahu, ba nime, me ka o bilie site n'etiti umu-nne-ya, me kwa ka ọ ba n'ime-ulo di n'ime-ulo." 
2Kings9:3 Gi were kwa karama manu ahu, wukwasi ya n'isi-ya, si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, Etewom i manu ibu eze Israel. Meghe kwa uzọ, b͕alaga, eche-kwa-la eche." 
2Kings9:4 Nwa-okorọbia ahu, ọbuná nwa-okorọbia ahu, bú onye-amuma, we jerue Remot-gilead." 
2Kings9:5 Ọ bia, ma, le, ndi-isi usu-ndi-agha nanọdu ala; ọ si, Enwerem okwu igwa gi, onye-isi. Jihu we si, Ọ̀ bu onye nime ayi nile? Ọ si, Ọ bu gi, onye-isi." 
2Kings9:6 O bilie, ba n'ulo; ọ wukwasi manu ahu n'isi-ya, si ya, Otú a ka Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, siri, Etewom i manu ibu eze ndi Jehova, bú Israel." 
2Kings9:7 I gētib͕u kwa ulo Ehab, bú onye-nwe-gi, ka M'we bọ ọ́bọ̀ ọbara ndi-orùm, bú ndi-amuma, na ọbara ndi-orù nile nke Jehova, n'aka Jezebel." 
2Kings9:8 Ulo nile nke Ehab gāla kwa n'iyì: M'gēbipu kwa n'aru Ehab nwa-nwoke ọ bula, na onye eb͕ochiri eb͕ochi na onye arapuru arapu n'Israel." 
2Kings9:9 M'gēme kwa ulo Ehab ka ọ di ka ulo Jeroboam nwa Nebat, ka ọ di kwa ka ulo Beasha nwa Ahaija." 
2Kings9:10 Nkita gēri kwa Jezebel n'òkè-ala-ubi Jezreel, ọ dighi kwa onye nēlì ya. O we meghe uzọ b͕alaga." 
2Kings9:11 Jehu we pukute ndi-orù onye-nwe-ya: otù onye we si ya, Ùdo di kwa? gini mere onye a nke nāwi ara biakutere gi? Ọ si ha, Unu onwe-unu amawo nwoke ahu na nkpari-uka-ya." 
2Kings9:12 Ha si, Ọ bu okwu-ugha; biko, gosi ayi. Ọ si, Otú a na otú a ka ọ gwaram, si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, Etewom i manu ibu eze Israel." 
2Kings9:13 Ha we me ngwa, chiri, nwoke ọ bula uwe-ya, do ya n'okpuru ya n'elu ihe-nrigo, fùa opì-ike, si, Jihù bu eze." 
2Kings9:14 Jihu nwa Jehoshafat nwa Nimshi we kekọta madu imegide Joram. (Ma Joram nēche Remot-gilead, ya onwe-ya na Israel nile, n'ihi Hazael, bú eze Siria:" 
2Kings9:15 ma Jehoram, bú eze, laghachiri ka agwọ ya nime Jezreel na ntib͕u nke ndi Siria tib͕uru ya, mb͕e o nēbuso Hazael, bú eze Siria, agha.) Jihu we si, Ọ buru na nka bu uche-unu, ka onye-nb͕apu ghara isi n'obodo a pua ije igosi ya nime Jezreel." 
2Kings9:16 Jihu we nọdu n'ub͕ọ-ala, jerue Jezreel; n'ihi na Joram nēdina n'ebe ahu. Ma Ehazaia, bú eze Juda, ridatara ihu Joram." 
2Kings9:17 Ma onye-nche nēguzo n'elu ulo-elu na Jezreel, ọ hu ìgwè ndi Jihu mb͕e ọ nābia, ọ si, Ìgwè madu ka m'nāhu. Jehoram we si, Were onye-inyinya, ziga izute ha, ya si kwa, Ùdo di kwa?" 
2Kings9:18 Onye-nnọkwasi-inyinya we je izute ya, si, Otú a ka eze siri. Ùdo di kwa? Jihu we si, Gini ka gi na udo nwekọrọ? chigharia ga n'azum. Onye-nche ahu we gosi, si, Onye-ozi-ayi biakutere ha, ma ọ lataghi." 
2Kings9:19 O we zipu onye-nnọkwasi-inyinya nke-abua, ọ biakute ha, si, Otú a ka eze siri, Ùdo di kwa? Jihu we si, Gini ka gi na udo nwekọrọ? chigharia ga n'azum." 
2Kings9:20 Onye-nche we gosi, si, Ọ biaruru ha aru, ma ọ latagh: ma odudu-inyinya di ka odudu-inyinya Jihu nwa Nimshi; n'ihi na o nēdu inyinya dika onye nāwi ara." 
2Kings9:21 Jehoram we si, Jikwa ub͕ọ-ala. Ha we jikwa ub͕ọ-ala-ya. Jehoram, bú eze Israel, na Ehazaia, bú eze Juda, we pua, nwoke ọ bula n'ub͕ọ-ala-ya, ha we pua izute Jihu, we huta ya n'òkè-ala-ubi Nebot, bú onye Jezreel." 
2Kings9:22 O rue, mb͕e Jehoram huru Jihu, na ọ siri, Ùdo di kwa, Jihu? Ọ si, Gini bu udo ahu, na mb͕e ikwa-iko Jezebel, bú nne-gi, na mb͕asi-ya nādi ọtutu?" 
2Kings9:23 Jehoram we chigharia aka-ya abua, b͕alaga, si Ehazaia, Aghughọ di, Ehazaia." 
2Kings9:24 Jihu we dọtia uta-ya ka aka-ya ra, b͕ata Jehoram n'ab͕ata ogwe-aka-ya abua, àkú we si n'obi-ya puta, o we ruru ala n'ub͕ọ-ala-ya." 
2Kings9:25 Jihu we si Bidka, bú onye-isi-agha-ya, Bulie ya, tubà n'òkè ubi Nebot, bú onye Jezreel: n'ihi na cheta na mu na gi nānọkwasi n'elu inyinya, ayi abua, nēso Ehab, bú nna-ya, mb͕e Jehova boro ya ibu a;" 
2Kings9:26 N'ezie ahuwom ọbara Nebot na ọbara umu-ya ndikom n'abali hnyahuru, ọ bu ihe si n'ọnu Jehova puta; M'gākwughachi kwa gi n'òkè-ala-ubi nka, ọ bu ihe si n'ọnu Jehova puta. Ma ub͕u a bulie ya, tubà ya n'òkè-ala-ubi ahu, dika okwu Jehova si di." 
2Kings9:27 Ma Ehazaia, bú eze Juda, huru ya, b͕alaga n'uzọ ulo ubi ab͕ara ogige. Jihu we chuso ya, si, Tib͕u-kwa-nu ya n'ub͕ọ-ala-ya. Ha we tib͕ue ya na nrigo Gua, nke di nso Ibleam. O we b͕alaga na Megido, nwua n'ebe ahu." 
2Kings9:28 Ndi-orù-ya we me ka ub͕ọ-ala-ya būru ya jerue Jerusalem, ha we lìe ya n'ílì-ya, n'ebe elìri nna-ya-hà, n'obodo Devid." 
2Kings9:29 Ma n'arọ nke-iri-na-otù nke Joram nwa Ehab ka Ehazaia malitere ibu eze Juda. 
2Kings9:30 Jihu we biarue Jezreel, Jezebel we nu ya; ọ we de ihe-ichọ-nma n'anya-ya abua, me ka isi-ya di nma, lepu anya na window." 
2Kings9:31 Mb͕e Jihu bara n'ọnu-uzọ-ama, nwayi ahu siri, Ùdo di kwa, Zimri, ob͕u onye-nwe-ya?" 
2Kings9:32 Jihu we welie iru-ya le anya na window, si, Ònye diyerem? ònye? Onozi abua ma-ọbu atọ we leputa anya n'ebe ọ nọ." 
2Kings9:33 Ọ si, Tudanu ya. Ha we tuda ya: ufọdu nime ọbara-ya we fesa na mb͕idi, na n'inyinya-ya: ọ we zọkwasi ya ukwu." 
2Kings9:34 Ọ bata, rie ihe ṅu kwa ihe-ọṅuṅu, si, Biko, Lenu nwayi a aburu ọnu anya nke-ọma, lìe ya: n'ihi na nwa-nwayi eze ka ọ bu." 
2Kings9:35 Ha we je ilì ya: ma ha achọtaghi ihe ọ bula di n'aru-ya ma-ọbughi okpokoro-isi-ya, na ukwu-ya abua, na ọbu-aka-ya abua." 
2Kings9:36 Ha we biaghachi, gosi ya. Ọ si, Okwu Jehova ka ọ bu, nke O kwuru n'aka orù-Ya, bú Elaija onye Tisbe, si, N'òkè-ala-ubi Jezreel ka nkita gēri anu-aru Jezebel:" 
2Kings9:37 ozu Jezebel gādi kwa ka ǹsí-anu n'elu ubi n'òkè-ala-ubi Jezreel; ha ewe ghara isi, Nka bu Jezebel." 
2Kings10:1 Ma Ehab nwere ọgu umu-ndikom atọ na iri nime Sameria. Jihu we de akwukwọ ziga na Sameria, zigara ndi-isi Jezreel, bú ndi-okenye, ziga-kwa-ra ndi nāzù umu Ehab, si," 
2Kings10:2 Ma ub͕u a, mb͕e akwukwọ a bara n'aka-unu, ebe umu onye-nwe-unu nọ n'etiti unu, ebe ub͕ọ-ala na inyinya di kwa n'etiti unu, na obodo ewusiri ike, na ihe-agha;" 
2Kings10:3 leputanu onye ahu nke kachasi nma, nke zi-kwa-ra ezi karisia, nime umu-ndikom onye-nwe-unu, donu ya n'elu oche-eze nna-ya, buere ulo onye-nwe-unu agha." 
2Kings10:4 Ha we tua egwu nke-uku ri nne, si, Le, eze abua eguzoghi n'iru ya: àyi onwe-ayi gēsi kwa aṅa guzo?" 
2Kings10:5 Onye nke bu onye-isi ulo, na onye nke bu onye-isi obodo, na ndi-okenye, na ndi nāzù umu eze, we zigara Jihu ozi, si, Ndi-orù-gi ka ayi bu, ayi gēme kwa ihe nile i si ayi me; ayi agaghi-eme nwoke ọ bula eze: gi me ihe di nma n'anya-gi." 
2Kings10:6 O we degara ha akwukwọ nke ub͕ò abua, si, Ọ buru na mu ka unu diri, ọ buru kwa na olum ka unu onwe-unu nēge nti, chirinu isi ndikom ahu, bú umu onye-nwe-unu, biakutem dika mb͕e a echi rue Jezreel. Ma umu eze, bú ọgu ndikom atọ na iri, nọ n'aka ndi uku obodo ahu, ndi nāzùlite ha." 
2Kings10:7 O rue, mb͕e akwukwọ ahu bara ha n'aka, na ha chiri umu eze, b͕ue ha, bú ọgu ndikom atọ na iri, tiye isi-ha nime nkata, zigara ya rue Jezreel." 
2Kings10:8 Onye-ozi we bia, gosi ya, si, Ha ebubatawo isi umu eze. Ọ si, Tukọbanu ha n'obo abua n'oghere ọnu-uzọ-ama rue ututu." 
2Kings10:9 O rue, n'ututu, na ọ puru, guzo, si ndi Israel nile, Ndi ezi omume ka unu bu: le, mu onwem kekọtara madu imegide onye-nwem, b͕ue ya: ma ònye tib͕uru ndia nile?" 
2Kings10:10 Maranu ub͕u a na ọ dighi okwu ọ bula gāda n'ala nime okwu Jehova, nke Jehova kwuru bayere ulo Ehab: n'ihi na Jehova emewo ihe O kwuru n'aka orù-Ya, bú Elaija." 
2Kings10:11 Jihu we tib͕ue ndi nile fọduru ulo Ehab nime Jezreel, na ndi uku ya nile, na ndi ọ mara nke-ọma, na ndi-nchu-àjà-ya, rue mb͕e ọ dighi onye fọduru ọ rapuru ya." 
2Kings10:12 O bilie, bia, jerue Sameria. Mb͕e ya onwe-ya ruru ulo-nlibe-anu nke ndi-ọzùzù-aturu n'uzọ," 
2Kings10:13 Jihu hutara umu-nne Ehazaia, bú eze Juda, ọ si, Òle ndi ka unu bu? Ha si, Umu-nne Ehazaia ka ayi bu: ayi nārida kwa iju ajuju bayere udo umu eze na umu eze-nwayi." 
2Kings10:14 Ọ si, Jidenu ha na ndu. Ha we jide ha na ndu, b͕ue ha n'olùlù ulo-nlibe-anu, bú ọgu ndikom abua na abua; o kweghi kwa ka nwoke ọ bula fọdu nime ha." 
2Kings10:15 O si n'ebe ahu je, we huta Jehonadab nwa Rikab, ka ọ nābia izute ya: ọ gọzie ya, si ya, Obi-gi, ò ziri ezi, dika obim di n'ebe obi-gi di? Jehonadab we si, Otú a ka ọ di. Ọ buru na ọ di otú a, nyem aka-gi. O we nye ya aka-ya; o we me ka ọ rigo n'ub͕ọ-ala-ya." 
2Kings10:16 Ọ si, Jesom, le ekworo m'nēkworo Jehova. Ha we me ka ọ ga ije n'ub͕ọ-ala-ya." 
2Kings10:17 Ọ biarue Sameria, tib͕ue ndi nile fọduru Ehab nime Sameria, rue mb͕e o kpochapuru ya, dika okwu Jehova si di, nke Ọ gwara Elaija." 
2Kings10:18 Jihu we chikọta ndi Israel nile, si ha, Ehab fère Beal òfùfè nke-ntà; Jihu gēfè ya òfùfè rinne." 
2Kings10:19 Ma ub͕u a, kpọnu ndi-amuma nile nke Beal, na ndi nile nēfè ya, na ndi-nchu-àjà-ya nile, ka ha biakutem; ka aghara ile anya nwoke ọ bula ma ahughi ya: n'ihi na enwerem àjà uku ichuru Beal; onye ọ bula elere anya ya ma ahughi ya, ọ gaghi-adi ndu. Ma Jihu mere ya n'aghughọ, ka o we me ka ndi nēfè Beal la n'iyì." 
2Kings10:20 Jihu we si, Donu ubọchi nb͕ochi nsọ nye Beal. Ha we kpọsa ya." 
2Kings10:21 Jihu we ziga ozi n'Israel nile: ndi nile nēfè Beal we bia, ọ dighi kwa nwoke ọ bula fọduru nke nābiaghi. Ha we ba n'ulo Beal; ulo Beal we juputa na madu site n'otù ọnu-uzọ rue ọnu-uzọ ọzọ." 
2Kings10:22 Ọ si onye ahu nke bu onye-isi ulo anēdebe uwe, Chiputara ndi nile nēfè Beal uwe. O we chiputara ha uwe." 
2Kings10:23 Jihu we ba, ya na Jehonadab nwa Rikab, n'ulo Beal; ọ si ndi nēfè Beal, Chọsienu ike, hu, ka otù nime ndi nēfè Jehova ghara idi n'ebe a n'etiti unu, kama ndi nēfè Beal, nání ha." 
2Kings10:24 Ha we ba ime àjà na àjà-nsure-ọku. Ma Jihu doro nye onwe-ya ọgu ndikom anọ n'èzí, si, Nwoke ahu nke kwere ka otù onye wepuga onwe-ya nime ndikom ahu ndi mu onwem nēme ka ha ba n'aka-unu, ndu-ya gālara ndu-ya." 
2Kings10:25 O rue, mb͕e o surebìri àjà-nsure-ọku, na Jihu siri ndi-ọb͕a-ọsọ, si kwa ndi-isi-agha, Banu, tib͕ue ha; ekwela nwoke ọ bula pua. Ha we were ọnu mma-agha tib͕ue ha; ndi-ọb͕a-ọsọ na ndi-isi-agha tupuru ha n'èzí, jerue obodo ulo Beal." 
2Kings10:26 Ha we buputa ogidi nke ulo Beal, sure ha ọku." 
2Kings10:27 Ha kwatu-kwa-ra ogidi Beal, kwatu kwa Beal, me ka ọ buru olùlù-ọkwu, rue ta." 
2Kings10:28 Jihu we kpochapu Beal n'Israel. 
2Kings10:29 Nání nmehie nile nke Jeroboam nwa Nebat, nke o jiri me ka Israel mehie, Jihu ewezugaghi onwe-ya n'iso ha, bú umu-ehi ọla-edo ahu nke di na Bet-el, na nke di na Dan." 
2Kings10:30 Jehova we si Jihu, N'ihi na i mewo nke-ọma n'ime ihe ziri ezi n'anyam, i we me ulo Ehab dika ihe nile si di nke di n'obim, umu-gi ndikom nke umu-umu nke-anọ gānọkwasiri gi n'oche-eze Israel." 
2Kings10:31 Ma Jihu elezighi anya ijeghari n'iwu Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, n'obi-ya nile: o wezugaghi onwe-ya pua na nmehie nile nke Jeroboam, nke o jiri me ka Israel mehie." 
2Kings10:32 Na mb͕e ahu ka Jehova malitere ibipu ufọdu n'Israel: Hazael we tib͕ue ha n'ókè ala nile nke Israel; 
2Kings10:33 site na Jọdan n'ọwuwa-anyanwu, ala nile nke Gilead, ndi Gad, na ndi Reuben, na ndi Manase, site n'Aroea, nke di n'akuku ndagwurugwu Anon, bú Gilead na Beshan." 
2Kings10:34 Ma okwu Jihu nile nke fọduru, na ihe nile o mere, na idi-ike-ya nile, èdeghi ihe ahu n'akwukwọ ihe emere n'ubọchi nke ndi-eze Israel?" 
2Kings10:35 Jihu we so nna-ya-hà dina n'ọnwu: ha we lìe ya na Sameria. Jehoahaz nwa-ya we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya. 
2Kings10:36 Ma ubọchi Jihu bu eze Israel nime Sameria di orú arọ na asatọ. 
2Kings11:1 Mb͕e Atalaia, bú nne Ehazaia, huru na nwa-ya nwoke anwuwo, o bilie, me ka nkpuru nile ndi nwe ala-eze la n'iyì." 
2Kings11:2 Ma Jehosheba, nwa-nwayi eze, bú Joram, nwa-nne-nwayi Ehazaia, were Joash nwa-nwoke Ehazaia, zupu ya n'etiti umu-ndikom eze ndi anēme ka ha nwua, o were ya na nwayi nēnye ya ara, tiye ha n'ime-ulo nke ihe-ndina; ha we zopu ya n'iru Atalaia, ewe ghara ime ka ọ nwua." 
2Kings11:3 O we nọ n'aka-ya n'ulo Jehova nēzo onwe-ya arọ isi: Atalaia we buru eze ala ahu. 
2Kings11:4 Ma n'arọ nke-asa Jehoiada zigara chita ndi-isi usu nile nke ọgu ndikom ise, ndi diri ndi-Karait, na ndi diri ndi-ọb͕a-ọsọ, o me ka ha bakute ya n'ulo Jehova; ya na ha we b͕a ndu, o me ka ha ṅua iyi n'ulo Jehova, o me kwa ka ha hu nwa eze." 
2Kings11:5 O we nye ha iwu, si, Nka bu ihe unu gēme: otù uzọ n'uzọ atọ nime unu, bú ndi nābà nime n'ubọchi-izu-ike, ganēdebe kwa ihe-ndebe ulo eze;" 
2Kings11:6 otù uzọ n'uzọ atọ gādi kwa n'ọnu-uzọ-ama Sua; otù uzọ n'uzọ atọ gādi kwa n'ọnu-uzọ-ama n'azu ndi-ọb͕a-ọsọ: unu gēdebe kwa ihe-ndebe nke ulo a, buru ihe-nb͕ochi." 
2Kings11:7 Ma usu abua ahu nime unu, bú ndi nile nāpu apu n'ubọchi-izu-ike, ha gēdebe kwa ihe-ndebe ulo Jehova buruburu eze." 
2Kings11:8 Unu gānọ kwa eze buruburu, nwoke ọ bula na ihe-agha-ya n'aka-ya; ma onye nābata nime akuku-unu, ka eme ka ọ nwua: unu nọye-kwa-ra eze mb͕e ọ nāpu n'èzí, na mb͕e ọ nābà nime." 
2Kings11:9 Ndi-isi usu ọgu ndikom ise we me dika ihe nile si di nke Jehoiada, bú onye-nchu-àjà, nyere n'iwu: ha we chiri, nwoke ọ bula ndikom-ya, bú ndi nābà nime n'ubọchi-izu-ike, ha na ndi nāpu apu n'ubọchi-izu-ike, ha we biakute Jehoiada, bú onye-nchu-àjà." 
2Kings11:10 Onye-nchu-àjà we nye ndi-isi usu ọgu ndikom ise ube na ọta nke eze, bú Devid, nwereri, nke di n'ulo Jehova." 
2Kings11:11 Ndi-ọb͕a-ọsọ we guzo, nwoke ọ bula na ihe-agha-ya n'aka-ya, site n'akuku aka-nri ulo rue akuku aka-ekpe ulo ahu, n'akuku ebe-ichu-àjà na n'akuku ulo, n'akuku eze buruburu." 
2Kings11:12 O we me ka nwa eze puta, o kpube ya okpu-eze, nye ya ihe-àmà; ha we me ya eze, te ya manu, kua aka-ha, si, Ka eze di ndu." 
2Kings11:13 Atalaia we nu olu ndi-ọb͕a-ọsọ na nke ndi Juda, o we biakute ndi ahu n'ulo Jehova:" 
2Kings11:14 ọ hu, ma, le, eze nēguzo n'akuku ogidi, dika ikpé si di, ndi-isi na opì-ha di kwa n'akuku eze; ndi nile nke ala ahu ṅuri-kwa-ra ọṅu, fùa opì. Atalaia we dọwa uwe-ya nile, kpọ, si, Nkekọta imegide eze, nkekọta imegide eze." 
2Kings11:15 Jehoiada, bú onye-nchu-àjà, we nye ndi-isi usu nile nke ọgu ndikom ise iwu, bú ndi-nlekọta usu-ndi-agha, si ha, Menu ka ọ pua ba n'etiti akuku; ma onye nābiaso ya n'azu, werenu mma-agha me ka ọ nwua: n'ihi na onye-nchu-àjà siri, Ka aghara ime ka ọ nwua n'ulo Jehova." 
2Kings11:16 Ha we doro ya onwe-ha n'akuku abua; o we si uzọ nbata inyinya ba n'ulo eze: ewe me ka ọ nwua n'ebe ahu. 
2Kings11:17 Jehoiada we me ọb͕ub͕a-ndu nke di n'etiti Jehova na eze na ndi Juda, na ha gābu ndi Jehova nwere; na n'etiti eze na ndi Juda." 
2Kings11:18 Ndi nile nke ala ahu we ba n'ulo Beal, kwatue ya; ebe-ichu-àjà-ya nile na onyinyo-ya nile, ha tupiara ha nke-ọma, ha b͕u-kwa-ra Matan, bú onye-nchu-àjà Beal, n'iru ebe-ichu-àjà ahu. Onye-nchu-àjà we do ndi-nkekọta ilekọta ulo Jehova." 
2Kings11:19 Ọ we chiri ndi-isi usu ọgu ndikom ise, na ndi-Karait, na ndi-ọb͕a-ọsọ, na ndi nile nke ala ahu; ha we me ka eze si n'ulo Jehova rida, ha we si uzọ ọnu-uzọ-ama ndi-ọb͕a-ọsọ ba n'ulo eze. O we nọkwasi n'oche ndi-eze." 
2Kings11:20 Ndi nile nke ala ahu we ṅuria ọṅu, obodo ahu di-kwa-ra jū: ha we were mma-agha me ka Atalaia nwua n'ulo eze." 
2Kings11:21 Jehoash b͕ara arọ asa mb͕e ọ malitere ibu eze. 
2Kings12:1 N'arọ nke-asa nke Jihu ka Jehoash malitere ibu eze; o we buru eze ọgu arọ abua na Jerusalem: aha nne-ya bu Zibia nke Bia-sheba. 
2Kings12:2 Jehoash we me ihe ziri ezi n'anya Jehova ubọchi-ya nile nke Jehoiada, bú onye-nchu-àjà, zíri ya ihe." 
2Kings12:3 Nání na ewezugaghi ebe di elu: ndi Juda nọ nāchu àjà, nēsure kwa ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ n'ebe di elu nile." 
2Kings12:4 Jehoash we si ndi-nchu-àjà, Ego nile nke ihe nsọ nile nke anēwebata n'ulo Jehova, bú ego onye nāgabiga n'ebe ndi agukọtara agukọta nọ, nwoke ọ bula ego madu nile nke ọ̀rùrù-ọnu-ya, na ego nile nke ọ batara n'obi nwoke ọ bula iwebata n'ulo Jehova," 
2Kings12:5 ka ndi-nchu-àjà were ya n'onwe-ha, nwoke ọ bula site n'aka onye ọ mara: ha onwe-ha gēme ka ebe etipúru etipú nke ulo ahu di ike, ebe ọ bula agāchọta ebe etipúru etipú." 
2Kings12:6 O rue, n'arọ nke-orú-na-atọ nke eze, bú Jehoash, na ndi-nchu-àjà emeghi ka ebe etipúru etipú nke ulo ahu di ike." 
2Kings12:7 Eze, bú Jehoash, we kpọ Jehoiada, bú onye-nchu-àjà, kpọ kwa ndi-nchu-àjà ọzọ, si ha, Gini mere unu emeghi ka ebe etipúru etipú nke ulo ahu di ike? ma ub͕u a unu anarala ego n'aka ndi unu mara, kama nyenu ya ime ka ebe etipúru etipú nke ulo ahu di ike." 
2Kings12:8 Ndi-nchu-àjà we kwere ka ha ghara inara ego n'aka ndi Juda, ka ha ghara kwa ime ka ebe etipúru etipú nke ulo ahu di ike." 
2Kings12:9 Jehoiada, bú onye-nchu-àjà, we were otù ib͕e, rapúe oghere n'okwu-ya, dọba ya n'akuku ebe-ichu-àjà, n'aka-nri nke ebe madu nābà n'ulo Jehova: ndi-nchu-àjà ndi nēche nbata-uzọ we tiye n'ebe ahu ego nile anēwebata n'ulo Jehova." 
2Kings12:10 O rue, mb͕e ha huru na ego ahu riri nne n'ib͕e ahu, na ode-akwukwọ eze na onye-isi-nchu-àjà rigoro, ke ego ahu n'ihe, gu kwa ya, bú nke achọtara n'ulo Jehova."
