1Chronicles4:37 na Ziza nwa Shifi, nwa Alon, nwa Jedaia, nwa Shimri, nwa Shemaia;" 
1Chronicles4:38 Ndia ndi baworo n'akwukwọ n'aha bu ndi-isi n'ab͕uru-ha: ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha we basa rue ọtutu. 
1Chronicles4:39 Ha we jerue nbata Gedoa, rue n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu ndagwurugwu, ichọ ihe iji zù ìgwè ewu na aturu-ha." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ha we chọta ihe-ọzùzù mara abuba di kwa nma, ala ahu sa-kwa-ra mbara n'akuku-ya abua, nādi kwa jū, nwe kwa udo; n'ihi na ndi bi n'ebe ahu na mb͕e gara aga sitere na Ham." 
1Chronicles4:41 Ndia ndi edeworo n'akwukwọ n'aha we bia n'ubọchi Hezekaia, bú eze Juda, tib͕ue ọmuma-ulo-ikwū-ha, na Meunim ndi ahuru n'ebe ahu, ha we wezuga ha ka ebibie ha, rue ta, we biri n'ọnọdu ha: n'ihi na ihe eji zù ìgwè ewu na aturu-ha di n'ebe ahu." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ufọdu nime ha, bú ufọdu nime umu Simeon, nnù ndikom na ọgu ise, je-kwa-ra ugwu Sia; Pelataia, na Nearaia, na Refaia, na Uziel, bú umu Ishi, bu ndi-isi-ha." 
1Chronicles4:43 Ha we tib͕ue ndi fọduru n'etiti ndi Amalek b͕apuru ab͕apu, ha we biri n'ebe ahu, rue ta." 
1Chronicles5:1 Ma umu-ndikom Reuben ọkpara Israel, (n'ihi na onye ahu bu ọkpara; ma, n'ihi na o mere ute nna-ya ka ọ ghara idi nsọ, enyere umu Josef nwa Israel ọnọdu-ọkpara-ya; agaghi-ede kwa ya n'akwukwọ-osuso-ọmumu dika ọnọdu-ọkpara si di." 
1Chronicles5:2 N'ihi na Juda di ike n'etiti umu-nne-ya, onye-ndú we si nime ya puta; ma Josef nwere ọnọdu-ọkpara:)" 
1Chronicles5:3 umu-ndikom Reuben ọkpara Israel; Hanok, na Palu, na Hezron, na Kami." 
1Chronicles5:4 Umu-ndikom Joel; Shemaia nwa-ya, Gog nwa-ya, Shimai nwa-ya;" 
1Chronicles5:4 Umu-ndikom Joel; Shemaia nwa-ya, Gog nwa-ya, Shimai nwa-ya;" 
1Chronicles5:5 Maika nwa-ya, Reaia nwa-ya, Beal nwa-ya;" 
1Chronicles5:6 Beera nwa-ya, onye Tilgat-pilnesa, bú eze Asiria, mere ka ọ je biri n'ala ọzọ: onye ahu bu onye-isi ndi Reuben nwere." 
1Chronicles5:7 Na umu-nne-ya ndikom dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, mb͕e edere akwukwọ-osuso-ọmumu nke osuso-ọmumu nile ha; onye-isi, bú Jeiel, na Zekaraia," 
1Chronicles5:8 na Bela nwa Azaz, nwa Shema, nwa Joel, onye ahu bi n'Aroea, we rue Nebo na Beal-meon:" 
1Chronicles5:8 na Bela nwa Azaz, nwa Shema, nwa Joel, onye ahu bi n'Aroea, we rue Nebo na Beal-meon:" 
1Chronicles5:9 ma n'ọwuwa-anyanwu o biruru nbata ọzara, bú site n'osimiri Yufretis: n'ihi na anu-ulo-ha bara uba n'ala Gilead." 
1Chronicles5:10 Ma n'ubọchi Sọl ha busoro ndi Haga agha, ndi dara n'aka-ha: ha we biri n'ulo-ikwū-ha n'elu ala nile nke ọwuwa-anyanwu Gilead." 
1Chronicles5:11 Umu Gad biri kwa na ncherita-iru ha, n'ala Beshan rue Saleka:" 
1Chronicles5:12 Joel, bú onye-isi, na Shafam, bú nke-abua, na Janai, na Shefat nime Beshan:" 
1Chronicles5:12 Joel, bú onye-isi, na Shafam, bú nke-abua, na Janai, na Shefat nime Beshan:" 
1Chronicles5:13 na umu-nne-ha ndikom nke ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha; Maikael, na Meshulam, na Sheba, na Jorai, na Jakan, na Zia, na Iba, asa." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ndia bu umu-ndikom Abihail nwa Huri, nwa Jaroa, nwa Gilead, nwa Maikael, nwa Jeshishai, nwa Jahdo, nwa Buz;" 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi nwa Abdiel, nwa Guni, bú onye-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ha we biri na Gilead nime Beshan, na n'ime-obodo-ya, na n'ebe-ita-nri nile nke Sheron, rue ọpupu nile ha." 
1Chronicles5:17 Edere ha nile n'akwukwọ-osuso-ọmumu n'ubọchi Jotam, bú eze Juda, na n'ubọchi Jeroboam, bú eze Israel." 
1Chronicles5:18 Umu Reuben, na ndi Gad, na nkera ebo Manase, nime ndi bu dìnkpà, ndikom nēbu ọta na mma-agha, nāzọgide kwa uta ikwe ya, ndi ezíwo-kwa-ra ibu agha, di orú nnù ndikom uzọ ise na nnù iri-na-otù na ọgu iri-na-asatọ, ndi nāpukuru usu-ndi-agha." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ha we buso ndi Haga, na Jetua, na Nafish, na Nodab, agha." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ewe yere ha aka imegide ha, ewe nye ndi Haga na ndi nile ha na ha yikọrọ n'aka-ha: n'ihi na ọ bu Chineke ka ha kpọkuru n'agha ahu, O we kwe ka ha riọta ihe ha riọrọ; n'ihi na ha tukwasiri Ya obi." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ha we chiri anu-ulo-ha n'agha: camel-ha orú nnù uzọ isi na nnù ise, na ìgwè ewu na aturu orú nnù orú uzọ na uzọ iri-na-otù na nnù ise, na inyinya-ibu nnù ise, na madu orú nnù uzọ iri-na-abua na nnù iri." 
1Chronicles5:22 N'ihi na ọtutu ndi eb͕uru eb͕u dara, n'ihi na agha ahu sitere na Chineke. Ha we biri n'ọnọdu ha rue mb͕e emere ka ha je biri n'ala ọzọ." 
1Chronicles5:23 Umu nkera ebo Manase biri kwa n'ala ahu: site na Beshan rue Beal-heamon na Senia na ugwu Heamon ka ndi ahu bara uba. 
1Chronicles5:24 Ma ndia bu ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha, bú Ifa, na Ishi, na Eliel, na Azriel, na Jeremaia, na Hodavaia, na Jahdiel, ndi-dike bu dìnkpà, ndikom amara aha-ha, ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha." 
1Chronicles5:25 Ha we mekpue emekpu megide Chineke nke ndi bu nna-ha, soro chi nile nke ndi ala ahu kwa iko, bú ndi Chineke kpochapuru n'iru ha." 
1Chronicles5:26 Chineke Israel we kpọte mọ Pul, bú eze Asiria, na mọ Tilgat-pilnesa, bú eze Asiria, o we me ka ha je biri n'ala ọzọ, bú ndi Reuben, na ndi Gad, na nkera ebo Manase, o we me ka ha biarue Hala, na Haboa, na Hara, na osimiri Gozan, rue ta." 
1Chronicles6:1 Umu-ndikom Livai; Giashon, na Kohat, na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Umu-ndikom Kohat kwa; Amram, na Izha, na Hebron, na Uziel."

1Chronicles6:4 Eleeza muru Finehas, Finehas muru Abishua;" 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua we mua Buki, Buki mua Uzi;" 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzi mua Zerahia, Zerahia mua Meraiot;" 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraiot mua Amaraia, Amaraia mua Ahaitub;" 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahaitub mua Zedok, Zedok mua Ahimaaz;" 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaaz mua Azaraia, Azaraia mua Johanan;"

1Chronicles6:14 Azaraia mua Seraia, Seraia mua Jehozadak;" 
1Chronicles6:15 Jehozadak we je mb͕e Jehova mere ka Juda na Jerusalem je biri n'ala ọzọ n'aka Nebukadneza. 
1Chronicles6:16 Umu-ndikom Livai; Giashom, na Kohat, na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Ma ndia bu aha umu-ndikom Giashom; Libni, na Shimai." 
1Chronicles6:18 Umu-ndikom Kohat bu Amram, na Izha, na Hebron, na Uziel." 
1Chronicles6:19 Umu-ndikom Merari; Mahli na Mushi. Ndia bu ab͕uru Livai dika ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha si di. 
1Chronicles6:20 Nke Giashom; Libni nwa-ya, Jahat nwa-ya, Zima nwa-ya;" 
1Chronicles6:21 Joa nwa-ya, Ido nwa-ya, Zera nwa-ya, Jeaterai nwa-ya."

1Chronicles6:23 Elkena nwa-ya, Ebiasaf nwa-ya, na Asia nwa-ya;" 
1Chronicles6:24 Tahat nwa-ya, Uriel nwa-ya, Uzaia nwa-ya, na Shaul nwa-ya." 
1Chronicles6:25 Umu-ndikom Elkena kwa; Amasai, na Ahimot." 
1Chronicles6:26 Ma Elkena: umu-ndikom Elkena; Zofai nwa-ya, na Nehat nwa-ya;" 
1Chronicles6:27 Elaiab nwa-ya, Jeroham nwa-ya, Elkena nwa-ya." 
1Chronicles6:28 Umu-ndikom Samuel kwa; ọkpara-ya, bú Joel, na nke-abua, bú Abaia." 
1Chronicles6:28 Umu-ndikom Samuel kwa; ọkpara-ya, bú Joel, na nke-abua, bú Abaia." 
1Chronicles6:29 Umu-ndikom Merari; Mahli, Libni nwa-ya, Shimai nwa-ya, Uza nwa-ya;" 
1Chronicles6:30 Shimea nwa-ya, Hagia nwa-ya, Asaia nwa-ya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Ndia bu kwa ndi Devid guzoro dika ndi-isi akuku abua nke ndi-ọbù-abù nke ulo Jehova, site na mb͕e ib͕e Chineke zuru ike." 
1Chronicles6:32 Ha we nēje ozi n'iru ebe-obibi ulo-ikwū nzute n'abù, rue mb͕e Solomon wuru ulo Jehova nime Jerusalem: ha we guzo n'ibu ndi-isi òfùfè-ha dika ikpe ekpere ha si di." 
1Chronicles6:33 Ndia bu kwa ndi nēguzo, ha na umu-ha ndikom. Nime umu-ndikom ndi Kohat: Himan ọbù-abù, nwa Joel, nwa Samuel;"

1Chronicles6:34 nwa Elkena, nwa Jeroham, nwa Eliel, nwa Toa;" 
1Chronicles6:35 nwa Zuf, nwa Elkena, nwa Mahat, nwa Amasai;" 
1Chronicles6:36 nwa Elkena, nwa Joel, nwa Azaraia, nwa Zefanaia;" 
1Chronicles6:36 nwa Elkena, nwa Joel, nwa Azaraia, nwa Zefanaia;" 
1Chronicles6:37 nwa Tahat, nwa Asia, nwa Ebiasaf, nwa Kora;" 
1Chronicles6:38 nwa Izha, nwa Kohat, nwa Livai, nwa Israel." 
1Chronicles6:39 Na nwa-nne-ya nwoke, bú Esaf, onye nēguzo n'aka-nri-ya, bú Esaf nwa Berekaia, nwa Shimea;" 
1Chronicles6:40 nwa Maikael, nwa Baaseia, nwa Malkija;" 
1Chronicles6:41 nwa Etni, nwa Zera, nwa Adaia;" 
1Chronicles6:42 nwa Itan, nwa Zima, nwa Shimai;" 
1Chronicles6:43 nwa Jahat, nwa Giashom, nwa Livai." 
1Chronicles6:44 Umu-ndikom Merari, bú umu-nne-ha, nọ kwa n'aka-ekpe: Itan nwa Kishi, nwa Abdi, nwa Maluk;" 
1Chronicles6:45 nwa Hashabaia, nwa Amazaia, nwa Hilkaia;" 
1Chronicles6:46 nwa Amzi, nwa Bani, nwa Shemea;" 
1Chronicles6:47 nwa Mahli, nwa Mushi, nwa Merari, nwa Livai." 
1Chronicles6:48 Enye-kwa-ra umu-nne-ha, bú ndi Livai, ifè òfùfè nile nke ebe-obibi ulo Chineke." 
1Chronicles6:49 Ma Eron na umu-ya ndikom nēsure ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ n'elu ebe-ichu-aja nke àjà-nsure-ọku, na n'elu ebe-ichu-aja nke ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ, bayere ije-ozi nile nke ebe nsọ kachasi ebe nsọ nile, na ikpuchiri Israel nmehie-ha, dika ihe nile si di nke Moses, bú orù Chineke, nyere n'iwu." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ndia bu kwa umu-ndikom Eron; Eleeza nwa-ya, Finehas nwa-ya, Abishua nwa-ya;" 
1Chronicles6:51 Buki nwa-ya, Uzi nwa-ya, Zerahaia nwa-ya;" 
1Chronicles6:52 Meraiot nwa-ya, Amaraia nwa-ya, Ahaitub nwa-ya;" 
1Chronicles6:53 Zedok nwa-ya, Ahimaaz nwa-ya." 
1Chronicles6:54 Ma ndia bu ebe-obibi-ha dika ebe-ulo-ikwū nile ha si di n'ókè-ala nile ha: enyere umu Eron, bú ab͕uru ndi Kohat, n'ihi na ha nwere ife-nzà mbu," 
1Chronicles6:55 ha we nye ha Hebron n'ala Juda, na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile buruburu ya;" 
1Chronicles6:56 ma ha nyere Keleb nwa Jefune ọhia obodo ahu, na obodo ntà ya nile." 
1Chronicles6:57 Umu Eron ka ha nye-kwa-ra obodo nb͕aba, Hebron; na Libna na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Jatia, na Eshtemoa na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
1Chronicles6:58 na Hilen na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Debia na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
1Chronicles6:59 na Ashan na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Bet-shemesh na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile:" 
1Chronicles6:60 site kwa n'ebo Benjamin; Geba na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Alemet na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Anatot na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile. Obodo-ha nile bu obodo iri na atọ n'ab͕uru-ha nile." 
1Chronicles6:61 Enye-kwa-ra umu Kohat, bú ndi fọduru, nime ab͕uru ebo ahu, nime nkera ebo ahu, bú nkera ebo Manase, obodo iri n'ife-nzà." 
1Chronicles6:62 Enye-kwa-ra umu Giashom, dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, site n'ebo Isaka, site kwa n'ebo Asha, site kwa n'ebo Naftali, site kwa n'ebo Manase nime Beshan, obodo iri na atọ." 
1Chronicles6:63 Enyere umu Merari, dika ab͕uru nile ha si di, site n'ebo Reuben, site kwa n'ebo Gad, site kwa n'ebo Zebulun, obodo iri na abua n'ife-nzà." 
1Chronicles6:64 Umu Israel we nye ndi Livai obodo ndia na ebe-ita-nri-ha. 
1Chronicles6:65 Ha we nye obodo ndia, nke ha kpọrọ aha, site n'ebo umu Juda, site kwa n'ebo umu Simeon, site kwa n'ebo umu Benjamin, n'ife-nzà." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ma ufọdu nime ab͕uru umu Kohat nwere obodo ókè-ala nile ha site n'ebo Efraim. 
1Chronicles6:67 Ha nyere ha obodo nb͕abà, bú Shekem na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile n'ugwu Efraim; Gezea kwa na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
1Chronicles6:68 na Jọkmeam na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Bet-horon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
1Chronicles6:69 na Ajalon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Gat-rimon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile:" 
1Chronicles6:70 site kwa na nkera ebo Manase; Anea na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Bileam na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile ka enyere umu Kohat fọduru." 
1Chronicles6:71 Enyere umu Giashom, site n'ab͕uru nkera ebo Manase, Golan nime Beshan na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Ashtarot na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile:" 
1Chronicles6:72 site kwa n'ebo Isaka; Kedesh na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Daberat na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
1Chronicles6:73 na Remot na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Anem na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile:" 
1Chronicles6:74 site kwa n'ebo Asha; Mashal na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Abdon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile;" 
1Chronicles6:75 na Hukok na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Rehob na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile:" 
1Chronicles6:76 site kwa n'ebo Naftali; Kedesh nime Galili na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Hamon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Kiriataim na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile." 
1Chronicles6:77 Enyere umu Merari, bú ndi fọduru nime ndi Livai, site n'ebo Zebulun, Rimono na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Teboa na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile:" 
1Chronicles6:78 enye-kwa-ra ha n'ofè Jọdan n'akuku Jeriko, n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu Jọdan, site n'ebo Reuben, Beza n'ọzara na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Jahza na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile," 
1Chronicles6:79 na Kedimot na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Mefaat na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile:" 
1Chronicles6:80 site kwa n'ebo Gad; Remot nime Gilead na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Mahanaim na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile," 
1Chronicles6:81 na Heshbon na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile, na Jeza na ebe-ita-nri-ya nile." 
1Chronicles7:1 Ma umu-ndikom Isaka; Tola, na Pua, na Jashub, na Shimron, anọ." 
1Chronicles7:2 Umu-ndikom Tola kwa; Uzi, na Refaia, na Jeriel, na Jahmai, na Ibsam, na Shemuel, ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha, bú ndi nke Tola; ha bu ndi-dike bu dìnkpà n'osuso-ọmumu nile ha: ọnu-ọgugu-ha n'ubọchi Devid di orú nnù uzọ abua na nnù iri-na-isi na ọgu iri." 
1Chronicles7:3 Umu-ndikom Uzi kwa; Izrahia: umu-ndikom Izrahia kwa; Maikael, na Obadaia, na Joel, na Ishia, ise: ndi-isi ka ha nile bu." 
1Chronicles7:3 Umu-ndikom Uzi kwa; Izrahia: umu-ndikom Izrahia kwa; Maikael, na Obadaia, na Joel, na Ishia, ise: ndi-isi ka ha nile bu." 
1Chronicles7:4 Usu ndi nāpunara madu ihe nke usu-ndi-agha so-kwa-ra ha, n'osuso-ọmumu-ha, dika ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha si di, ha di orú nnù uzọ anọ na nnù iri: n'ihi na ha nwere ọtutu ndinyom na umu-ndikom." 
1Chronicles7:5 Umu-nne-ha kwa nke ab͕uru nile nke Isaka, ndi-dike bu dìnkpà, di orú nnù uzọ iri na nnù iri-na-asa na ọgu iri, edewo ha nile n'akwukwọ-osuso-ọmumu." 
1Chronicles7:6 Umu-ndikom Benjamin; Bela, na Bekea, na Jediael, atọ." 
1Chronicles7:7 Umu-ndikom Bela kwa; Ezbon, na Uzi, na Uziel, na Jerimot, na Iri, ise; ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna, ndi-dike bu dìkpà; edewo kwa ha n'akwukwọ-osuso-ọmumu, ha di orú nnù uzọ abua na nnù iri-na-ise na orú na iri na anọ." 
1Chronicles7:8 Umu-ndikom Bekea kwa; Zemira, na Joash, na Elieza, na Elioenai, na Ọmri, na Jeremot, na Abaija, na Anatot, na Alemet. Ndia nile bu umu-ndikom Bekea." 
1Chronicles7:9 Edewo kwa ha n'akwukwọ-osuso-ọmumu, dika osuso-ọmumu nile ha si di, ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha, ndi-dike bu dìnkpà, ha di orú nnù uzọ abua na nnù iri na ọgu iri." 
1Chronicles7:10 Umu-ndikom Jediael kwa; Bilhan: umu-ndikom Bilhan kwa; Jeush, na Benjamin, na Ihud, na Keneana, na Zetan, na Tashish, na Ahishaha." 
1Chronicles7:11 Ndia nile bu umu Jediael, dika ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha si di, ndi-dike bu dìnkpà, ha di orú nnù uzọ abua na nnù atọ, ndi nāpukuru usu-ndi-agha ibu agha." 
1Chronicles7:12 Shupim kwa, na Hupim, bú umu Ia, na Hushim, bú umu Ahea." 
1Chronicles7:13 Umu-ndikom Naftali; Jahaziel, na Guni, na Jiza, na Shalum, bú umu Bilha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Umu-ndikom Manase; Asriel, onye nwunye-ya muru: (iko-ya nwayi, bú nwayi Eram, muru Makia nna Gilead:" 
1Chronicles7:15 Makia we luru nwunye n'etiti Hupim na n'etiti Shupim, aha nwa-nne-ya nwayi bu kwa Meaka;) aha nwa nke-abua bu kwa Zelọfehad: ma Zelọfehad nwere umu-ndinyom." 
1Chronicles7:16 Meaka, bú nwunye Makia, we mua nwa-nwoke, o we kpọ aha-ya Peresh; aha nwa-nne-ya nwoke bu Sheresh; umu-ya ndikom bu Ulam na Rakem." 
1Chronicles7:17 Umu-ndikom Ulam kwa; Bedan. Ndia bu umu Gilead, nwa Makia, nwa Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Nwa-nne-ya nwayi, bú Hamoleket, we mua Ishhod, na Abieza, na Mahla." 
1Chronicles7:19 Umu-ndikom Shemida bu kwa Ahian, na Shekem, na Likhi, na Aniam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Umu-ndikom Efraim kwa; Shutela, na Bered nwa-ya, na Tahat nwa-ya, na Eleada nwa-ya, na Tahat nwa-ya," 
1Chronicles7:21 na Zabad nwa-ya, na Shutela nwa-ya, na Eza, na Elead, ndi ndikom Gat, ndi amuru n'ala, b͕uru, n'ihi na ha ridatara ichiri anu-ulo-ha." 
1Chronicles7:22 Efraim, bú nna-ha, we rue újú ọtutu ubọchi, umu-nne-ya we bia ikasi ya obi." 
1Chronicles7:23 O we bakuru nwunye-ya, o we turu ime, mua nwa-nwoke, nna-ya we kpọ aha-ya Beria, n'ihi na ulo-ya di n'ọnọdu ọjọ." 
1Chronicles7:24 Nwa-ya nwayi bu Sheera, onye wuru Bet-horon di n'okpuru, na nke di n'elu, na Uzen-sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Refa bu kwa nwa-ya, na Reshef, na Tela nwa-ya, na Tahan nwa-ya;" 
1Chronicles7:26 Ladan nwa-ya, Amaihud nwa-ya, Elishama nwa-ya;" 
1Chronicles7:27 Nun nwa-ya, Joshua nwa-ya." 
1Chronicles7:27 Nun nwa-ya, Joshua nwa-ya." 
1Chronicles7:28 Ihe-onwunwe nile ha na ebe-obibi nile ha bu Bet-el na umu-obodo-ya, na n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu Naaran, na n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu Gezea na umu-obodo-ya; na Shekem na umu-obodo-ya, rue Aza na umu-obodo-ya:" 
1Chronicles7:29 na n'akuku umu Manase, Bet-shean na umu-obodo-ya, Teanak na umu-obodo-ya, na Megido na umu-obodo-ya, na Doa na umu-obodo-ya. Nime ndia ka umu Josef nwa Israel biri." 
1Chronicles7:30 Umu-ndikom Asha; Imna, na Ishva, na Ishvi, na Beria, na Sera, bú nwa-nne-ha nwayi." 
1Chronicles7:31 Umu-ndikom Beria kwa; Heba, na Malkiel, onye ahu bu nna Biazait." 
1Chronicles7:32 Heba we mua Jaflet, na Shoma, na Hotam, na Shua nwa-nne-ha nwayi." 
1Chronicles7:33 Umu-ndikom Jaflet kwa; Pasak, na Bimhal, na Ashvat. Ndia bu umu Jaflet." 
1Chronicles7:34 Umu-ndikom Shema kwa; Ahi, na Rohga, na Jehuba, na Eram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Umu-ndikom Helem nwa-nne-ya kwa; Zofa, na Imna, na Shelesh, na Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 Umu-ndikom Zofa; Sua, na Hanefa, na Shual, na Beri, na Imra;" 
1Chronicles7:37 Beza, na Hod, na Shama, na Shilsha, na Itran, na Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Umu-ndikom Jeta kwa; Jefune, na Pispa, na Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Umu-ndikom Ula kwa; Ara, na Haniel, na Rizia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Ndia nile bu umu Asha, ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha, ndi arọputara arọputa, ndi-dike bu dìnkpà, ha bu ndi-isi nke ndi-isi. Edewo kwa ha n'akwukwọ-osuso-ọmumu, nime usu-ndi-agha, n'ibu-agha, ọnu-ọgugu-ha bu orú nnù ndikom uzọ atọ na nnù ise." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjamin we mua Bela, bú ọkpara-ya, na Ashbel, bú nke-abua, na Ahara, bú nke-atọ;" 
1Chronicles8:2 na Noha, bú nke-anọ, na Rafa, bú nke-ise." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela we nwe umu-ndikom; Ada, na Gira, na Abaihud;" 
1Chronicles8:4 na Abishua, na Neaman, na Ahoa;" 
1Chronicles8:5 na Gira, na Shefufan, na Huram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ndia bu kwa umu-ndikom Ihud: ndia bu ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna nke ndi bi na Geba, ha we me ka ha je biri na Manahat:" 
1Chronicles8:7 na Neaman, na Ahaija, na Gira, onye ahu mere ka ha je biri n'ala ọzọ; ọ mua Uza na Ahaihud." 
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharaim we mua umu n'ọhia Moab, mb͕e o zilagasiri ha; Hushim na Baara bu ndinyom-ya." 
1Chronicles8:9 O we site na Hodesh, bú nwunye-ya, mua Jobab, na Zibia, na Misha, na Malkam;" 
1Chronicles8:9 O we site na Hodesh, bú nwunye-ya, mua Jobab, na Zibia, na Misha, na Malkam;" 
1Chronicles8:10 na Jeuz, na Shakia, na Miama. Ndia bu umu-ya ndikom, ha bu ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna." 
1Chronicles8:11 O site-kwa-ra na Hushim mua Abaitub na Elpaal. 
1Chronicles8:12 Umu-ndikom Elpaal; Iba, na Misham, na Shemed; onye ahu wuru Ono na Lod, na umu-obodo-ya:" 
1Chronicles8:13 na Beria, na Shema; ndia bu ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna nke ndi bi n'Ajalon, ha onwe-ha mere ka ndi bi na Gat b͕alaga;" 
1Chronicles8:14 na Ahio, na Shashak, na Jeremot;" 
1Chronicles8:15 na Zebadaia, na Arad, na Eda;" 
1Chronicles8:16 na Maikael, na Ishpa, na Joha, bú umu-ndikom Beria;" 
1Chronicles8:17 na Zebadaia, na Meshulam, na Hizki, na Heba;" 
1Chronicles8:18 na Ishmerai, na Izlia, na Jobab, bú umu-ndikom Elpaal;" 
1Chronicles8:18 na Ishmerai, na Izlia, na Jobab, bú umu-ndikom Elpaal;" 
1Chronicles8:19 na Jakim, na Zikri, na Zabdi;" 
1Chronicles8:20 na Elienai, na Ziletai, na Eliel;" 
1Chronicles8:21 na Adaia, na Beraia, na Shimrat, bú umu-ndikom Shimai;" 
1Chronicles8:22 na Ishpan, na Iba, na Eliel;" 
1Chronicles8:23 na Abdon, na Zikri, na Henan;" 
1Chronicles8:24 na Hananaia, na Ilam, na Antot a;" 
1Chronicles8:25 na Ifdeia, na Penuel, bú umu-ndikom Shashak;" 
1Chronicles8:26 na Shamsherai, na Sheharia, na Atalaia;" 
1Chronicles8:27 na Jaareshia, na Elaija, na Zikri, bú umu-ndikom Jeroham." 
1Chronicles8:28 Ndia bu ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna n'osuso-ọmumu nile ha, ndi-isi. Ndia biri na Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles8:29 Ma nime Gibeon ka nna Gibeon biri, bú Jeiel, aha nwunye-ya bu Meaka:" 
1Chronicles8:30 nwa-ya, bú ọkpara, bú Abdon, na Zua, na Kish, na Beal, na Nedab;" 
1Chronicles8:31 na Gedoa, na Ahio, na Zeka." 
1Chronicles8:32 Miklot we mua Shimea. Ha onwe-ha we so kwa umu-nne-ha biri na Jerusalem, na ncherita-iru umu-nne-ha." 
1Chronicles8:33 Nea we mua Kish; Kish mua Sọl; Sọl mua Jonatan, na Malki-shua, na Abinadab, na Eshbeal." 
1Chronicles8:34 Nwa-nwoke Jonatan bu Merib-beal; Merib-beal we mua Maika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Umu-ndikom Maika kwa; Piton, na Melek, na Tarea, na Ehaz." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ehaz we mua Jehoada; Jehoada we mua Alemet, na Azmavet, na Zimri; Zimri we mua Moza:" 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza mua Binea; Rafa bu nwa-ya, Eleasa nwa-ya, Azel nwa-ya:" 
1Chronicles8:38 Azel nwere umu-ndikom isi, ndia bu kwa aha-ha; Azrikam, na Bokeru, na Ishmael, na Shearia, na Obadaia, na Henan. Ndia nile bu umu-ndikom Azel." 
1Chronicles8:39 Umu-ndikom Ishek nwa-nne-ya nwoke kwa; Ulam, bú ọkpara-ya, na Jeush, bú nke-abua, na Elifelet, bú nke-atọ." 
1Chronicles8:40 Umu Ulam we buru ndi-dike bu dìnkpà, ndi-ọb͕a-uta, ha nwe-kwa-ra ọtutu umu-ndikom, na umu umu, ọgu asa na iri. Ndia nile sitere n'umu Benjamin." 
1Chronicles9:1 Ewe de Israel nile n'akwukwọ-osuso-ọmumu; ma, le, edere ha n'akwukwọ ndi-eze Israel: ma emere ka Juda je biri na Babilon n'ihi nmekpu ha mekpuru." 
1Chronicles9:2 Ma ndi-obibi mbu ndi bi n'ihe-onwunwe-ha n'obodo nile ha bu, Israel, ndi-nchu-aja, ndi Livai, na Netinim." 
1Chronicles9:3 Ma ufọdu nime umu Juda, na ufọdu nime umu Benjamin, na ufọdu nime umu Efraim na Manase, biri na Jerusalem;" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai nwa Amihud, nwa Ọmri, nwa Imri, nwa Bani, onye sitere n'umu Perez nwa Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Ndi sitere na ndi Shailo; Asaia, bú ọkpara, na umu-ya ndikom." 
1Chronicles9:6 Ndi sitere n'umu Zera; Jeuel, na umu-nne-ha, nnù madu na ọgu iri-na-anọ na iri." 
1Chronicles9:7 Ndi sitere n'umu Benjamin; Salu nwa Meshulam, nwa Hodavaia, nwa Hasenua;" 
1Chronicles9:8 na Ibneia nwa Jeroham, na Ila nwa Uzi, nwa Mikri, na Meshulam nwa Shefataia, nwa Reuel, nwa Ibnija;" 
1Chronicles9:9 na umu-nne-ha, dika osuso-ọmumu nile ha si di, nnù madu abua na ọgu asa na iri na isi. Ndikom ndia nile bu ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna diri ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha." 
1Chronicles9:10 Ndi sitere na ndi-nchu-aja; Jedaia, na Jehoiarib, na Jakin;" 
1Chronicles9:11 na Azaraia nwa Hilkaia, nwa Meshulam, nwa Zedok, nwa Meraiot, nwa Ahaitub, bú onye-ndú ulo Chineke;" 
1Chronicles9:12 na Adaia nwa Jeroham, nwa Pashhua, nwa Malkija, na Maasai nwa Adiel, nwa Jahzera, nwa Meshulam, nwa Meshilemit, nwa Imea;" 
1Chronicles9:13 na umu-nne-ha, bú ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha nwere, nnù madu anọ na ọgu asatọ; ndi-dike ndi bu dìnkpà ije ozi òfùfè ulo Chineke." 
1Chronicles9:14 Ndi sitere na ndi Livai; Shemaia nwa Hashub, nwa Azrikam, nwa Hashabaia, site n'umu Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 na Bakbaka, na Heresh, na Galal, na Matanaia nwa Maika, nwa Zikri, nwa Esaf;" 
1Chronicles9:16 na Obadaia nwa Shemaia, nwa Galal, nwa Jedutun, na Berekaia nwa Esa, nwa Elkena, onye bi n'obodo ntà ndi Netofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Ndi-ọnu-uzọ-ama kwa; Shalum, na Akub, na Talmon, na Ahaiman, na umu-nne-ha: Shalum bu onye-isi;" 
1Chronicles9:18 ma ha nọ rue ub͕u a n'ọnu-uzọ-ama eze n'akuku ọwuwa-anyanwu: ndi ahu bu ndi-ọnu-uzọ-ama nke ọmuma-ulo-ikwū umu Livai nwere. 
1Chronicles9:19 Ma Shalum nwa Kora, nwa Ebiasaf, nwa Kora, na umu-nne-ya, nke ulo nna-ya, bú ndi Kora, bu ndi-isi ije-ozi òfùfè ahu, ndi-nche nbata-uzọ nile nke ulo-ikwū: ndi bu nna-ha buri ndi-isi ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Jehova, ndi-nche uzọ-nbata;" 
1Chronicles9:20 Finehas nwa Eleeza bu kwa onye-ndú-ha na mb͕e gara aga, Jehova nọyere ya." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekaraia nwa Meshelemaia bu onye-ọnu-uzọ-ama nke ọnu-uzọ ulo-ikwū nzute. 
1Chronicles9:22 Ndia nile arọputara ibu ndi-ọnu-uzọ-ama nime nbata-uzọ nile di ọgu iri na iri na abua. Edere ndi ahu n'akwukwọ-osuso-ọmumu-ha n'obodo ntà ha, ndi ahu ka Devid na Samuel onye-ọhu-uzọ doro n'ọnọdu-ha, bú ọnọdu nke ndi kwesiri ntukwasi-obi." 
1Chronicles9:23 Ndi ahu na umu-ha bu kwa ndi-isi ọnu-uzọ-ama nile diri ulo Jehova, bú ulo nke ulo-ikwū ahu, n'ihe-ndebe." 
1Chronicles9:24 N'akuku anọ ka ndi-ọnu-uzọ-ama nọ, n'Ọwuwa-anyanwu, na n'akuku Ọdida-anyanwu, na n'akuku Ugwu, na n'akuku Ndida." 
1Chronicles9:25 Ma umu-nne-ha, n'obodo ntà nile ha, nwe ibata kwa-ubọchi-asa site na mb͕e rue mb͕e, inọyere ha:" 
1Chronicles9:26 n'ihi na n'ọnọdu ndi kwesiri ntukwasi-obi ka ha nọ, bú ndi-dike anọ nke ndi-ọnu-uzọ-ama, ha onwe-ha bu ndi Livai, ha bu kwa ndi-isi ime-ulo nile na ndi-isi ulo-àkù nile nke ulo Chineke." 
1Chronicles9:27 Buruburu ulo Chineke ka ha nānọ kwa ọnọdu-abali, n'ihi na n'isi-ha ka ndebe di, ha onwe-ha nwe-kwa-ra imeghe ya kwa-ututu." 
1Chronicles9:28 Ufọdu nime ha bu kwa ndi-isi ihe òfùfè; n'ihi na n'ọnu-ọgugu ka ha nāchibata ha, n'ọnu-ọgugu kwa ka ha nāchipu ha." 
1Chronicles9:29 Ufọdu nime ha kwa ka agutara ibu ndi-isi ihe, bú ibu ndi-isi ihe nile nke ebe nsọ ahu, na ibu ndi-isi utu ọka flour, na manya-vine, na manu, na frankincense, na uda di iche iche." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ufọdu nime umu ndi-nchu-àjà nāsugwa kwa manu-otite nēsì ísì utọ nke uda di iche iche. 
1Chronicles9:31 Matitaia kwa, otù onye nime ndi Livai, onye ahu bu ọkpara Shalum onye Kora, ọ nọ n'ọnọdu ndi kwesiri ntukwasi-obi ibu onye-isi nke ihe esiri n'ite isi ihe." 
1Chronicles9:32 Ufọdu nime umu ndi Kohat, bú ufọdu nime umu-nne-ha, bu ndi-isi achicha anēdo n'usoro, idozi ya kwa-ubọchi-izu-ike." 
1Chronicles9:33 Ndia kwa bu ndi-ọbù-abù, ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna nke ndi Livai, ndi bi n'ime-ulo, ndi puru n'òfùfè ọzọ: n'ihi na ehihie na abali ha bu ndi-isi-ha n'ije-ozi ahu." 
1Chronicles9:34 Ndia bu ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna nke ndi Livai n'osuso-ọmumu nile ha, ndi-isi: ndia biri na Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles9:35 Ma nime Gibeon ka nna Gibeon biri, bú Jeiel, aha nwunye-ya bu Meaka:" 
1Chronicles9:36 na nwa-ya, bú ọkpara, bú Abdon, na Zua, na Kish, na Beal, na Nea, na Nedab;" 
1Chronicles9:37 na Gedoa, na Ahio, na Zekaraia, na Miklot." 
1Chronicles9:38 Miklot we mua Shimeam. Ha onwe-ha we so kwa umu-nne-ha biri na Jerusalem, na ncherita-iru umu-nne-ha." 
1Chronicles9:39 Nea we mua Kish; Kish mua Sọl; Sọl mua Jonatan, na Malki-shua, na Abinadab, na Eshbeal." 
1Chronicles9:40 Nwa-nwoke Jonatan bu Merib-beal; Merib-beal we mua Maika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Umu-ndikom Maika kwa; Piton, na Melek, na Tahrea, na Ehaz." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ehaz we mua Jara; Jara mua Alemet, na Azmavet, na Zimri; Zimri we mua Moza;" 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza mua Binea; Refaia bu kwa nwa-ya, Eleasa nwa-ya, Azel nwa-ya:" 
1Chronicles9:44 Azel nwere umu-ndikom isi, ndia bu kwa aha-ha; Azrikam, na Bokeru, na Ishmael, na Shearia, na Obadaia, na Henan: ndia bu umu-ndikom Azel." 
1Chronicles10:1 Ma ndi Filistia busoro Israel agha: ndikom Israel we b͕alaga n'iru ndi Filistia, ha we da, buru ndi eb͕uru eb͕u n'ugwu Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Ndi Filistia we sosie ike n'azu Sọl na n'azu umu-ya ndikom; ndi Filistia we tib͕ue Jonatan, na Abinadab, na Malki-shua, bú umu-ndikom Sọl." 
1Chronicles10:3 Agha ahu we di arọ́ megide Sọl, ndi-ọb͕a-uta we huta ya; o we nēb͕u ya nb͕u site n'ib͕a-uta nke ndi-ọb͕a-uta." 
1Chronicles10:4 Sọl we si onye nēbu ihe-agha-ya, Miputa nma-agha-gi, were ya mapuem aru; ka ndia anēbìghi úgwù ghara ibia kwam emò. Ma onye nēbu ihe-agha-ya ekweghi; n'ihi na ọ nātu egwu nke-uku. Sọl we were mma-agha-ya, dakwasi ya." 
1Chronicles10:5 Onye nēbu ihe-agha-ya we hu na Sọl anwuwo, ya onwe-ya we dakwasi kwa na mma-agha-ya, nwua." 
1Chronicles10:6 Sọl we nwua, ya na umu-ya ndikom atọ; ulo-ya nile nwu-kwa-ra n'otù." 
1Chronicles10:7 Ndikom Israel nile ndi nọ na ndagwurugwu ahu we hu na ha ab͕alagawo, na Sọl na umu-ya ndikom anwuwo kwa, ha we rapu obodo nile ha b͕alaga; ndi Filistia we bia biri nime ha." 
1Chronicles10:8 O rue, n'echi-ya, mb͕e ndi Filistia biaru ibupu ihe ndi eb͕uru eb͕u, na ha huru Sọl ma umu-ya ndikom ka ha tọb͕ọrọ n'ugwu Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ha we yipu ihe-agha-ya, būru isi-ya na ihe-agha-ya, ziga n'ala ndi Filistia buruburu, izisara arusi nile ha na ndi-ha ozi ahu." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ha we dọba ihe-agha-ya n'ulo chi-ha, kpọgide okpokoro-isi-ya n'ulo Degon." 
1Chronicles10:11 Jebesh-gilead nile we nu ihe nile ndi Filistia mere Sọl," 
1Chronicles10:12 ndikom nile bu dìnkpà we bilie, būru ozu Sọl na ozu umu-ya ndikom, bubata ha na Jebesh, lìe ọkpukpu-ha n'okpuru osisi terebinth nime Jebesh, bue ọnu ubọchi asa." 
1Chronicles10:13 Sọl we nwua n'ihi nmekpu-ya o mekpuru megide Jehova, n'ihi okwu Jehova, nke ọ nēdebegh: ọzọ kwa, n'ihi na ọ juru ase n'aka onye nwere mọ ọ nāju ihe, iji ya ju ase," 
1Chronicles10:14 ma ọ jughi Jehova ase: O we me ka ọ nwua, O we chigharia ala-eze nye Devid nwa Jesi." 
1Chronicles11:1 Israel nile we chikọta onwe-ha n'ebe Devid nọ rue Hebron, si, Le, ọkpukpu-gi na anu-aru-gi ka ayi bu." 
1Chronicles11:2 Na mb͕e gara aga, ọbuná mb͕e Sọl bu eze, gi onwe-gi bu onye nēdupu na onye nēdubata Israel: Jehova, bú Chineke-gi, we si gi, Gi onwe-gi gāzù ndim, bú Israel, gi onwe-gi gābu kwa onye-ndú ndim, bú Israel." 
1Chronicles11:3 Ndi-okenye nile nke Israel we biakute eze rue Hebron; ha na Devid we b͕a ndu nime Hebron n'iru Jehova; ha we te Devid manu ibu eze Israel, dika okwu Jehova n'aka Samuel si di." 
1Chronicles11:4 Devid na Israel nile we jerue Jerusalem (nke ahu bu Jebus); ma n'ebe ahu ka ndi Jebus, ndi bi n'ala ahu, nọ." 
1Chronicles11:5 Ndi bi na Jebus we si Devid, I gaghi-abata n'ebe a. Devid we were ebe ewusiri ike nke Zaion; nke ahu bu obodo Devid." 
1Chronicles11:6 Devid we si, Onye ọ bula nke buru uzọ tib͕u ndi Jebus gābu onye-isi na ọchi-agha. Joab nwa Zeruaia we buru uzọ rigo, o we buru onye-isi." 
1Chronicles11:7 Devid we biri n'ebe ahu ewusiri ike; n'ihi ya ka ha kpọrọ ya obodo Devid. 
1Chronicles11:8 O we wue obodo buruburu, site na Milo we rue buruburu ya: ma Joab mere ka obodo fọduru di ndu." 
1Chronicles11:9 Devid we nāga n'iru, nēje nādi uku; Jehova nke usu nile nke ndi-agha nọye-kwa-ra ya." 
1Chronicles11:10 Ma ndia bu ndi-isi nke ndi-dike Devid nwere, ndi mere onwe-ha ka ha di ike n'akuku ya n'ala-eze-ya, ha na Israel nile, ime ya eze, dika okwu Jehova si di bayere Israel." 
1Chronicles11:11 Nka bu kwa ọnu-ọgugu ndi-dike Devid nwere: Jashọbeam, bú nwa onye-Hakmonait, onye-isi nke orú na iri ahu; o feghariri ube-ya imegide ọgu ndikom iri-na-ise, ha we ghọ ndi eb͕uru eb͕u n'otù ub͕ò." 
1Chronicles11:12 Nke so ya bu Eleeza nwa Dodo, onye Ahoa, onye ahu di n'etiti ndi-dike atọ ahu." 
1Chronicles11:13 Onye ahu nọyere Devid nime Pas-damim, ma ndi Filistia chikọtara onwe-ha n'ebe ahu ibu agha, òkè ubi nke juputara n'ọka barley di kwa; ma ndi Israel b͕alagara n'iru ndi Filistia." 
1Chronicles11:14 Ha we guzo onwe-ha n'etiti òkè ahu, naputa ya, tib͕ue ndi Filistia; Jehova we zọputa nzọputa uku." 
1Chronicles11:15 Ndikom atọ n'etiti orú ndi-isi na iri ahu we ridarue oké nkume ahu jekuru Devid, rue ọb͕à Adulam; ma ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ndi-Filistia amawo ulo-ikwū-ha na ndagwurugwu Refaim." 
1Chronicles11:16 Ma Devid nọ n'ebe ahu ewusiri ike mb͕e ahu, ma ebe-nguzo-ndi-agha ndi Filistia di na Bet-lehem mb͕e ahu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Devid we chọsie ike, si, Ònye gēme ka m'ṅua miri sitere n'olùlù-miri Bet-lehem, nke di n'ọnu-uzọ-ama?" 
1Chronicles11:18 Ndikom atọ ahu we wapue ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ndi Filistia, sere miri n'olùlù-miri Bet-lehem, nke di n'ọnu-uzọ-ama, ha we būru ya, kutere Devid: ma Devid ekweghi iṅu ya, o we wusiere ya Jehova," 
1Chronicles11:19 si, Ya burum ihe-árú sitere na Chinekem, ime ihe a: #m'gāṅu ọbara ndikom ahu ndi ji ndu-ha n'aka-ha je? n'ihi na ha ji ndu-ha n'aka-ha kute ya. O kweghi kwa iṅu ya. Ihe ndia ka ndi-dike atọ ahu mere." 
1Chronicles11:20 Ma Abishai, bú nwa-nne Joab, onye ahu bu onye-isi ndikom atọ ahu: onye ahu feghari-kwa-ra ube-ya imegide ọgu ndikom iri-na-ise, ha we ghọ ndi eb͕uru eb͕u, o we nwe aha n'etiti ndikom atọ ahu." 
1Chronicles11:21 N'etiti ndikom atọ ahu anāsọpuru ya kari abua fọduru, o we ghọrọ ha onye-isi: ma o rughi ndikom atọ mbu ahu." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaia nwa Jehoiada, nwa nke nwoke bu dìnkpà nke Kabzeel, onye di uku n'ime ihe, onye ahu tib͕uru umu-ndikom abua nke Ariel nke Moab: onye ahu rida-kwa-ra tib͕ue ọdum n'etiti olùlù n'ubọchi snow nēzò." 
1Chronicles11:23 Onye ahu tib͕u-kwa-ra nwoke ahu, bú onye Ijipt, nwoke toro ogologo, cubit ise; ube di kwa n'aka onye Ijipt ahu dika oké ókpòrò di arọ́ nke ọkpa-ákwà ji akpa ákwà; ma o ji nkpa-n'aka ridakuru ya, napu ube ahu n'aka onye Ijipt n'ike, were ube-ya b͕ue ya." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ihe ndia ka Benaia nwa Jehoiada mere, we nwe aha n'etiti ndi-dike atọ ahu." 
1Chronicles11:25 Le, anāsọpuru ya kari orú ndikom na iri ahu, ma o rughi ndikom atọ mbu ahu: Devid we do ya onye-isi ndi nānu okwu-ya." 
1Chronicles11:26 Ndi-dike nke usu nile nke ndi-agha kwa; Asahel nwa-nne Joab, Elhanan nwa Dodo nke Bet-lehem;" 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamot onye Haroa, Hilez onye-Pelonait;" 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira nwa Ikesh onye Tekoa, Abieza onye Anatot;" 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai onye Husha, Ilai onye Ahoa;" 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai onye Netofa, Hiled nwa Beana onye Netofa;" 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai nwa Ribai nke Gibea umu Benjamin, Benaia onye Piraton;" 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai nke miri-iyi Gaash, Abiel onye Araba;" 
1Chronicles11:33 Azmavet onye Bahurim, Eliahba onye Shaalabin;" 
1Chronicles11:34 nke umu Hashem onye-Gaizonait, Jonatan nwa Shagei onye-Hararait;" 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiam nwa Saka onye-Hararait, Elifal nwa Ua;" 
1Chronicles11:36 Hefa onye-Mekeratait, Ahaija onye-Pelonait;" 
1Chronicles11:37 Hezro onye Kamel, Naarai nwa Ezbai;" 
1Chronicles11:38 Joel nwa-nne Netan, Mibha nwa Hagri;" 
1Chronicles11:38 Joel nwa-nne Netan, Mibha nwa Hagri;" 
1Chronicles11:39 Zelek onye Amon, Naharai onye Beirot, onye nēbu ihe-agha Joab nwa Zeruaia;" 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira onye Jeta, Gareb onye Jeta;" 
1Chronicles11:41 Uraia onye Het, Zabad nwa Ahlai;" 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina nwa Shiza onye Reuben, onye-isi ndi Reuben, orú ndikom na iri so-kwa-ra ya;" 
1Chronicles11:43 Henan nwa Meaka, na Joshafat onye-Mitnait;" 
1Chronicles11:44 Uzia onye Ashterot, Shama na Jeiel, bú umu Hotam onye Aroea;" 
1Chronicles11:45 Jediael nwa Shimri, na Joha nwa-nne-ya, onye-Tizait;" 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliel onye-Mahavait, na Jeribai, na Joshavia, umu Elnaam, na Itma onye Moab;" 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliel, na Obed, na Jaasiel onye-Mezobait." 
1Chronicles12:1 Ma ndia bu ndi nābiakute Devid rue Ziklag, mb͕e anọ̀ nēmechibido ya n'ihi Sọl nwa Kish: ndi ahu di kwa n'etiti ndi-dike-ya, ndi nēyere ya aka n'agha ahu." 
1Chronicles12:2 Ha nāchi uta, nēme aka-nri nēme kwa aka-ekpe n'itu nkume na n'iwere uta b͕a àkú; ha sitere n'umu-nne Sọl site na Benjamin." 
1Chronicles12:3 Onye-isi bu Ahieza, na Joash, bú umu Shemaa onye Gibea; na Jeziel, na Pelet, bú umu Azmavet; na Beraka, na Jihu onye Anatot;" 
1Chronicles12:4 na Ishmaia onye Gibeon, bú dike n'etiti orú ndikom na iri ahu, na onye-isi orú na iri ahu; na Jeremaia, na Jahaziel, na Johanan, na Jozabad onye Gedira;" 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzai, na Jerimot, na Bealia, na Shemaraia, na Shefataia onye-Harufait;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Elkena, na Ishia, na Azarel, na Joeza, na Jashọbeam, bú ndi Kora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 na Joela, na Zebadaia, bú umu Jeroham nke Gedoa." 
1Chronicles12:7 na Joela, na Zebadaia, bú umu Jeroham nke Gedoa." 
1Chronicles12:8 Ufọdu nime ndi Gad kewaputa-kwa-ra onwe-ha jekuru Devid rue ebe ahu ewusiri ike n'ọzara, ndi-dike bu dìnkpà, ndikom usu-ndi-agha ibu agha, ndi nēdo ọta na ube n'usoro; iru-ha bu kwa iru ọdum, ha di kwa ngwa dika mb͕ada n'elu ugwu;" 
1Chronicles12:9 Iza, bú onye-isi, Obadaia, bú nke-abua, Elaiab, bú nke-atọ;" 
1Chronicles12:10 Mishmana, bú nke-ano, Jeremaia, bú nke-ise;" 
1Chronicles12:11 Atai, bú nke-isi, Eliel, bú nke-asa;" 
1Chronicles12:12 Johanan, bú nke-asatọ, Elzabad, bú nke-iteghete;" 
1Chronicles12:13 Jeremaia, bú nke-iri, Makbanai, bú nke-iri-na-otù." 
1Chronicles12:14 Ndia, ndi sitere n'umu Gad, bu ndi-isi usu-ndi-agha: onye kachasi ntà ra ka ọgu ndikom ise, onye kachasi uku ra kwa ka nnù ndikom abua na ọgu iri." 
1Chronicles12:15 Ndia bu ndikom ahu ndi gabigara Jọdan n'ọnwa mbu, mb͕e osimiri ahu nēruchi usọ-ya nile; ha we me ka ndi ndagwurugwu nile b͕alaga, ma n'Ọwuwa-anyanwu ma n'Ọdida-anyanwu." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ufọdu nime umu Benjamin na Juda we biarue ebe ahu ewusiri ike biakute Devid. 
1Chronicles12:17 Devid we pua izute ha, o we za, si ha, Ọ buru na unu abiakutem n'uzọ udo iyerem aka, enwerem obi ọma n'aru unu ka mu na unu buru otù: ma ọ buru na unu abiawo iwere aghughọ nyem n'aka ndi nākpab͕um, mb͕e ihe-ike nādighi n'akam, ka Chineke nna-ayi-hà hu ya, bara unu nba." 
1Chronicles12:18 Mọ nke Chineke we yiri Amasai, bú onye-isi ndi-ọchi-agha ahu, dika uwe, o we si, Nke gi ka ayi bu, Devid, n'akuku gi ka ayi nọ kwa, nwa Jesi: udo, udo diri gi, udo di-kwa-ra onye nēyere gi aka; n'ihi na Chineke-gi enyeworo gi aka. Devid we nara ha, me ha ndi-isi usu ndi nāpunara madu ihe." 
1Chronicles12:19 Ufọdu nime Manase dinyekwara Devid, mb͕e o soro ndi Filistia bia imegide Sọl n'agha, ma ha eyeghi ha aka: n'ihi na ndi-isi ndi Filistia were idu-ọdu zilaga ya, si, Ọ gēwere isi-ayi danyere onye-nwe-ya, bú Sọl." 
1Chronicles12:20 Mb͕e ọ nāla na Ziklag, ndia sitere na Manase danyere ya, bú Adna, na Jozabad, na Jediael, na Maikael, na Jozabad, na Elaihu, na Ziletai, bú ndi-isi usu nnù ndikom abua na ọgu iri ndi diri Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ndi ahu ye-kwa-ra Devid aka imegide usu ndi nāpunara madu ihe: n'ihi na ndi-dike bu dìnkpà ka ha nile bu, ha we buru ndi-isi n'usu-ndi-agha." 
1Chronicles12:22 N'ihi na mb͕e ahu ha nābiakute Devid kwa-ubọchi iyere ya aka, rue mb͕e ọ bu ọmuma-ulo-ikwū, dika ọmuma-ulo-ikwū Chineke." 
1Chronicles12:23 Ndia bu kwa ọnu-ọgugu ndi-isi nke ndi ejikere iso usu-ndi-agha; ha biakutere Devid nime Hebron ichighari ala-eze Sọl nye ya, dika okwu-ọnu Jehova si di." 
1Chronicles12:24 Umu Juda ndi nēbu ọta na ube di nnù iri-na-asa, ndi ejikere iso usu-ndi-agha." 
1Chronicles12:25 Site n'umu Simeon, ndi-dike bu dìnkpà iso usu-ndi-agha, nnù iri-na-asa na ọgu iri-na-ise." 
1Chronicles12:26 Site n'umu Livai, nnù iri-na-otù na ọgu iri." 
1Chronicles12:27 Jehoiada bu onye-ndú ndi Eron, nnù ndikom iteghete na ọgu ise so-kwa-ra ya;" 
1Chronicles12:28 na Zedok, bú nwa-okorọbia nke bu dike bu dìnkpà, na nke ulo nna-ya orú ndi-isi na abua." 
1Chronicles12:29 Site kwa n'umu Benjamin, bú umu-nne Sọl, nnù asa na ọgu iri: n'ihi na rue mb͕e ahu ndi ka n'ọnu-ọgugu nime ha nēdebe ihe-ndebe ulo Sọl." 
1Chronicles12:30 Site kwa n'umu Efraim, orú nnù uzọ abua na nnù iri-na-abua, ha bu ndi-dike bu dìnkpà, ndikom amara aha-ha n'ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha." 
1Chronicles12:31 Site kwa na nkera ebo Manase, orú nnù uzọ abua na nnù ise, ndi akpọrọ n'aha n'aha, ibia ime Devid eze." 
1Chronicles12:32 Site kwa n'umu Isaka, bú ndi mara nghọta bayere mb͕e ahu nile, imara ihe Israel gēme; ndi-isi-ha bu ọgu iri; umu-nne-ha nile nēme kwa dika okwu-ọnu-ha si di." 
1Chronicles12:33 Site na Zebulun, ndi nāpukuru usu-ndi-agha, ndi nēdo agha n'usoro, ndi chiri ihe-agha nile, orú nnù uzọ isi na nnù ise; ndi nēdo onwe-ha n'usoro, nēnweghi obi abua." 
1Chronicles12:34 Site kwa na Naftali, nnù ndi-isi abua na ọgu iri, orú nnù ndikom uzọ anọ na nnù iri-na-abua na ọgu iri so-kwa-ra ha nāchi uta na ube." 
1Chronicles12:35 Site kwa na ndi Dan, bú ndi nēdo agha n'usoro, orú nnù uzọ atọ na nnù iri-na-otù na ọgu iri." 
1Chronicles12:36 Site kwa n'Asha, bú ndi nāpukuru usu-ndi-agha ido agha n'usoro, orú nnù uzọ ise." 
1Chronicles12:37 Site kwa n'ofè Jọdan, site n'umu Reuben, na ndi Gad, na nkera ebo Manase, bú ndi nāchi ihe nile nke usu-ndi-agha iji bu agha, orú nnù uzọ iri-na-ise." 
1Chronicles12:38 Ndia nile, bú ndikom agha, ndi nēdo agha n'usoro, were obi zuru okè biarue Hebron, ime Devid eze Israel nile: ọzọ kwa, ndi Israel nile nke fọduru nwere otù obi ime Devid eze." 
1Chronicles12:39 Ha na Devid we nọ n'ebe ahu ubọchi atọ nēri ihe nāṅu kwa ihe-ọṅuṅu: n'ihi na umu-nne-ha doziri ha ihe. 
1Chronicles12:40 Ọzọ kwa, ndi bi ha nso, rue Isaka na Zebulun na Naftali, nēweta achicha n'elu inyinya-ibu na n'elu camel, na n'elu inyinya mule, na n'elu ehi, ihe-oriri nke utu ọka, na mbadamba fig, na uyọkọ nkpuru-vine amiri ami, na manya-vine, na manu, na ìgwè ehi, na ìgwè ewu na aturu n'uba: n'ihi na ọṅù di n'Israel." 
1Chronicles13:1 Devid we me ka ndi-isi usu nile nke nnù ndikom abua na ọgu iri na usu nile nke ọgu ndikom ise dua ya ọdu, bú onye-ndú ọ bula." 
1Chronicles13:2 Devid we si nkpọkọta nile nke Israel, Ọ buru na ọ di unu nma, ọ buru kwa na o sitere na Jehova, bú Chineke-ayi, ka ayi zisara umu-nne-ayi ozi n'ebe nile, bú ndi fọduru n'ala nile nke Israel, ha na ndi-nchu-àjà na ndi Livai ndi bi n'obodo ebe-ita-nri nile ha, ka ha we chikọta onwe-ha n'ebe ayi nọ:" 
1Chronicles13:3 ka ayi bughachi kwa ib͕e Chineke-ayi n'ebe ayi nọ: n'ihi na ayi achọghi ya n'ubọchi Sọl. 
1Chronicles13:4 Nkpọkọta ahu nile we si na ha gēme otú a: n'ihi na okwu ahu ziri ezi n'anya ndi Israel nile. 
1Chronicles13:5 Devid we kpọkọta Israel nile, site na Shaihoa nke Egypt we rue nbata Hemat, ime ka ib͕e Chineke si na Kiriat-jearim bia." 
1Chronicles13:6 Devid we rigo, ya na Israel nile, rue Beala, rue Kiriat-jearim, nke Juda nwere, isi n'ebe ahu bugota ib͕e Chineke, bú Jehova, Onye nānọkwasi cherubim, nke akpọkwasiri Aha ahu." 
1Chronicles13:7 Ha we me ka ub͕ọ-ala ọhu būru ib͕e Chineke, ha we buputa ya n'ulo Abinadab: Uza na Ahio we nēdu ub͕ọ-ala ahu." 
1Chronicles13:8 Devid na Israel nile nēwere ike-ha nile gba egwú n'iru Chineke, were kwa abù, were kwa ubọ-akwara, na une, na egwú-otiti, na ájà, na opì." 
1Chronicles13:9 Ha we biarue ebe-nzọcha-ọka Kidon, Uza we setia aka-ya ijide ib͕e ahu; n'ihi na ehi nāb͕a ukwu." 
1Chronicles13:10 Iwe Jehova we di ọku megide Uza, O we tib͕ue ya, n'ihi na o setiri aka-ya metu ib͕e ahu: o we nwua n'ebe ahu n'iru Chineke." 
1Chronicles13:11 Iwe Devid we di ọku, n'ihi na Jehova tiwaputara ntiwa megide Uza: o we kpọ ebe ahu Perez-uza, rue ta." 
1Chronicles13:12 Devid we tua egwu Chineke n'ubọchi ahu, si, M'gēsi aṅa me ka ib͕e Chineke biakutem?" 
1Chronicles13:13 Devid ewezugaghi kwa ib͕e ahu nye onwe-ya rue obodo Devid, ma o buzugara ya rue ulo Obed-edom, bú onye Gat." 
1Chronicles13:14 Ib͕e Chineke we nọdu n'ezi-na-ulo Obed-edom n'ulo-ya ọnwa atọ: Jehova we gọzie ulo Obed-edom na ihe nile o nwere. 
1Chronicles14:1 Hairam, bú eze Taia, we zigara Devid ndi-ozi, na osisi cedar, na ndi-ọ̀kà na nkume, na ndi-ọ̀kà n'osisi, iwuru Devid ulo." 
1Chronicles14:2 Devid we mara na Jehova emewo ya ka o guzosie ike ibu eze Israel, n'ihi na ebuliwo ala-eze-ya n'elu n'ihi ndi-Ya, bú Israel." 
1Chronicles14:3 Devid we kuru ndinyom ọzọ nime Jerusalem: Devid we mua umu-ndikom na umu-ndinyom ọzọ. 
1Chronicles14:4 Ndia bu kwa aha umu o nwere na Jerusalem; Shamua, na Shobab, na Netan, na Solomon;" 
1Chronicles14:5 na Ibha, na Elishua, na Elpelet;" 
1Chronicles14:6 na Noga, na Nefeg, na Jafia;" 
1Chronicles14:7 na Elishama, na Beeliada, na Elifelet." 
1Chronicles14:8 Ndi Filistia we nu na etere Devid manu ibu eze Israel nile, ndi Filistia nile we rigo ichọ Devid: Devid we nu ya, we pua n'iru ha." 
1Chronicles14:9 Ma ndi Filistia biara, nọdu na ndagwurugwu Refaim." 
1Chronicles14:10 Devid we jua Chineke ase, si, M'gārigo imegide ndi Filistia? Ì gēnye kwa ha n'akam? Jehova we si ya, Rigo; M'gēnye kwa ha n'aka-gi." 
1Chronicles14:11 Ha we rigorue Beal-perazim, Devid we tib͕ue ha n'ebe ahu; Devid we si, Jehova ekwopúwo megide ndi-irom site n'akam, dika nkwopú miri. N'ihi nka ka ha kpọrọ aha ebe ahu Beal-perazim." 
1Chronicles14:12 Ha we rapu chi nile ha n'ebe ahu; Devid we kwue, ewe sure ha n'ọku." 
1Chronicles14:13 Ndi Filistia we nọdu ọzọ na ndagwurugwu ahu. 
1Chronicles14:14 Devid we jua Chineke ase ọzọ; Chineke we si ya, Arigola iso ha: si n'ebe ha nọ ga buruburu, biakute ha na ncherita-iru osisi balsam." 
1Chronicles14:15 Ọ gēru kwa, mb͕e i nuru olu ikiti-ukwu n'elu osisi balsam ahu, mb͕e ahu ka i gāpu ibu agha: n'ihi na Chineke apuwo n'iru gi itib͕u ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ndi Filistia." 
1Chronicles14:16 Devid we me dika Chineke nyere ya iwu: ha we tib͕ue ọmuma-ulo-ikwū ndi Filistia site na Gibeon we rue Gezea. 
1Chronicles14:17 Aha Devid we pua jezue n'ala nile; Jehova we tiye ujọ-ya n'aru mba nile. 
1Chronicles15:1 Devid we mere onwe-ya ulo ufọdu n'obodo Devid; o we doziere ib͕e Chineke ọnọdu, we mara ya ulo-ikwū." 
1Chronicles15:2 Mb͕e ahu Devid siri, Ọ dighi onye gēbu ib͕e Chineke ma-ọbughi ndi Livai: n'ihi na ha ka Jehova rọputaworo ibū ib͕e Chineke, na ijere Ya ozi rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi." 
1Chronicles15:3 Devid we kpọkọta Israel nile ibiaru Jerusalem, ibugota ib͕e Jehova rue ọnọdu-ya, nke o doziri nye ya." 
1Chronicles15:4 Devid we chikọta umu Eron na ndi Livai: 
1Chronicles15:5 nke umu Kohat; Uriel, bú onye-isi, na umu-nne-ya, ọgu ndikom isi:" 
1Chronicles15:6 nke umu Merari; Asaia, bú onye-isi, na umu-nne-ya, ọgu ndikom iri-na-otù:" 
1Chronicles15:7 nke umu Giashom; Joel, bú onye-isi, na umu-nne-ya, ọgu ndikom isi na iri:" 
1Chronicles15:7 nke umu Giashom; Joel, bú onye-isi, na umu-nne-ya, ọgu ndikom isi na iri:" 
1Chronicles15:8 nke umu Elizafan; Shemaia, bú onye-isi, na umu-nne-ya, ọgu ndikom iri:" 
1Chronicles15:9 nke umu Hebron; Eliel, bú onye-isi, na umu-nne-ya, ọgu ndikom anọ:" 
1Chronicles15:10 nke umu Uziel; Aminadab, bú onye-isi, na umu-nne-ya, ọgu ndikom ise na iri na abua." 
1Chronicles15:11 Devid we kpọ Zedok, kpọ kwa Abaiata, bú ndi-nchu-àjà, kpọ kwa ndi Livai, bú Uriel, na Asaia, na Joel, na Shemaia, na Eliel, na Aminadab," 
1Chronicles15:11 Devid we kpọ Zedok, kpọ kwa Abaiata, bú ndi-nchu-àjà, kpọ kwa ndi Livai, bú Uriel, na Asaia, na Joel, na Shemaia, na Eliel, na Aminadab," 
1Chronicles15:12 si ha, Unu onwe-unu bu ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna ndi Livai: donu onwe-unu nsọ, unu onwe-unu na umu-nne-unu, ka unu we bugota ib͕e Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, rue ebe m'doziri nye ya." 
1Chronicles15:13 N'ihi na ọ bughi unu onwe-unu būru ya na mbu, n'ihi ya ka Jehova, bú Chineke-ayi, tiwaputara megide ayi, n'ihi na ayi achọghi Ya dika ikpé-Ya si di." 
1Chronicles15:14 Ndi-nchu-àjà na ndi Livai we do onwe-ha nsọ ibugota ib͕e Jehova, bú Chineke Israel." 
1Chronicles15:15 Umu ndi Livai we were nkpa-n'aka-ya abua būru ib͕e Chineke n'ubu-ha n'elu ha, dika Moses nyere iwu, dika okwu Jehova si di." 
1Chronicles15:16 Devid we si ndi-isi ndi Livai ka ha me umu-nne-ha, bú ndi-ọbù-abù, ka ha guzo chiri ihe abù, bú une, na ubọ-akwara, na ájà, nēme ka anu udà-ha, iweli olu n'elu n'ihi ọṅù." 
1Chronicles15:17 Ndi Livai we guzo Himan nwa Joel; na site n'umu-nne-ya, Esaf nwa Berekaia; na site n'umu Merari, bú umu-nne-ha, Itan nwa Kushaia;" 
1Chronicles15:17 Ndi Livai we guzo Himan nwa Joel; na site n'umu-nne-ya, Esaf nwa Berekaia; na site n'umu Merari, bú umu-nne-ha, Itan nwa Kushaia;" 
1Chronicles15:18 tiye-kwa-ra ha umu-nne-ha, bú ndi nke usoro nke-abua, Zekaraia, na Ben, na Jaaziel, na Shemiramot, na Jehiel, na Uni, na Elaiab, na Benaia, na Maaseia, na Matitaia, na Elifelehu, na Mikneia, na Obed-edom, na Jeiel, bú ndi-ọnu-uzọ-ama." 
1Chronicles15:19 Na ndi-ọbù-abù, bú Himan, na Esaf, na Itan, chiri ájà ọla ime ka anu udà-ha;" 
1Chronicles15:20 na Zekaraia, na Aziel, na Shemiramot, na Jehiel, na Uni, na Elaiab, na Maaseia, na Benaia, chiri une nke dabàra n'olu umu-ab͕ọghọ;" 
1Chronicles15:21 na Matitaia, na Elifelehu, na Mikneia, na Obed-edom, na Jeiel, na Azazaia, chiri ubọ-akwara nke dabàra n'octave, ibu ndi-isi nke ndi-abù." 
1Chronicles15:22 Ma Kenania, bú onye-isi ndi Livai, bu isi n'ibū ibu ahu: ọ dọrọ aka na nti n'ibū ibu ahu, n'ihi na onye nwere nghọta ka ọ bu." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekaia na Elkena bu ndi-ọnu-uzọ-ama diri ib͕e ahu. 
1Chronicles15:24 Shebania, na Joshafat, na Netanel, na Amasai, na Zekaraia, na Benaia, na Elieza, bú ndi-nchu-àjà, nāfù opì n'iru ib͕e Chineke: Obed-edom na Jehia bu ndi-ọnu-uzọ-ama diri ib͕e ahu." 
1Chronicles15:25 Devid, na ndi-okenye Israel, na ndi-isi usu nnù ndikom abua na ọgu iri, we nēje iwere ọṅù si n'ulo Obed-edom bugota ib͕e ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Jehova:" 
1Chronicles15:26 o rue, mb͕e Chineke yere ndi Livai ndi nēbu ib͕e ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Jehova aka, na ha churu oke-ehi asa na ebulu asa n'àjà." 
1Chronicles15:27 Ewere kwa uwe-nwuda nke ezi ákwà ọcha ke Devid ekike, ya na ndi Livai nile ndi nēbu ib͕e ahu, na ndi-ọbù-abù, na Kenania, bú onye-isi n'ibū ibu ahu tiyere ndi-ọbù-abù: ephod ákwà ọcha di kwa n'aru Devid." 
1Chronicles15:28 Israel nile we were iti-nkpu, were kwa olu opì-ike, chiri kwa opì, na ájà, nēbugota ibe ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Jehova, nēwere une na ubọ-akwara me ka anu udà-ha." 
1Chronicles15:29 O rue, mb͕e ib͕e ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Jehova biaruru obodo Devid, na Maikal nwa-nwayi Sọl lepuru anya na window, hu eze, bú Devid, ka ọ nāwuli, nēgwu kwa egwú; o we leda ya anya n'obi-ya." 
1Chronicles16:1 Ha we bubata ib͕e Chineke, guzo ya n'etiti ulo-ikwū nke Devid mara nye ya: ha we weta nso àjà-nsure-ọku na àjà-udo n'iru Chineke." 
1Chronicles16:2 Devid we surebìe àjà-nsure-ọku ahu na àjà-udo nile, gọzie ndi Israel n'aha Jehova." 
1Chronicles16:3 Ọ we kesara madu ọ bula n'Israel, ma nwoke ma nwayi, madu ọ bula, otù ob͕e achicha, na otù ọkpurukpu anu, na otù mbadamba nkpuru-vine amiri ami." 
1Chronicles16:4 O we tiye ufọdu nime ndi Livai n'iru ib͕e Jehova, bú ndi nēje ozi, ọbuná ime ka echeta na ikele na ito Jehova, bú Chineke Israel:" 
1Chronicles16:5 ha bu: Esaf, bú onye-isi, na Zekaraia, bú onye nke-abua ya, na Jeiel, na Shemiramot, na Jehiel, na Matitaia, na Elaiab, na Benaia, na Obede-edom, na Jeiel, chiri une na ubọ-akwara; Esaf nēwere kwa ájà me ka anu udà-ha;" 
1Chronicles16:6 Benaia na Jehaziel, bú ndi-nchu-àjà, nāchiri kwa opì mb͕e nile, n'iru ib͕e ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Chineke." 
1Chronicles16:7 Mb͕e ahu, n'ubọchi ahu, Devid buru uzọ nye iwu ikele Jehova, site n'aka Esaf na umu-nne-ya." 
1Chronicles16:8 Kelenu Jehova, kpọkuenu aha-Ya; Menu ka amara omume-Ya nile n'etiti ndi nile n'uwa." 
1Chronicles16:9 Bùkuenu Ya abù, bùkuenu Ya abù ọma; Tugharinu uche n'oké ọlu-Ya nile." 
1Chronicles16:10 Nētonu onwe-unu n'aha nsọ Ya: Ka obi ndi nāchọ Jehova ṅuria. 
1Chronicles16:11 Nāchọnu Jehova na ike-Ya; Chọnu iru-Ya mb͕e nile. 
1Chronicles16:12 Chetanu oké ọlu-Ya nile nke Ọ luworo; Ihe-ebube-Ya nile, na ikpé nile nke ọnu-Ya;" 
1Chronicles16:13 Unu nkpuru Israel, bú orù-Ya, Umu Jekob, ndi-Ya arọputara." 
1Chronicles16:14 Ya onwe-ya bu Jehova, bú Chineke-ayi: N'uwa nile ka ikpé-Ya nile di." 
1Chronicles16:15 Chetanu ọb͕ub͕a-ndu-Ya rue mb͕e ebighi ebi, Okwu O nyere nnù ọb͕ọ abua na ọgu iri n'iwu;" 
1Chronicles16:16 Ọb͕ub͕a-ndu nke Ya na Abraham b͕ara, Na iyi-Ya Ọ ṅuru Aisak;" 
1Chronicles16:17 O we me ka o guzoro Jekob ibu ukpuru, Ka o guzoro Israel ibu ọb͕ub͕a-ndu ebighi-ebi:" 
1Chronicles16:18 Si, Gi ka M'gēnye ala Kenean, Bú ala-nketa-unu eji udọ̀ tùa:" 
1Chronicles16:19 Mb͕e unu bu ndikom ole-na-ole; E, nání madu ole-na-ole, na ndi-ọbìa nime ya;" 
1Chronicles16:20 Ha we nējeghari si n'otù mba jerue mba ọzọ, Si n'otù ala-eze jerue ndi ọzọ." 
1Chronicles16:21 O kweghi ka nwoke ọ bula meb͕ue ha; O we bara ndi-eze nba n'ihi ha; 
1Chronicles16:22 Si, Unu emetula ndim etere manu aka, Unu emejo-kwa-la ndi-amumam." 
1Chronicles16:23 Bùkuenu Jehova abù, unu uwa nile; Nēzisanu ozi nzọputa-Ya site n'otù ubọchi rue ubọchi ọzọ." 
1Chronicles16:24 Kọsanu akukọ nsọpuru-Ya n'etiti mba nile, Akukọ oké ọlu-Ya nile n'etiti ndi nile di iche iche." 
1Chronicles16:25 N'ihi na Jehova di uku, buru kwa onye anēto nke-uku: Onye anātu egwu Ya ka Ọ bu kwa n'elu chi nile." 
1Chronicles16:26 N'ihi na chi nile nke ndi nile di iche iche bu ihe-efu: Ma Jehova mere elu-igwe. 
1Chronicles16:27 Ebube na ima-nma di n'iru Ya: Ike na ọṅù di n'ebe-Ya. 
1Chronicles16:28 Nyenu Jehova, unu ab͕uru nke ndi nile di iche iche, Nyenu Jehova nsọpuru na ike." 
1Chronicles16:29 Nyenu Jehova nsọpuru aha-Ya: Butenu onyinye-inata-iru-ọma, bia n'iru Ya: Kpọnu isi ala nye Jehova n'ima-nma nke idi-nsọ." 
1Chronicles16:30 Ka o nēb͕u unu nb͕u site n'iru Ya, unu elu-uwa nile: Ọzọ, elu-uwa dum madu bi nēguzosi ike, adighi-ewezuga ya n'ọnọdu-ya." 
1Chronicles16:31 Ka elu-igwe ṅuria, ka uwa teghari kwa egwú ọṅù; Ka ha si kwa n'etiti mba nile, Jehova bu eze." 
1Chronicles16:32 Ka oké osimiri bib͕ọ, ya na ùjú-ya; Ka obi tọ ọhia utọ, ya na ihe nile nke di nime ya;" 
1Chronicles16:33 Mb͕e ahu osisi nile nke oké ọhia gēti nkpu ọṅù n'iru Jehova, N'ihi na Ọ biawo ikpe uwa ikpe." 
1Chronicles16:34 Kelenu Jehova; n'ihi na Ọ di nma: N'ihi na rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi ka ebere-Ya di. 
1Chronicles16:35 Si-kwa-nu, Zọputa ayi, Chineke nzọputa-ayi, Chikọta kwa ayi, naputa ayi n'aka mba nile, Ikele aha nsọ Gi, Na inya isi n'otuto-Gi." 
1Chronicles16:36 Onye agọziri agọzi ka Jehova, bú Chineke nke Israel, bu, Site na mb͕e ebighi-ebi we rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi. Ndi Israel nile we si, Amen, ha we to Jehova." 
1Chronicles16:37 O we rapu n'ebe ahu, n'iru ib͕e ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Jehova, Esaf na umu-nne-ya, ije ozi n'iru ib͕e ahu mb͕e nile, dika ihe ubọchi n'ubọchi-ya si di:" 
1Chronicles16:38 na Obed-edom na umu-nne-ha, ọgu ndikom atọ na asatọ; na Obed-edom nwa Jedutun, na Hosa, ibu ndi-ọnu-uzọ-ama:" 
1Chronicles16:39 na Zedok, bú onye-nchu-àjà, na umu-nne-ya, bú ndi-nchu-àjà, n'iru ebe-obibi Jehova n'ebe di elu nke di na Gibeon," 
1Chronicles16:40 isurere Jehova àjà-nsure-ọku n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà nke àjà-nsure-ọku mb͕e nile n'ututu na n'anyasi, ọbuná dika ihe nile si di nke edeworo n'iwu Jehova, nke O nyere Israel n'iwu;" 
1Chronicles16:41 ha na Himan na Jedutun, na ndi fọduru nime ndi arọputara arọputa, ndi akpọrọ n'aha n'aha, ikele Jehova, n'ihi na rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi ka ebere-Ya di;" 
1Chronicles16:42 ha na Himan na Jedutun, ndi chiri opì na ájà inye ndi nēme ka anu udà-ha, chiri kwa ihe abù Chineke: na umu Jedutun, inọ n'ọnu-uzọ-ama." 
1Chronicles16:43 Ndi Israel nile we la, nwoke ọ bula n'ulo-ya: Devid we lata igọzi ulo-ya." 
1Chronicles17:1 O rue, mb͕e Devid biri n'ulo-ya, na Devid siri Netan, bú onye-amuma, Le, mu onwem nēbi n'ulo cedar, ma ib͕e ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Jehova nēbi n'okpuru ákwà-nkwuba." 
1Chronicles17:2 Netan we si Devid, Ihe nile nke di n'obi-gi, me ya; n'ihi na Chineke nọyere gi." 
1Chronicles17:3 O rue, n'abali ahu, na okwu Chineke ruru Netan nti, si," 
1Chronicles17:4 Je, si Devid, bú orùm, Otú a ka Jehova siri, Gi onwe-gi agaghi-ewurum ulo ibu ebe M'gēbi:" 
1Chronicles17:5 n'ihi na ebighm n'ulo site n'ubọchi M'mere ka Israel rigota, rue ta; kama esim n'otù ulo-ikwū ba n'ulo-ikwū ọzọ, si kwa n'otù ebe-obibi ba n'ebe-obibi ọzọ." 
1Chronicles17:6 N'ebe nile nke M'nējeghari n'etiti Israel nile, ọ̀ di okwu M'gwara otù nime ndi-ikpe Israel, nke M'nyere iwu izù ndim, si, N'ìhi gini ka unu nēwurughm ulo cedar?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Ma ub͕u a otú a ka i gāsi orùm, bú Devid, Otú a ka Jehova nke usu nile nke ndi-agha siri, Mu onwem siri n'ebe-ita-nri anu-ulo, si kwa n'ebe i nēso ìgwè ewu na aturu, kuru gi, ka i buru onye-ndú ndim, bú Israel:" 
1Chronicles17:8 M'we nọyere gi n'ebe ọ bula i jere, ebipu-kwa-ram ndi-iro-gi nile n'iru gi; M'gēme-kwa-ra gi aha, dika aha ndi uku ndi nọ n'uwa." 
1Chronicles17:9 M'gēdo-kwa-ra ndim, bú Israel, otù ebe, ku kwa ha dika osisi, ka ha we biri n'ọnọdu-ha, ghara ima jijiji ọzọ; umu ajọ omume agaghi-eme kwa ha ọzọ ka ha nāka nká ngwa ngwa, dika na mbu," 
1Chronicles17:10 na dika site n'ubọchi mb͕e M'nyere ndi-ikpe iwu ibu ndi-isi ndim, bú Israel: emewokwam ka ndi-iro-gi nile ruru ala. Anamegosi kwa gi na Jehova gēwuru gi ulo." 
1Chronicles17:11 Ọ gēru kwa, mb͕e ubọchi-gi zuru ijeso nna-gi-hà, na M'gēme ka o bilie, bú nkpuru-gi nke gānọchi gi, onye gēsite n'umu-gi ndikom; M'gēme kwa ka ala-eze-ya guzosie ike." 
1Chronicles17:12 Onye ahu gēwurum ulo, M'gēme kwa ka oche-eze-ya guzosie ike rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi." 
1Chronicles17:13 Mu onwem gāburu ya nna, ya onwe-ya gābu-kwa-ram nwa: M'gaghi-ewezuga kwa eberem n'ebe ọ nọ, dika M'wezugara ya n'ebe ọ nọ, bú onye buru gi uzọ:" 
1Chronicles17:14 ma M'gēme ka o nēguzo n'ulom na n'ala-ezem rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi: agēme kwa ka oche-eze-ya buru ihe guzosiri ike rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi. 
1Chronicles17:15 Dika okwu ndia nile si di, na dika ọhù a nile si di, otú a ka Netan gwara Devid okwu." 
1Chronicles17:16 Devid, bú eze, we ba, nọdu ala n'iru Jehova; ọ si, Ònye ka m'bu, Jehova, bú Chineke, gini kwa ka ulom bu, na I mewo ka m'biarue na mb͕e a?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Ma nka bu ihe ntà n'anya-gi, Chineke; I we kwue okwu bayere ulo orù-Gi rue mb͕e di anya, I huwokwam dika ọnọdu nke madu nọ n'elu si di, Jehova, bú Chineke." 
1Chronicles17:18 Gini ka Devid gāgwa kwa Gi ọzọ bayere nsọpuru orù-Gi? n'ihi na Gi onwe-gi mara orù-Gi. 
1Chronicles17:19 Jehova, n'ihi orù-Gi, na dika obi-Gi si di, ka I meworo ihe-idi-uku a nile, ime ka amara ihe uku ndia nile." 
1Chronicles17:20 Jehova, ọ dighi onye di ka Gi, ọ dighi kwa Chineke ma-ọbughi Gi, dika ihe nile si di nke ayi nuworo na nti-ayi." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ma òle mba di ka ndi-Gi, bú Israel, nke bu otù mba nke nēguzo iche n'uwa, nke Chineke jere ib͕aputara Onwe-ya ibu otù ndi, imere Onwe-gi aha site n'ihe-idi-uku na ihe di egwu, ichupu mba di iche iche n'iru ndi-Gi, ndi I siri n'Ijipt b͕aputa?" 
1Chronicles17:22 I we doro Onwe-gi ndi-Gi, bú Israel, ibu otù ndi rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi; Gi onwe-gi, Jehova, we ghọrọ ha Chineke." 
1Chronicles17:23 Ma ub͕u a, Jehova, okwu ahu nke I kwuworo bayere orù-Gi, baye-kwa-ra ulo-ya, ka eme ya ka o guzosie ike rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi, Gi me kwa dika I kwuworo." 
1Chronicles17:24 Ka eme kwa ka ọ buru ihe kwesiri ntukwasi-obi, ka aha-Gi di kwa uku rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi, si, Jehova nke usu nile nke ndi-agha, bú Chineke Israel, bu Chineke Israel nwere: agēme kwa ka ulo Devid, bú orù-Gi, guzosie ike n'iru Gi." 
1Chronicles17:25 N'ihi na Gi onwe-gi, Chinekem, ekpughewo nti orù-Gi, si na I gēwuru ya ulo: n'ihi nka orù-Gi nwetara obi-ike ikpe ekpere n'iru Gi." 
1Chronicles17:26 Ma ub͕u a, Jehova, Gi onwe-gi bu Chineke onwe-ya, I gwawo kwa orù-Gi ezi ihe a:" 
1Chronicles17:27 ma ub͕u a I kwerewo igọzi ulo orù-Gi, ka o we dirue mb͕e ebighi-ebi n'iru Gi: n'ihi na Gi onwe-gi, Jehova, agọziwo, o we buru ihe agọziri agọzi rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi." 
1Chronicles18:1 O rue, mb͕e nka gasiri, na Devid tib͕uru ndi Filistia, me kwa ka ha ruru ala, o we nara n'aka ndi Filistia Gat na umu-obodo-ya." 
1Chronicles18:2 O tib͕u-kwa-ra Moab; Moab we ghọrọ Devid ndi-orù, nēbute onyinye-inata-iru-ọma." 
1Chronicles18:3 Devid tib͕u-kwa-ra Hedareza, bú eze Zoba, rue Hemat, mb͕e o nēje ime ka ike-ya guzo n'akuku osimiri Yufretis." 
1Chronicles18:4 Devid we napu n'aka-ya nnù ub͕ọ-ala abua na ọgu iri, na nnù ndi-inyinya iri-na-asa na ọgu iri, na orú nnù ndikom uzọ abua na nnù iri, bú ndi ji ukwu eje: Devid bipu-kwa-ra nkwonkwo-ukwu inyinya ub͕ọ-ala nile, ma o kwere ka ọgu inyinya ub͕ọ-ala ise fọdu n'etiti ha." 
1Chronicles18:5 Siria Damaskọs we bia iyere Hedareza, bú eze Zoba, aka, Devid we tib͕ue n'etiti ndi Siria orú nnù ndikom uzọ abua na nnù iri-na-ise." 
1Chronicles18:6 Devid we tiye ebe-nguzo-ndi-agha nime Siria Damaskọs; Siria we ghọrọ Devid ndi-orù, nēbute onyinye-inata-iru-ọma. Jehova we nāzọputa Devid ebe ọ bula o jere." 
1Chronicles18:7 Devid we chiri ọta ọla-edo nke dikwasiri ndi-orù Hedareza, chita ha na Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles18:8 Devid we si na Tibhat, si kwa na Kun, bú obodo Hedareza, chiri ọtutu ọla nke-uku, nke Solomon ji me oké osimiri ọla ahu, na ogidi nile, na ihe ọla nile." 
1Chronicles18:9 Tou, bú eze Hemat, we nu na Devid etib͕uwo usu-ndi-agha nile nke Hedareza, bú eze Zoba;" 
1Chronicles18:10 o we zìe Hadoram nwa-ya jekuru eze, bú Devid, iju ya ajuju bayere udo-ya, na igọzi ya, n'ihi na o busoworo Hedareza agha, we tib͕ue ya; n'ihi na nwoke nke nēbuso Tou agha nke-uku ka Hedareza bu; ihe nile nke ọla-edo na nke ọla-ọcha na nke ọla di kwa n'aka Hadoram." 
1Chronicles18:11 Ihe ndia ka eze, bú Devid, do-kwa-ra nsọ nye Jehova, tiyere ọla-ọcha na ọla-edo ahu nke o butere site na mba nile; site n'Edom, site kwa na Moab, site kwa n'umu Amon, site kwa na ndi Filistia, site kwa n'Amalek." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abishai nwa Zeruaia tib͕u-kwa-ra Edom nime Ndagwurugwu Nnù. orú nnù ndikom uzọ abua na nnù ise. 
1Chronicles18:13 O we tiye ebe-nguzo-ndi-agha n'Edom; Edom nile we ghọrọ Devid ndi-orù. Jehova we nāzọputa Devid ebe ọ bula o jere. 
1Chronicles18:14 Devid we buru eze Israel nile; o we nēmere ndi-ya nile ihe ekpere m'ikpe na ezi omume. 
1Chronicles18:15 Joab nwa Zeruaia bu onye-isi usu-ndi-agha; Jehoshafat nwa Ahailud bu onye-ncheta. 
1Chronicles18:16 Zedok nwa Ahaitub, na Abimelek nwa Abaiata, bu ndi-nchu-àjà; Shavsha bu ode-akwukwọ;" 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaia nwa Jehoiada bu onye-isi ndi Keret na ndi Pelet; umu-ndikom Devid bu ndi-isi n'aka eze. 
1Chronicles19:1 O rue, mb͕e ihe a gasiri, na Nehash, bú eze umu Amon, nwuru, nwa-ya we buru eze n'ọnọdu ya." 
1Chronicles19:2 Devid we si, M'gēmere Hanun nwa Nehash ebere, n'ihi na nna-ya merem ebere. Devid we ziga ndi-ozi ikasi ya obi bayere nna-ya. Ndi-orù Devid we ba n'ala umu Amon jekuru Hanun, ikasi ya obi." 
1Chronicles19:3 Ma ndi-isi umu Amon siri Hanun, Devid, ọ̀ nāsọpuru nna-gi n'anya-gi, na o ziteworo gi ndi-nkasi-obi? ọ̀ bughi ileputa ala-ayi, na ikwatu ya, na iledo ya, ka ndi-orù-ya biakutere gi?" 
1Chronicles19:4 Hanun we were ndi-orù Devid, kọpu ha afu-ọnu, bipu kwa uwe-nwuda-ha n'etiti, rue otule-ha, we zilaga ha." 
1Chronicles19:5 Ewe je gosi Devid ihe bayere ndikom ahu. O we ziga izute ha; n'ihi na ihere nēme ndikom ahu nke-uku. Eze we si, Nọdunu na Jeriko rue mb͕e afu-ọnu-unu tolitere, mb͕e ahu ka unu gālata." 
1Chronicles19:6 Umu Amon we hu na ha emewo onwe-ha ka ha nēsi Devid ísì ọjọ, Hanun na umu Amon we ziga nnù talent ọla-ọcha abua na ọgu iri igotara onwe-ha ub͕ọ-ala na ndi-inyinya site na Mesọpọtemia, site kwa na Siria Meaka, site kwa na Zoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Ha we gotara onwe-ha orú nnù ub͕ọ-ala uzọ anọ, na eze Meaka na ndi-ya; ha we bia ma ulo-ikwū-ha n'iru Medeba. Umu Amon si-kwa-ra n'obodo nile ha chikọta onwe-ha, bia ibu agha." 
1Chronicles19:8 Devid we nu ya, ziga Joab, na usu-ndi-agha nile, bú ndi-dike." 
1Chronicles19:9 Umu Amon we puta, do agha n'usoro n'ọnu-uzọ obodo: ma ndi-eze ndi biara nọrọ onwe-ha n'ọhia." 
1Chronicles19:10 Joab we hu na iru agha ahu di megide ya iru na azu, o we rọputa ufọdu n'etiti ndi Israel nile arọputara arọputa, do ha n'usoro izute Siria." 
1Chronicles19:11 O tiye ndi Israel fọduru n'aka Abishai, bú nwa-nne-ya, ha we do onwe-ha n'usoro izute umu Amon." 
1Chronicles19:12 Ọ si, Ọ buru na Siria akariam ike, i gābu-kwa-ram onye-nzọputa: ma ọ buru na umu Amon akaria gi ike, m'gāzọputa kwa gi." 
1Chronicles19:13 Di ike, ka ayi me kwa onwe-ayi ndi di ike n'ihi ndi-ayi, na n'ihi obodo nile nke Chineke-ayi: Jehova me kwa ihe di nma n'anya-Ya." 
1Chronicles19:14 Joab na ndi soro ya we biarue nso n'iru ndi Siria ibu agha; ha we b͕alaga n'iru ya. 
1Chronicles19:15 Umu Amon we hu na Siria ab͕alagawo, ha onwe-ha we b͕alaga kwa n'iru Abishai nwa-nne-ya, ba n'obodo. Joab we biarue Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles19:16 Siria we hu na etib͕uru ha n'iru Israel, ha we ziga ndi-ozi, me ka Siria ndi nọ n'ofè Osimiri puta, Shofak onye-isi usu-ndi-agha Hedareza je-kwa-ra n'iru ha." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ewe gosi Devid; o we chikọta Israel nile, gabiga Jọdan, biakute ha, do agha n'usoro megide ha. Devid we do ndi-ya n'usoro izute Siria, ha we buso ya agha." 
1Chronicles19:18 Siria we b͕alaga n'iru Israel; Devid we b͕ue n'etiti ndi Siria ndikom nke nnù ub͕ọ-ala iri-na-asa na ọgu iri, na orú nnù ndikom uzọ ise, bú ndi ji ukwu eje, o me-kwa-ra ka Shofak, bú onye-isi usu-ndi-agha-ha, nwua." 
1Chronicles19:19 Ndi-orù Hedareza we hu na etib͕uru ha n'iru Israel, ha we me ka ha onwe-ha na Devid di n'udo, we fè ya òfùfè: Siria ekweghi kwa izọputa umu Amon ọzọ." 
1Chronicles20:1 O rue, na mb͕e ọb͕ub͕a arọ, na mb͕e ndi-eze nāpu ibu agha, na Joab dupuru ndi-dìnkpà nke usu-ndi-agha, bibie ala umu Amon, bia, nọchigide Raba n'agha. Ma Devid nānọdu na Jerusalem. Joab we tib͕ue Raba, kwada kwa ya." 
1Chronicles20:2 Devid we kpupu okpu-eze nke eze-ha n'isi-ya, we hu na o ruru otù talent ọla-edo n'ọtùtù, nkume di okè ọnu-ahia di kwa nime ya; o we di n'isi Devid: o weputa-kwa-ra ihe-nkwata obodo ahu, nke riri nne nke-uku." 
1Chronicles20:3 O me-kwa-ra ka ndi nọ nime ya puta, o do ha n'okpuru mma-nkwọ, na n'okpuru ígwè nēbì ihe, na n'okpuru anyu-ike. Otù a ka Devid nēme kwa obodo nile nke umu Amon. Devid na ndi Israel nile we lata na Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles20:4 O rue, mb͕e ihe a gasiri, na agha biliri na Gezea nke ebusoro ndi Filistia: mb͕e ahu Sibekai onye Husha tib͕uru Sipai, nke sitere n'umu Rafa: ewe me ka ha ruru ala." 
1Chronicles20:5 Agha we di ọzọ ebusoro ndi Filistia; Elhanam nwa Jaia we tib͕ue Lahmi, bú nwa-nne Gọlaiat onye Gat, onye osisi ube-ya di ka oké ókpòrò di arọ́ nke ọkpa-ákwà ji akpa ákwà." 
1Chronicles20:6 Agha we di ọzọ na Gat, ma otù nwoke toro ogologo nọ n'ebe ahu, nkpisi aka-ya abua di isi isi, nkpisi ukwu-ya abua di kwa isi isi, ha nile di orú na anọ; ma amu-kwa-ra onye ahu nye Rafa." 
1Chronicles20:7 Ọ ta Israel uta, Jonatan nwa Shimea, bú nwa-nne Devid, we tib͕ue ya." 
1Chronicles20:8 Ndia ka amuru nye Rafa nime Gat; ha we da site n'aka Devid, na site n'aka ndi-orù-ya." 
1Chronicles21:1 Setan we guzo imegide Israel, o we kpalie Devid iguta Israel." 
1Chronicles21:2 Devid we si Joab, si kwa ndi-isi ndi Israel, Jenu, gua Israel ọnu site na Bia-sheba we rue Dan; wetaranum ọnu-ọgugu-ha ka m'we mara ya." 
1Chronicles21:3 Joab we si, Ka Jehova tukwasiri ndi-Ya, ka iba-uba ha bara ra, otù onye ọgu ise otù onye ọgu ise: onye-nwem, bú eze, hà abughi ndi-orù onye-nwem nwere, ha nile? n'ìhi gini ka onye-nwem nāchọ ihe a? n'ìhi gini ka ọ gāghọrọ Israel ihe-ikpe-ọmuma?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Ma okwu eze di ike n'ebe Joab nọ. Joab we pua, jegharia n'Israel nile, biarue Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles21:5 Joab we nye Devid ọnu-ọgugu nke ngukọta ọ gukọtara ndi Israel. Israel nile we di orú nnù ndikom ọgu uzọ isi na uzọ iri-na-asa na nnù iri, ndi nāmiputa mma-agha: Juda di kwa orú nnù ndikom ọgu uzọ abua na uzọ iri-na-asatọ na nnù iri-na-ise, ndi nāmiputa mma-agha." 
1Chronicles21:6 Ma ọ gukọtaghi Livai na Benjamin n'etiti ha: n'ihi na okwu eze bu ihe-árú n'anya Joab. 
1Chronicles21:7 Ọ we jọ njọ n'anya Chineke bayere okwu a, O we tib͕ue Israel." 
1Chronicles21:8 Devid we si Chineke, Emehiewom nke-uku n'ihe a m'meworo: ma ub͕u a, biko, me ka ajọ omume orù-Gi gabiga; n'ihi na emewom ihe-nzuzu nke-uku." 
1Chronicles21:9 Jehova we gwa Gad, bú onye-ọhu-uzọ nke Devid, okwu, si," 
1Chronicles21:10 Je gwa Devid okwu, si, Otú a ka Jehova siri, Ihe atọ ka Mu onwem nēche n'iru gi; rọputara onwe-gi otù nime ha, ka M'we me gi ya." 
1Chronicles21:11 Gad we biakute Devid, si ya, Otú a ka Jehova siri, Nara n'onwe-gi otù n'ihe ndia;" 
1Chronicles21:12 ma ọ bu oké unwu arọ atọ; ma-ọbu ka ekpochapu gi ọnwa atọ n'iru ndi nākpab͕u gi, ọbuná mma-agha ndi-iro-gi nēru gi aru; ma-ọbu mma-agha Jehova ubọchi atọ, bú ajọ ọria nēfe efe n'ala, mọ-ozi nke Jehova nēbibi kwa n'ókè-ala nile nke Israel. Ma ub͕u a le okwu m'gēweghachiri Onye nēzitem." 
1Chronicles21:13 Devid we si Gad, Anọm na nkpà nke-uku: biko ka m'dabà n'aka Jehova; n'ihi na obi-ebere-Ya bara uba nke-uku: ma ka m'ghara idabà n'aka madu." 
1Chronicles21:14 Jehova we tiye ajọ ọria nēfe efe n'aru Israel: orú nnù ndikom uzọ asatọ na nnù iri-na-ise we dapu n'Israel. 
1Chronicles21:15 Chineke we ziga mọ-ozi na Jerusalem ibibi ya: ma mb͕e ọ gaje ibibi, Jehova huru, we chègharia n'ihe ọjọ ahu, we si mọ-ozi ahu nke nēbibi, O zuwo; ub͕u a ra aka-gi. Ma mọ-ozi nke Jehova nēguzo n'akuku ebe-nzọcha-ọka nke Ọnan onye Jebus." 
1Chronicles21:16 Devid we welie anya-ya, hu mọ-ozi nke Jehova, ka o nēguzo n'etiti ala na elu-igwe, ya na mma-agha-ya amiputara amiputa n'aka-ya, nke esetiri n'elu Jerusalem. Devid na ndi-okenye we kpuru ákwà-nkpe da kpuchie iru-ha n'ala." 
1Chronicles21:17 Devid we si Chineke, Ọ̀ bughi mu onwem siri ka aguta ndi Israel? ọbuná mu onwem ka ọ bu, bú onye mehieworo, me kwa ihe ọjọ nke-uku; ma ìgwè aturu ndia, gini ka ha mere? biko, Jehova, bú Chinekem, ka aka-Gi digidem, digide kwa ulo nnam; ma ka ọ ghara idigide ndi-Gi, ka etie ha ihe-otiti." 
1Chronicles21:18 Mọ-ozi nke Jehova we si Gad ka ọ si Devid ka Devid rigo, me ka ebe-ichu-àjà guzoro Jehova n'ebe-nzọcha-ọka nke Ọnan onye Jebus." 
1Chronicles21:19 Devid we rigo n'okwu Gad nke o kwuru n'aha Jehova. 
1Chronicles21:20 Ọnan we chigharia, hu mọ-ozi ahu; umu-ya ndikom anọ ndi ya na ha nọ we nēzo onwe-ha. Ma Ọnan nāzọcha ọka wheat." 
1Chronicles21:21 Devid we biakute Ọnan, Ọnan we legide anya, hu Devid, si n'ebe-nzọcha-ọka-ya puta, kpọ isi ala nye Devid, kpuchie iru-ya n'ala." 
1Chronicles21:22 Devid we si Ọnan, Nyem ebe a, bú ebe-nzọcha-ọka nka, ka m'we wuere Jehova ebe-ichu-àjà nime ya: n'ego zuru ezu o ruru ka i gēnyem ya: ka ewe b͕ochie ihe-otiti a n'ebe ndi Israel nọ." 
1Chronicles21:23 Ọnan we si Devid, Were ya n'onwe-gi, ka onye-nwem, bú eze, me kwa ihe di nma n'anya-ya: le, enyewom gi ehi iji chu àjà-nsure-ọku, na ihe nzọcha-ọka ka ha buru nkú, na ọka wheat ka ọ buru onyinye-inata-iru-ọma; ihe nile ka m'nyeworo." 
1Chronicles21:24 Eze, bú Devid, we si Ọnan, É-è; kama aghaghm izuru ya n'ego zuru ezu o ruru: n'ihi na m'gaghi-ewere ihe i nwere ichuru Jehova àjà, m'gaghi-esure kwa àjà-nsure-ọku nke m'nētiyeghi ego ọ bula." 
1Chronicles21:25 Devid we nye Ọnan nnù shekel ọla-edo na ọgu iri n'ọtùtù iji zuru ebe ahu. 
1Chronicles21:26 Devid we wuere Jehova ebe-ichu-àjà n'ebe ahu, sure àjà-nsure-ọku na àjà-udo, kpọkue Jehova; Ọ we were ọku si n'elu-igwe za ya n'elu ebe-ichu-àjà nke àjà-nsure-ọku." 
1Chronicles21:27 Jehova we gwa mọ-ozi ahu; o we mighachi mma-agha-ya n'ọbọ-ya. 
1Chronicles21:28 Na mb͕e ahu, mb͕e Devid huru na Jehova zara ya n'ebe-nzọcha-ọka nke Ọnan onye Jebus, o we chua àjà n'ebe ahu." 
1Chronicles21:29 Ma ebe-obibi Jehova, nke Moses mere n'ọzara, na ebe-ichu-àjà nke àjà-nsure-ọku, di n'ebe di elu nime Gibeon na mb͕e ahu." 
1Chronicles21:30 Ma Devid apughi ije n'iru ya iju Chineke ase: n'ihi na ọ turu egwu nke-uku n'ihi mma-agha mọ-ozi nke Jehova. 
1Chronicles22:1 Devid we si, Nka bu ulo Jehova, bú Chineke, nka bu-kwa-ra Israel ebe-ichu-àjà nke àjà-nsure-ọku." 
1Chronicles22:2 Devid we si ka achikọta ndi-ọbìa ndi nọ n'ala Israel; o we guzo ndi nāwa nkume iwa nkume awaputara awaputa iwu ulo Chineke. 
1Chronicles22:3 Devid dozi-kwa-ra ígwè riri nne ikpuru ibo ọnu-uzọ-ama nile ǹtú, na ikpu ihe-njikọta nile; na ọla riri nne nke anātùghi atù;" 
1Chronicles22:4 na osisi cedar nādighi ọnu-ọgugu: n'ihi na ndi Zaidon na ndi Taia butere osisi cedar riri nne nye Devid. 
1Chronicles22:5 Devid we si, Solomon nwam bu nwata di kwa nrò, ma ulo ahu agēwuru Jehova, aghaghi ime ya ka ọ di uku kachasi ulo nile, ibu aha na ibu ihe mara nma diri ala nile: biko, ka m'doziere ya. Devid we dozie ri nne tutu ọ nwua." 
1Chronicles22:6 O we kpọ Solomon, bú nwa-ya, nye ya iwu iwuru Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, ulo." 
1Chronicles22:7 Devid we si Solomon nwa-ya, Mu onwem, ọ di n'obim iwuru aha Jehova, bú Chinekem, ulo." 
1Chronicles22:8 Okwu Jehova we ruem nti, si, I wusiwo ọbara ri nne, i buwo kwa agha uku di iche iche: i gaghi-ewuru aham ulo, n'ihi na i wusiwo ọtutu ọbara n'uwa n'irum:" 
1Chronicles22:9 le, agāmuru gi nwa-nwoke, onye ahu gābu nwoke izu-ike; M'gēme kwa ka o zuru ike pua n'aka ndi-iro-ya nile buruburu: n'ihi na Solomon ka aha-ya gābu, M'gēnye kwa Israel udo na idi-jū n'ubọchi-ya:" 
1Chronicles22:10 onye ahu gēwuru aham ulo; ya onwe-ya gāburum nwa, Mu onwem gābu-kwa-ra ya nna; M'gēme kwa ka oche-eze nke ala-eze-ya guzosie ike n'elu Israel rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi." 
1Chronicles22:11 Ub͕u a, nwam, ka Jehova nọyere gi; gi nwe kwa uche, wue ulo Jehova, bú Chineke-gi, dika O kwuworo bayere gi." 
1Chronicles22:12 Nání Jehova nye gi ezi uche na nghọta, nye gi iwu bayere Israel; ọbuná idebe iwu Jehova, bú Chineke-gi." 
1Chronicles22:13 Mb͕e ahu ka i gēnwe uche, ọ buru na i lezie anya ime ukpuru nile na ikpé nile nke Jehova nyere Moses n'iwu bayere Israel: di ike, nwe kwa ume; atula egwu, atu-kwa-la ujọ." 
1Chronicles22:14 Ma, le, na nwedam edoziworom ulo Jehova ọla-edo orú nnù talent uzọ iri-na-abua na nnù iri, na ọla-ọcha orú nnù talent ọgu uzọ isi na uzọ ise; ma ọla na ígwè enweghi ọtùtù; n'ihi na o riri nne: edoziwokwam osisi na nkume; i gātukwasi kwa ha ihe." 
1Chronicles22:15 Ndi nēje ozi ri-kwa-ra nne n'aka-gi, ndi nāwa nkume na osisi na ndi-ọ̀kà nkume na osisi, na ndi nile mara ihe n'ije-ozi ọ bula;" 
1Chronicles22:16 ọla-edo, na ọla-ọcha, na ọla, na ígwè, enweghi ọnu-ogugu; bilie, lua ọlu, ka Jehova nọyere kwa gi." 
1Chronicles22:17 Devid we nye ndi-isi nile nke Israel iwu iyere Solomon nwa-ya aka, si," 
1Chronicles22:18 Jehova, bú Chineke-unu, Ọ̀ nọyeghi unu? Ọ̀ meghi kwa ka unu zuru ike buruburu? n'ihi na Ọ nyewo n'akam ndi bi n'ala; ebudawo kwa ala n'iru Jehova, na n'iru ndi-Ya." 
1Chronicles22:19 Ub͕u a werenu obi-unu na nkpuru-obi-unu nye ichọ Jehova, bú Chineke-unu; bili-kwa-nu, wue ebe nsọ Jehova, bú Chineke, ibubata ib͕e ọb͕ub͕a-ndu Jehova, na ihe nsọ nile nke Chineke, n'ulo nke anēwuru aha Jehova." 
1Chronicles23:1 Ma Devid ghọrọ agadi, ubọchi ndu-ya ju-kwa-ra ya afọ, o we me Solomon, bú nwa-ya, eze Israel." 
1Chronicles23:2 O we chikọta ndi-isi nile nke Israel, ha na ndi-nchu-àjà na ndi Livai." 
1Chronicles23:3 Ewe gua ndi Livai ọnu site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ na iri we gaba n'iru: ọnu-ọgugu-ha, onye na isi-ya onye na isi-ya, ndikom di ike, di orú nnù uzọ anọ na nnù iri-na-ise." 
1Chronicles23:4 Nime ndia ndi ọlu-ha bu ichi achi n'ije-ozi ulo Jehova di orú nnù uzọ atọ; nnù ndikom iri-na-ise bu ndi-odozi-okwu na ndi-ikpe: 
1Chronicles23:5 nnù ndikom iri bu ndi-ọnu-uzọ; nnù ndikom iri nēto Jehova n'ihe m'mere iji to Ya, ka Devid kwuru." 
1Chronicles23:6 Devid we kè ha n'òkè, n'òkè, dika umu Livai si di; bú Giashon na Kohat, na Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Nke ndi Giashon; Ladan na Shimai. 
1Chronicles23:8 Umu-ndikom Ladan; onye-isi bu Jehiel, na Zitam, na Joel, atọ." 
1Chronicles23:8 Umu-ndikom Ladan; onye-isi bu Jehiel, na Zitam, na Joel, atọ." 
1Chronicles23:9 Umu-ndikom Shimai; Shel-omot, na Haziel, na Haran, atọ. Ndia bu ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna umu Ladan." 
1Chronicles23:10 Umu-ndikom Shimai kwa; Jahat, na Zina, na Jeush, na Beria. Anọ ndia bu umu Shimai." 
1Chronicles23:11 Jahat bu onye-isi, Ziza bu kwa nke-abua: ma Jeush na Beria enweghi ọtutu umu-ndikom; ha we ghọ otù ulo nna site n'igukọta ha n'otù." 
1Chronicles23:12 Umu-ndikom Kohat; Amram, na Izha, na Hebron, na Uziel, anọ." 
1Chronicles23:13 Umu-ndikom Amram; Eron na Moses: ewe kewapu Eron, ido ya nsọ ibu onye nsọ kachasi ndi nsọ nile, ya onwe-ya na umu-ya ndikom, rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi, isure ihe-nsure-ọku nēsì ísì utọ n'iru Jehova, ijere Ya ozi, na igọzi n'aha-Ya, rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi." 
1Chronicles23:14 Ma Moses, bú onye nke Chineke ahu, anākpọ umu-ya ndikom aha n'etiti ebo Livai." 
1Chronicles23:15 Umu-ndikom Moses; Giashom, na Elieza." 
1Chronicles23:16 Umu-ndikom Giashon; Shebuel, bú onye-isi." 
1Chronicles23:17 Umu-ndikom Elieza bu kwa Rehabia, bú onye-isi. Ma Elieza enweghi umu-ndikom ọzọ; ma umu-ndikom Rehabia bara uba nke-uku." 
1Chronicles23:18 Umu-ndikom Izha; Shelomit, bú onye-isi." 
1Chronicles23:19 Umu-ndikom Hebron; Jeria, bú onye-isi, na Amaraia, bú nke-abua, na Jehaziel, bú nke-atọ, na Jekameam, bú nke-anọ." 
1Chronicles23:20 Umu-ndikom Uziel; Maika, bú onye-isi, na Ishia, bú nke-abua." 
1Chronicles23:21 Umu-ndikom Merari; Mahli na Mushi. Umu-ndikom Mahli; Eleeza na Kish. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleeza we nwua, ma o nweghi umu-ndikom, ọ bu nání umu-ndinyom: umu-nne-ha, bú umu-ndikom Kish, we luru ha na nwunye." 
1Chronicles23:23 Umu-ndikom Mushi; Mahli, na Ida, na Jeremot, atọ." 
1Chronicles23:24 Ndia bu umu Livai dika ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha si di, bú ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna nke ndi-ha agukọtara, n'ọnu-ọgugu aha, onye na isi-ya onye na isi-ya, ndi nēje ozi ahu diri òfùfè ulo Jehova, site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ we gaba." 
1Chronicles23:25 N'ihi na Devid siri, Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, emewo ka ndi-Ya zuru ike; Ọ nēbi kwa nime Jerusalem rue mb͕e ebighi-ebi:" 
1Chronicles23:26 ọzọ kwa, ndi Livai agaghi-enwe ibūru ebe-obibi na ihe-ya nile diri òfùfè-ya." 
1Chronicles23:27 N'ihi na n'okwu ikpe-azu Devid ka edere ndia, bú ọnu-ọgugu umu-ndikom Livai site n'onye b͕ara orú arọ we gaba." 
1Chronicles23:28 N'ihi na ebe-nguzo-ha di n'akuku umu Eron ifè òfùfè ulo Jehova, n'ogige nile, na n'ime-ulo nile, na n'ime ka ihe nsọ ọ bula di ọcha, bú ọlu òfùfè ulo Chineke;" 
1Chronicles23:29 na idozi achicha anēdo n'usoro, na idozi utu oka flour iji nye onyinye-inata-iru-ọma, na idozi mbadamba-achicha ekoghi-eko, na idozi ihe esiri n'ite isi ihe, na idozi ihe edere edè, na idebe ihe ọ bula itù ihe di miri miri na ihe ọ bula itù ihe ọzọ;" 
1Chronicles23:30 na iguzo kwa-ututu ikele na ito Jehova, otú a kwa n'anyasi;" 
1Chronicles23:31 na isurere Jehova àjà-nsure-ọku nile, n'ubọchi-izu-ike nile, na n'ọnwa ọhu nile, na nime mb͕e nile akara àkà, n'ọnu-ọgugu dika ikpe ekpere ha si di, mb͕e nile n'iru Jehova:" 
1Chronicles23:32 ka ha we debe kwa ihe-ndebe ulo-ikwū nzute, na ihe-ndebe ebe nsọ ahu, na ihe-ndebe umu Eron, bú umu-nne-ha, bayere òfùfè ulo Jehova." 
1Chronicles24:1 Ekè-kwa-ra umu Eron òkè nile ha. Umu-ndikom Eron; Nedab, na Abaihu, na Eleeza, na Itama." 
1Chronicles24:2 Nedab na Abaihu we nwua n'iru nna-ha, ha enweghi kwa umu-ndikom: Eleeza na Itama we buru ndi-nchu-àjà." 
1Chronicles24:3 Devid we kè ha, ya na Zedok, onye sitere n'umu Eleeza, na Ahimelek, sitere n'umu Itama, dika ihe-nlekọta-ha si di n'òfùfè-ha." 
1Chronicles24:4 Ewe chọta ọtutu umu Eleeza ibu ndi-isi nke ndikom di ike kari umu Itama; ewe kè ha otú a: umu Eleeza nwere ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna iri na isi; umu Itama nwe-kwa-ra asatọ, dika ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha si di." 
1Chronicles24:5 Ewe kè ha n'ife-nzà, ndi Eleeza na ndi Itama n'otù; n'ihi na ndi-isi ebe nsọ di, na ndi-isi nke Chineke, ndi sitere n'umu Eleeza na n'etiti umu Itama." 
1Chronicles24:6 Shemaia nwa Netanel, bú ode-akwukwọ, onye sitere na ndi Livai, we de ha n'akwukwọ n'iru eze, na ndi-isi, na Zedok, bú onye-nchu-àjà, na Ahimelek nwa Abaiata, na ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna nke ndi-nchu-àjà na nke ndi Livai: otù ulo nna nke Eleeza ka ejidere, ejide-kwa-ra otù nke Itama." 
1Chronicles24:7 Ife-nzà mbu we putara Jehoiarib, nke-abua putara Jedaia;" 
1Chronicles24:8 nke-atọ putara Harim, nke-anọ putara Seorim;" 
1Chronicles24:9 nke-ise putara Malkija, nke-isi putara Mijamin;" 
1Chronicles24:10 nke-asa putara Hakoz, nke-asatọ putara Abaija;" 
1Chronicles24:11 nke-iteghete putara Jeshua, nke-iri putara Shekania;" 
1Chronicles24:12 nke-iri-na-otù putara Elaiashib, nke-iri-na-abua putara Jakim;" 
1Chronicles24:13 nke-iri-na-atọ putara Hupa, nke-iri-na-anọ putara Jeshebeab;" 
1Chronicles24:14 nke iri-na-ise putara Bilga, nke-iri-na-isi putara Imea;" 
1Chronicles24:15 nke-iri-na-asa putara Hezia, nke-iri-na-asatọ putara Hapizez;" 
1Chronicles24:16 nke-iri-na-iteghete putara Petahia, nke-orú putara Jehezkel;" 
1Chronicles24:17 nke-orú-na-otù putara Jakin, nke-orú-na-abua putara Gamul;" 
1Chronicles24:18 nke-orú-na-atọ putara Delaia, nke-orú-na-anọ putara Maazia." 
1Chronicles24:19 Ndia bu ihe-nlekọta-ha ifè òfùfè-ha, ibà n'ulo Jehova, dika ikpé-ha si di site n'aka Eron nna-ha, dika Jehova, bú Chineke Israel, nyere ya iwu." 
1Chronicles24:20 Ma nke umu Livai ndi fọduru: nke umu Amram, Shubael; nke umu Shubael, Jehdeia." 
1Chronicles24:21 Nke Rehabia: nke umu Rehabia, onye-isi bu Ishia." 
1Chronicles24:22 Nke ndi Izha, Shelomot; nke umu Shelomot, Jahat." 
1Chronicles24:23 Umu-ndikom Hebron kwa; Jeria, bú onye-isi, na Amaraia, bú nke-abua, na Jehaziel, bú nke-atọ, na Jekameam, bú nke-anọ." 
1Chronicles24:24 Umu-ndikom Uziel, Maika; nke umu-ndikom Maika, Shamia." 
1Chronicles24:25 Nwa-nne Maika, Ishia: nke umu-ndikom Ishia, Zekaraia." 
1Chronicles24:26 Umu-ndikom Merari; Mahli na Mushi: umu-ndikom Jaazia; Beno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Umu-ndikom Merari; nke Jaazia, Beno, na Shoham, na Zakua, na Ibri." 
1Chronicles24:28 Nke Mahli; Eleeza, onye nēnweghi umu-ndikom." 
1Chronicles24:29 Nke Kish; umu-ndikom Kish, Jerahmeel." 
1Chronicles24:30 Umu-ndikom Mushi kwa; Mahli, na Ida, na Jerimot. Ndia bu umu ndi Livai, dika ulo nke ndi bu nna-ha si di." 
1Chronicles24:31 Ndia fe-kwa-ra nzà, ọbuná dika umu-nne-ha, bú umu Eron, fere, n'iru Devid, bú eze, na Zedok, na Ahimelek, na ndi-isi ulo nke ndi bu nna nke ndi-nchu-àjà na nke ndi Livai; ulo nke ndi bu nna nke onye-isi ọbuná dika nke nwa-nne-ya nke-ntà."
